;;;121    {

;;;132    		 temp = temp / 1000000 + 1;

;;;133    	else temp = temp / 1000000;

;;;134    	SCLK = temp;

;;;137    	CCLK = temp;

;;;138    	
;;;139    	if(CCLK > 100)	CCLK = 100;

;;;140    	if(MCLK > 100)	MCLK = 100;

000104  7062              STRB     r2,[r4,#1]
                  |L1.262|

;;;143    	lpllOD_sclk = 3;
;;;144    	lpllOD_cclk = 2;
;;;145    	lpllOD_mclk = 2;
;;;146    	lpllR_sclk  = 5;

                  Memory_16bpp_Mode PROC
;;;1520   }
;;;1521   void Memory_16bpp_Mode(void)	
0001ec  b500              PUSH     {lr}
;;;1522   {
;;;1523   /*
;;;1524   Canvas imageˇ¦s color depth & memory R/W data width
;;;1525   In Block Mode:
;;;1526   00: 8bpp
;;;1527   01: 16bpp
;;;1528   1x: 24bpp
;;;1529   In Linear Mode:
;;;1530   X0: 8-bits memory data read/write.
;;;1531   X1: 16-bits memory data read/write
;;;1532   */
;;;1533   	uint8_t temp;
;;;1534   
;;;1535   	LCD_CmdWrite(0x5E);
0001ee  205e              MOVS     r0,#0x5e
0001f0  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_CmdWrite
;;;1536   	temp = LCD_DataRead();
0001f4  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_DataRead
;;;1537   	temp &= cClrb1;
0001f8  f00000fd          AND      r0,r0,#0xfd
;;;1538   	temp |= cSetb0;
0001fc  f0400001          ORR      r0,r0,#1
;;;1539   	LCD_DataWrite(temp);
000200  f85deb04          POP      {lr}
000204  e7fe              B        LCD_DataWrite
;;;1540   }
;;;1541   void Memory_Linear_Mode(void)	
                          ENDP

                  Memory_XY_Mode PROC
;;;1506   //5Eh]=========================================================================
;;;1507   void Memory_XY_Mode(void)

;;;1508   {
;;;1509   /*
;;;1510   Canvas addressing mode
;;;1511   0: Block mode (X-Y coordination addressing)
;;;1512   1: linear mode

                  LCD_VSYNC_Pulse_Width PROC
;;;1045   //[1Fh]=========================================================================
;;;1046   void LCD_VSYNC_Pulse_Width(uint16_t HY)
00021c  b500              PUSH     {lr}
;;;1047   {
;;;1048   /*
;;;1049   [1Fh] VSYNC Pulse Width[5:0]
;;;1050   The pulse width of VSYNC in lines.
;;;1051   VSYNC Pulse Width(Line) = (VPWR + 1)
;;;1052   */
;;;1053   	uint8_t temp;
;;;1054       temp=HY-1;
00021e  1e40              SUBS     r0,r0,#1
000220  b2c2              UXTB     r2,r0
;;;1055   	LCD_CmdWrite(0x1F);
000222  201f              MOVS     r0,#0x1f
000224  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_CmdWrite
;;;1056   	LCD_DataWrite(temp);
000228  4610              MOV      r0,r2
00022a  f85deb04          POP      {lr}
00022e  e7fe              B        LCD_DataWrite
;;;1057   }
;;;1058   //[20h][21h][22h][23h]=========================================================================
                          ENDP

                  LCD_VSYNC_Start_Position PROC
;;;1032   //[1Eh]=========================================================================
;;;1033   void LCD_VSYNC_Start_Position(uint16_t HY)
000230  b500              PUSH     {lr}
;;;1034   {
;;;1035   /*
;;;1036   [1Eh] VSYNC Start Position[7:0]
;;;1037   The starting position from the end of display area to the beginning of VSYNC.
;;;1038   VSYNC Start Position(Line) = (VSTR + 1)
;;;1039   */
;;;1040   	uint8_t temp;
;;;1041       temp=HY-1;
000232  1e40              SUBS     r0,r0,#1
000234  b2c2              UXTB     r2,r0
;;;1042   	LCD_CmdWrite(0x1E);
000236  201e              MOVS     r0,#0x1e
000238  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_CmdWrite
;;;1043   	LCD_DataWrite(temp);
00023c  4610              MOV      r0,r2
00023e  f85deb04          POP      {lr}
000242  e7fe              B        LCD_DataWrite
;;;1044   }
;;;1045   //[1Fh]=========================================================================
                          ENDP

                  LCD_Vertical_Non_Display PROC
;;;1014   //[1Ch][1Dh]=========================================================================
;;;1015   void LCD_Vertical_Non_Display(uint16_t HY)
000244  b500              PUSH     {lr}
;;;1016   {
;;;1017   /*
;;;1018   [1Ch] Vertical Non-Display Period Bit[7:0]
;;;1019   Vertical Non-Display Period(Line) = (VNDR + 1)
;;;1020   
;;;1021   [1Dh] Vertical Non-Display Period Bit[9:8]
;;;1022   Vertical Non-Display Period(Line) = (VNDR + 1)
;;;1023   */
;;;1024   	uint8_t temp;
;;;1025       temp=HY-1;
000246  1e40              SUBS     r0,r0,#1
000248  b2c2              UXTB     r2,r0
;;;1026   	LCD_CmdWrite(0x1C);
00024a  201c              MOVS     r0,#0x1c
00024c  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_CmdWrite
;;;1027   	LCD_DataWrite(temp);
000250  4610              MOV      r0,r2
000252  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_DataWrite
;;;1028   
;;;1029   	LCD_CmdWrite(0x1D);
000256  201d              MOVS     r0,#0x1d
000258  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_CmdWrite
;;;1030   	LCD_DataWrite(temp>>8);
00025c  2000              MOVS     r0,#0
00025e  f85deb04          POP      {lr}
000262  e7fe              B        LCD_DataWrite
;;;1031   }
;;;1032   //[1Eh]=========================================================================
                          ENDP

                  LCD_HSYNC_Pulse_Width PROC
;;;993    //[19h]=========================================================================
;;;994    void LCD_HSYNC_Pulse_Width(uint16_t WX)
000264  b500              PUSH     {lr}
;;;995    {
;;;996    /*
;;;997    [19h] HSYNC Pulse Width(HPW) [4:0]
;;;998    The period width of HSYNC.
;;;999    HSYNC Pulse Width(pixels) = (HPW + 1)x8
;;;1000   */
;;;1001   	uint8_t temp;
;;;1002   	if(WX<8)
000266  2808              CMP      r0,#8
000268  d206              BCS      |L1.632|
;;;1003   	{
;;;1004   	LCD_CmdWrite(0x19);
00026a  2019              MOVS     r0,#0x19
00026c  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_CmdWrite
;;;1005   	LCD_DataWrite(0x00);
000270  2000              MOVS     r0,#0
000272  f85deb04          POP      {lr}
000276  e7fe              B        LCD_DataWrite
                  |L1.632|
;;;1006   	}
;;;1007   	else
;;;1008   	{
;;;1009       temp=(WX/8)-1;
000278  21ff              MOVS     r1,#0xff
00027a  eb0100d0          ADD      r0,r1,r0,LSR #3
00027e  b2c2              UXTB     r2,r0
;;;1010   	LCD_CmdWrite(0x19);
000280  2019              MOVS     r0,#0x19
000282  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_CmdWrite
;;;1011   	LCD_DataWrite(temp);	
000286  4610              MOV      r0,r2
000288  f85deb04          POP      {lr}
00028c  e7fe              B        LCD_DataWrite
;;;1012   	}
;;;1013   }
;;;1014   //[1Ch][1Dh]=========================================================================
                          ENDP

                  LCD_HSYNC_Start_Position PROC
;;;970    //[18h]=========================================================================
;;;971    void LCD_HSYNC_Start_Position(uint16_t WX)
00028e  b500              PUSH     {lr}
;;;972    {
;;;973    /*
;;;974    [18h] HSYNC Start Position[4:0]
;;;975    The starting position from the end of display area to the
;;;976    beginning of HSYNC. Each level of this modulation is 8-pixel.
;;;977    Also called front porch.
;;;978    HSYNC Start Position(pixels) = (HSTR + 1)x8
;;;979    */
;;;980    	uint8_t temp;
;;;981    	if(WX<8)
000290  2808              CMP      r0,#8
000292  d206              BCS      |L1.674|
;;;982    	{
;;;983    	LCD_CmdWrite(0x18);
000294  2018              MOVS     r0,#0x18
000296  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_CmdWrite
;;;984    	LCD_DataWrite(0x00);
00029a  2000              MOVS     r0,#0
00029c  f85deb04          POP      {lr}
0002a0  e7fe              B        LCD_DataWrite
                  |L1.674|
;;;985    	}
;;;986    	else
;;;987    	{
;;;988        temp=(WX/8)-1;
0002a2  21ff              MOVS     r1,#0xff
0002a4  eb0100d0          ADD      r0,r1,r0,LSR #3
0002a8  b2c2              UXTB     r2,r0
;;;989    	LCD_CmdWrite(0x18);
0002aa  2018              MOVS     r0,#0x18
0002ac  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_CmdWrite
;;;990    	LCD_DataWrite(temp);	
0002b0  4610              MOV      r0,r2
0002b2  f85deb04          POP      {lr}
0002b6  e7fe              B        LCD_DataWrite
;;;991    	}
;;;992    }
;;;993    //[19h]=========================================================================
                          ENDP

                  LCD_Horizontal_Non_Display PROC
;;;935    ////[16h][17h]=========================================================================
;;;936    void LCD_Horizontal_Non_Display(uint16_t WX)
0002b8  b500              PUSH     {lr}
;;;937    {
0002ba  4602              MOV      r2,r0
;;;938    /*
;;;939    [16h] Horizontal Non-Display Period(HNDR) Bit[4:0]
;;;940    This register specifies the horizontal non-display period. Also
;;;941    called back porch.
;;;942    Horizontal non-display period(pixels) = (HNDR + 1) * 8 + HNDFTR
;;;943    
;;;944    [17h] Horizontal Non-Display Period Fine Tuning(HNDFT) [3:0]
;;;945    This register specifies the fine tuning for horizontal non-display
;;;946    period; it is used to support the SYNC mode panel. Each level of
;;;947    this modulation is 1-pixel.
;;;948    Horizontal non-display period(pixels) = (HNDR + 1) * 8 + HNDFTR
;;;949    */
;;;950    	uint8_t temp;
;;;951    	if(WX<8)
0002bc  2a08              CMP      r2,#8
0002be  d20c              BCS      |L1.730|
;;;952    	{
;;;953    	LCD_CmdWrite(0x16);
0002c0  2016              MOVS     r0,#0x16
0002c2  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_CmdWrite
;;;954    	LCD_DataWrite(0x00);
0002c6  2000              MOVS     r0,#0
0002c8  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_DataWrite
;;;955        
;;;956    	LCD_CmdWrite(0x17);
0002cc  2017              MOVS     r0,#0x17
0002ce  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_CmdWrite
;;;957    	LCD_DataWrite(WX);
0002d2  b2d0              UXTB     r0,r2
0002d4  f85deb04          POP      {lr}
0002d8  e7fe              B        LCD_DataWrite
                  |L1.730|
;;;958    	}
;;;959    	else
;;;960    	{
;;;961        temp=(WX/8)-1;
0002da  20ff              MOVS     r0,#0xff
0002dc  eb0000d2          ADD      r0,r0,r2,LSR #3
0002e0  b2c3              UXTB     r3,r0
;;;962    	LCD_CmdWrite(0x16);
0002e2  2016              MOVS     r0,#0x16
0002e4  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_CmdWrite
;;;963    	LCD_DataWrite(temp);
0002e8  4618              MOV      r0,r3
0002ea  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_DataWrite
;;;964        
;;;965        temp=WX%8;
0002ee  f0020207          AND      r2,r2,#7
;;;966    	LCD_CmdWrite(0x17);
0002f2  2017              MOVS     r0,#0x17
0002f4  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_CmdWrite
;;;967    	LCD_DataWrite(temp);
0002f8  4610              MOV      r0,r2
0002fa  f85deb04          POP      {lr}
0002fe  e7fe              B        LCD_DataWrite
;;;968    	}	
;;;969    }
;;;970    //[18h]=========================================================================
                          ENDP

                  LCD_HorizontalWidth_VerticalHeight PROC
;;;884    
;;;885    void LCD_HorizontalWidth_VerticalHeight(uint16_t WX,uint16_t HY)
000300  b530              PUSH     {r4,r5,lr}
;;;886    {
000302  4602              MOV      r2,r0
;;;887    /*
;;;888    [14h] Horizontal Display Width Setting Bit[7:0]
;;;889    [15h] Horizontal Display Width Fine Tuning (HDWFT) [3:0]
;;;890    The register specifies the LCD panel horizontal display width in
;;;891    the unit of 8 pixels resolution.
;;;892    Horizontal display width(pixels) = (HDWR + 1) * 8 + HDWFTR
;;;893    
;;;894    [1Ah] Vertical Display Height Bit[7:0]
;;;895    Vertical Display Height(Line) = VDHR + 1
;;;896    [1Bh] Vertical Display Height Bit[10:8]
;;;897    Vertical Display Height(Line) = VDHR + 1
;;;898    */
;;;899    	uint8_t temp;
;;;900    	if(WX<8)
;;;901        {
;;;902    	LCD_CmdWrite(0x14);
;;;903    	LCD_DataWrite(0x00);
;;;904        
;;;905    	LCD_CmdWrite(0x15);
;;;906    	LCD_DataWrite(WX);
;;;907        
;;;908        temp=HY-1;
000304  1e4c              SUBS     r4,r1,#1
;;;909    	LCD_CmdWrite(0x1A);
;;;910    	LCD_DataWrite(temp);
;;;911    	    
;;;912    	temp=(HY-1)>>8;
000306  f3c42307          UBFX     r3,r4,#8,#8
00030a  2a08              CMP      r2,#8                 ;900
00030c  d219              BCS      |L1.834|
00030e  2014              MOVS     r0,#0x14              ;902
000310  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_CmdWrite
000314  2000              MOVS     r0,#0                 ;903
000316  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_DataWrite
00031a  2015              MOVS     r0,#0x15              ;905
00031c  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_CmdWrite
000320  b2d0              UXTB     r0,r2                 ;906
000322  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_DataWrite
000326  b2e2              UXTB     r2,r4                 ;908
000328  201a              MOVS     r0,#0x1a              ;909
00032a  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_CmdWrite
00032e  4610              MOV      r0,r2                 ;910
000330  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_DataWrite
;;;913    	LCD_CmdWrite(0x1B);
000334  201b              MOVS     r0,#0x1b
000336  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_CmdWrite
;;;914    	LCD_DataWrite(temp);
00033a  e8bd4030          POP      {r4,r5,lr}
00033e  4618              MOV      r0,r3
000340  e7fe              B        LCD_DataWrite
                  |L1.834|
;;;915    	}
;;;916    	else
;;;917    	{
;;;918        temp=(WX/8)-1;
000342  20ff              MOVS     r0,#0xff
000344  eb0000d2          ADD      r0,r0,r2,LSR #3
000348  b2c5              UXTB     r5,r0
;;;919    	LCD_CmdWrite(0x14);
00034a  2014              MOVS     r0,#0x14
00034c  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_CmdWrite
;;;920    	LCD_DataWrite(temp);
000350  4628              MOV      r0,r5
000352  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_DataWrite
;;;921        
;;;922        temp=WX%8;
000356  f0020207          AND      r2,r2,#7
;;;923    	LCD_CmdWrite(0x15);
00035a  2015              MOVS     r0,#0x15
00035c  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_CmdWrite
;;;924    	LCD_DataWrite(temp);
000360  4610              MOV      r0,r2
000362  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_DataWrite
;;;925        
;;;926        temp=HY-1;
000366  b2e2              UXTB     r2,r4
;;;927    	LCD_CmdWrite(0x1A);
000368  201a              MOVS     r0,#0x1a
00036a  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_CmdWrite
;;;928    	LCD_DataWrite(temp);
00036e  4610              MOV      r0,r2
000370  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_DataWrite
;;;929    	    
;;;930    	temp=(HY-1)>>8;
;;;931    	LCD_CmdWrite(0x1B);
000374  201b              MOVS     r0,#0x1b
000376  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_CmdWrite
;;;932    	LCD_DataWrite(temp);
00037a  e8bd4030          POP      {r4,r5,lr}
00037e  4618              MOV      r0,r3
000380  e7fe              B        LCD_DataWrite
;;;933    	}
;;;934    }
;;;935    ////[16h][17h]=========================================================================
                          ENDP

                  DE_High_Active PROC
;;;867    
;;;868    void DE_High_Active(void)
000382  b500              PUSH     {lr}
;;;869    {
;;;870    /*	
;;;871    DE Polarity
;;;872    0 : High active.
;;;873    1 : Low active.
;;;874    */
;;;875    	uint8_t temp;
;;;876    	
;;;877    	LCD_CmdWrite(0x13);
000384  2013              MOVS     r0,#0x13
000386  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_CmdWrite
;;;878    	temp = LCD_DataRead();
00038a  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_DataRead
;;;879    	temp &= cClrb5;
00038e  f00000df          AND      r0,r0,#0xdf
;;;880    	LCD_DataWrite(temp);
000392  f85deb04          POP      {lr}
000396  e7fe              B        LCD_DataWrite
;;;881    }
;;;882    
                          ENDP

                  VSYNC_Low_Active PROC

;;;857    0 : Low active.
;;;858    1 : High active.
;;;859    */

;;;861

00039c  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_CmdWrite
;;;863    	temp = LCD_DataRead();
0003a0  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_DataRead
;;;864    	temp &= cClrb6;	
0003a4  f00000bf          AND      r0,r0,#0xbf
;;;865    	LCD_DataWrite(temp);
0003a8  f85deb04          POP      {lr}
0003ac  e7fe              B        LCD_DataWrite
;;;866    }
;;;867    
                          ENDP

                  HSYNC_Low_Active PROC
;;;837    ////[13h]=========================================================================

;;;851    }

                          ENDP

                  PDATA_Set_RGB PROC
;;;816    }
;;;817    void PDATA_Set_RGB(void)
0003c4  b500              PUSH     {lr}
;;;818    {
;;;819    /*	
;;;820    parallel PDATA[23:0] Output Sequence
;;;821    000b : RGB.
;;;822    001b : RBG.
;;;823    010b : GRB.
;;;824    011b : GBR.
;;;825    100b : BRG.
;;;826    101b : BGR.
;;;827    */
;;;828    	uint8_t temp;
;;;829    	
;;;830    	LCD_CmdWrite(0x12);
0003c6  2012              MOVS     r0,#0x12
0003c8  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_CmdWrite
;;;831    	temp = LCD_DataRead();
0003cc  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_DataRead
;;;832      temp &=0xf8;
0003d0  f00000f8          AND      r0,r0,#0xf8
;;;833    	temp |=0x05;
0003d4  f0400005          ORR      r0,r0,#5
;;;834    	LCD_DataWrite(temp);
0003d8  f85deb04          POP      {lr}
0003dc  e7fe              B        LCD_DataWrite
;;;835    }
;;;836    
                          ENDP

                  VSCAN_T_to_B PROC
;;;801    }
;;;802    void VSCAN_T_to_B(void)
0003de  b500              PUSH     {lr}
;;;803    {
;;;804    /*	
;;;805    Vertical Scan direction
;;;806    0 : From Top to Bottom
;;;807    1 : From bottom to Top
;;;808    PIP window will be disabled when VDIR set as 1.
;;;809    */
;;;810    	uint8_t temp;
;;;811    	
;;;812    	LCD_CmdWrite(0x12);
0003e0  2012              MOVS     r0,#0x12
0003e2  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_CmdWrite
;;;813    	temp = LCD_DataRead();
0003e6  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_DataRead
;;;814    	temp &= cClrb3;
0003ea  f00000f7          AND      r0,r0,#0xf7
;;;815    	LCD_DataWrite(temp);
0003ee  f85deb04          POP      {lr}
0003f2  e7fe              B        LCD_DataWrite
                  |L1.1012|
                          DCD      0x60040000
                  |L1.1016|
                          DCD      0x400048f8
                  |L1.1020|
                          DCD      0x036083a0
                  |L1.1024|
                          DCD      0x000f4240
                  |L1.1028|
                          DCD      0x000186a0
                  |L1.1032|
                          DCD      ||.data||
                          ENDP

                  PCLK_Falling PROC
;;;732    
;;;733    void PCLK_Falling(void)
00040c  b500              PUSH     {lr}
;;;734    {
;;;735    /*
;;;736    PCLK Inversion
;;;737    0: PDAT, DE, HSYNC etc. Drive(/ change) at PCLK falling edge.
;;;738    1: PDAT, DE, HSYNC etc. Drive(/ change) at PCLK rising edge.
;;;739    */
;;;740    	uint8_t temp;
;;;741    	LCD_CmdWrite(0x12);
00040e  2012              MOVS     r0,#0x12
000410  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_CmdWrite
;;;742    	temp = LCD_DataRead();
000414  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_DataRead
000418  b2c0              UXTB     r0,r0
;;;743        temp |= cSetb7;
00041a  f0400080          ORR      r0,r0,#0x80
;;;744    	LCD_DataWrite(temp);
00041e  f85deb04          POP      {lr}
000422  e7fe              B        LCD_DataWrite
;;;745    }
;;;746    void Display_ON(void)
                          ENDP

                  Memory_Select_SDRAM PROC
;;;513    }
;;;514    void Memory_Select_SDRAM(void)

;;;515    {
;;;516    	uint8_t temp;
;;;517    	LCD_CmdWrite(0x03);
000426  2003              MOVS     r0,#3
000428  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_CmdWrite
;;;518    	temp = LCD_DataRead();
00042c  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_DataRead
;;;519        temp &= cClrb1;
000430  f00000fd          AND      r0,r0,#0xfd
;;;520        temp &= cClrb0;	// B
000434  f00000fe          AND      r0,r0,#0xfe
;;;521    	LCD_DataWrite(temp);
000438  f85deb04          POP      {lr}
00043c  e7fe              B        LCD_DataWrite
;;;522    }
;;;523    void Memory_Select_Graphic_Cursor_RAM(void)
                          ENDP

                  MemWrite_Left_Right_Top_Down PROC
;;;487    
;;;488    void MemWrite_Left_Right_Top_Down(void)
000454  b500              PUSH     {lr}
;;;489    {
;;;490    	uint8_t temp;

000458  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_CmdWrite
;;;492    	temp = LCD_DataRead();
00045c  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_DataRead
;;;493    	temp &= cClrb2;
000460  f00000fb          AND      r0,r0,#0xfb
;;;494    	temp &= cClrb1;
000464  f00000fd          AND      r0,r0,#0xfd
;;;495    	LCD_DataWrite(temp);

00046c  e7fe              B        LCD_DataWrite

                  RGB_16b_16bpp PROC
;;;477    
;;;478    void RGB_16b_16bpp(void)
00046e  b500              PUSH     {lr}
;;;479    {
;;;480    	uint8_t temp;
;;;481    	LCD_CmdWrite(0x02);
000470  2002              MOVS     r0,#2
000472  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_CmdWrite
;;;482    	temp = LCD_DataRead();
000476  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_DataRead
;;;483    	temp &= cClrb7;
00047a  f000007f          AND      r0,r0,#0x7f
;;;484    	temp |= cSetb6;
00047e  f0400040          ORR      r0,r0,#0x40
;;;485    	LCD_DataWrite(temp);
000482  f85deb04          POP      {lr}
000486  e7fe              B        LCD_DataWrite
;;;486    }
;;;487    
                          ENDP

                  Host_Bus_16bit PROC
;;;463    }
;;;464    void Host_Bus_16bit(void)
000488  b500              PUSH     {lr}
;;;465    {
;;;466    /*  Parallel Host Data Bus Width Selection
;;;467        0: 8-bit Parallel Host Data Bus.
;;;468        1: 16-bit Parallel Host Data Bus.*/
;;;469    	uint8_t temp;
;;;470    	LCD_CmdWrite(0x01);
00048a  2001              MOVS     r0,#1
00048c  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_CmdWrite
;;;471    	temp = LCD_DataRead();
000490  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_DataRead
000494  b2c0              UXTB     r0,r0
;;;472    	temp |= cSetb0;
000496  f0400001          ORR      r0,r0,#1
;;;473    	LCD_DataWrite(temp);
00049a  f85deb04          POP      {lr}
00049e  e7fe              B        LCD_DataWrite
;;;474    }
;;;475    
                          ENDP

                  TFT_16bit PROC
;;;425    
;;;426    void TFT_16bit(void)
0004a0  b500              PUSH     {lr}
;;;427    {
;;;428    /*  00b: 24-bits output.
;;;429        01b: 18-bits output, unused pins are set as GPIO.
;;;430        10b: 16-bits output, unused pins are set as GPIO.
;;;431        11b: LVDS, all 24-bits unused output pins are set as GPIO.*/
;;;432    	uint8_t temp;
;;;433    	LCD_CmdWrite(0x01);
0004a2  2001              MOVS     r0,#1
0004a4  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_CmdWrite
;;;434    	temp = LCD_DataRead();
0004a8  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_DataRead
;;;435    	temp |= cSetb4;
0004ac  f0400010          ORR      r0,r0,#0x10
;;;436        temp &= cClrb3;
0004b0  f00000f7          AND      r0,r0,#0xf7
;;;437    	LCD_DataWrite(temp);  
0004b4  f85deb04          POP      {lr}
0004b8  e7fe              B        LCD_DataWrite
;;;438    }
;;;439    
                          ENDP

                  Set_LCD_Panel PROC
;;;191    
;;;192    void Set_LCD_Panel(void)
0004ba  b500              PUSH     {lr}
;;;193    {
;;;194    	//**[01h]**//   
;;;195    	TFT_16bit();	
0004bc  f7fffffe          BL       TFT_16bit
;;;196    	//TFT_18bit();
;;;197    	//TFT_24bit(); 
;;;198    	
;;;199    	Host_Bus_16bit();	//Ö÷»ú×ÜĎß16bit
0004c0  f7fffffe          BL       Host_Bus_16bit
;;;200          
;;;201    	//**[02h]**//
;;;202    	RGB_16b_16bpp();
0004c4  f7fffffe          BL       RGB_16b_16bpp
;;;203    	//RGB_16b_24bpp_mode1();
;;;204    	MemWrite_Left_Right_Top_Down();	
0004c8  f7fffffe          BL       MemWrite_Left_Right_Top_Down
;;;205    	//MemWrite_Down_Top_Left_Right();
;;;206          
;;;207    	//**[03h]**//
;;;208    	Graphic_Mode();
0004cc  f7fffffe          BL       Graphic_Mode
;;;209    	Memory_Select_SDRAM();
0004d0  f7fffffe          BL       Memory_Select_SDRAM
;;;210         
;;;211    	PCLK_Falling();	       	//REG[12h]:ĎÂ˝µŃŘ 
0004d4  f7fffffe          BL       PCLK_Falling
;;;212    	//PCLK_Rising();
;;;213    	
;;;214    	VSCAN_T_to_B();	        //REG[12h]:´ÓÉĎµ˝ĎÂ
0004d8  f7fffffe          BL       VSCAN_T_to_B
;;;215    	//VSCAN_B_to_T();				//´ÓĎÂµ˝ÉĎ
;;;216    	
;;;217    	PDATA_Set_RGB();        //REG[12h]:Select RGB output
0004dc  f7fffffe          BL       PDATA_Set_RGB
;;;218    	//PDATA_Set_RBG();
;;;219    	//PDATA_Set_GRB();
;;;220    	//PDATA_Set_GBR();
;;;221    	//PDATA_Set_BRG();
;;;222    	//PDATA_Set_BGR();
;;;223    
;;;224    	HSYNC_Low_Active();     //REG[13h]:		  
0004e0  f7fffffe          BL       HSYNC_Low_Active
;;;225    	//HSYNC_High_Active();
;;;226    	
;;;227    	VSYNC_Low_Active();     //REG[13h]:			
0004e4  f7fffffe          BL       VSYNC_Low_Active
;;;228    	//VSYNC_High_Active();
;;;229    	
;;;230    	DE_High_Active();       //REG[13h]:	
0004e8  f7fffffe          BL       DE_High_Active
;;;231    	//DE_Low_Active();
;;;232     
;;;233    	LCD_HorizontalWidth_VerticalHeight(LCD_XSIZE_TFT ,LCD_YSIZE_TFT);	
0004ec  f44f7116          MOV      r1,#0x258
0004f0  f44f6080          MOV      r0,#0x400
0004f4  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_HorizontalWidth_VerticalHeight
;;;234    	LCD_Horizontal_Non_Display(LCD_HBPD);	                            
0004f8  20a0              MOVS     r0,#0xa0
0004fa  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_Horizontal_Non_Display
;;;235    	LCD_HSYNC_Start_Position(LCD_HFPD);	                              
0004fe  20a0              MOVS     r0,#0xa0
000500  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_HSYNC_Start_Position
;;;236    	LCD_HSYNC_Pulse_Width(LCD_HSPW);		                            	
000504  2078              MOVS     r0,#0x78
000506  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_HSYNC_Pulse_Width
;;;237    	LCD_Vertical_Non_Display(LCD_VBPD);	                                
00050a  2017              MOVS     r0,#0x17
00050c  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_Vertical_Non_Display
;;;238    	LCD_VSYNC_Start_Position(LCD_VFPD);	                              
000510  200c              MOVS     r0,#0xc
000512  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_VSYNC_Start_Position
;;;239    	LCD_VSYNC_Pulse_Width(LCD_VSPW);		                            	
000516  200a              MOVS     r0,#0xa
000518  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_VSYNC_Pulse_Width
;;;240    
;;;241    	Memory_XY_Mode();	//Block mode (X-Y coordination addressing);żéÄŁĘ˝
00051c  f7fffffe          BL       Memory_XY_Mode
;;;242    	Memory_16bpp_Mode();	
000520  f85deb04          POP      {lr}
000524  e7fe              B        Memory_16bpp_Mode
;;;243    }
;;;244    
                          ENDP

                  LT768_initial PROC
;;;245    void LT768_initial(void)

;;;246    {
;;;247      LT768_PLL_Initial();
000528  f7fffffe          BL       LT768_PLL_Initial
;;;248      LT768_SDRAM_initail(MCLK);
00052c  48fc              LDR      r0,|L1.2336|
00052e  7840              LDRB     r0,[r0,#1]  ; MCLK
000530  f7fffffe          BL       LT768_SDRAM_initail
;;;249      Set_LCD_Panel();

000538  e7fe              B        Set_LCD_Panel
;;;250    }
;;;251    
                          ENDP

                  LT768_Init PROC
;;;252    
;;;253    void LT768_Init(void)
00053a  b500              PUSH     {lr}
;;;254    {
;;;255    	Delay_ms(100);                    //delay for LT768 power on
00053c  2064              MOVS     r0,#0x64
00053e  f7fffffe          BL       Delay_ms
;;;256    	LT768_HW_Reset();                 //LT768¸´Î»
000542  f7fffffe          BL       LT768_HW_Reset
;;;257    	System_Check_Temp();	            //Ľě˛â¸´Î»ĘÇ·ńłÉą¦
000546  f7fffffe          BL       System_Check_Temp
;;;258    	Delay_ms(100);
00054a  2064              MOVS     r0,#0x64
00054c  f7fffffe          BL       Delay_ms
                  |L1.1360|
;;;259    	while(LCD_StatusRead()&0x02);	    //Initial_Display_test	and  set SW2 pin2 = 1
000550  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_StatusRead
000554  0780              LSLS     r0,r0,#30
000556  d4fb              BMI      |L1.1360|
;;;260    	LT768_initial();
000558  f85deb04          POP      {lr}
00055c  e7fe              B        LT768_initial
;;;261    }
;;;262    
                          ENDP

                  Stop_PWM0 PROC
;;;2444   }
;;;2445   void Stop_PWM0(void)
00055e  b500              PUSH     {lr}
;;;2446   {
;;;2447   /*
;;;2448   PWM Timer 0 start/stop
;;;2449   Determine start/stop for Timer 0. 
;;;2450   0 = Stop 
;;;2451   1 = Start for Timer 0
;;;2452   */
;;;2453   	uint8_t temp;
;;;2454   	LCD_CmdWrite(0x86);
000560  2086              MOVS     r0,#0x86
000562  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_CmdWrite
;;;2455   	temp = LCD_DataRead();
000566  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_DataRead
;;;2456   	temp &= cClrb0;
00056a  f00000fe          AND      r0,r0,#0xfe
;;;2457   	LCD_DataWrite(temp);
00056e  f85deb04          POP      {lr}
000572  e7fe              B        LCD_DataWrite
;;;2458   }
;;;2459   //[87h]=========================================================================
                          ENDP

                  Start_PWM0 PROC
;;;2430   //[86h]PWM0
;;;2431   void Start_PWM0(void)
000574  b500              PUSH     {lr}
;;;2432   {
;;;2433   /*
;;;2434   PWM Timer 0 start/stop
;;;2435   Determine start/stop for Timer 0. 
;;;2436   0 = Stop 
;;;2437   1 = Start for Timer 0
;;;2438   */
;;;2439   	uint8_t temp;
;;;2440   	LCD_CmdWrite(0x86);
000576  2086              MOVS     r0,#0x86
000578  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_CmdWrite
;;;2441   	temp = LCD_DataRead();
00057c  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_DataRead
000580  b2c0              UXTB     r0,r0
;;;2442   	temp |= cSetb0;
000582  f0400001          ORR      r0,r0,#1
;;;2443   	LCD_DataWrite(temp);
000586  f85deb04          POP      {lr}
00058a  e7fe              B        LCD_DataWrite
;;;2444   }
;;;2445   void Stop_PWM0(void)
                          ENDP

                  Set_Timer0_Compare_Buffer PROC
;;;2460   //[88h][89h]=========================================================================
;;;2461   void Set_Timer0_Compare_Buffer(uint16_t WX)
00058c  b500              PUSH     {lr}
;;;2462   {
00058e  4602              MOV      r2,r0
;;;2463   /*
;;;2464   Timer 0 compare buffer register
;;;2465   Compare buffer register total has 16 bits.
;;;2466   When timer counter equal or less than compare buffer register will cause PWM out
;;;2467   high level if inv_on bit is off.
;;;2468   */
;;;2469   	LCD_CmdWrite(0x88);
000590  2088              MOVS     r0,#0x88
000592  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_CmdWrite
;;;2470   	LCD_DataWrite(WX);
000596  b2d0              UXTB     r0,r2
000598  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_DataWrite
;;;2471   	LCD_CmdWrite(0x89);
00059c  2089              MOVS     r0,#0x89
00059e  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_CmdWrite
;;;2472   	LCD_DataWrite(WX>>8);
0005a2  0a10              LSRS     r0,r2,#8
0005a4  f85deb04          POP      {lr}
0005a8  e7fe              B        LCD_DataWrite
;;;2473   }
;;;2474   //[8Ah][8Bh]=========================================================================
                          ENDP

                  Set_Timer0_Count_Buffer PROC
;;;2475   void Set_Timer0_Count_Buffer(uint16_t WX)
0005aa  b500              PUSH     {lr}
;;;2476   {
0005ac  4602              MOV      r2,r0
;;;2477   /*
;;;2478   Timer 0 count buffer register
;;;2479   Count buffer register total has 16 bits.
;;;2480   When timer counter equal to 0 will cause PWM timer reload Count buffer register if reload_en bit set as enable.
;;;2481   It may read back timer counterˇ¦s real time value when PWM timer start.
;;;2482   */
;;;2483   	LCD_CmdWrite(0x8A);
0005ae  208a              MOVS     r0,#0x8a
0005b0  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_CmdWrite
;;;2484   	LCD_DataWrite(WX);
0005b4  b2d0              UXTB     r0,r2
0005b6  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_DataWrite
;;;2485   	LCD_CmdWrite(0x8B);
0005ba  208b              MOVS     r0,#0x8b
0005bc  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_CmdWrite
;;;2486   	LCD_DataWrite(WX>>8);
0005c0  0a10              LSRS     r0,r2,#8
0005c2  f85deb04          POP      {lr}
0005c6  e7fe              B        LCD_DataWrite
;;;2487   }
;;;2488   //[8Ch][8Dh]=========================================================================
                          ENDP

                  Select_PWM0_Clock_Divided_By_8 PROC
;;;2340   }
;;;2341   void Select_PWM0_Clock_Divided_By_8(void)
0005c8  b500              PUSH     {lr}
;;;2342   {
;;;2343   /*
;;;2344   Select MUX input for PWM Timer 0.
;;;2345   00 = 1; 01 = 1/2; 10 = 1/4 ; 11 = 1/8;
;;;2346   */
;;;2347   	uint8_t temp;
;;;2348   	
;;;2349   	LCD_CmdWrite(0x85);
0005ca  2085              MOVS     r0,#0x85
0005cc  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_CmdWrite
;;;2350   	temp = LCD_DataRead();
0005d0  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_DataRead
0005d4  b2c0              UXTB     r0,r0
;;;2351   	temp |= cSetb5;
0005d6  f0400020          ORR      r0,r0,#0x20
;;;2352   	temp |= cSetb4;
0005da  f0400010          ORR      r0,r0,#0x10
;;;2353   	LCD_DataWrite(temp);
0005de  f85deb04          POP      {lr}
0005e2  e7fe              B        LCD_DataWrite
;;;2354   }
;;;2355   //[85h].[bit3][bit2]=========================================================================
                          ENDP

                  Select_PWM0_Clock_Divided_By_4 PROC
;;;2326   }
;;;2327   void Select_PWM0_Clock_Divided_By_4(void)
0005e4  b500              PUSH     {lr}
;;;2328   {
;;;2329   /*
;;;2330   Select MUX input for PWM Timer 0.
;;;2331   00 = 1; 01 = 1/2; 10 = 1/4 ; 11 = 1/8;
;;;2332   */
;;;2333   	uint8_t temp;
;;;2334   	
;;;2335   	LCD_CmdWrite(0x85);
0005e6  2085              MOVS     r0,#0x85
0005e8  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_CmdWrite
;;;2336   	temp = LCD_DataRead();
0005ec  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_DataRead
;;;2337   	temp |= cSetb5;
0005f0  f0400020          ORR      r0,r0,#0x20
;;;2338   	temp &= cClrb4;
0005f4  f00000ef          AND      r0,r0,#0xef
;;;2339   	LCD_DataWrite(temp);
0005f8  f85deb04          POP      {lr}
0005fc  e7fe              B        LCD_DataWrite
;;;2340   }
;;;2341   void Select_PWM0_Clock_Divided_By_8(void)
                          ENDP

                  Select_PWM0_Clock_Divided_By_2 PROC
;;;2312   }
;;;2313   void Select_PWM0_Clock_Divided_By_2(void)
0005fe  b500              PUSH     {lr}
;;;2314   {
;;;2315   /*
;;;2316   Select MUX input for PWM Timer 0.
;;;2317   00 = 1; 01 = 1/2; 10 = 1/4 ; 11 = 1/8;
;;;2318   */
;;;2319   	uint8_t temp;
;;;2320   	
;;;2321   	LCD_CmdWrite(0x85);
000600  2085              MOVS     r0,#0x85
000602  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_CmdWrite
;;;2322   	temp = LCD_DataRead();
000606  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_DataRead
;;;2323   	temp &= cClrb5;
00060a  f00000df          AND      r0,r0,#0xdf
;;;2324   	temp |= cSetb4;
00060e  f0400010          ORR      r0,r0,#0x10
;;;2325   	LCD_DataWrite(temp);
000612  f85deb04          POP      {lr}
000616  e7fe              B        LCD_DataWrite
;;;2326   }
;;;2327   void Select_PWM0_Clock_Divided_By_4(void)
                          ENDP

                  Select_PWM0_Clock_Divided_By_1 PROC
;;;2298   }
;;;2299   void Select_PWM0_Clock_Divided_By_1(void)
000618  b500              PUSH     {lr}
;;;2300   {
;;;2301   /*
;;;2302   Select MUX input for PWM Timer 0.
;;;2303   00 = 1; 01 = 1/2; 10 = 1/4 ; 11 = 1/8;
;;;2304   */
;;;2305   	uint8_t temp;
;;;2306   	
;;;2307   	LCD_CmdWrite(0x85);
00061a  2085              MOVS     r0,#0x85
00061c  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_CmdWrite
;;;2308   	temp = LCD_DataRead();
000620  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_DataRead
;;;2309   	temp &= cClrb5;
000624  f00000df          AND      r0,r0,#0xdf
;;;2310   	temp &= cClrb4;
000628  f00000ef          AND      r0,r0,#0xef
;;;2311   	LCD_DataWrite(temp);
00062c  f85deb04          POP      {lr}
000630  e7fe              B        LCD_DataWrite
;;;2312   }
;;;2313   void Select_PWM0_Clock_Divided_By_2(void)
                          ENDP

                  Set_PWM_Prescaler_1_to_256 PROC
;;;2230   //[84h]=========================================================================
;;;2231   void Set_PWM_Prescaler_1_to_256(uint16_t WX)
000632  b500              PUSH     {lr}
;;;2232   {
;;;2233   /*
;;;2234   PWM Prescaler Register
;;;2235   These 8 bits determine prescaler value for Timer 0 and 1.
;;;2236   Time base is ˇ§Core_Freq / (Prescaler + 1)ˇ¨
;;;2237   */
;;;2238   	WX=WX-1;
000634  1e42              SUBS     r2,r0,#1
;;;2239   	LCD_CmdWrite(0x84);
000636  2084              MOVS     r0,#0x84
000638  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_CmdWrite
;;;2240   	LCD_DataWrite(WX);
00063c  b2d0              UXTB     r0,r2
00063e  f85deb04          POP      {lr}
000642  e7fe              B        LCD_DataWrite
;;;2241   }
;;;2242   //[85h]=========================================================================
                          ENDP

                  Select_PWM0 PROC
;;;2389   
;;;2390   void Select_PWM0(void)
000644  b500              PUSH     {lr}
;;;2391   {
;;;2392   	uint8_t temp;
;;;2393   	
;;;2394   	LCD_CmdWrite(0x85);
000646  2085              MOVS     r0,#0x85
000648  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_CmdWrite
;;;2395   	temp = LCD_DataRead();
00064c  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_DataRead
;;;2396   	temp |= cSetb1;
000650  f0400002          ORR      r0,r0,#2
;;;2397   	temp &= cClrb0;
000654  f00000fe          AND      r0,r0,#0xfe
;;;2398   	LCD_DataWrite(temp);
000658  f85deb04          POP      {lr}
00065c  e7fe              B        LCD_DataWrite
;;;2399   }
;;;2400   //[86h]=========================================================================
                          ENDP

                  LT768_PWM0_Init PROC
;;;264    
;;;265    void LT768_PWM0_Init
00065e  b570              PUSH     {r4-r6,lr}
;;;266    (
;;;267     uint8_t on_off                       // 0Łş˝űÖąPWM0    1ŁşĘąÄÜPWM0
;;;268    ,uint8_t Clock_Divided                // PWMĘ±ÖÓ·ÖĆµ  ČˇÖµ·¶Î§ 0~3(1,1/2,1/4,1/8)
;;;269    ,uint8_t Prescalar                    // Ę±ÖÓ·ÖĆµ     ČˇÖµ·¶Î§ 1~256
;;;270    ,uint16_t Count_Buffer                // ÉčÖĂPWMµÄĘäłöÖÜĆÚ
;;;271    ,uint16_t Compare_Buffer              // ÉčÖĂŐĽżŐ±Č
;;;272    )
;;;273    {
000660  4605              MOV      r5,r0
000662  460c              MOV      r4,r1
000664  9e04              LDR      r6,[sp,#0x10]
;;;274    	 Select_PWM0();
000666  f7fffffe          BL       Select_PWM0
;;;275       Set_PWM_Prescaler_1_to_256(Prescalar);
00066a  4610              MOV      r0,r2
00066c  f7fffffe          BL       Set_PWM_Prescaler_1_to_256
;;;276    
;;;277    	if(Clock_Divided ==0)	Select_PWM0_Clock_Divided_By_1();
000670  b90c              CBNZ     r4,|L1.1654|
000672  f7fffffe          BL       Select_PWM0_Clock_Divided_By_1
                  |L1.1654|
;;;278    	if(Clock_Divided ==1)	Select_PWM0_Clock_Divided_By_2();
000676  2c01              CMP      r4,#1
000678  d101              BNE      |L1.1662|
00067a  f7fffffe          BL       Select_PWM0_Clock_Divided_By_2
                  |L1.1662|
;;;279    	if(Clock_Divided ==2)	Select_PWM0_Clock_Divided_By_4();
00067e  2c02              CMP      r4,#2
000680  d101              BNE      |L1.1670|
000682  f7fffffe          BL       Select_PWM0_Clock_Divided_By_4
                  |L1.1670|
;;;280    	if(Clock_Divided ==3) Select_PWM0_Clock_Divided_By_8();
000686  2c03              CMP      r4,#3
000688  d101              BNE      |L1.1678|
00068a  f7fffffe          BL       Select_PWM0_Clock_Divided_By_8
                  |L1.1678|
;;;281    
;;;282    	Set_Timer0_Count_Buffer(Count_Buffer);  
00068e  4618              MOV      r0,r3
000690  f7fffffe          BL       Set_Timer0_Count_Buffer
;;;283    	Set_Timer0_Compare_Buffer(Compare_Buffer);	
000694  4630              MOV      r0,r6
000696  f7fffffe          BL       Set_Timer0_Compare_Buffer
;;;284    		
;;;285    	if (on_off == 1)	Start_PWM0(); 
00069a  2d01              CMP      r5,#1
00069c  d101              BNE      |L1.1698|
00069e  f7fffffe          BL       Start_PWM0
                  |L1.1698|
;;;286    	if (on_off == 0)	Stop_PWM0();
0006a2  2d00              CMP      r5,#0
0006a4  d102              BNE      |L1.1708|
0006a6  e8bd4070          POP      {r4-r6,lr}
0006aa  e7fe              B        Stop_PWM0
                  |L1.1708|
;;;287    }
0006ac  bd70              POP      {r4-r6,pc}
;;;288    
                          ENDP

                  LT768_PWM0_Duty PROC
;;;289    
;;;290    void LT768_PWM0_Duty(uint16_t Compare_Buffer)
0006ae  e7fe              B        Set_Timer0_Compare_Buffer
;;;291    {
;;;292    	Set_Timer0_Compare_Buffer(Compare_Buffer);
;;;293    }
;;;294    
                          ENDP

                  Stop_PWM1 PROC
;;;2415   }
;;;2416   void Stop_PWM1(void)
0006b0  b500              PUSH     {lr}
;;;2417   {
;;;2418   /*
;;;2419   PWM Timer 1 start/stop
;;;2420   Determine start/stop for Timer 1. 
;;;2421   0 = Stop 
;;;2422   1 = Start for Timer 1
;;;2423   */
;;;2424   	uint8_t temp;
;;;2425   	LCD_CmdWrite(0x86);
0006b2  2086              MOVS     r0,#0x86
0006b4  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_CmdWrite
;;;2426   	temp = LCD_DataRead();
0006b8  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_DataRead
;;;2427   	temp &= cClrb4;
0006bc  f00000ef          AND      r0,r0,#0xef
;;;2428   	LCD_DataWrite(temp);
0006c0  f85deb04          POP      {lr}
0006c4  e7fe              B        LCD_DataWrite
;;;2429   }
;;;2430   //[86h]PWM0
                          ENDP

                  Start_PWM1 PROC
;;;2401   //[86h]PWM1
;;;2402   void Start_PWM1(void)
0006c6  b500              PUSH     {lr}
;;;2403   {
;;;2404   /*
;;;2405   PWM Timer 1 start/stop
;;;2406   Determine start/stop for Timer 1. 
;;;2407   0 = Stop 
;;;2408   1 = Start for Timer 1
;;;2409   */
;;;2410   	uint8_t temp;
;;;2411   	LCD_CmdWrite(0x86);
0006c8  2086              MOVS     r0,#0x86
0006ca  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_CmdWrite
;;;2412   	temp = LCD_DataRead();
0006ce  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_DataRead
0006d2  b2c0              UXTB     r0,r0
;;;2413   	temp |= cSetb4;
0006d4  f0400010          ORR      r0,r0,#0x10
;;;2414   	LCD_DataWrite(temp);
0006d8  f85deb04          POP      {lr}
0006dc  e7fe              B        LCD_DataWrite
;;;2415   }
;;;2416   void Stop_PWM1(void)
                          ENDP

                  Set_Timer1_Compare_Buffer PROC
;;;2488   //[8Ch][8Dh]=========================================================================
;;;2489   void Set_Timer1_Compare_Buffer(uint16_t WX)
0006de  b500              PUSH     {lr}
;;;2490   {
0006e0  4602              MOV      r2,r0
;;;2491   /*
;;;2492   Timer 0 compare buffer register
;;;2493   Compare buffer register total has 16 bits.
;;;2494   When timer counter equal or less than compare buffer register will cause PWM out
;;;2495   high level if inv_on bit is off.
;;;2496   */
;;;2497   	LCD_CmdWrite(0x8C);
0006e2  208c              MOVS     r0,#0x8c
0006e4  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_CmdWrite
;;;2498   	LCD_DataWrite(WX);
0006e8  b2d0              UXTB     r0,r2
0006ea  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_DataWrite
;;;2499   	LCD_CmdWrite(0x8D);
0006ee  208d              MOVS     r0,#0x8d
0006f0  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_CmdWrite
;;;2500   	LCD_DataWrite(WX>>8);
0006f4  0a10              LSRS     r0,r2,#8
0006f6  f85deb04          POP      {lr}
0006fa  e7fe              B        LCD_DataWrite
;;;2501   }
;;;2502   //[8Eh][8Fh]=========================================================================
                          ENDP

                  Set_Timer1_Count_Buffer PROC
;;;2503   void Set_Timer1_Count_Buffer(uint16_t WX)
0006fc  b500              PUSH     {lr}
;;;2504   {
0006fe  4602              MOV      r2,r0
;;;2505   /*
;;;2506   Timer 0 count buffer register
;;;2507   Count buffer register total has 16 bits.
;;;2508   When timer counter equal to 0 will cause PWM timer reload Count buffer register if reload_en bit set as enable.
;;;2509   It may read back timer counterˇ¦s real time value when PWM timer start.
;;;2510   */
;;;2511   	LCD_CmdWrite(0x8E);
000700  208e              MOVS     r0,#0x8e
000702  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_CmdWrite
;;;2512   	LCD_DataWrite(WX);
000706  b2d0              UXTB     r0,r2
000708  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_DataWrite
;;;2513   	LCD_CmdWrite(0x8F);
00070c  208f              MOVS     r0,#0x8f
00070e  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_CmdWrite
;;;2514   	LCD_DataWrite(WX>>8);
000712  0a10              LSRS     r0,r2,#8
000714  f85deb04          POP      {lr}
000718  e7fe              B        LCD_DataWrite
;;;2515   }
;;;2516   //[90h]=========================================================================
                          ENDP

                  Select_PWM1_Clock_Divided_By_8 PROC
;;;2284   }
;;;2285   void Select_PWM1_Clock_Divided_By_8(void)
00071a  b500              PUSH     {lr}
;;;2286   {
;;;2287   /*
;;;2288   Select MUX input for PWM Timer 1.
;;;2289   00 = 1; 01 = 1/2; 10 = 1/4 ; 11 = 1/8;
;;;2290   */
;;;2291   	uint8_t temp;
;;;2292   	
;;;2293   	LCD_CmdWrite(0x85);
00071c  2085              MOVS     r0,#0x85
00071e  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_CmdWrite
;;;2294   	temp = LCD_DataRead();
000722  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_DataRead
000726  b2c0              UXTB     r0,r0
;;;2295   	temp |= cSetb7;
000728  f0400080          ORR      r0,r0,#0x80
;;;2296   	temp |= cSetb6;
00072c  f0400040          ORR      r0,r0,#0x40
;;;2297   	LCD_DataWrite(temp);
000730  f85deb04          POP      {lr}
000734  e7fe              B        LCD_DataWrite
;;;2298   }
;;;2299   void Select_PWM0_Clock_Divided_By_1(void)
                          ENDP

                  Select_PWM1_Clock_Divided_By_4 PROC
;;;2270   }
;;;2271   void Select_PWM1_Clock_Divided_By_4(void)
000736  b500              PUSH     {lr}
;;;2272   {
;;;2273   /*
;;;2274   Select MUX input for PWM Timer 1.
;;;2275   00 = 1; 01 = 1/2; 10 = 1/4 ; 11 = 1/8;
;;;2276   */
;;;2277   	uint8_t temp;
;;;2278   	
;;;2279   	LCD_CmdWrite(0x85);
000738  2085              MOVS     r0,#0x85
00073a  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_CmdWrite
;;;2280   	temp = LCD_DataRead();
00073e  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_DataRead
;;;2281   	temp |= cSetb7;
000742  f0400080          ORR      r0,r0,#0x80
;;;2282   	temp &= cClrb6;
000746  f00000bf          AND      r0,r0,#0xbf
;;;2283   	LCD_DataWrite(temp);
00074a  f85deb04          POP      {lr}
00074e  e7fe              B        LCD_DataWrite
;;;2284   }
;;;2285   void Select_PWM1_Clock_Divided_By_8(void)
                          ENDP

                  Select_PWM1_Clock_Divided_By_2 PROC

;;;2258   {
;;;2259   /*
;;;2260   Select MUX input for PWM Timer 1.
;;;2261   00 = 1; 01 = 1/2; 10 = 1/4 ; 11 = 1/8;
;;;2262   */
;;;2263   	uint8_t temp;
;;;2264   	
;;;2265   	LCD_CmdWrite(0x85);
000752  2085              MOVS     r0,#0x85
000754  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_CmdWrite
;;;2266   	temp = LCD_DataRead();
000758  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_DataRead
;;;2267   	temp &= cClrb7;
00075c  f000007f          AND      r0,r0,#0x7f
;;;2268   	temp |= cSetb6;
000760  f0400040          ORR      r0,r0,#0x40
;;;2269   	LCD_DataWrite(temp);
000764  f85deb04          POP      {lr}
000768  e7fe              B        LCD_DataWrite
;;;2270   }
;;;2271   void Select_PWM1_Clock_Divided_By_4(void)
                          ENDP

                  Select_PWM1_Clock_Divided_By_1 PROC
;;;2242   //[85h]=========================================================================
;;;2243   void Select_PWM1_Clock_Divided_By_1(void)
00076a  b500              PUSH     {lr}
;;;2244   {
;;;2245   /*
;;;2246   Select MUX input for PWM Timer 1.
;;;2247   00 = 1; 01 = 1/2; 10 = 1/4 ; 11 = 1/8;
;;;2248   */

;;;2250

00076e  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_CmdWrite
;;;2252   	temp = LCD_DataRead();
000772  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_DataRead
;;;2253   	temp &= cClrb7;
000776  f000007f          AND      r0,r0,#0x7f
;;;2254   	temp &= cClrb6;
00077a  f00000bf          AND      r0,r0,#0xbf
;;;2255   	LCD_DataWrite(temp);
00077e  f85deb04          POP      {lr}
000782  e7fe              B        LCD_DataWrite
;;;2256   }
;;;2257   void Select_PWM1_Clock_Divided_By_2(void)
                          ENDP

                  Select_PWM1 PROC
;;;2371   }
;;;2372   void Select_PWM1(void)
000784  b500              PUSH     {lr}
;;;2373   {
;;;2374   	uint8_t temp;
;;;2375   	
;;;2376   	LCD_CmdWrite(0x85);
000786  2085              MOVS     r0,#0x85
000788  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_CmdWrite
;;;2377   	temp = LCD_DataRead();
00078c  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_DataRead
;;;2378   	temp |= cSetb3;
000790  f0400008          ORR      r0,r0,#8
;;;2379   	temp &= cClrb2;
000794  f00000fb          AND      r0,r0,#0xfb
;;;2380   	LCD_DataWrite(temp);
000798  f85deb04          POP      {lr}
00079c  e7fe              B        LCD_DataWrite
;;;2381   }
;;;2382   //[85h].[bit1][bit0]=========================================================================
                          ENDP

                  LT768_PWM1_Init PROC
;;;296    
;;;297    void LT768_PWM1_Init
00079e  b570              PUSH     {r4-r6,lr}
;;;298    (
;;;299     uint8_t on_off                       // 0Łş˝űÖąPWM0    1ŁşĘąÄÜPWM0
;;;300    ,uint8_t Clock_Divided                // PWMĘ±ÖÓ·ÖĆµ  ČˇÖµ·¶Î§ 0~3(1,1/2,1/4,1/8)
;;;301    ,uint8_t Prescalar                    // Ę±ÖÓ·ÖĆµ     ČˇÖµ·¶Î§ 1~256
;;;302    ,uint16_t Count_Buffer                // ÉčÖĂPWMµÄĘäłöÖÜĆÚ
;;;303    ,uint16_t Compare_Buffer              // ÉčÖĂŐĽżŐ±Č
;;;304    )
;;;305    {
0007a0  4605              MOV      r5,r0
0007a2  460c              MOV      r4,r1
0007a4  9e04              LDR      r6,[sp,#0x10]
;;;306    	Select_PWM1();
0007a6  f7fffffe          BL       Select_PWM1
;;;307    	Set_PWM_Prescaler_1_to_256(Prescalar);
0007aa  4610              MOV      r0,r2
0007ac  f7fffffe          BL       Set_PWM_Prescaler_1_to_256
;;;308     
;;;309    	if(Clock_Divided ==0)	Select_PWM1_Clock_Divided_By_1();
0007b0  b90c              CBNZ     r4,|L1.1974|
0007b2  f7fffffe          BL       Select_PWM1_Clock_Divided_By_1
                  |L1.1974|
;;;310    	if(Clock_Divided ==1)	Select_PWM1_Clock_Divided_By_2();
0007b6  2c01              CMP      r4,#1
0007b8  d101              BNE      |L1.1982|
0007ba  f7fffffe          BL       Select_PWM1_Clock_Divided_By_2
                  |L1.1982|
;;;311    	if(Clock_Divided ==2) Select_PWM1_Clock_Divided_By_4();
0007be  2c02              CMP      r4,#2
0007c0  d101              BNE      |L1.1990|
0007c2  f7fffffe          BL       Select_PWM1_Clock_Divided_By_4
                  |L1.1990|
;;;312    	if(Clock_Divided ==3)	Select_PWM1_Clock_Divided_By_8();
0007c6  2c03              CMP      r4,#3
0007c8  d101              BNE      |L1.1998|
0007ca  f7fffffe          BL       Select_PWM1_Clock_Divided_By_8
                  |L1.1998|
;;;313    
;;;314    	Set_Timer1_Count_Buffer(Count_Buffer); 
0007ce  4618              MOV      r0,r3
0007d0  f7fffffe          BL       Set_Timer1_Count_Buffer
;;;315    	Set_Timer1_Compare_Buffer(Compare_Buffer); 
0007d4  4630              MOV      r0,r6
0007d6  f7fffffe          BL       Set_Timer1_Compare_Buffer
;;;316    
;;;317    	if (on_off == 1)	Start_PWM1(); 
0007da  2d01              CMP      r5,#1
0007dc  d101              BNE      |L1.2018|
0007de  f7fffffe          BL       Start_PWM1
                  |L1.2018|
;;;318    	if (on_off == 0)	Stop_PWM1();
0007e2  2d00              CMP      r5,#0
0007e4  d102              BNE      |L1.2028|
0007e6  e8bd4070          POP      {r4-r6,lr}
0007ea  e7fe              B        Stop_PWM1
                  |L1.2028|
;;;319    }
0007ec  bd70              POP      {r4-r6,pc}
;;;320    
                          ENDP

                  LT768_PWM1_Duty PROC
;;;321    
;;;322    void LT768_PWM1_Duty(uint16_t Compare_Buffer)
0007ee  e7fe              B        Set_Timer1_Compare_Buffer
;;;323    {
;;;324    	Set_Timer1_Compare_Buffer(Compare_Buffer);
;;;325    }
;;;326    
                          ENDP

                  LCD_RegisterRead PROC
;;;341    //---------------------//
;;;342    uint8_t LCD_RegisterRead(uint8_t Cmd)
0007f0  b500              PUSH     {lr}
;;;343    {
;;;344    	uint8_t temp;
;;;345    	
;;;346    	LCD_CmdWrite(Cmd);
0007f2  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_CmdWrite
;;;347    	temp=LCD_DataRead();
0007f6  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_DataRead
0007fa  b2c0              UXTB     r0,r0
;;;348    	return temp;
;;;349    }
0007fc  bd00              POP      {pc}
;;;350    
                          ENDP

                  Check_Mem_WR_FIFO_not_Full PROC
;;;354    
;;;355    void Check_Mem_WR_FIFO_not_Full(void)
0007fe  b500              PUSH     {lr}
                  |L1.2048|
;;;356    {
;;;357    /*	0: Memory Write FIFO is not full.
;;;358    	1: Memory Write FIFO is full.		*/
;;;359    	do
;;;360    	{
;;;361    		
;;;362    	}
;;;363    	while( LCD_StatusRead()&0x80 );
000800  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_StatusRead
000804  0600              LSLS     r0,r0,#24
000806  d4fb              BMI      |L1.2048|
;;;364    }
000808  bd00              POP      {pc}
;;;365    
                          ENDP

;;;370    		
;;;371    	}

00080c  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_StatusRead
000810  0700              LSLS     r0,r0,#28
000812  d4fb              BMI      |L1.2060|
;;;373    }
000814  bd00              POP      {pc}
;;;374    void Check_SDRAM_Ready(void)
                          ENDP

                  |L1.2072|
;;;386    {

;;;388    	1: Memory Write FIFO is empty.		*/	
;;;389    	do
;;;390    	{
;;;391    		
;;;392    	}
;;;393    	while( (LCD_StatusRead()&0x40) == 0x00 );
000818  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_StatusRead
00081c  0640              LSLS     r0,r0,#25
00081e  d5fb              BPL      |L1.2072|
;;;394    }
000820  bd00              POP      {pc}
;;;395    void Check_Busy_Draw(void)
                          ENDP

;;;401    	}

;;;403    
;;;404    }

;;;405    
                          ENDP

                  LT768_SW_Reset PROC
;;;407    
;;;408    void LT768_SW_Reset(void)//IC ResetˇA¦ý
00082e  b500              PUSH     {lr}
;;;409    {
;;;410    	uint8_t temp;
;;;411    
;;;412    	LCD_CmdWrite(0x00);
000830  2000              MOVS     r0,#0
000832  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_CmdWrite
;;;413    	temp = LCD_DataRead();
000836  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_DataRead
00083a  b2c0              UXTB     r0,r0
;;;414    	temp |= 0x01;
00083c  f0400001          ORR      r0,r0,#1
;;;415    	LCD_DataWrite(temp);
000840  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_DataWrite
                  |L1.2116|
;;;416    
;;;417        do
;;;418        {
;;;419    	    temp = LCD_DataRead();
000844  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_DataRead
;;;420        }
;;;421        while( temp&0x01 );
000848  07c0              LSLS     r0,r0,#31
00084a  d1fb              BNE      |L1.2116|
;;;422    }
00084c  bd00              POP      {pc}
;;;423    
                          ENDP

                  Enable_SFlash_SPI PROC
;;;440    
;;;441    void Enable_SFlash_SPI(void)
00084e  b500              PUSH     {lr}
;;;442    {
;;;443    /*  Serial Flash SPI Interface Enable/Disable
;;;444        0: Disable
;;;445        1: Enable*/
;;;446    	uint8_t temp;
;;;447    	LCD_CmdWrite(0x01);
000850  2001              MOVS     r0,#1
000852  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_CmdWrite
;;;448    	temp = LCD_DataRead();
000856  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_DataRead
00085a  b2c0              UXTB     r0,r0
;;;449    	temp |= cSetb1;
00085c  f0400002          ORR      r0,r0,#2
;;;450    	LCD_DataWrite(temp);     
000860  f85deb04          POP      {lr}
000864  f7ffbffe          B.W      LCD_DataWrite
;;;451    }
;;;452    
                          ENDP

;;;462    	LCD_DataWrite(temp);

;;;463    }

                          ENDP

                  Select_Main_Window_16bpp PROC
;;;542    
;;;543    void Select_Main_Window_16bpp(void)
0008b6  b500              PUSH     {lr}
;;;544    {
;;;545    /*
;;;546    Main Window Color Depth Setting
;;;547    00b: 8-bpp generic TFT, i.e. 256 colors.
;;;548    01b: 16-bpp generic TFT, i.e. 65K colors.
;;;549    1xb: 24-bpp generic TFT, i.e. 1.67M colors.
;;;550    */
;;;551    	uint8_t temp;
;;;552    	LCD_CmdWrite(0x10);
0008b8  2010              MOVS     r0,#0x10
0008ba  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_CmdWrite
;;;553    	temp = LCD_DataRead();
0008be  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_DataRead
;;;554        temp &= cClrb3;
0008c2  f00000f7          AND      r0,r0,#0xf7
;;;555        temp |= cSetb2;
0008c6  f0400004          ORR      r0,r0,#4
;;;556    	LCD_DataWrite(temp);
0008ca  f85deb04          POP      {lr}
0008ce  f7ffbffe          B.W      LCD_DataWrite
;;;557    }
;;;558    //[10h]=========================================================================
                          ENDP

                  Enable_PIP1 PROC
;;;559    void Enable_PIP1(void)
0008d2  b500              PUSH     {lr}
;;;560    {
;;;561    /*
;;;562    PIP 1 window Enable/Disable
;;;563    0 : PIP 1 window disable.
;;;564    1 : PIP 1 window enable
;;;565    PIP 1 window always on top of PIP 2 window.
;;;566    */
;;;567    	unsigned char temp;
;;;568    	LCD_CmdWrite(0x10);
0008d4  2010              MOVS     r0,#0x10
0008d6  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_CmdWrite
;;;569    	temp = LCD_DataRead();
0008da  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_DataRead
0008de  b2c0              UXTB     r0,r0
;;;570        temp |= cSetb7;
0008e0  f0400080          ORR      r0,r0,#0x80
;;;571    	LCD_DataWrite(temp);
0008e4  f85deb04          POP      {lr}
0008e8  f7ffbffe          B.W      LCD_DataWrite
;;;572    }
;;;573    void Disable_PIP1(void)
                          ENDP

                  Disable_PIP1 PROC
0008ec  b500              PUSH     {lr}
;;;574    {
;;;575    /*
;;;576    PIP 1 window Enable/Disable
;;;577    0 : PIP 1 window disable.
;;;578    1 : PIP 1 window enable
;;;579    PIP 1 window always on top of PIP 2 window.
;;;580    */
;;;581    	unsigned char temp;
;;;582    	LCD_CmdWrite(0x10);
0008ee  2010              MOVS     r0,#0x10
0008f0  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_CmdWrite
;;;583    	temp = LCD_DataRead();
0008f4  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_DataRead
;;;584        temp &= cClrb7;
0008f8  f000007f          AND      r0,r0,#0x7f
;;;585    	LCD_DataWrite(temp);
0008fc  f85deb04          POP      {lr}
000900  f7ffbffe          B.W      LCD_DataWrite
;;;586    }
;;;587    void Enable_PIP2(void)
                          ENDP

                  Enable_PIP2 PROC
000904  b500              PUSH     {lr}
;;;588    {
;;;589    /*
;;;590    PIP 2 window Enable/Disable
;;;591    0 : PIP 2 window disable.
;;;592    1 : PIP 2 window enable
;;;593    PIP 1 window always on top of PIP 2 window.
;;;594    */
;;;595    	unsigned char temp;
;;;596    	LCD_CmdWrite(0x10);
000906  2010              MOVS     r0,#0x10
000908  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_CmdWrite
;;;597    	temp = LCD_DataRead();
00090c  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_DataRead
000910  b2c0              UXTB     r0,r0
;;;598        temp |= cSetb6;
000912  f0400040          ORR      r0,r0,#0x40
;;;599    	LCD_DataWrite(temp);
000916  f85deb04          POP      {lr}
00091a  f7ffbffe          B.W      LCD_DataWrite
00091e  0000              DCW      0x0000
                  |L1.2336|
                          DCD      ||.data||
                          ENDP

                  Disable_PIP2 PROC
;;;600    }

;;;611    	temp = LCD_DataRead();

;;;614    }

                  Select_PIP1_Parameter PROC

;;;617    /*
;;;618    0: To configure PIP 1ˇ¦s parameters.
;;;619    1: To configure PIP 2ˇ¦s parameters..
;;;620    */

;;;622    	LCD_CmdWrite(0x10);

;;;623    	temp = LCD_DataRead();

;;;624        temp &= cClrb4;

;;;625    	LCD_DataWrite(temp);

000950  f7ffbffe          B.W      LCD_DataWrite
;;;626    }
;;;627    void Select_PIP2_Parameter(void)
                          ENDP

                  Select_PIP2_Parameter PROC
000954  b500              PUSH     {lr}
;;;628    {

;;;631    1: To configure PIP 2ˇ¦s parameters..
;;;632    */

                  Select_PIP2_Window_8bpp PROC
;;;640    void Select_PIP2_Window_8bpp(void)
00096e  b500              PUSH     {lr}
;;;641    {
;;;642    /*
;;;643    PIP 1 Window Color Depth Setting
;;;644    00b: 8-bpp generic TFT, i.e. 256 colors.
;;;645    01b: 16-bpp generic TFT, i.e. 65K colors.
;;;646    1xb: 24-bpp generic TFT, i.e. 1.67M colors.
;;;647    */
;;;648    	unsigned char temp;
;;;649    	LCD_CmdWrite(0x11);
000970  2011              MOVS     r0,#0x11
000972  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_CmdWrite
;;;650    	temp = LCD_DataRead();
000976  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_DataRead
;;;651        temp &= cClrb1;
00097a  f00000fd          AND      r0,r0,#0xfd
;;;652        temp &= cClrb0;
00097e  f00000fe          AND      r0,r0,#0xfe
;;;653    	LCD_DataWrite(temp);
000982  f85deb04          POP      {lr}
000986  f7ffbffe          B.W      LCD_DataWrite
;;;654    }
;;;655    void Select_PIP2_Window_16bpp(void)
                          ENDP

                  Select_PIP2_Window_16bpp PROC
00098a  b500              PUSH     {lr}
;;;656    {
;;;657    /*
;;;658    PIP 1 Window Color Depth Setting
;;;659    00b: 8-bpp generic TFT, i.e. 256 colors.
;;;660    01b: 16-bpp generic TFT, i.e. 65K colors.
;;;661    1xb: 24-bpp generic TFT, i.e. 1.67M colors.
;;;662    */
;;;663    	unsigned char temp;
;;;664    	LCD_CmdWrite(0x11);
00098c  2011              MOVS     r0,#0x11
00098e  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_CmdWrite
;;;665    	temp = LCD_DataRead();
000992  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_DataRead
;;;666        temp &= cClrb1;
000996  f00000fd          AND      r0,r0,#0xfd
;;;667        temp |= cSetb0;
00099a  f0400001          ORR      r0,r0,#1
;;;668    	LCD_DataWrite(temp);
00099e  f85deb04          POP      {lr}
0009a2  f7ffbffe          B.W      LCD_DataWrite
;;;669    }
;;;670    void Select_PIP2_Window_24bpp(void)
                          ENDP

                  Select_PIP2_Window_24bpp PROC
0009a6  b500              PUSH     {lr}
;;;671    {
;;;672    /*
;;;673    PIP 1 Window Color Depth Setting
;;;674    00b: 8-bpp generic TFT, i.e. 256 colors.
;;;675    01b: 16-bpp generic TFT, i.e. 65K colors.
;;;676    1xb: 24-bpp generic TFT, i.e. 1.67M colors.
;;;677    */
;;;678    	unsigned char temp;
;;;679    	LCD_CmdWrite(0x11);
0009a8  2011              MOVS     r0,#0x11

;;;680    	temp = LCD_DataRead();

;;;681        temp |= cSetb1;
0009b2  f0400002          ORR      r0,r0,#2
;;;682        temp &= cClrb0;
0009b6  f00000fe          AND      r0,r0,#0xfe
;;;683    	LCD_DataWrite(temp);
0009ba  f85deb04          POP      {lr}
0009be  f7ffbffe          B.W      LCD_DataWrite
;;;684    }
;;;685    void Select_PIP1_Window_8bpp(void)
                          ENDP

                  Select_PIP1_Window_8bpp PROC
0009c2  b500              PUSH     {lr}
;;;686    {
;;;687    /*
;;;688    PIP 2 Window Color Depth Setting
;;;689    00b: 8-bpp generic TFT, i.e. 256 colors.
;;;690    01b: 16-bpp generic TFT, i.e. 65K colors.
;;;691    1xb: 24-bpp generic TFT, i.e. 1.67M colors.
;;;692    */

;;;695    	temp = LCD_DataRead();

;;;696        temp &= cClrb3;

;;;697        temp &= cClrb2;

;;;698    	LCD_DataWrite(temp);
0009d6  f85deb04          POP      {lr}
0009da  f7ffbffe          B.W      LCD_DataWrite
;;;699    }
;;;700    void Select_PIP1_Window_16bpp(void)
                          ENDP

                  Select_PIP1_Window_16bpp PROC
0009de  b500              PUSH     {lr}
;;;701    {
;;;702    /*
;;;703    PIP 2 Window Color Depth Setting
;;;704    00b: 8-bpp generic TFT, i.e. 256 colors.
;;;705    01b: 16-bpp generic TFT, i.e. 65K colors.
;;;706    1xb: 24-bpp generic TFT, i.e. 1.67M colors.

;;;711        temp &= cClrb3;

;;;712        temp |= cSetb2;

;;;713    	LCD_DataWrite(temp);

                  Select_PIP1_Window_24bpp PROC
0009fa  b500              PUSH     {lr}

;;;719    00b: 8-bpp generic TFT, i.e. 256 colors.
;;;720    01b: 16-bpp generic TFT, i.e. 65K colors.

;;;727        temp &= cClrb2;

;;;729    }

                  Display_ON PROC
;;;745    }
;;;746    void Display_ON(void)
000a16  b500              PUSH     {lr}
;;;747    {
;;;748    /*	
;;;749    Display ON/OFF
;;;750    0b: Display Off.
;;;751    1b: Display On.
;;;752    */
;;;753    	uint8_t temp;
;;;754    	
;;;755    	LCD_CmdWrite(0x12);
000a18  2012              MOVS     r0,#0x12
000a1a  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_CmdWrite
;;;756    	temp = LCD_DataRead();
000a1e  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_DataRead
000a22  b2c0              UXTB     r0,r0
;;;757    	temp |= cSetb6;
000a24  f0400040          ORR      r0,r0,#0x40
;;;758    	LCD_DataWrite(temp);
000a28  f85deb04          POP      {lr}
000a2c  f7ffbffe          B.W      LCD_DataWrite
;;;759    }
;;;760    void Display_OFF(void)
                          ENDP

                  Display_OFF PROC

;;;765    1b: Display On.

;;;768    	
;;;769    	LCD_CmdWrite(0x12);

;;;770    	temp = LCD_DataRead();
