                  Main_Image_Start_Address PROC
;;;1058   //[20h][21h][22h][23h]=========================================================================
;;;1059   void Main_Image_Start_Address(unsigned long Addr)	
000a7a  b500              PUSH     {lr}
;;;1060   {
000a7c  4603              MOV      r3,r0
;;;1061   /*
;;;1062   [20h] Main Image Start Address[7:2]
;;;1063   [21h] Main Image Start Address[15:8]
;;;1064   [22h] Main Image Start Address [23:16]
;;;1065   [23h] Main Image Start Address [31:24]
;;;1066   */
;;;1067   	LCD_RegisterWrite(0x20,Addr);
000a7e  b2d9              UXTB     r1,r3
000a80  2020              MOVS     r0,#0x20
000a82  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_RegisterWrite
;;;1068   	LCD_RegisterWrite(0x21,Addr>>8);
000a86  f3c32107          UBFX     r1,r3,#8,#8
000a8a  2021              MOVS     r0,#0x21
000a8c  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_RegisterWrite
;;;1069   	LCD_RegisterWrite(0x22,Addr>>16);
000a90  f3c34107          UBFX     r1,r3,#16,#8
000a94  2022              MOVS     r0,#0x22
000a96  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_RegisterWrite
;;;1070   	LCD_RegisterWrite(0x23,Addr>>24);
000a9a  0e19              LSRS     r1,r3,#24
000a9c  2023              MOVS     r0,#0x23
000a9e  f85deb04          POP      {lr}
000aa2  f7ffbffe          B.W      LCD_RegisterWrite
;;;1071   }
;;;1072   //[24h][25h]=========================================================================
                          ENDP

                  Main_Image_Width PROC
;;;1073   void Main_Image_Width(uint16_t WX)	
000aa6  b500              PUSH     {lr}
;;;1074   {
000aa8  4603              MOV      r3,r0
;;;1075   /*
;;;1076   [24h] Main Image Width [7:0]
;;;1077   [25h] Main Image Width [12:8]
;;;1078   Unit: Pixel.
;;;1079   It must be divisible by 4. MIW Bit [1:0] tie to ˇ§0ˇ¨ internally.
;;;1080   The value is physical pixel number. Maximum value is 8188 pixels
;;;1081   */
;;;1082   	LCD_RegisterWrite(0x24,WX);
000aaa  b2d9              UXTB     r1,r3
000aac  2024              MOVS     r0,#0x24
000aae  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_RegisterWrite
;;;1083   	LCD_RegisterWrite(0x25,WX>>8);
000ab2  0a19              LSRS     r1,r3,#8
000ab4  2025              MOVS     r0,#0x25
000ab6  f85deb04          POP      {lr}
000aba  f7ffbffe          B.W      LCD_RegisterWrite
;;;1084   }
;;;1085   //[26h][27h][28h][29h]=========================================================================
                          ENDP

                  Main_Window_Start_XY PROC
;;;1086   void Main_Window_Start_XY(uint16_t WX,uint16_t HY)	
000abe  b510              PUSH     {r4,lr}
;;;1087   {
000ac0  4603              MOV      r3,r0
000ac2  460c              MOV      r4,r1
;;;1088   /*
;;;1089   [26h] Main Window Upper-Left corner X-coordination [7:0]
;;;1090   [27h] Main Window Upper-Left corner X-coordination [12:8]
;;;1091   Reference Main Image coordination.
;;;1092   Unit: Pixel
;;;1093   It must be divisible by 4. MWULX Bit [1:0] tie to ˇ§0ˇ¨ internally.
;;;1094   X-axis coordination plus Horizontal display width cannot large than 8188.
;;;1095   
;;;1096   [28h] Main Window Upper-Left corner Y-coordination [7:0]
;;;1097   [29h] Main Window Upper-Left corner Y-coordination [12:8]
;;;1098   Reference Main Image coordination.
;;;1099   Unit: Pixel
;;;1100   Range is between 0 and 8191.
;;;1101   */
;;;1102   	LCD_RegisterWrite(0x26,WX);
000ac4  b2d9              UXTB     r1,r3
000ac6  2026              MOVS     r0,#0x26
000ac8  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_RegisterWrite
;;;1103   	LCD_RegisterWrite(0x27,WX>>8);
000acc  0a19              LSRS     r1,r3,#8
000ace  2027              MOVS     r0,#0x27
000ad0  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_RegisterWrite
;;;1104   
;;;1105   	LCD_RegisterWrite(0x28,HY);
000ad4  b2e1              UXTB     r1,r4
000ad6  2028              MOVS     r0,#0x28
000ad8  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_RegisterWrite
;;;1106   	LCD_RegisterWrite(0x29,HY>>8);
000adc  0a21              LSRS     r1,r4,#8
000ade  e8bd4010          POP      {r4,lr}
000ae2  2029              MOVS     r0,#0x29
000ae4  f7ffbffe          B.W      LCD_RegisterWrite
;;;1107   }
;;;1108   //[2Ah][2Bh][2Ch][2Dh]=========================================================================
                          ENDP

                  PIP_Display_Start_XY PROC
;;;1109   void PIP_Display_Start_XY(unsigned short WX,unsigned short HY)	
000ae8  b510              PUSH     {r4,lr}
;;;1110   {
000aea  4603              MOV      r3,r0
000aec  460c              MOV      r4,r1
;;;1111   /*
;;;1112   [2Ah] PIP Window Display Upper-Left corner X-coordination [7:0]
;;;1113   [2Bh] PIP Window Display Upper-Left corner X-coordination [12:8]
;;;1114   Reference Main Window coordination.
;;;1115   Unit: Pixel
;;;1116   It must be divisible by 4. PWDULX Bit [1:0] tie to ˇ§0ˇ¨ internally.
;;;1117   X-axis coordination should less than horizontal display width.
;;;1118   According to bit of Select Configure PIP 1 or 2 Windowˇ¦s parameters. 
;;;1119   Function bit will be configured for relative PIP window.
;;;1120   
;;;1121   [2Ch] PIP Window Display Upper-Left corner Y-coordination [7:0]
;;;1122   [2Dh] PIP Window Display Upper-Left corner Y-coordination [12:8]
;;;1123   Reference Main Window coordination.
;;;1124   Unit: Pixel
;;;1125   Y-axis coordination should less than vertical display height.
;;;1126   According to bit of Select Configure PIP 1 or 2 Windowˇ¦s parameters.
;;;1127   Function bit will be configured for relative PIP window.
;;;1128   */
;;;1129   	LCD_RegisterWrite(0x2A,WX);
000aee  b2d9              UXTB     r1,r3
000af0  202a              MOVS     r0,#0x2a
000af2  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_RegisterWrite
;;;1130   	LCD_RegisterWrite(0x2B,WX>>8);
000af6  0a19              LSRS     r1,r3,#8
000af8  202b              MOVS     r0,#0x2b
000afa  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_RegisterWrite
;;;1131   	
;;;1132   	LCD_RegisterWrite(0x2C,HY);
000afe  b2e1              UXTB     r1,r4
000b00  202c              MOVS     r0,#0x2c
000b02  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_RegisterWrite
;;;1133   	LCD_RegisterWrite(0x2D,HY>>8);
000b06  0a21              LSRS     r1,r4,#8
000b08  e8bd4010          POP      {r4,lr}
000b0c  202d              MOVS     r0,#0x2d
000b0e  f7ffbffe          B.W      LCD_RegisterWrite
;;;1134   }
;;;1135   //[2Eh][2Fh][30h][31h]=========================================================================
                          ENDP

                  PIP_Image_Start_Address PROC
;;;1136   void PIP_Image_Start_Address(unsigned long Addr)	
000b12  b500              PUSH     {lr}
;;;1137   {
000b14  4603              MOV      r3,r0
;;;1138   /*
;;;1139   [2Eh] PIP Image Start Address[7:2]
;;;1140   [2Fh] PIP Image Start Address[15:8]
;;;1141   [30h] PIP Image Start Address [23:16]
;;;1142   [31h] PIP Image Start Address [31:24]
;;;1143   */
;;;1144   	LCD_RegisterWrite(0x2E,Addr);
000b16  b2d9              UXTB     r1,r3
000b18  202e              MOVS     r0,#0x2e
000b1a  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_RegisterWrite
;;;1145   	LCD_RegisterWrite(0x2F,Addr>>8);
000b1e  f3c32107          UBFX     r1,r3,#8,#8
000b22  202f              MOVS     r0,#0x2f
000b24  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_RegisterWrite
;;;1146   	LCD_RegisterWrite(0x30,Addr>>16);
000b28  f3c34107          UBFX     r1,r3,#16,#8
000b2c  2030              MOVS     r0,#0x30
000b2e  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_RegisterWrite
;;;1147   	LCD_RegisterWrite(0x31,Addr>>24);
000b32  0e19              LSRS     r1,r3,#24
000b34  2031              MOVS     r0,#0x31
000b36  f85deb04          POP      {lr}
000b3a  f7ffbffe          B.W      LCD_RegisterWrite
;;;1148   }
;;;1149   //[32h][33h]=========================================================================
                          ENDP

                  PIP_Image_Width PROC
;;;1150   void PIP_Image_Width(unsigned short WX)	
000b3e  b500              PUSH     {lr}
;;;1151   {
000b40  4603              MOV      r3,r0
;;;1152   /*
;;;1153   [32h] PIP Image Width [7:0]
;;;1154   [33h] PIP Image Width [12:8]
;;;1155   Unit: Pixel.
;;;1156   It must be divisible by 4. PIW Bit [1:0] tie to ˇ§0ˇ¨ internally.
;;;1157   The value is physical pixel number.
;;;1158   This width should less than horizontal display width.
;;;1159   According to bit of Select Configure PIP 1 or 2 Windowˇ¦s parameters.
;;;1160   Function bit will be configured for relative PIP window.
;;;1161   */
;;;1162   	LCD_RegisterWrite(0x32,WX);
000b42  b2d9              UXTB     r1,r3
000b44  2032              MOVS     r0,#0x32
000b46  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_RegisterWrite
;;;1163   	LCD_RegisterWrite(0x33,WX>>8);
000b4a  0a19              LSRS     r1,r3,#8
000b4c  2033              MOVS     r0,#0x33
000b4e  f85deb04          POP      {lr}
000b52  f7ffbffe          B.W      LCD_RegisterWrite
;;;1164   }
;;;1165   //[34h][35h][36h][37h]=========================================================================
                          ENDP

                  PIP_Window_Image_Start_XY PROC
;;;1166   void PIP_Window_Image_Start_XY(unsigned short WX,unsigned short HY)	
000b56  b510              PUSH     {r4,lr}
;;;1167   {
000b58  4603              MOV      r3,r0
000b5a  460c              MOV      r4,r1
;;;1168   /*
;;;1169   [34h] PIP 1 or 2 Window Image Upper-Left corner X-coordination [7:0]
;;;1170   [35h] PIP Window Image Upper-Left corner X-coordination [12:8]
;;;1171   Reference PIP Image coordination.
;;;1172   Unit: Pixel
;;;1173   It must be divisible by 4. PWIULX Bit [1:0] tie to ˇ§0ˇ¨ internally.
;;;1174   X-axis coordination plus PIP image width cannot large than 8188.
;;;1175   According to bit of Select Configure PIP 1 or 2 Windowˇ¦s parameters. 
;;;1176   Function bit will be configured for relative PIP window.
;;;1177   
;;;1178   [36h] PIP Windows Display Upper-Left corner Y-coordination [7:0]
;;;1179   [37h] PIP Windows Image Upper-Left corner Y-coordination [12:8]
;;;1180   Reference PIP Image coordination.
;;;1181   Unit: Pixel
;;;1182   Y-axis coordination plus PIP window height should less than 8191.
;;;1183   According to bit of Select Configure PIP 1 or 2 Windowˇ¦s parameters. 
;;;1184   Function bit will be configured for relative PIP window.
;;;1185   */
;;;1186   	LCD_RegisterWrite(0x34,WX);
000b5c  b2d9              UXTB     r1,r3
000b5e  2034              MOVS     r0,#0x34
000b60  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_RegisterWrite
;;;1187   	LCD_RegisterWrite(0x35,WX>>8);
000b64  0a19              LSRS     r1,r3,#8
000b66  2035              MOVS     r0,#0x35
000b68  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_RegisterWrite
;;;1188   	
;;;1189   	LCD_RegisterWrite(0x36,HY);
000b6c  b2e1              UXTB     r1,r4
000b6e  2036              MOVS     r0,#0x36
000b70  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_RegisterWrite
;;;1190   	LCD_RegisterWrite(0x37,HY>>8);
000b74  0a21              LSRS     r1,r4,#8
000b76  e8bd4010          POP      {r4,lr}
000b7a  2037              MOVS     r0,#0x37
000b7c  f7ffbffe          B.W      LCD_RegisterWrite
;;;1191   }
;;;1192   //[38h][39h][3Ah][3Bh]=========================================================================
                          ENDP

                  PIP_Window_Width_Height PROC
;;;1193   void PIP_Window_Width_Height(unsigned short WX,unsigned short HY)	
000b80  b510              PUSH     {r4,lr}
;;;1194   {
000b82  4603              MOV      r3,r0
000b84  460c              MOV      r4,r1
;;;1195   /*
;;;1196   [38h] PIP Window Width [7:0]
;;;1197   [39h] PIP Window Width [10:8]
;;;1198   Unit: Pixel.
;;;1199   It must be divisible by 4. The value is physical pixel number.
;;;1200   Maximum value is 8188 pixels.
;;;1201   According to bit of Select Configure PIP 1 or 2 Windowˇ¦s parameters. 
;;;1202   Function bit will be configured for relative PIP window.
;;;1203   
;;;1204   [3Ah] PIP Window Height [7:0]
;;;1205   [3Bh] PIP Window Height [10:8]
;;;1206   Unit: Pixel
;;;1207   The value is physical pixel number. Maximum value is 8191 pixels.
;;;1208   According to bit of Select Configure PIP 1 or 2 Windowˇ¦s parameters. 
;;;1209   Function bit will be configured for relative PIP window.
;;;1210   */
;;;1211   	LCD_RegisterWrite(0x38,WX);
000b86  b2d9              UXTB     r1,r3
000b88  2038              MOVS     r0,#0x38
000b8a  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_RegisterWrite
;;;1212   	LCD_RegisterWrite(0x39,WX>>8);
000b8e  0a19              LSRS     r1,r3,#8
000b90  2039              MOVS     r0,#0x39
000b92  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_RegisterWrite
;;;1213   	
;;;1214   	LCD_RegisterWrite(0x3A,HY);
000b96  b2e1              UXTB     r1,r4
000b98  203a              MOVS     r0,#0x3a
000b9a  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_RegisterWrite
;;;1215   	LCD_RegisterWrite(0x3B,HY>>8);
000b9e  0a21              LSRS     r1,r4,#8
000ba0  e8bd4010          POP      {r4,lr}
000ba4  203b              MOVS     r0,#0x3b
000ba6  f7ffbffe          B.W      LCD_RegisterWrite
;;;1216   }
;;;1217   
                          ENDP

                  Enable_Graphic_Cursor PROC
;;;1218   //[3Ch]=========================================================================
;;;1219   void Enable_Graphic_Cursor(void)	
000baa  b500              PUSH     {lr}
;;;1220   {
;;;1221   /*
;;;1222   Graphic Cursor Enable
;;;1223   0 : Graphic Cursor disable.
;;;1224   1 : Graphic Cursor enable.
;;;1225   */
;;;1226   	unsigned char temp;
;;;1227   	
;;;1228   	LCD_CmdWrite(0x3C);
000bac  203c              MOVS     r0,#0x3c
000bae  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_CmdWrite
;;;1229   	temp = LCD_DataRead();
000bb2  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_DataRead
000bb6  b2c0              UXTB     r0,r0
;;;1230   	temp |= cSetb4;
000bb8  f0400010          ORR      r0,r0,#0x10
;;;1231   	LCD_DataWrite(temp);
000bbc  f85deb04          POP      {lr}
000bc0  f7ffbffe          B.W      LCD_DataWrite
;;;1232   }
;;;1233   void Disable_Graphic_Cursor(void)	
                          ENDP

                  Disable_Graphic_Cursor PROC
000bc4  b500              PUSH     {lr}
;;;1234   {
;;;1235   /*
;;;1236   Graphic Cursor Enable
;;;1237   0 : Graphic Cursor disable.
;;;1238   1 : Graphic Cursor enable.
;;;1239   */
;;;1240   	unsigned char temp;
;;;1241   	
;;;1242   	LCD_CmdWrite(0x3C);
000bc6  203c              MOVS     r0,#0x3c
000bc8  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_CmdWrite
;;;1243   	temp = LCD_DataRead();
000bcc  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_DataRead
;;;1244   	temp &= cClrb4;
000bd0  f00000ef          AND      r0,r0,#0xef
;;;1245   	LCD_DataWrite(temp);
000bd4  f85deb04          POP      {lr}
000bd8  f7ffbffe          B.W      LCD_DataWrite
;;;1246   }
;;;1247   //
                          ENDP

                  Select_Graphic_Cursor_1 PROC
;;;1248   void Select_Graphic_Cursor_1(void)	
000bdc  b500              PUSH     {lr}
;;;1249   {
;;;1250   /*
;;;1251   Graphic Cursor Selection Bit
;;;1252   Select one from four graphic cursor types. (00b to 11b)
;;;1253   00b : Graphic Cursor Set 1.
;;;1254   01b : Graphic Cursor Set 2.
;;;1255   10b : Graphic Cursor Set 3.
;;;1256   11b : Graphic Cursor Set 4.
;;;1257   */
;;;1258   	unsigned char temp;
;;;1259   	
;;;1260   	LCD_CmdWrite(0x3C);
000bde  203c              MOVS     r0,#0x3c
000be0  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_CmdWrite
;;;1261   	temp = LCD_DataRead();
000be4  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_DataRead
;;;1262   	temp &= cClrb3;
000be8  f00000f7          AND      r0,r0,#0xf7
;;;1263   	temp &= cClrb2;
000bec  f00000fb          AND      r0,r0,#0xfb
;;;1264   	LCD_DataWrite(temp);
000bf0  f85deb04          POP      {lr}
000bf4  f7ffbffe          B.W      LCD_DataWrite
;;;1265   }
;;;1266   void Select_Graphic_Cursor_2(void)	
                          ENDP

                  Select_Graphic_Cursor_2 PROC
000bf8  b500              PUSH     {lr}
;;;1267   {
;;;1268   /*
;;;1269   Graphic Cursor Selection Bit
;;;1270   Select one from four graphic cursor types. (00b to 11b)
;;;1271   00b : Graphic Cursor Set 1.
;;;1272   01b : Graphic Cursor Set 2.
;;;1273   10b : Graphic Cursor Set 3.
;;;1274   11b : Graphic Cursor Set 4.
;;;1275   */
;;;1276   	unsigned char temp;
;;;1277   	
;;;1278   	LCD_CmdWrite(0x3C);
000bfa  203c              MOVS     r0,#0x3c
000bfc  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_CmdWrite
;;;1279   	temp = LCD_DataRead();
000c00  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_DataRead
;;;1280   	temp &= cClrb3;
000c04  f00000f7          AND      r0,r0,#0xf7
;;;1281   	temp |= cSetb2;
000c08  f0400004          ORR      r0,r0,#4
;;;1282   	LCD_DataWrite(temp);
000c0c  f85deb04          POP      {lr}
000c10  f7ffbffe          B.W      LCD_DataWrite
;;;1283   }
;;;1284   void Select_Graphic_Cursor_3(void)	
                          ENDP

                  Select_Graphic_Cursor_3 PROC
000c14  b500              PUSH     {lr}
;;;1285   {
;;;1286   /*
;;;1287   Graphic Cursor Selection Bit
;;;1288   Select one from four graphic cursor types. (00b to 11b)
;;;1289   00b : Graphic Cursor Set 1.
;;;1290   01b : Graphic Cursor Set 2.
;;;1291   10b : Graphic Cursor Set 3.
;;;1292   11b : Graphic Cursor Set 4.
;;;1293   */
;;;1294   	unsigned char temp;
;;;1295   	
;;;1296   	LCD_CmdWrite(0x3C);
000c16  203c              MOVS     r0,#0x3c
000c18  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_CmdWrite
;;;1297   	temp = LCD_DataRead();
000c1c  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_DataRead
;;;1298   	temp |= cSetb3;
000c20  f0400008          ORR      r0,r0,#8
;;;1299   	temp &= cClrb2;
000c24  f00000fb          AND      r0,r0,#0xfb
;;;1300   	LCD_DataWrite(temp);
000c28  f85deb04          POP      {lr}
000c2c  f7ffbffe          B.W      LCD_DataWrite
;;;1301   }
;;;1302   void Select_Graphic_Cursor_4(void)	
                          ENDP

                  Select_Graphic_Cursor_4 PROC
000c30  b500              PUSH     {lr}
;;;1303   {
;;;1304   /*
;;;1305   Graphic Cursor Selection Bit
;;;1306   Select one from four graphic cursor types. (00b to 11b)
;;;1307   00b : Graphic Cursor Set 1.
;;;1308   01b : Graphic Cursor Set 2.
;;;1309   10b : Graphic Cursor Set 3.
;;;1310   11b : Graphic Cursor Set 4.
;;;1311   */
;;;1312   	unsigned char temp;
;;;1313   	
;;;1314   	LCD_CmdWrite(0x3C);
000c32  203c              MOVS     r0,#0x3c
000c34  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_CmdWrite
;;;1315   	temp = LCD_DataRead();
000c38  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_DataRead
000c3c  b2c0              UXTB     r0,r0
;;;1316   	temp |= cSetb3;
000c3e  f0400008          ORR      r0,r0,#8
;;;1317   	temp |= cSetb2;
000c42  f0400004          ORR      r0,r0,#4
;;;1318   	LCD_DataWrite(temp);
000c46  f85deb04          POP      {lr}
000c4a  f7ffbffe          B.W      LCD_DataWrite
;;;1319   }
;;;1320   //
                          ENDP

                  Enable_Text_Cursor PROC
;;;1321   void Enable_Text_Cursor(void)	
000c4e  b500              PUSH     {lr}
;;;1322   {
;;;1323   /*
;;;1324   Text Cursor Enable
;;;1325   0 : Disable.
;;;1326   1 : Enable.
;;;1327   Text cursor & Graphic cursor cannot enable simultaneously.
;;;1328   Graphic cursor has higher priority then Text cursor if enabled simultaneously.
;;;1329   */
;;;1330   	unsigned char temp;
;;;1331   	
;;;1332   	LCD_CmdWrite(0x3C);
000c50  203c              MOVS     r0,#0x3c
000c52  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_CmdWrite
;;;1333   	temp = LCD_DataRead();
000c56  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_DataRead
000c5a  b2c0              UXTB     r0,r0
;;;1334   	temp |= cSetb1;
000c5c  f0400002          ORR      r0,r0,#2
;;;1335   	LCD_DataWrite(temp);
000c60  f85deb04          POP      {lr}
000c64  f7ffbffe          B.W      LCD_DataWrite
;;;1336   }
;;;1337   void Disable_Text_Cursor(void)	
                          ENDP

                  Disable_Text_Cursor PROC
000c68  b500              PUSH     {lr}
;;;1338   {
;;;1339   /*
;;;1340   Text Cursor Enable
;;;1341   0 : Disable.
;;;1342   1 : Enable.
;;;1343   Text cursor & Graphic cursor cannot enable simultaneously.
;;;1344   Graphic cursor has higher priority then Text cursor if enabled simultaneously.
;;;1345   */
;;;1346   	unsigned char temp;
;;;1347   	
;;;1348   	LCD_CmdWrite(0x3C);
000c6a  203c              MOVS     r0,#0x3c
000c6c  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_CmdWrite
;;;1349   	temp = LCD_DataRead();
000c70  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_DataRead
;;;1350   	temp &= cClrb1;
000c74  f00000fd          AND      r0,r0,#0xfd
;;;1351   	LCD_DataWrite(temp);
000c78  f85deb04          POP      {lr}
000c7c  f7ffbffe          B.W      LCD_DataWrite
;;;1352   }
;;;1353   //
                          ENDP

                  Enable_Text_Cursor_Blinking PROC
;;;1354   void Enable_Text_Cursor_Blinking(void)	
000c80  b500              PUSH     {lr}
;;;1355   {
;;;1356   /*
;;;1357   Text Cursor Blinking Enable
;;;1358   0 : Disable.
;;;1359   1 : Enable.
;;;1360   */
;;;1361   	unsigned char temp;
;;;1362   	
;;;1363   	LCD_CmdWrite(0x3C);
000c82  203c              MOVS     r0,#0x3c
000c84  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_CmdWrite
;;;1364   	temp = LCD_DataRead();
000c88  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_DataRead
000c8c  b2c0              UXTB     r0,r0
;;;1365   	temp |= cSetb0;
000c8e  f0400001          ORR      r0,r0,#1
;;;1366   	LCD_DataWrite(temp);
000c92  f85deb04          POP      {lr}
000c96  f7ffbffe          B.W      LCD_DataWrite
;;;1367   }
;;;1368   void Disable_Text_Cursor_Blinking(void)	
                          ENDP

                  Disable_Text_Cursor_Blinking PROC
000c9a  b500              PUSH     {lr}
;;;1369   {
;;;1370   /*
;;;1371   Text Cursor Blinking Enable
;;;1372   0 : Disable.
;;;1373   1 : Enable.
;;;1374   */
;;;1375   	unsigned char temp;
;;;1376   	
;;;1377   	LCD_CmdWrite(0x3C);
000c9c  203c              MOVS     r0,#0x3c
000c9e  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_CmdWrite
;;;1378   	temp = LCD_DataRead();
000ca2  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_DataRead
;;;1379   	temp &= cClrb0;
000ca6  f00000fe          AND      r0,r0,#0xfe
;;;1380   	LCD_DataWrite(temp);
000caa  f85deb04          POP      {lr}
000cae  f7ffbffe          B.W      LCD_DataWrite
;;;1381   }
;;;1382   //[3Dh]=========================================================================
                          ENDP

                  Blinking_Time_Frames PROC
;;;1383   void Blinking_Time_Frames(unsigned char temp)	
000cb2  b500              PUSH     {lr}
;;;1384   {
000cb4  4602              MOV      r2,r0
;;;1385   /*
;;;1386   Text Cursor Blink Time Setting (Unit: Frame)
;;;1387   00h : 1 frame time.
;;;1388   01h : 2 frames time.
;;;1389   02h : 3 frames time.
;;;1390   :
;;;1391   FFh : 256 frames time.
;;;1392   */
;;;1393   	LCD_CmdWrite(0x3D);
000cb6  203d              MOVS     r0,#0x3d
000cb8  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_CmdWrite
;;;1394   	LCD_DataWrite(temp);
000cbc  4610              MOV      r0,r2
000cbe  f85deb04          POP      {lr}
000cc2  f7ffbffe          B.W      LCD_DataWrite
;;;1395   }
;;;1396   //[3Eh]=========================================================================
                          ENDP

                  Text_Cursor_H_V PROC
;;;1397   void Text_Cursor_H_V(unsigned short WX,unsigned short HY)
000cc6  b500              PUSH     {lr}
;;;1398   {
000cc8  4603              MOV      r3,r0
000cca  460a              MOV      r2,r1
;;;1399   /*
;;;1400   [3Eh]
;;;1401   Text Cursor Horizontal Size Setting[4:0]
;;;1402   Unit : Pixel
;;;1403   Zero-based number. Value ˇ§0ˇ¨ means 1 pixel.
;;;1404   Note : When font is enlarged, the cursor setting will multiply the
;;;1405   same times as the font enlargement.
;;;1406   [3Fh]
;;;1407   Text Cursor Vertical Size Setting[4:0]
;;;1408   Unit : Pixel
;;;1409   Zero-based number. Value ˇ§0ˇ¨ means 1 pixel.
;;;1410   Note : When font is enlarged, the cursor setting will multiply the
;;;1411   same times as the font enlargement.
;;;1412   */
;;;1413   	LCD_CmdWrite(0x3E);
000ccc  203e              MOVS     r0,#0x3e
000cce  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_CmdWrite
;;;1414   	LCD_DataWrite(WX);
000cd2  b2d8              UXTB     r0,r3
000cd4  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_DataWrite
;;;1415   	LCD_CmdWrite(0x3F);
000cd8  203f              MOVS     r0,#0x3f
000cda  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_CmdWrite
;;;1416   	LCD_DataWrite(HY);
000cde  b2d0              UXTB     r0,r2
000ce0  f85deb04          POP      {lr}
000ce4  f7ffbffe          B.W      LCD_DataWrite
;;;1417   }
;;;1418   //[40h][41h][42h][43h]=========================================================================
                          ENDP

                  Graphic_Cursor_XY PROC
;;;1419   void Graphic_Cursor_XY(unsigned short WX,unsigned short HY)
000ce8  b510              PUSH     {r4,lr}
;;;1420   {
000cea  4603              MOV      r3,r0
000cec  460c              MOV      r4,r1
;;;1421   /*
;;;1422   [40h] Graphic Cursor Horizontal Location[7:0]
;;;1423   [41h] Graphic Cursor Horizontal Location[12:8]
;;;1424   [42h] Graphic Cursor Vertical Location[7:0]
;;;1425   [43h] Graphic Cursor Vertical Location[12:8]
;;;1426   Reference main Window coordination.
;;;1427   */	
;;;1428   	LCD_RegisterWrite(0x40,WX);
000cee  b2d9              UXTB     r1,r3
000cf0  2040              MOVS     r0,#0x40
000cf2  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_RegisterWrite
;;;1429   	LCD_RegisterWrite(0x41,WX>>8);
000cf6  0a19              LSRS     r1,r3,#8
000cf8  2041              MOVS     r0,#0x41
000cfa  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_RegisterWrite
;;;1430   
;;;1431   	LCD_RegisterWrite(0x42,HY);
000cfe  b2e1              UXTB     r1,r4
000d00  2042              MOVS     r0,#0x42
000d02  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_RegisterWrite
;;;1432   	LCD_RegisterWrite(0x43,HY>>8);
000d06  0a21              LSRS     r1,r4,#8
000d08  e8bd4010          POP      {r4,lr}
000d0c  2043              MOVS     r0,#0x43
000d0e  f7ffbffe          B.W      LCD_RegisterWrite
;;;1433   }
;;;1434   //[44h]=========================================================================
                          ENDP

                  Set_Graphic_Cursor_Color_1 PROC
;;;1435   void Set_Graphic_Cursor_Color_1(unsigned char temp)
000d12  4601              MOV      r1,r0
;;;1436   {
;;;1437   /*
;;;1438   [44h] Graphic Cursor Color 0 with 256 Colors
;;;1439   RGB Format [7:0] = RRRGGGBB.
;;;1440   */	
;;;1441   	LCD_RegisterWrite(0x44,temp);
000d14  2044              MOVS     r0,#0x44
000d16  f7ffbffe          B.W      LCD_RegisterWrite
;;;1442   }
;;;1443   //[45h]=========================================================================
                          ENDP

                  Set_Graphic_Cursor_Color_2 PROC
;;;1444   void Set_Graphic_Cursor_Color_2(unsigned char temp)

;;;1445   {
;;;1446   /*
;;;1447   [45h] Graphic Cursor Color 1 with 256 Colors
;;;1448   RGB Format [7:0] = RRRGGGBB.
;;;1449   */	
;;;1450   	LCD_RegisterWrite(0x45,temp);
000d1c  2045              MOVS     r0,#0x45

;;;1451   }
;;;1452   //[50h][51h][52h][53h]=========================================================================
                          ENDP

                  Canvas_Image_Start_address PROC
;;;1453   void Canvas_Image_Start_address(unsigned long Addr)	
000d22  b500              PUSH     {lr}
;;;1454   {
000d24  4603              MOV      r3,r0
;;;1455   /*
;;;1456   [50h] Start address of Canvas [7:0]
;;;1457   [51h] Start address of Canvas [15:8]
;;;1458   [52h] Start address of Canvas [23:16]
;;;1459   [53h] Start address of Canvas [31:24]
;;;1460   */
;;;1461   	LCD_RegisterWrite(0x50,Addr);
000d26  b2d9              UXTB     r1,r3
000d28  2050              MOVS     r0,#0x50
000d2a  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_RegisterWrite
;;;1462   	LCD_RegisterWrite(0x51,Addr>>8);
000d2e  f3c32107          UBFX     r1,r3,#8,#8
000d32  2051              MOVS     r0,#0x51
000d34  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_RegisterWrite
;;;1463   	LCD_RegisterWrite(0x52,Addr>>16);
000d38  f3c34107          UBFX     r1,r3,#16,#8
000d3c  2052              MOVS     r0,#0x52
000d3e  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_RegisterWrite
;;;1464   	LCD_RegisterWrite(0x53,Addr>>24);
000d42  0e19              LSRS     r1,r3,#24
000d44  2053              MOVS     r0,#0x53
000d46  f85deb04          POP      {lr}
000d4a  f7ffbffe          B.W      LCD_RegisterWrite
;;;1465   }
;;;1466   //[54h][55h]=========================================================================
                          ENDP

                  Canvas_image_width PROC
;;;1467   void Canvas_image_width(uint16_t WX)	
000d4e  b500              PUSH     {lr}
;;;1468   {
000d50  4603              MOV      r3,r0
;;;1469   /*
;;;1470   [54h] Canvas image width [7:2]
;;;1471   [55h] Canvas image width [12:8]
;;;1472   */
;;;1473   	LCD_RegisterWrite(0x54,WX);
000d52  b2d9              UXTB     r1,r3
000d54  2054              MOVS     r0,#0x54
000d56  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_RegisterWrite
;;;1474   	LCD_RegisterWrite(0x55,WX>>8);
000d5a  0a19              LSRS     r1,r3,#8
000d5c  2055              MOVS     r0,#0x55
000d5e  f85deb04          POP      {lr}
000d62  f7ffbffe          B.W      LCD_RegisterWrite
;;;1475   }
;;;1476   //[56h][57h][58h][59h]=========================================================================
                          ENDP

                  Active_Window_XY PROC
;;;1477   void Active_Window_XY(uint16_t WX,uint16_t HY)	
000d66  b510              PUSH     {r4,lr}
;;;1478   {
000d68  4603              MOV      r3,r0
000d6a  460c              MOV      r4,r1
;;;1479   /*
;;;1480   [56h] Active Window Upper-Left corner X-coordination [7:0]
;;;1481   [57h] Active Window Upper-Left corner X-coordination [12:8]
;;;1482   [58h] Active Window Upper-Left corner Y-coordination [7:0]
;;;1483   [59h] Active Window Upper-Left corner Y-coordination [12:8]
;;;1484   */
;;;1485   	LCD_RegisterWrite(0x56,WX);
000d6c  b2d9              UXTB     r1,r3
000d6e  2056              MOVS     r0,#0x56
000d70  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_RegisterWrite
;;;1486   	LCD_RegisterWrite(0x57,WX>>8);
000d74  0a19              LSRS     r1,r3,#8
000d76  2057              MOVS     r0,#0x57
000d78  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_RegisterWrite
;;;1487   	
;;;1488   	LCD_RegisterWrite(0x58,HY);
000d7c  b2e1              UXTB     r1,r4
000d7e  2058              MOVS     r0,#0x58
000d80  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_RegisterWrite
;;;1489   	LCD_RegisterWrite(0x59,HY>>8);
000d84  0a21              LSRS     r1,r4,#8
000d86  e8bd4010          POP      {r4,lr}
000d8a  2059              MOVS     r0,#0x59
000d8c  f7ffbffe          B.W      LCD_RegisterWrite
;;;1490   }
;;;1491   ////[5Ah][5Bh][5Ch][5Dh]=========================================================================
                          ENDP

                  Active_Window_WH PROC
;;;1492   void Active_Window_WH(uint16_t WX,uint16_t HY)	
000d90  b510              PUSH     {r4,lr}
;;;1493   {
000d92  4603              MOV      r3,r0
000d94  460c              MOV      r4,r1
;;;1494   /*
;;;1495   [5Ah] Width of Active Window [7:0]
;;;1496   [5Bh] Width of Active Window [12:8]
;;;1497   [5Ch] Height of Active Window [7:0]
;;;1498   [5Dh] Height of Active Window [12:8]
;;;1499   */
;;;1500   	LCD_RegisterWrite(0x5A,WX);
000d96  b2d9              UXTB     r1,r3
000d98  205a              MOVS     r0,#0x5a
000d9a  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_RegisterWrite
;;;1501   	LCD_RegisterWrite(0x5B,WX>>8);
000d9e  0a19              LSRS     r1,r3,#8
000da0  205b              MOVS     r0,#0x5b
000da2  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_RegisterWrite
;;;1502    
;;;1503    	LCD_RegisterWrite(0x5C,HY);
000da6  b2e1              UXTB     r1,r4
000da8  205c              MOVS     r0,#0x5c
000daa  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_RegisterWrite
;;;1504   	LCD_RegisterWrite(0x5D,HY>>8);
000dae  0a21              LSRS     r1,r4,#8
000db0  e8bd4010          POP      {r4,lr}
000db4  205d              MOVS     r0,#0x5d
000db6  f7ffbffe          B.W      LCD_RegisterWrite
;;;1505   }
;;;1506   //5Eh]=========================================================================
                          ENDP

                  Memory_Linear_Mode PROC
;;;1540   }
;;;1541   void Memory_Linear_Mode(void)	
000dba  b500              PUSH     {lr}
;;;1542   {
;;;1543   /*
;;;1544   Canvas addressing mode
;;;1545   0: Block mode (X-Y coordination addressing)
;;;1546   1: linear mode
;;;1547   */
;;;1548   	unsigned char temp;
;;;1549   
;;;1550   	LCD_CmdWrite(0x5E);
000dbc  205e              MOVS     r0,#0x5e
000dbe  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_CmdWrite
;;;1551   	temp = LCD_DataRead();
000dc2  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_DataRead
000dc6  b2c0              UXTB     r0,r0
;;;1552   	temp |= cSetb2;
000dc8  f0400004          ORR      r0,r0,#4
;;;1553   	LCD_DataWrite(temp);
000dcc  f85deb04          POP      {lr}
000dd0  f7ffbffe          B.W      LCD_DataWrite
;;;1554   }
;;;1555   //[5Fh][60h][61h][62h]=========================================================================
                          ENDP

                  Goto_Pixel_XY PROC
;;;1556   void Goto_Pixel_XY(uint16_t WX,uint16_t HY)	
000dd4  b510              PUSH     {r4,lr}
;;;1557   {
000dd6  4603              MOV      r3,r0
000dd8  460c              MOV      r4,r1
;;;1558   /*
;;;1559   [Write]: Set Graphic Read/Write position
;;;1560   [Read]: Current Graphic Read/Write position
;;;1561   Read back is Read position or Write position depends on
;;;1562   REG[5Eh] bit3, Select to read back Graphic Read/Write position.
;;;1563   When DPRAM Linear mode:Graphic Read/Write Position [31:24][23:16][15:8][7:0]
;;;1564   When DPRAM Active window mode:Graphic Read/Write 
;;;1565   Horizontal Position [12:8][7:0], 
;;;1566   Vertical Position [12:8][7:0].
;;;1567   Reference Canvas image coordination. Unit: Pixel
;;;1568   */
;;;1569   	LCD_RegisterWrite(0x5F,WX);
000dda  b2d9              UXTB     r1,r3
000ddc  205f              MOVS     r0,#0x5f
000dde  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_RegisterWrite
;;;1570   	LCD_RegisterWrite(0x60,WX>>8);
000de2  0a19              LSRS     r1,r3,#8
000de4  2060              MOVS     r0,#0x60
000de6  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_RegisterWrite
;;;1571   	
;;;1572   	LCD_RegisterWrite(0x61,HY);
000dea  b2e1              UXTB     r1,r4
000dec  2061              MOVS     r0,#0x61
000dee  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_RegisterWrite
;;;1573   	LCD_RegisterWrite(0x62,HY>>8);
000df2  0a21              LSRS     r1,r4,#8
000df4  e8bd4010          POP      {r4,lr}
000df8  2062              MOVS     r0,#0x62
000dfa  f7ffbffe          B.W      LCD_RegisterWrite
;;;1574   }
;;;1575   void Goto_Linear_Addr(unsigned long Addr)
                          ENDP

                  Goto_Linear_Addr PROC
000dfe  b500              PUSH     {lr}
;;;1576   {
000e00  4603              MOV      r3,r0
;;;1577    LCD_RegisterWrite(0x5F,Addr);
000e02  b2d9              UXTB     r1,r3
000e04  205f              MOVS     r0,#0x5f
000e06  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_RegisterWrite
;;;1578    LCD_RegisterWrite(0x60,Addr>>8); 
000e0a  f3c32107          UBFX     r1,r3,#8,#8
000e0e  2060              MOVS     r0,#0x60
000e10  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_RegisterWrite
;;;1579    LCD_RegisterWrite(0x61,Addr>>16);
000e14  f3c34107          UBFX     r1,r3,#16,#8
000e18  2061              MOVS     r0,#0x61
000e1a  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_RegisterWrite
;;;1580    LCD_RegisterWrite(0x62,Addr>>24);
000e1e  0e19              LSRS     r1,r3,#24
000e20  2062              MOVS     r0,#0x62
000e22  f85deb04          POP      {lr}
000e26  f7ffbffe          B.W      LCD_RegisterWrite
;;;1581   }
;;;1582   //[63h][64h][65h][66h]=========================================================================
                          ENDP

                  Goto_Text_XY PROC
;;;1583   void Goto_Text_XY(unsigned short WX,unsigned short HY)	
000e2a  b510              PUSH     {r4,lr}
;;;1584   {
000e2c  4603              MOV      r3,r0

;;;1585   /*
;;;1586   Write: Set Text Write position
;;;1587   Read: Current Text Write position

;;;1589   Text Write Y-coordination [12:8][7:0]

;;;1591   Unit: Pixel
;;;1592   */
;;;1593   	LCD_RegisterWrite(0x63,WX);

000e32  2063              MOVS     r0,#0x63

000e3a  2064              MOVS     r0,#0x64
000e3c  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_RegisterWrite
;;;1595   	
;;;1596   	LCD_RegisterWrite(0x65,HY);
000e40  b2e1              UXTB     r1,r4
000e42  2065              MOVS     r0,#0x65
000e44  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_RegisterWrite
;;;1597   	LCD_RegisterWrite(0x66,HY>>8);

000e4a  e8bd4010          POP      {r4,lr}
000e4e  2066              MOVS     r0,#0x66
000e50  f7ffbffe          B.W      LCD_RegisterWrite
;;;1598   }
;;;1599   
                          ENDP

                  Start_Line PROC
;;;1615   */

;;;1621   }
;;;1622   void Start_Triangle(void)
                          ENDP

;;;1627   }

                          ENDP

                  Line_Start_XY PROC
;;;1636   //ĎßĆđµă
;;;1637   void Line_Start_XY(unsigned short WX,unsigned short HY)
000e90  b500              PUSH     {lr}
;;;1638   {
000e92  4602              MOV      r2,r0
000e94  460b              MOV      r3,r1
;;;1639   /*
;;;1640   [68h] Draw Line/Square/Triangle Start X-coordination [7:0]
;;;1641   [69h] Draw Line/Square/Triangle Start X-coordination [12:8]
;;;1642   [6Ah] Draw Line/Square/Triangle Start Y-coordination [7:0]
;;;1643   [6Bh] Draw Line/Square/Triangle Start Y-coordination [12:8]
;;;1644   */
;;;1645   	LCD_CmdWrite(0x68);
000e96  2068              MOVS     r0,#0x68
000e98  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_CmdWrite
;;;1646   	LCD_DataWrite(WX);
000e9c  b2d0              UXTB     r0,r2
000e9e  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_DataWrite
;;;1647   
;;;1648   	LCD_CmdWrite(0x69);
000ea2  2069              MOVS     r0,#0x69
000ea4  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_CmdWrite
;;;1649   	LCD_DataWrite(WX>>8);
000ea8  0a10              LSRS     r0,r2,#8
000eaa  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_DataWrite
;;;1650   
;;;1651   	LCD_CmdWrite(0x6A);
000eae  206a              MOVS     r0,#0x6a
000eb0  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_CmdWrite
;;;1652   	LCD_DataWrite(HY);
000eb4  b2d8              UXTB     r0,r3
000eb6  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_DataWrite
;;;1653   
;;;1654   	LCD_CmdWrite(0x6B);
000eba  206b              MOVS     r0,#0x6b
000ebc  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_CmdWrite
;;;1655   	LCD_DataWrite(HY>>8);
000ec0  0a18              LSRS     r0,r3,#8
000ec2  f85deb04          POP      {lr}
000ec6  f7ffbffe          B.W      LCD_DataWrite
;;;1656   }
;;;1657   //[6Ch][6Dh][6Eh][6Fh]=========================================================================
                          ENDP

                  Line_End_XY PROC
;;;1658   //ĎßÖŐµă
;;;1659   void Line_End_XY(unsigned short WX,unsigned short HY)
000eca  b500              PUSH     {lr}
;;;1660   {
000ecc  4602              MOV      r2,r0
000ece  460b              MOV      r3,r1
;;;1661   /*
;;;1662   [6Ch] Draw Line/Square/Triangle End X-coordination [7:0]
;;;1663   [6Dh] Draw Line/Square/Triangle End X-coordination [12:8]
;;;1664   [6Eh] Draw Line/Square/Triangle End Y-coordination [7:0]
;;;1665   [6Fh] Draw Line/Square/Triangle End Y-coordination [12:8]
;;;1666   */
;;;1667   	LCD_CmdWrite(0x6C);
000ed0  206c              MOVS     r0,#0x6c
000ed2  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_CmdWrite
;;;1668   	LCD_DataWrite(WX);
000ed6  b2d0              UXTB     r0,r2
000ed8  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_DataWrite
;;;1669   
;;;1670   	LCD_CmdWrite(0x6D);
000edc  206d              MOVS     r0,#0x6d
000ede  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_CmdWrite
;;;1671   	LCD_DataWrite(WX>>8);
000ee2  0a10              LSRS     r0,r2,#8
000ee4  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_DataWrite
;;;1672   
;;;1673   	LCD_CmdWrite(0x6E);

000eea  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_CmdWrite
;;;1674   	LCD_DataWrite(HY);
000eee  b2d8              UXTB     r0,r3
000ef0  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_DataWrite
;;;1675   
;;;1676   	LCD_CmdWrite(0x6F);
000ef4  206f              MOVS     r0,#0x6f
000ef6  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_CmdWrite
;;;1677   	LCD_DataWrite(HY>>8);

000f00  f7ffbffe          B.W      LCD_DataWrite
;;;1678   }
;;;1679   //[68h]~[73h]=========================================================================
                          ENDP

                  Triangle_Point1_XY PROC
;;;1680   //¤T¨¤-ÂI1

;;;1682   {

;;;1684   [68h] Draw Line/Square/Triangle Start X-coordination [7:0]
;;;1685   [69h] Draw Line/Square/Triangle Start X-coordination [12:8]
;;;1686   [6Ah] Draw Line/Square/Triangle Start Y-coordination [7:0]
;;;1687   [6Bh] Draw Line/Square/Triangle Start Y-coordination [12:8]
;;;1688   */

;;;1690   	LCD_DataWrite(WX);

;;;1691

;;;1696   	LCD_DataWrite(HY);

000f2a  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_DataWrite
;;;1697

                  Triangle_Point3_XY PROC
;;;1723   void Triangle_Point3_XY (unsigned short WX,unsigned short HY)
000f78  b500              PUSH     {lr}
;;;1724   {
000f7a  4602              MOV      r2,r0
000f7c  460b              MOV      r3,r1
;;;1725   /*
;;;1726   [70h] Draw Triangle Point 3 X-coordination [7:0]
;;;1727   [71h] Draw Triangle Point 3 X-coordination [12:8]
;;;1728   [72h] Draw Triangle Point 3 Y-coordination [7:0]
;;;1729   [73h] Draw Triangle Point 3 Y-coordination [12:8]
;;;1730   */
;;;1731   	LCD_CmdWrite(0x70);
000f7e  2070              MOVS     r0,#0x70
000f80  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_CmdWrite
;;;1732   	LCD_DataWrite(WX);
000f84  b2d0              UXTB     r0,r2
000f86  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_DataWrite
;;;1733   
;;;1734   	LCD_CmdWrite(0x71);

000f8c  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_CmdWrite
;;;1735   	LCD_DataWrite(WX>>8);
000f90  0a10              LSRS     r0,r2,#8
000f92  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_DataWrite
;;;1736   
;;;1737   	LCD_CmdWrite(0x72);
000f96  2072              MOVS     r0,#0x72
000f98  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_CmdWrite
;;;1738   	LCD_DataWrite(HY);
000f9c  b2d8              UXTB     r0,r3
000f9e  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_DataWrite
;;;1739   
;;;1740   	LCD_CmdWrite(0x73);
000fa2  2073              MOVS     r0,#0x73
000fa4  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_CmdWrite
;;;1741   	LCD_DataWrite(HY>>8);
000fa8  0a18              LSRS     r0,r3,#8
000faa  f85deb04          POP      {lr}
000fae  f7ffbffe          B.W      LCD_DataWrite
;;;1742   }
;;;1743   //¤č°_ÂI
                          ENDP

                  Square_Start_XY PROC
;;;1744   void Square_Start_XY(unsigned short WX,unsigned short HY)
000fb2  b500              PUSH     {lr}
;;;1745   {
000fb4  4602              MOV      r2,r0
000fb6  460b              MOV      r3,r1
;;;1746   /*
;;;1747   [68h] Draw Line/Square/Triangle Start X-coordination [7:0]
;;;1748   [69h] Draw Line/Square/Triangle Start X-coordination [12:8]
;;;1749   [6Ah] Draw Line/Square/Triangle Start Y-coordination [7:0]
;;;1750   [6Bh] Draw Line/Square/Triangle Start Y-coordination [12:8]
;;;1751   */
;;;1752   	LCD_CmdWrite(0x68);
000fb8  2068              MOVS     r0,#0x68
000fba  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_CmdWrite
;;;1753   	LCD_DataWrite(WX);
000fbe  b2d0              UXTB     r0,r2
000fc0  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_DataWrite
;;;1754   
;;;1755   	LCD_CmdWrite(0x69);
000fc4  2069              MOVS     r0,#0x69
000fc6  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_CmdWrite
;;;1756   	LCD_DataWrite(WX>>8);
000fca  0a10              LSRS     r0,r2,#8
000fcc  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_DataWrite
;;;1757   
;;;1758   	LCD_CmdWrite(0x6A);
000fd0  206a              MOVS     r0,#0x6a
000fd2  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_CmdWrite
;;;1759   	LCD_DataWrite(HY);
000fd6  b2d8              UXTB     r0,r3
000fd8  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_DataWrite
;;;1760   
;;;1761   	LCD_CmdWrite(0x6B);
000fdc  206b              MOVS     r0,#0x6b
000fde  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_CmdWrite
;;;1762   	LCD_DataWrite(HY>>8);
000fe2  0a18              LSRS     r0,r3,#8
000fe4  f85deb04          POP      {lr}
000fe8  f7ffbffe          B.W      LCD_DataWrite
;;;1763   }
;;;1764   
                          ENDP

                  Square_End_XY PROC
;;;1765   void Square_End_XY(uint16_t WX,uint16_t HY)
000fec  b500              PUSH     {lr}
;;;1766   {
000fee  4602              MOV      r2,r0
000ff0  460b              MOV      r3,r1
;;;1767   /*
;;;1768   [6Ch] Draw Line/Square/Triangle End X-coordination [7:0]
;;;1769   [6Dh] Draw Line/Square/Triangle End X-coordination [12:8]
;;;1770   [6Eh] Draw Line/Square/Triangle End Y-coordination [7:0]
;;;1771   [6Fh] Draw Line/Square/Triangle End Y-coordination [12:8]
;;;1772   */
;;;1773   	LCD_CmdWrite(0x6C);
000ff2  206c              MOVS     r0,#0x6c
000ff4  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_CmdWrite
;;;1774   	LCD_DataWrite(WX);
000ff8  b2d0              UXTB     r0,r2
000ffa  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_DataWrite
;;;1775   
;;;1776   	LCD_CmdWrite(0x6D);
000ffe  206d              MOVS     r0,#0x6d
001000  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_CmdWrite
;;;1777   	LCD_DataWrite(WX>>8);
001004  0a10              LSRS     r0,r2,#8
001006  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_DataWrite
;;;1778   
;;;1779   	LCD_CmdWrite(0x6E);
00100a  206e              MOVS     r0,#0x6e
00100c  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_CmdWrite
;;;1780   	LCD_DataWrite(HY);
001010  b2d8              UXTB     r0,r3
001012  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_DataWrite
;;;1781   
;;;1782   	LCD_CmdWrite(0x6F);
001016  206f              MOVS     r0,#0x6f
001018  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_CmdWrite
;;;1783   	LCD_DataWrite(HY>>8);
00101c  0a18              LSRS     r0,r3,#8
00101e  f85deb04          POP      {lr}
001022  f7ffbffe          B.W      LCD_DataWrite
;;;1784   }
;;;1785   
                          ENDP

                  Point PROC
;;;1786   //-----------------------------------------------------
;;;1787   void Point(uint16_t x,uint16_t y,uint16_t color)
001026  b510              PUSH     {r4,lr}
;;;1788   { //x=799-x;
001028  4603              MOV      r3,r0
00102a  460c              MOV      r4,r1
;;;1789   	Check_Mem_WR_FIFO_not_Full();
00102c  f7fffffe          BL       Check_Mem_WR_FIFO_not_Full
;;;1790   	LCD_CmdWrite(0x5e);
001030  205e              MOVS     r0,#0x5e
001032  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_CmdWrite
;;;1791   	LCD_DataWrite(0x01);
001036  2001              MOVS     r0,#1
001038  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_DataWrite
;;;1792   	
;;;1793   	LCD_CmdWrite(0x5f);
00103c  205f              MOVS     r0,#0x5f
00103e  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_CmdWrite
;;;1794   	LCD_DataWrite(x);
001042  b2d8              UXTB     r0,r3
001044  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_DataWrite
;;;1795   	LCD_CmdWrite(0x60);
001048  2060              MOVS     r0,#0x60
00104a  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_CmdWrite
;;;1796   	LCD_DataWrite(x>>8);
00104e  0a18              LSRS     r0,r3,#8
001050  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_DataWrite
;;;1797   
;;;1798   	LCD_CmdWrite(0x61);
001054  2061              MOVS     r0,#0x61
001056  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_CmdWrite
;;;1799   	LCD_DataWrite(y);
00105a  b2e0              UXTB     r0,r4
00105c  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_DataWrite
;;;1800   	LCD_CmdWrite(0x62);
001060  2062              MOVS     r0,#0x62
001062  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_CmdWrite
;;;1801   	LCD_DataWrite(y>>8);
001066  0a20              LSRS     r0,r4,#8
001068  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_DataWrite
;;;1802   		
;;;1803   	LCD_CmdWrite(0x04);
00106c  2004              MOVS     r0,#4
00106e  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_CmdWrite
;;;1804   	LCD_DataWrite_Pixel(color);
001072  e8bd4010          POP      {r4,lr}
001076  4610              MOV      r0,r2
001078  f7ffbffe          B.W      LCD_DataWrite_Pixel
;;;1805   }
;;;1806   
                          ENDP

                  Lines PROC
;;;1807   void Lines(uint16_t x1 ,uint16_t y1 ,uint16_t x2,uint16_t y2,uint16_t color)
00107c  b570              PUSH     {r4-r6,lr}
;;;1808   { 
00107e  4605              MOV      r5,r0
001080  9c04              LDR      r4,[sp,#0x10]
001082  460e              MOV      r6,r1
;;;1809   	uint8_t temp;
;;;1810   	//x1=799-x1,x2=799-x2;
;;;1811   	LCD_CmdWrite(0x68);
001084  2068              MOVS     r0,#0x68
001086  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_CmdWrite
;;;1812   	LCD_DataWrite(x1);
00108a  b2e8              UXTB     r0,r5
00108c  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_DataWrite
;;;1813   	LCD_CmdWrite(0x69);
001090  2069              MOVS     r0,#0x69
001092  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_CmdWrite
;;;1814   	LCD_DataWrite(x1>>8);
001096  0a28              LSRS     r0,r5,#8
001098  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_DataWrite
;;;1815   
;;;1816   	LCD_CmdWrite(0x6A);
00109c  206a              MOVS     r0,#0x6a
00109e  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_CmdWrite
;;;1817   	LCD_DataWrite(y1);
0010a2  b2f0              UXTB     r0,r6
0010a4  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_DataWrite
;;;1818   	LCD_CmdWrite(0x6B);
0010a8  206b              MOVS     r0,#0x6b
0010aa  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_CmdWrite
;;;1819   	LCD_DataWrite(y1>>8);
0010ae  0a30              LSRS     r0,r6,#8
0010b0  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_DataWrite
;;;1820   	
;;;1821   	LCD_CmdWrite(0x6C);
0010b4  206c              MOVS     r0,#0x6c
0010b6  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_CmdWrite
;;;1822   	LCD_DataWrite(x2);
0010ba  b2d0              UXTB     r0,r2
0010bc  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_DataWrite
;;;1823   	LCD_CmdWrite(0x6D);
0010c0  206d              MOVS     r0,#0x6d
0010c2  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_CmdWrite
;;;1824   	LCD_DataWrite(x2>>8);
0010c6  0a10              LSRS     r0,r2,#8
0010c8  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_DataWrite
;;;1825   
;;;1826   	LCD_CmdWrite(0x6E);
0010cc  206e              MOVS     r0,#0x6e
0010ce  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_CmdWrite
;;;1827   	LCD_DataWrite(y2);
0010d2  b2d8              UXTB     r0,r3
0010d4  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_DataWrite
;;;1828   	LCD_CmdWrite(0x6F);
0010d8  206f              MOVS     r0,#0x6f
0010da  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_CmdWrite
;;;1829   	LCD_DataWrite(y2>>8);
0010de  0a18              LSRS     r0,r3,#8
0010e0  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_DataWrite
;;;1830   	
;;;1831   	temp=color;
;;;1832   	temp=temp<<3;
0010e4  06e0              LSLS     r0,r4,#27
0010e6  0e02              LSRS     r2,r0,#24
;;;1833   	LCD_CmdWrite(0xD2);
0010e8  20d2              MOVS     r0,#0xd2
0010ea  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_CmdWrite
;;;1834   	LCD_DataWrite(temp);
0010ee  4610              MOV      r0,r2
0010f0  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_DataWrite
;;;1835   	temp=color>>3;
0010f4  08e0              LSRS     r0,r4,#3
;;;1836   	temp=temp & 0xfc;
0010f6  f00002fc          AND      r2,r0,#0xfc
;;;1837   	LCD_CmdWrite(0xD3);
0010fa  20d3              MOVS     r0,#0xd3
0010fc  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_CmdWrite
;;;1838   	LCD_DataWrite(temp);
001100  4610              MOV      r0,r2
001102  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_DataWrite
;;;1839   	temp=color>>8;
001106  0a20              LSRS     r0,r4,#8
;;;1840   	temp=temp & 0xf8;
001108  f00002f8          AND      r2,r0,#0xf8
;;;1841   	LCD_CmdWrite(0xD4);
00110c  20d4              MOVS     r0,#0xd4
00110e  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_CmdWrite
;;;1842   	LCD_DataWrite(temp);
001112  4610              MOV      r0,r2
001114  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_DataWrite
;;;1843   	
;;;1844   	LCD_CmdWrite(0x67);
001118  2067              MOVS     r0,#0x67
00111a  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_CmdWrite
;;;1845   	LCD_DataWrite(0x80);//B10000000
00111e  2080              MOVS     r0,#0x80
001120  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_DataWrite
;;;1846   	Check_Busy_Draw();
001124  e8bd4070          POP      {r4-r6,lr}
001128  f7ffbffe          B.W      Check_Busy_Draw
;;;1847   	/*int x,y,dx,dy,Dx,Dy,e,i;
;;;1848     Dx=x2-x1;
;;;1849     Dy=y2-y1;
;;;1850     dx=abs(x2-x1); //computes the absolute value of the floating-point number x2-x1.
;;;1851     dy=abs(y2-y1);
;;;1852     x=x1;
;;;1853     y=y1;
;;;1854     if(dy>dx)
;;;1855     {
;;;1856       e=-dy;
;;;1857       for(i=0;i<dy;i++)
;;;1858       {
;;;1859         Point(x,y,color);
;;;1860         if(Dy>=0) y++;  
;;;1861         else y--;   
;;;1862         e+=2*dx;
;;;1863         if(e>=0)
;;;1864         {
;;;1865           if(Dx>=0) x++;
;;;1866           else x--; 
;;;1867           e-=2*dy;
;;;1868         }
;;;1869       }
;;;1870     }
;;;1871     else
;;;1872     {
;;;1873       e=-dx;
;;;1874       for(i=0;i<dx;i++)
;;;1875       {
;;;1876         Point(x,y,color);
;;;1877         if(Dx>=0) x++;
;;;1878         else x--;
;;;1879         e+=2*dy;
;;;1880         if(e>=0)
;;;1881         {
;;;1882           if(Dy>=0) y++;
;;;1883           else y--;
;;;1884           e-=2*dx;
;;;1885         }
;;;1886       }
;;;1887     }*/
;;;1888   }	
;;;1889   void Images(uint16_t x,uint16_t y,const char h[],uint16_t number,uint16_t color1,uint16_t color2) 
                          ENDP

                  Images PROC
00112c  e92d4fff          PUSH     {r0-r11,lr}
;;;1890   {
001130  b083              SUB      sp,sp,#0xc
;;;1891    int16_t dx,i,j,k,color;
;;;1892    uint8_t a,b,c;
;;;1893    a=h[0];
001132  9805              LDR      r0,[sp,#0x14]
001134  f8908000          LDRB     r8,[r0,#0]
;;;1894    b=h[1];
001138  9805              LDR      r0,[sp,#0x14]
00113a  7840              LDRB     r0,[r0,#1]
00113c  9000              STR      r0,[sp,#0]
;;;1895    dx=2+a*b*number;
00113e  9800              LDR      r0,[sp,#0]
001140  fb18f000          SMULBB   r0,r8,r0
001144  4358              MULS     r0,r3,r0
001146  1c80              ADDS     r0,r0,#2
001148  b200              SXTH     r0,r0
00114a  9001              STR      r0,[sp,#4]
;;;1896    for (j=0;j<b;j++)
00114c  2700              MOVS     r7,#0
00114e  e02e              B        |L1.4526|
                  |L1.4432|
;;;1897   	{
;;;1898   			for ( i=0;i<a;i++)
001150  2500              MOVS     r5,#0
001152  e028              B        |L1.4518|
                  |L1.4436|
;;;1899         {   
;;;1900   				c=h[dx+j*a+i] ;
001154  9805              LDR      r0,[sp,#0x14]
001156  fb070108          MLA      r1,r7,r8,r0
00115a  9801              LDR      r0,[sp,#4]
00115c  4428              ADD      r0,r0,r5
00115e  5c0e              LDRB     r6,[r1,r0]
;;;1901           for (k=0;k<8 ;k++)
001160  2400              MOVS     r4,#0
;;;1902            {    
;;;1903   					 if (c&0x80)  color=color1;
001162  9810              LDR      r0,[sp,#0x40]
001164  fa0ff980          SXTH     r9,r0
;;;1904              else         color=color2;
001168  9811              LDR      r0,[sp,#0x44]
00116a  fa0ffa80          SXTH     r10,r0
;;;1905   					 Point(x+i*8+k,y+j,color);
00116e  9804              LDR      r0,[sp,#0x10]
001170  eb000b07          ADD      r11,r0,r7
001174  9803              LDR      r0,[sp,#0xc]
001176  eb0000c5          ADD      r0,r0,r5,LSL #3
00117a  9002              STR      r0,[sp,#8]
                  |L1.4476|
00117c  0630              LSLS     r0,r6,#24             ;1903
00117e  d501              BPL      |L1.4484|
001180  4648              MOV      r0,r9                 ;1903
001182  e000              B        |L1.4486|
                  |L1.4484|
001184  4650              MOV      r0,r10                ;1904
                  |L1.4486|
001186  b282              UXTH     r2,r0
001188  9802              LDR      r0,[sp,#8]
00118a  fa1ff18b          UXTH     r1,r11
00118e  4420              ADD      r0,r0,r4
001190  b280              UXTH     r0,r0
001192  f7fffffe          BL       Point
;;;1906              c=c<<1;
001196  0670              LSLS     r0,r6,#25
001198  0e06              LSRS     r6,r0,#24
00119a  1c64              ADDS     r4,r4,#1              ;1901
00119c  b224              SXTH     r4,r4                 ;1901
00119e  2c08              CMP      r4,#8                 ;1901
0011a0  dbec              BLT      |L1.4476|
0011a2  1c6d              ADDS     r5,r5,#1              ;1898
0011a4  b22d              SXTH     r5,r5                 ;1898
                  |L1.4518|
0011a6  4545              CMP      r5,r8                 ;1898
0011a8  dbd4              BLT      |L1.4436|
0011aa  1c7f              ADDS     r7,r7,#1              ;1896
0011ac  b23f              SXTH     r7,r7                 ;1896
                  |L1.4526|
0011ae  9800              LDR      r0,[sp,#0]            ;1896
0011b0  4287              CMP      r7,r0                 ;1896
0011b2  dbcd              BLT      |L1.4432|
;;;1907            }
;;;1908   		   }
;;;1909   		}	
;;;1910   }	
0011b4  b007              ADD      sp,sp,#0x1c
0011b6  e8bd8ff0          POP      {r4-r11,pc}
;;;1911   /*---------------------------------------*/
                          ENDP

                  MPU_Memory_Write_Window_8bit PROC
;;;1912   void MPU_Memory_Write_Window_8bit  //???????????????
0011ba  e92d4ff0          PUSH     {r4-r11,lr}
;;;1913   (
;;;1914    uint16_t x            // x??
;;;1915   ,uint16_t y            // y??
;;;1916   ,const char g[]
;;;1917   ,uint16_t number
;;;1918   ,uint16_t color1
;;;1919   ,uint16_t color2   // ??(8?)
;;;1920   )
;;;1921   { int16_t dx,i,j,k,color;
0011be  4604              MOV      r4,r0
0011c0  460d              MOV      r5,r1
0011c2  4690              MOV      r8,r2
;;;1922     uint8_t a,b,c;
;;;1923     a=g[0];
0011c4  f8987000          LDRB     r7,[r8,#0]
;;;1924     b=g[1];
0011c8  f8989001          LDRB     r9,[r8,#1]
;;;1925     dx=2+a*b*number;
0011cc  fb17f009          SMULBB   r0,r7,r9
0011d0  4358              MULS     r0,r3,r0
0011d2  1c80              ADDS     r0,r0,#2
0011d4  fa0ffa80          SXTH     r10,r0
;;;1926   	Graphic_Mode();
0011d8  f7fffffe          BL       Graphic_Mode
;;;1927     Active_Window_XY(x,y);
0011dc  4629              MOV      r1,r5
0011de  4620              MOV      r0,r4
0011e0  f7fffffe          BL       Active_Window_XY
;;;1928   	Active_Window_WH(a*8,b);
0011e4  00f8              LSLS     r0,r7,#3
0011e6  4649              MOV      r1,r9
0011e8  f7fffffe          BL       Active_Window_WH
;;;1929   	Goto_Pixel_XY(x,y);
0011ec  4629              MOV      r1,r5
0011ee  4620              MOV      r0,r4
0011f0  f7fffffe          BL       Goto_Pixel_XY
;;;1930   	LCD_CmdWrite(0x04);
0011f4  2004              MOVS     r0,#4
0011f6  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_CmdWrite
;;;1931   	for(j=0;j<b;j++)
0011fa  2600              MOVS     r6,#0
0011fc  e022              B        |L1.4676|
                  |L1.4606|
;;;1932   	{
;;;1933   		for(i=0;i<a;i++)
0011fe  2500              MOVS     r5,#0
001200  e01c              B        |L1.4668|
                  |L1.4610|
;;;1934   		{ 
;;;1935   			c=g[dx+j*a+i] ;
001202  fb068007          MLA      r0,r6,r7,r8
001206  eb0a0105          ADD      r1,r10,r5
00120a  5c44              LDRB     r4,[r0,r1]
;;;1936   			for (k=0;k<8 ;k++)
00120c  2300              MOVS     r3,#0
;;;1937            {    
;;;1938   					 if (c&0x80)  color=color1;
00120e  9809              LDR      r0,[sp,#0x24]
001210  b202              SXTH     r2,r0
;;;1939              else         color=color2;
001212  980a              LDR      r0,[sp,#0x28]
001214  fa0ffb80          SXTH     r11,r0
                  |L1.4632|
001218  0620              LSLS     r0,r4,#24             ;1938
00121a  d501              BPL      |L1.4640|
00121c  4611              MOV      r1,r2                 ;1938
00121e  e000              B        |L1.4642|
                  |L1.4640|
001220  4659              MOV      r1,r11
                  |L1.4642|
;;;1940   					 Check_Mem_WR_FIFO_not_Full();
001222  f7fffffe          BL       Check_Mem_WR_FIFO_not_Full
;;;1941   					 LCD_DataWrite_Pixel(color);
001226  b288              UXTH     r0,r1
001228  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_DataWrite_Pixel
;;;1942              c=c<<1;
00122c  0660              LSLS     r0,r4,#25
00122e  0e04              LSRS     r4,r0,#24
001230  1c5b              ADDS     r3,r3,#1              ;1936
001232  b21b              SXTH     r3,r3                 ;1936
001234  2b08              CMP      r3,#8                 ;1936
001236  dbef              BLT      |L1.4632|
001238  1c6d              ADDS     r5,r5,#1              ;1933
00123a  b22d              SXTH     r5,r5                 ;1933
                  |L1.4668|
00123c  42bd              CMP      r5,r7                 ;1933
00123e  dbe0              BLT      |L1.4610|
001240  1c76              ADDS     r6,r6,#1              ;1931
001242  b236              SXTH     r6,r6                 ;1931
                  |L1.4676|
001244  454e              CMP      r6,r9                 ;1931
001246  dbda              BLT      |L1.4606|
;;;1943            } 
;;;1944   			
;;;1945   		}
;;;1946   	}
;;;1947   	Check_Mem_WR_FIFO_Empty();
001248  f7fffffe          BL       Check_Mem_WR_FIFO_Empty
;;;1948   	Active_Window_XY(0,0);
00124c  2100              MOVS     r1,#0
00124e  4608              MOV      r0,r1
001250  f7fffffe          BL       Active_Window_XY
;;;1949   	Active_Window_WH(LCD_XSIZE_TFT,LCD_YSIZE_TFT);
001254  e8bd4ff0          POP      {r4-r11,lr}
001258  f44f7116          MOV      r1,#0x258
00125c  f44f6080          MOV      r0,#0x400
001260  e7fe              B        Active_Window_WH
;;;1950   }
;;;1951   /*---------------------------------------*/
                          ENDP

                  Foreground_color_65k PROC
;;;2967   } 
;;;2968   void Foreground_color_65k(uint16_t temp)
001278  b500              PUSH     {lr}
;;;2969   {
00127a  4602              MOV      r2,r0
;;;2970       LCD_CmdWrite(0xD2);
00127c  20d2              MOVS     r0,#0xd2
00127e  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_CmdWrite
;;;2971    	LCD_DataWrite(temp>>8);
001282  0a10              LSRS     r0,r2,#8
001284  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_DataWrite
;;;2972    
;;;2973       LCD_CmdWrite(0xD3);
001288  20d3              MOVS     r0,#0xd3
00128a  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_CmdWrite
;;;2974    	LCD_DataWrite(temp>>3);
00128e  f3c200c7          UBFX     r0,r2,#3,#8
001292  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_DataWrite
;;;2975     
;;;2976       LCD_CmdWrite(0xD4);
001296  20d4              MOVS     r0,#0xd4
001298  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_CmdWrite
;;;2977    	LCD_DataWrite(temp<<3);
00129c  06d0              LSLS     r0,r2,#27
00129e  0e00              LSRS     r0,r0,#24
0012a0  f85deb04          POP      {lr}
0012a4  f7ffbffe          B.W      LCD_DataWrite
;;;2978   }
;;;2979   //[93h][94h][95h][96h]=========================================================================
                          ENDP

                  Fills PROC
;;;1951   /*---------------------------------------*/
;;;1952   void Fills
0012a8  b5f0              PUSH     {r4-r7,lr}
;;;1953   (
;;;1954    uint16_t X1                // X1Î»ÖĂ
;;;1955   ,uint16_t Y1                // Y1Î»ÖĂ
;;;1956   ,uint16_t X2                // X2Î»ÖĂ
;;;1957   ,uint16_t Y2                // Y2Î»ÖĂ
;;;1958   ,unsigned long ForegroundColor    // ±łľ°ŃŐÉ«
;;;1959   )
;;;1960   {
0012aa  4606              MOV      r6,r0
0012ac  9805              LDR      r0,[sp,#0x14]
0012ae  460f              MOV      r7,r1
0012b0  4614              MOV      r4,r2
0012b2  461d              MOV      r5,r3
;;;1961   	Foreground_color_65k(ForegroundColor);
0012b4  b280              UXTH     r0,r0
0012b6  f7fffffe          BL       Foreground_color_65k
;;;1962     Square_Start_XY(X1,Y1);
0012ba  4639              MOV      r1,r7
0012bc  4630              MOV      r0,r6
0012be  f7fffffe          BL       Square_Start_XY
;;;1963     Square_End_XY(X2,Y2);
0012c2  4629              MOV      r1,r5
0012c4  4620              MOV      r0,r4
0012c6  f7fffffe          BL       Square_End_XY
;;;1964     Start_Square_Fill();
0012ca  f7fffffe          BL       Start_Square_Fill
;;;1965     Check_2D_Busy();
0012ce  e8bd40f0          POP      {r4-r7,lr}
0012d2  f7ffbffe          B.W      Check_2D_Busy
;;;1966   }
;;;1967   void ellipse(uint16_t x1 ,uint16_t y1 ,uint16_t r1,uint16_t r2,uint16_t color)
                          ENDP

                  ellipse PROC
0012d6  b570              PUSH     {r4-r6,lr}
;;;1968   { uint8_t temp;
0012d8  4605              MOV      r5,r0
0012da  9c04              LDR      r4,[sp,#0x10]
0012dc  460e              MOV      r6,r1
;;;1969   	LCD_CmdWrite(0x7b);
0012de  207b              MOVS     r0,#0x7b
0012e0  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_CmdWrite
;;;1970   	LCD_DataWrite(x1);
0012e4  b2e8              UXTB     r0,r5
0012e6  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_DataWrite
;;;1971   	LCD_CmdWrite(0x7c);
0012ea  207c              MOVS     r0,#0x7c
0012ec  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_CmdWrite
;;;1972   	LCD_DataWrite(x1>>8);
0012f0  0a28              LSRS     r0,r5,#8
0012f2  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_DataWrite
;;;1973   
;;;1974   	LCD_CmdWrite(0x7d);
0012f6  207d              MOVS     r0,#0x7d
0012f8  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_CmdWrite
;;;1975   	LCD_DataWrite(y1);
0012fc  b2f0              UXTB     r0,r6
0012fe  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_DataWrite
;;;1976   	LCD_CmdWrite(0x7e);
001302  207e              MOVS     r0,#0x7e
001304  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_CmdWrite
;;;1977   	LCD_DataWrite(y1>>8);
001308  0a30              LSRS     r0,r6,#8
00130a  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_DataWrite
;;;1978   	
;;;1979   	LCD_CmdWrite(0x77);
00130e  2077              MOVS     r0,#0x77
001310  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_CmdWrite
;;;1980   	LCD_DataWrite(r1);
001314  b2d0              UXTB     r0,r2
001316  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_DataWrite
;;;1981   	LCD_CmdWrite(0x78);
00131a  2078              MOVS     r0,#0x78
00131c  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_CmdWrite
;;;1982   	LCD_DataWrite(r1>>8);
001320  0a10              LSRS     r0,r2,#8
001322  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_DataWrite
;;;1983   
;;;1984   	LCD_CmdWrite(0x79);
001326  2079              MOVS     r0,#0x79
001328  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_CmdWrite
;;;1985   	LCD_DataWrite(r2);
00132c  b2d8              UXTB     r0,r3
00132e  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_DataWrite
;;;1986   	LCD_CmdWrite(0x7a);
001332  207a              MOVS     r0,#0x7a
001334  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_CmdWrite
;;;1987   	LCD_DataWrite(r2>>8);
001338  0a18              LSRS     r0,r3,#8
00133a  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_DataWrite
;;;1988   	
;;;1989   	temp=color;
;;;1990   	temp=temp<<3;
00133e  06e0              LSLS     r0,r4,#27
001340  0e02              LSRS     r2,r0,#24
;;;1991   	LCD_CmdWrite(0xD2);
001342  20d2              MOVS     r0,#0xd2
001344  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_CmdWrite
;;;1992   	LCD_DataWrite(temp);
001348  4610              MOV      r0,r2
00134a  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_DataWrite
;;;1993   	temp=color>>3;
00134e  08e0              LSRS     r0,r4,#3
;;;1994   	temp=temp & 0xfc;
001350  f00002fc          AND      r2,r0,#0xfc
;;;1995   	LCD_CmdWrite(0xD3);
001354  20d3              MOVS     r0,#0xd3
001356  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_CmdWrite
;;;1996   	LCD_DataWrite(temp);
00135a  4610              MOV      r0,r2
00135c  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_DataWrite
;;;1997   	temp=color>>8;
001360  0a20              LSRS     r0,r4,#8
;;;1998   	temp=temp & 0xf8;
001362  f00002f8          AND      r2,r0,#0xf8
;;;1999   	LCD_CmdWrite(0xD4);
001366  20d4              MOVS     r0,#0xd4
001368  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_CmdWrite
;;;2000   	LCD_DataWrite(temp);
00136c  4610              MOV      r0,r2
00136e  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_DataWrite
;;;2001   	
;;;2002   	LCD_CmdWrite(0x76);
001372  2076              MOVS     r0,#0x76
001374  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_CmdWrite
;;;2003   	LCD_DataWrite(0x80);//B10000000
001378  e8bd4070          POP      {r4-r6,lr}
00137c  2080              MOVS     r0,#0x80
00137e  f7ffbffe          B.W      LCD_DataWrite
;;;2004   	
;;;2005   }	
;;;2006   
                          ENDP

                  Circle_Center_XY PROC
;;;2122   //¶ę¤¤¤ß
;;;2123   void Circle_Center_XY(unsigned short WX,unsigned short HY)
0014a0  b500              PUSH     {lr}
;;;2124   {
0014a2  4602              MOV      r2,r0
0014a4  460b              MOV      r3,r1
;;;2125   /*
;;;2126   [7Bh] Draw Circle/Ellipse/Circle Square Center X-coordination [7:0]
;;;2127   [7Ch] Draw Circle/Ellipse/Circle Square Center X-coordination [12:8]
;;;2128   [7Dh] Draw Circle/Ellipse/Circle Square Center Y-coordination [7:0]
;;;2129   [7Eh] Draw Circle/Ellipse/Circle Square Center Y-coordination [12:8]
;;;2130   */
;;;2131   	LCD_CmdWrite(0x7B);
0014a6  207b              MOVS     r0,#0x7b
0014a8  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_CmdWrite
;;;2132   	LCD_DataWrite(WX);
0014ac  b2d0              UXTB     r0,r2
0014ae  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_DataWrite
;;;2133   
;;;2134   	LCD_CmdWrite(0x7C);
0014b2  207c              MOVS     r0,#0x7c
0014b4  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_CmdWrite
;;;2135   	LCD_DataWrite(WX>>8);
0014b8  0a10              LSRS     r0,r2,#8
0014ba  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_DataWrite
;;;2136   
;;;2137   	LCD_CmdWrite(0x7D);
0014be  207d              MOVS     r0,#0x7d
0014c0  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_CmdWrite
;;;2138   	LCD_DataWrite(HY);
0014c4  b2d8              UXTB     r0,r3
0014c6  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_DataWrite
;;;2139   
;;;2140   	LCD_CmdWrite(0x7E);
0014ca  207e              MOVS     r0,#0x7e
0014cc  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_CmdWrite
;;;2141   	LCD_DataWrite(HY>>8);
0014d0  0a18              LSRS     r0,r3,#8
0014d2  f85deb04          POP      {lr}
0014d6  f7ffbffe          B.W      LCD_DataWrite
;;;2142   }
;;;2143   //ľň¶ę¤¤¤ß
                          ENDP

                  Ellipse_Center_XY PROC
;;;2144   void Ellipse_Center_XY(unsigned short WX,unsigned short HY)
0014da  b500              PUSH     {lr}
;;;2145   {
0014dc  4602              MOV      r2,r0
0014de  460b              MOV      r3,r1
;;;2146   /*
;;;2147   [7Bh] Draw Circle/Ellipse/Circle Square Center X-coordination [7:0]
;;;2148   [7Ch] Draw Circle/Ellipse/Circle Square Center X-coordination [12:8]
;;;2149   [7Dh] Draw Circle/Ellipse/Circle Square Center Y-coordination [7:0]
;;;2150   [7Eh] Draw Circle/Ellipse/Circle Square Center Y-coordination [12:8]
;;;2151   */
;;;2152   	LCD_CmdWrite(0x7B);
0014e0  207b              MOVS     r0,#0x7b
0014e2  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_CmdWrite
;;;2153   	LCD_DataWrite(WX);
0014e6  b2d0              UXTB     r0,r2
0014e8  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_DataWrite
;;;2154   
;;;2155   	LCD_CmdWrite(0x7C);
0014ec  207c              MOVS     r0,#0x7c
0014ee  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_CmdWrite
;;;2156   	LCD_DataWrite(WX>>8);
0014f2  0a10              LSRS     r0,r2,#8
0014f4  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_DataWrite
;;;2157   
;;;2158   	LCD_CmdWrite(0x7D);
0014f8  207d              MOVS     r0,#0x7d
0014fa  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_CmdWrite
;;;2159   	LCD_DataWrite(HY);
0014fe  b2d8              UXTB     r0,r3
001500  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_DataWrite
;;;2160   
;;;2161   	LCD_CmdWrite(0x7E);
001504  207e              MOVS     r0,#0x7e
001506  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_CmdWrite
;;;2162   	LCD_DataWrite(HY>>8);
00150a  0a18              LSRS     r0,r3,#8
00150c  f85deb04          POP      {lr}
001510  f7ffbffe          B.W      LCD_DataWrite
;;;2163   }
;;;2164   //¶ęĄb®|
                          ENDP

                  Circle_Radius_R PROC
;;;2165   void Circle_Radius_R(unsigned short WX)
001514  b500              PUSH     {lr}
;;;2166   {
001516  4602              MOV      r2,r0
;;;2167   /*
;;;2168   [77h] Draw Circle/Ellipse/Circle Square Major radius [7:0]
;;;2169   [78h] Draw Circle/Ellipse/Circle Square Major radius [12:8]
;;;2170   [79h] Draw Circle/Ellipse/Circle Square Minor radius [7:0]
;;;2171   [7Ah] Draw Circle/Ellipse/Circle Square Minor radius [12:8]
;;;2172   */
;;;2173   	LCD_CmdWrite(0x77);
001518  2077              MOVS     r0,#0x77
00151a  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_CmdWrite
;;;2174   	LCD_DataWrite(WX);
00151e  b2d0              UXTB     r0,r2
001520  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_DataWrite
;;;2175   
;;;2176   	LCD_CmdWrite(0x78);
001524  2078              MOVS     r0,#0x78
001526  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_CmdWrite
;;;2177   	LCD_DataWrite(WX>>8);
00152a  0a13              LSRS     r3,r2,#8
00152c  4618              MOV      r0,r3
00152e  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_DataWrite
;;;2178   
;;;2179   	LCD_CmdWrite(0x79);
001532  2079              MOVS     r0,#0x79
001534  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_CmdWrite
;;;2180   	LCD_DataWrite(WX);
001538  b2d0              UXTB     r0,r2
00153a  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_DataWrite
;;;2181   
;;;2182   	LCD_CmdWrite(0x7A);
00153e  207a              MOVS     r0,#0x7a
001540  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_CmdWrite
;;;2183   	LCD_DataWrite(WX>>8);
001544  4618              MOV      r0,r3
001546  f85deb04          POP      {lr}
00154a  f7ffbffe          B.W      LCD_DataWrite
;;;2184   }
;;;2185   
                          ENDP

                  Ellipse_Radius_RxRy PROC
;;;2186   //ľň¶ęĄb®|
;;;2187   void Ellipse_Radius_RxRy(unsigned short WX,unsigned short HY)
00154e  b500              PUSH     {lr}
;;;2188   {
001550  4602              MOV      r2,r0
001552  460b              MOV      r3,r1
;;;2189   /*
;;;2190   [77h] Draw Circle/Ellipse/Circle Square Major radius [7:0]
;;;2191   [78h] Draw Circle/Ellipse/Circle Square Major radius [12:8]
;;;2192   [79h] Draw Circle/Ellipse/Circle Square Minor radius [7:0]
;;;2193   [7Ah] Draw Circle/Ellipse/Circle Square Minor radius [12:8]
;;;2194   */
;;;2195   	LCD_CmdWrite(0x77);
001554  2077              MOVS     r0,#0x77
001556  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_CmdWrite
;;;2196   	LCD_DataWrite(WX);
00155a  b2d0              UXTB     r0,r2
00155c  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_DataWrite
;;;2197   
;;;2198   	LCD_CmdWrite(0x78);
001560  2078              MOVS     r0,#0x78
001562  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_CmdWrite
;;;2199   	LCD_DataWrite(WX>>8);
001566  0a10              LSRS     r0,r2,#8
001568  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_DataWrite
;;;2200   
;;;2201   	LCD_CmdWrite(0x79);
00156c  2079              MOVS     r0,#0x79
00156e  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_CmdWrite
;;;2202   	LCD_DataWrite(HY);
001572  b2d8              UXTB     r0,r3
001574  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_DataWrite
;;;2203   
;;;2204   	LCD_CmdWrite(0x7A);
001578  207a              MOVS     r0,#0x7a
00157a  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_CmdWrite
;;;2205   	LCD_DataWrite(HY>>8);
00157e  0a18              LSRS     r0,r3,#8
001580  f85deb04          POP      {lr}
001584  f7ffbffe          B.W      LCD_DataWrite
;;;2206   }
;;;2207   
                          ENDP

                  Circle_Square_Radius_RxRy PROC
;;;2208   //č§ÎÂŕ¨b®|
;;;2209   void Circle_Square_Radius_RxRy(unsigned short WX,unsigned short HY)
001588  b500              PUSH     {lr}
;;;2210   {
00158a  4602              MOV      r2,r0
00158c  460b              MOV      r3,r1
;;;2211   /*
;;;2212   [77h] Draw Circle/Ellipse/Circle Square Major radius [7:0]
;;;2213   [78h] Draw Circle/Ellipse/Circle Square Major radius [12:8]
;;;2214   [79h] Draw Circle/Ellipse/Circle Square Minor radius [7:0]
;;;2215   [7Ah] Draw Circle/Ellipse/Circle Square Minor radius [12:8]
;;;2216   */
;;;2217   	LCD_CmdWrite(0x77);
00158e  2077              MOVS     r0,#0x77
001590  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_CmdWrite
;;;2218   	LCD_DataWrite(WX);
001594  b2d0              UXTB     r0,r2
001596  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_DataWrite
;;;2219   
;;;2220   	LCD_CmdWrite(0x78);
00159a  2078              MOVS     r0,#0x78
00159c  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_CmdWrite
;;;2221   	LCD_DataWrite(WX>>8);
0015a0  0a10              LSRS     r0,r2,#8
0015a2  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_DataWrite
;;;2222   
;;;2223   	LCD_CmdWrite(0x79);
0015a6  2079              MOVS     r0,#0x79
0015a8  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_CmdWrite
;;;2224   	LCD_DataWrite(HY);
0015ac  b2d8              UXTB     r0,r3
0015ae  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_DataWrite
;;;2225   
;;;2226   	LCD_CmdWrite(0x7A);
0015b2  207a              MOVS     r0,#0x7a
0015b4  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_CmdWrite
;;;2227   	LCD_DataWrite(HY>>8);
0015b8  0a18              LSRS     r0,r3,#8
0015ba  f85deb04          POP      {lr}
0015be  f7ffbffe          B.W      LCD_DataWrite
;;;2228   }
;;;2229   
                          ENDP

                  Select_PWM1_is_ErrorFlag PROC
;;;2362   */
;;;2363   void Select_PWM1_is_ErrorFlag(void)
0015c2  b500              PUSH     {lr}
;;;2364   {
;;;2365   	uint8_t temp;
;;;2366

0015c4  2085              MOVS     r0,#0x85

;;;2368   	temp = LCD_DataRead();
0015ca  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_DataRead
;;;2369   	temp &= cClrb3;
0015ce  f00000f7          AND      r0,r0,#0xf7
