                          ENDP

                  BTE_Enable PROC
;;;2516   //[90h]=========================================================================
;;;2517   void BTE_Enable(void)
0015da  b500              PUSH     {lr}
;;;2518   {	
;;;2519   /*
;;;2520   BTE Function Enable
;;;2521   0 : BTE Function disable.
;;;2522   1 : BTE Function enable.
;;;2523   */
;;;2524       unsigned char temp;
;;;2525       LCD_CmdWrite(0x90);
0015dc  2090              MOVS     r0,#0x90
0015de  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_CmdWrite
;;;2526       temp = LCD_DataRead();
0015e2  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_DataRead
0015e6  b2c0              UXTB     r0,r0
;;;2527       temp |= cSetb4 ;
0015e8  f0400010          ORR      r0,r0,#0x10
;;;2528   	LCD_DataWrite(temp);  
0015ec  f85deb04          POP      {lr}
0015f0  f7ffbffe          B.W      LCD_DataWrite
;;;2529   }
;;;2530   
                          ENDP

                  BTE_Disable PROC
;;;2531   //[90h]=========================================================================
;;;2532   void BTE_Disable(void)
0015f4  b500              PUSH     {lr}
;;;2533   {	
;;;2534   /*
;;;2535   BTE Function Enable
;;;2536   0 : BTE Function disable.
;;;2537   1 : BTE Function enable.
;;;2538   */
;;;2539       unsigned char temp;
;;;2540       LCD_CmdWrite(0x90);
0015f6  2090              MOVS     r0,#0x90
0015f8  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_CmdWrite
;;;2541       temp = LCD_DataRead();
0015fc  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_DataRead
;;;2542       temp &= cClrb4 ;
001600  f00000ef          AND      r0,r0,#0xef
;;;2543   	LCD_DataWrite(temp);  
001604  f85deb04          POP      {lr}
001608  f7ffbffe          B.W      LCD_DataWrite
;;;2544   }
;;;2545   
                          ENDP

                  Check_BTE_Busy PROC
;;;2546   //[90h]=========================================================================
;;;2547   void Check_BTE_Busy(void)
00160c  b500              PUSH     {lr}
                  |L1.5646|
;;;2548   {	
;;;2549   /*
;;;2550   BTE Function Status
;;;2551   0 : BTE Function is idle.
;;;2552   1 : BTE Function is busy.
;;;2553   */
;;;2554   	unsigned char temp; 	
;;;2555   	do
;;;2556   	{
;;;2557   		temp=LCD_StatusRead();
00160e  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_StatusRead
;;;2558   	}while(temp&0x08);
001612  0700              LSLS     r0,r0,#28
001614  d4fb              BMI      |L1.5646|
;;;2559   
;;;2560   }
001616  bd00              POP      {pc}
;;;2561   //[90h]=========================================================================
                          ENDP

                  Pattern_Format_8X8 PROC
;;;2562   void Pattern_Format_8X8(void)
001618  b500              PUSH     {lr}
;;;2563   {	
;;;2564   /*
;;;2565   Pattern Format
;;;2566   0 : 8X8
;;;2567   1 : 16X16
;;;2568   */
;;;2569       unsigned char temp;
;;;2570       LCD_CmdWrite(0x90);
00161a  2090              MOVS     r0,#0x90
00161c  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_CmdWrite
;;;2571       temp = LCD_DataRead();
001620  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_DataRead
;;;2572       temp &= cClrb0 ;
001624  f00000fe          AND      r0,r0,#0xfe
;;;2573   	LCD_DataWrite(temp);
001628  f85deb04          POP      {lr}
00162c  f7ffbffe          B.W      LCD_DataWrite
;;;2574   }	
;;;2575   //[90h]=========================================================================
                          ENDP

                  Pattern_Format_16X16 PROC
;;;2576   void Pattern_Format_16X16(void)
001630  b500              PUSH     {lr}
;;;2577   {	
;;;2578   /*
;;;2579   Pattern Format
;;;2580   0 : 8X8
;;;2581   1 : 16X16
;;;2582   */
;;;2583       unsigned char temp;
;;;2584       LCD_CmdWrite(0x90);

001634  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_CmdWrite
;;;2585       temp = LCD_DataRead();
001638  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_DataRead
00163c  b2c0              UXTB     r0,r0
;;;2586       temp |= cSetb0 ;
00163e  f0400001          ORR      r0,r0,#1
;;;2587   	  LCD_DataWrite(temp);
001642  f85deb04          POP      {lr}
001646  f7ffbffe          B.W      LCD_DataWrite
;;;2588   }	
;;;2589   
                          ENDP

                  BTE_Operation_Code PROC
;;;2590   //[91h]=========================================================================
;;;2591   void BTE_Operation_Code(unsigned char setx)
00164a  b500              PUSH     {lr}
;;;2592   {	
00164c  4602              MOV      r2,r0
;;;2593   /*
;;;2594   BTE Operation Code[Bit3:0]
;;;2595   	
;;;2596   0000 : MPU Write BTE with ROP.
;;;2597   0001 : MPU Read BTE w/o ROP.
;;;2598   0010 : Memory copy (move) BTE in positive direction with ROP.
;;;2599   0011 : Memory copy (move) BTE in negative direction with ROP.
;;;2600   0100 : MPU Transparent Write BTE. (w/o ROP.)
;;;2601   0101 : Transparent Memory copy (move) BTE in positive direction (w/o ROP.)
;;;2602   0110 : Pattern Fill with ROP.
;;;2603   0111 : Pattern Fill with key-chroma
;;;2604   1000 : Color Expansion
;;;2605   1001 : Color Expansion with transparency
;;;2606   1010 : Move BTE in positive direction with Alpha blending
;;;2607   1011 : MPU Write BTE with Alpha blending
;;;2608   1100 : Solid Fill
;;;2609   1101 : Reserved
;;;2610   1110 : Reserved
;;;2611   1111 : Reserved
;;;2612   */
;;;2613       unsigned char temp;
;;;2614       LCD_CmdWrite(0x91);
00164e  2091              MOVS     r0,#0x91
001650  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_CmdWrite
;;;2615       temp = LCD_DataRead();
001654  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_DataRead
;;;2616       temp &= 0xf0 ;
001658  f00000f0          AND      r0,r0,#0xf0
;;;2617   		temp |= setx ;
00165c  4310              ORRS     r0,r0,r2
;;;2618   	  LCD_DataWrite(temp);
00165e  f85deb04          POP      {lr}
001662  f7ffbffe          B.W      LCD_DataWrite
;;;2619   
;;;2620   }
;;;2621   void BTE_ROP_Code(unsigned char setx)
                          ENDP

                  BTE_ROP_Code PROC
001666  b500              PUSH     {lr}
;;;2622   {	
001668  4602              MOV      r2,r0
;;;2623   /*
;;;2624   BTE ROP Code[Bit7:4]
;;;2625   	
;;;2626   0000 : 0(Blackness)
;;;2627   0001 : ~S0.~S1 or ~ ( S0+S1 )
;;;2628   0010 : ~S0.S1
;;;2629   0011 : ~S0
;;;2630   0100 : S0.~S1
;;;2631   0101 : ~S1
;;;2632   0110 : S0^S1
;;;2633   0111 : ~S0+~S1 or ~ ( S0.S1 )
;;;2634   1000 : S0.S1
;;;2635   1001 : ~ ( S0^S1 )
;;;2636   1010 : S1
;;;2637   1011 : ~S0+S1
;;;2638   1100 : S0
;;;2639   1101 : S0+~S1
;;;2640   1110 : S0+S1
;;;2641   1111 : 1 ( Whiteness )
;;;2642   */
;;;2643       unsigned char temp;
;;;2644       LCD_CmdWrite(0x91);
00166a  2091              MOVS     r0,#0x91
00166c  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_CmdWrite
;;;2645       temp = LCD_DataRead();
001670  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_DataRead
;;;2646       temp &= 0x0f ;
001674  f000000f          AND      r0,r0,#0xf
;;;2647   		temp |= (setx<<4);
001678  ea401002          ORR      r0,r0,r2,LSL #4
00167c  b2c0              UXTB     r0,r0
;;;2648   	  LCD_DataWrite(temp);
00167e  f85deb04          POP      {lr}
001682  f7ffbffe          B.W      LCD_DataWrite
;;;2649   }
;;;2650   //[92h]=========================================================================
                          ENDP

                  BTE_S0_Color_16bpp PROC
;;;2651   void BTE_S0_Color_16bpp(void)
001686  b500              PUSH     {lr}
;;;2652   {	
;;;2653   /*
;;;2654   S0 Color Depth
;;;2655   00 : 256 Color
;;;2656   01 : 64k Color
;;;2657   1x : 16M Color
;;;2658   */	
;;;2659       unsigned char temp;
;;;2660       LCD_CmdWrite(0x92);
001688  2092              MOVS     r0,#0x92
00168a  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_CmdWrite
;;;2661       temp = LCD_DataRead();
00168e  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_DataRead
;;;2662       temp &= cClrb6 ;
001692  f00000bf          AND      r0,r0,#0xbf
;;;2663   		temp |= cSetb5 ;
001696  f0400020          ORR      r0,r0,#0x20
;;;2664   	  LCD_DataWrite(temp);
00169a  f85deb04          POP      {lr}
00169e  f7ffbffe          B.W      LCD_DataWrite
;;;2665   
;;;2666   }	
;;;2667   //[92h]=========================================================================
                          ENDP

                  BTE_S0_Color_24bpp PROC
;;;2668   void BTE_S0_Color_24bpp(void)
0016a2  b500              PUSH     {lr}
;;;2669   {	
;;;2670   /*
;;;2671   S0 Color Depth
;;;2672   00 : 256 Color
;;;2673   01 : 64k Color
;;;2674   1x : 16M Color

;;;2680   		//temp |= cSetb5 ;
;;;2681   	  LCD_DataWrite(temp);

0016b8  f7ffbffe          B.W      LCD_DataWrite
;;;2682   }
;;;2683   //[92h]=========================================================================
                          ENDP

                  BTE_S1_Color_8bpp PROC
;;;2684   void BTE_S1_Color_8bpp(void)
0016bc  b500              PUSH     {lr}
;;;2685   {	
;;;2686   /*
;;;2687   S1 Color Depth
;;;2688   000 : 256 Color
;;;2689   001 : 64k Color
;;;2690   010 : 16M Color
;;;2691   011 : Constant Color
;;;2692   100 : 8 bit pixel alpha blending
;;;2693   101 : 16 bit pixel alpha blending
;;;2694   */	
;;;2695       unsigned char temp;

;;;2697       temp = LCD_DataRead();

;;;2698       temp &= cClrb4 ;
0016c8  f00000ef          AND      r0,r0,#0xef
;;;2699   		temp &= cClrb3 ;
0016cc  f00000f7          AND      r0,r0,#0xf7
;;;2700   	  temp &= cClrb2 ;
0016d0  f00000fb          AND      r0,r0,#0xfb
;;;2701   	  LCD_DataWrite(temp);
0016d4  f85deb04          POP      {lr}
0016d8  f7ffbffe          B.W      LCD_DataWrite
;;;2702   }	
;;;2703   //[92h]=========================================================================
                          ENDP

                  BTE_S1_Color_8bit_Alpha PROC

                  BTE_S1_Color_16bit_Alpha PROC
;;;2789   //[92h]=========================================================================
;;;2790   void BTE_S1_Color_16bit_Alpha(void)
00175c  b500              PUSH     {lr}
;;;2791   {	
;;;2792   /*
;;;2793   S1 Color Depth
;;;2794   000 : 256 Color
;;;2795   001 : 64k Color
;;;2796   010 : 16M Color
;;;2797   011 : Constant Color
;;;2798   100 : 8 bit pixel alpha blending
;;;2799   101 : 16 bit pixel alpha blending
;;;2800   */	
;;;2801       unsigned char temp;
;;;2802       LCD_CmdWrite(0x92);
00175e  2092              MOVS     r0,#0x92
001760  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_CmdWrite
;;;2803       temp = LCD_DataRead();
001764  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_DataRead
;;;2804       temp |= cSetb4 ;
001768  f0400010          ORR      r0,r0,#0x10
;;;2805   		temp &= cClrb3 ;
00176c  f00000f7          AND      r0,r0,#0xf7
;;;2806   	  temp |= cSetb2 ;
001770  f0400004          ORR      r0,r0,#4
;;;2807   	  LCD_DataWrite(temp);
001774  f85deb04          POP      {lr}
001778  f7ffbffe          B.W      LCD_DataWrite
;;;2808   }
;;;2809   
                          ENDP

                  BTE_Destination_Color_8bpp PROC
;;;2810   //[92h]=========================================================================
;;;2811   void BTE_Destination_Color_8bpp(void)
00177c  b500              PUSH     {lr}
;;;2812   {	
;;;2813   /*
;;;2814   Destination Color Depth
;;;2815   00 : 256 Color
;;;2816   01 : 64k Color
;;;2817   1x : 16M Color
;;;2818   */	
;;;2819       unsigned char temp;
;;;2820       LCD_CmdWrite(0x92);
00177e  2092              MOVS     r0,#0x92
001780  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_CmdWrite
;;;2821       temp = LCD_DataRead();
001784  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_DataRead
;;;2822       temp &= cClrb1 ;
001788  f00000fd          AND      r0,r0,#0xfd
;;;2823   		temp &= cClrb0 ;
00178c  f00000fe          AND      r0,r0,#0xfe
;;;2824   	  LCD_DataWrite(temp);
001790  f85deb04          POP      {lr}
001794  f7ffbffe          B.W      LCD_DataWrite
;;;2825   }	
;;;2826   //[92h]=========================================================================
                          ENDP

                  BTE_Destination_Color_16bpp PROC
;;;2827   void BTE_Destination_Color_16bpp(void)
001798  b500              PUSH     {lr}
;;;2828   {	
;;;2829   /*
;;;2830   Destination Color Depth
;;;2831   00 : 256 Color
;;;2832   01 : 64k Color
;;;2833   1x : 16M Color
;;;2834   */	
;;;2835       unsigned char temp;
;;;2836       LCD_CmdWrite(0x92);
00179a  2092              MOVS     r0,#0x92
00179c  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_CmdWrite
;;;2837       temp = LCD_DataRead();
0017a0  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_DataRead
;;;2838       temp &= cClrb1 ;
0017a4  f00000fd          AND      r0,r0,#0xfd
;;;2839   		temp |= cSetb0 ;
0017a8  f0400001          ORR      r0,r0,#1
;;;2840   	  LCD_DataWrite(temp);
0017ac  f85deb04          POP      {lr}
0017b0  f7ffbffe          B.W      LCD_DataWrite
;;;2841   
;;;2842   }	
;;;2843   //[92h]=========================================================================
                          ENDP

                  BTE_Destination_Color_24bpp PROC
;;;2844   void BTE_Destination_Color_24bpp(void)
0017b4  b500              PUSH     {lr}
;;;2845   {	
;;;2846   /*
;;;2847   Destination Color Depth
;;;2848   00 : 256 Color
;;;2849   10 : 64k Color
;;;2850   1x : 16M Color
;;;2851   */	
;;;2852       unsigned char temp;
;;;2853       LCD_CmdWrite(0x92);
0017b6  2092              MOVS     r0,#0x92
0017b8  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_CmdWrite
;;;2854       temp = LCD_DataRead();
0017bc  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_DataRead
0017c0  b2c0              UXTB     r0,r0
;;;2855       temp |= cSetb1 ;
0017c2  f0400002          ORR      r0,r0,#2
;;;2856   		//temp |= cSetb0 ;
;;;2857   	  LCD_DataWrite(temp);
0017c6  f85deb04          POP      {lr}
0017ca  f7ffbffe          B.W      LCD_DataWrite
;;;2858   }
;;;2859   
                          ENDP

                  Start_SFI_DMA PROC
;;;2860   //[B6h]=========================================================================
;;;2861   void Start_SFI_DMA(void)
0017ce  b500              PUSH     {lr}
;;;2862   {
;;;2863   	uint8_t temp;
;;;2864   	LCD_CmdWrite(0xB6);
0017d0  20b6              MOVS     r0,#0xb6
0017d2  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_CmdWrite
;;;2865   	temp = LCD_DataRead();
0017d6  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_DataRead
0017da  b2c0              UXTB     r0,r0
;;;2866       temp |= cSetb0;
0017dc  f0400001          ORR      r0,r0,#1
;;;2867   	LCD_DataWrite(temp);
0017e0  f85deb04          POP      {lr}
0017e4  f7ffbffe          B.W      LCD_DataWrite
;;;2868   }
;;;2869   
                          ENDP

                  Check_Busy_SFI_DMA PROC
;;;2870   void Check_Busy_SFI_DMA(void)
0017e8  b500              PUSH     {lr}
;;;2871   {
;;;2872   	LCD_CmdWrite(0xB6);
0017ea  20b6              MOVS     r0,#0xb6
0017ec  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_CmdWrite
                  |L1.6128|
;;;2873   	do
;;;2874   	{		
;;;2875   	}while((LCD_DataRead()&0x01)==0x01);
0017f0  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_DataRead
0017f4  07c0              LSLS     r0,r0,#31
0017f6  d1fb              BNE      |L1.6128|
;;;2876   }
0017f8  bd00              POP      {pc}
;;;2877   
                          ENDP

                  Select_SFI_0 PROC
;;;2879   //[B7h]=========================================================================
;;;2880   void Select_SFI_0(void)
0017fa  b500              PUSH     {lr}
;;;2881   {
;;;2882   /*[bit7]
;;;2883   Serial Flash/ROM I/F # Select
;;;2884   0: Serial Flash/ROM 0 I/F is selected.
;;;2885   1: Serial Flash/ROM 1 I/F is selected.
;;;2886   */
;;;2887   	uint8_t temp;
;;;2888   	LCD_CmdWrite(0xB7);
0017fc  20b7              MOVS     r0,#0xb7
0017fe  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_CmdWrite
;;;2889   	temp = LCD_DataRead();
001802  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_DataRead
;;;2890       temp &= cClrb7;
001806  f000007f          AND      r0,r0,#0x7f
;;;2891   	LCD_DataWrite(temp);
00180a  f85deb04          POP      {lr}
00180e  f7ffbffe          B.W      LCD_DataWrite
;;;2892   }
;;;2893   void Select_SFI_1(void)
                          ENDP

                  Select_SFI_1 PROC
001812  b500              PUSH     {lr}
;;;2894   {
;;;2895   /*[bit7]
;;;2896   Serial Flash/ROM I/F # Select
;;;2897   0: Serial Flash/ROM 0 I/F is selected.
;;;2898   1: Serial Flash/ROM 1 I/F is selected.
;;;2899   */
;;;2900   	uint8_t temp;
;;;2901   	LCD_CmdWrite(0xB7);
001814  20b7              MOVS     r0,#0xb7
001816  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_CmdWrite
;;;2902   	temp = LCD_DataRead();
00181a  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_DataRead
00181e  b2c0              UXTB     r0,r0
;;;2903       temp |= cSetb7;
001820  f0400080          ORR      r0,r0,#0x80
;;;2904   	LCD_DataWrite(temp);
001824  f85deb04          POP      {lr}
001828  f7ffbffe          B.W      LCD_DataWrite
;;;2905   }
;;;2906   
                          ENDP

                  Select_SFI_DMA_Mode PROC
;;;2907   void Select_SFI_DMA_Mode(void)
00182c  b500              PUSH     {lr}
;;;2908   {
;;;2909   /*[bit6]
;;;2910   Serial Flash /ROM Access Mode
;;;2911   0: Font mode ˇV for external cgrom
;;;2912   1: DMA mode ˇV for cgram , pattern , bootstart image or osd
;;;2913   */
;;;2914   	uint8_t temp;
;;;2915   	LCD_CmdWrite(0xB7);
00182e  20b7              MOVS     r0,#0xb7
001830  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_CmdWrite
;;;2916   	temp = LCD_DataRead();
001834  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_DataRead
001838  b2c0              UXTB     r0,r0
;;;2917       temp |= cSetb6;
00183a  f0400040          ORR      r0,r0,#0x40
;;;2918   	LCD_DataWrite(temp);
00183e  f85deb04          POP      {lr}
001842  f7ffbffe          B.W      LCD_DataWrite
;;;2919   }
;;;2920   
                          ENDP

                  Select_SFI_Dual_Mode0 PROC
;;;2921   void Select_SFI_Dual_Mode0(void)

;;;2925   	temp = LCD_DataRead();
00184e  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_DataRead
;;;2926   	temp &= 0xFC;
001852  f00000fc          AND      r0,r0,#0xfc
;;;2927       temp |= cSetb1;
001856  f0400002          ORR      r0,r0,#2
;;;2928   	LCD_DataWrite(temp);
00185a  f85deb04          POP      {lr}
00185e  f7ffbffe          B.W      LCD_DataWrite
;;;2929   }
;;;2930   
                          ENDP

                  SPI_Clock_Period PROC
;;;2931   //REG[BB] SPI Clock period (SPIDIV) 
;;;2932   void SPI_Clock_Period(uint8_t temp)
001862  b500              PUSH     {lr}
;;;2933   {
001864  4602              MOV      r2,r0
;;;2934      LCD_CmdWrite(0xBB);
001866  20bb              MOVS     r0,#0xbb
001868  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_CmdWrite
;;;2935      LCD_DataWrite(temp);
00186c  4610              MOV      r0,r2
00186e  f85deb04          POP      {lr}
001872  f7ffbffe          B.W      LCD_DataWrite
;;;2936   } 
;;;2937   
                          ENDP

                  SFI_DMA_Source_Start_Address PROC
;;;2938   //[BCh][BDh][BEh][BFh]=========================================================================
;;;2939   void SFI_DMA_Source_Start_Address(unsigned long Addr)
001876  b500              PUSH     {lr}
;;;2940   {
001878  4602              MOV      r2,r0
;;;2941   /*
;;;2942   DMA Source START ADDRESS
;;;2943   This bits index serial flash address [7:0][15:8][23:16][31:24]
;;;2944   */
;;;2945   	LCD_CmdWrite(0xBC);
00187a  20bc              MOVS     r0,#0xbc
00187c  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_CmdWrite
;;;2946   	LCD_DataWrite(Addr);
001880  b2d0              UXTB     r0,r2
001882  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_DataWrite
;;;2947   	LCD_CmdWrite(0xBD);
001886  20bd              MOVS     r0,#0xbd
001888  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_CmdWrite
;;;2948   	LCD_DataWrite(Addr>>8);
00188c  f3c22007          UBFX     r0,r2,#8,#8
001890  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_DataWrite
;;;2949   	LCD_CmdWrite(0xBE);
001894  20be              MOVS     r0,#0xbe
001896  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_CmdWrite
;;;2950   	LCD_DataWrite(Addr>>16);
00189a  f3c24007          UBFX     r0,r2,#16,#8
00189e  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_DataWrite
;;;2951   	LCD_CmdWrite(0xBF);
0018a2  20bf              MOVS     r0,#0xbf
0018a4  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_CmdWrite
;;;2952   	LCD_DataWrite(Addr>>24);
0018a8  0e10              LSRS     r0,r2,#24
0018aa  f85deb04          POP      {lr}
0018ae  f7ffbffe          B.W      LCD_DataWrite
;;;2953   }
;;;2954   //[C0h][C1h][C2h][C3h]=========================================================================
                          ENDP

                  SFI_DMA_Source_Width PROC
;;;2956   //[CAh][CBh]=========================================================================
;;;2957   void SFI_DMA_Source_Width(uint16_t WX)
0018b2  b500              PUSH     {lr}
;;;2958   {
0018b4  4602              MOV      r2,r0
;;;2959   /*
;;;2960   DMA Source Picture Width [7:0][12:8]
;;;2961   Unit: pixel
;;;2962   */
;;;2963   	LCD_CmdWrite(0xCA);
0018b6  20ca              MOVS     r0,#0xca
0018b8  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_CmdWrite
;;;2964   	LCD_DataWrite(WX);
0018bc  b2d0              UXTB     r0,r2
0018be  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_DataWrite
;;;2965   	LCD_CmdWrite(0xCB);
0018c2  20cb              MOVS     r0,#0xcb
0018c4  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_CmdWrite
;;;2966   	LCD_DataWrite(WX>>8);
0018c8  0a10              LSRS     r0,r2,#8
0018ca  f85deb04          POP      {lr}
0018ce  f7ffbffe          B.W      LCD_DataWrite
;;;2967   } 
;;;2968   void Foreground_color_65k(uint16_t temp)
                          ENDP

                  BTE_S0_Memory_Start_Address PROC
;;;2979   //[93h][94h][95h][96h]=========================================================================
;;;2980   void BTE_S0_Memory_Start_Address(unsigned long Addr)	
0018d2  b500              PUSH     {lr}
;;;2981   {
0018d4  4603              MOV      r3,r0
;;;2982   /*
;;;2983   [93h] BTE S0 Memory Start Address [7:0]
;;;2984   [94h] BTE S0 Memory Start Address [15:8]
;;;2985   [95h] BTE S0 Memory Start Address [23:16]
;;;2986   [96h] BTE S0 Memory Start Address [31:24]
;;;2987   Bit [1:0] tie to ˇ§0ˇ¨ internally.
;;;2988   */
;;;2989   	LCD_RegisterWrite(0x93,Addr);
0018d6  b2d9              UXTB     r1,r3
0018d8  2093              MOVS     r0,#0x93
0018da  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_RegisterWrite
;;;2990   	LCD_RegisterWrite(0x94,Addr>>8);
0018de  f3c32107          UBFX     r1,r3,#8,#8
0018e2  2094              MOVS     r0,#0x94
0018e4  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_RegisterWrite
;;;2991   	LCD_RegisterWrite(0x95,Addr>>16);
0018e8  f3c34107          UBFX     r1,r3,#16,#8
0018ec  2095              MOVS     r0,#0x95
0018ee  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_RegisterWrite
;;;2992   	LCD_RegisterWrite(0x96,Addr>>24);
0018f2  0e19              LSRS     r1,r3,#24
0018f4  2096              MOVS     r0,#0x96
0018f6  f85deb04          POP      {lr}
0018fa  f7ffbffe          B.W      LCD_RegisterWrite
;;;2993   }
;;;2994   
                          ENDP

                  BTE_S0_Image_Width PROC
;;;2996   //[97h][98h]=========================================================================
;;;2997   void BTE_S0_Image_Width(unsigned short WX)	
0018fe  b500              PUSH     {lr}
;;;2998   {
001900  4603              MOV      r3,r0
;;;2999   /*
;;;3000   [97h] BTE S0 Image Width [7:0]
;;;3001   [98h] BTE S0 Image Width [12:8]
;;;3002   Unit: Pixel.
;;;3003   Bit [1:0] tie to ˇ§0ˇ¨ internally.
;;;3004   */
;;;3005   	LCD_RegisterWrite(0x97,WX);
001902  b2d9              UXTB     r1,r3
001904  2097              MOVS     r0,#0x97
001906  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_RegisterWrite
;;;3006   	LCD_RegisterWrite(0x98,WX>>8);
00190a  0a19              LSRS     r1,r3,#8
00190c  2098              MOVS     r0,#0x98
00190e  f85deb04          POP      {lr}
001912  f7ffbffe          B.W      LCD_RegisterWrite
;;;3007   }
;;;3008   
                          ENDP

                  BTE_S0_Window_Start_XY PROC
;;;3010   //[99h][9Ah][9Bh][9Ch]=========================================================================
;;;3011   void BTE_S0_Window_Start_XY(unsigned short WX,unsigned short HY)	
001916  b510              PUSH     {r4,lr}
;;;3012   {
001918  4603              MOV      r3,r0
00191a  460c              MOV      r4,r1
;;;3013   /*
;;;3014   [99h] BTE S0 Window Upper-Left corner X-coordination [7:0]
;;;3015   [9Ah] BTE S0 Window Upper-Left corner X-coordination [12:8]
;;;3016   [9Bh] BTE S0 Window Upper-Left corner Y-coordination [7:0]
;;;3017   [9Ch] BTE S0 Window Upper-Left corner Y-coordination [12:8]
;;;3018   */
;;;3019   	LCD_RegisterWrite(0x99,WX);
00191c  b2d9              UXTB     r1,r3
00191e  2099              MOVS     r0,#0x99
001920  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_RegisterWrite
;;;3020   	LCD_RegisterWrite(0x9A,WX>>8);
001924  0a19              LSRS     r1,r3,#8
001926  209a              MOVS     r0,#0x9a
001928  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_RegisterWrite
;;;3021   
;;;3022   	LCD_RegisterWrite(0x9B,HY);
00192c  b2e1              UXTB     r1,r4
00192e  209b              MOVS     r0,#0x9b
001930  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_RegisterWrite
;;;3023   	LCD_RegisterWrite(0x9C,HY>>8);
001934  0a21              LSRS     r1,r4,#8
001936  e8bd4010          POP      {r4,lr}
00193a  209c              MOVS     r0,#0x9c
00193c  f7ffbffe          B.W      LCD_RegisterWrite
;;;3024   }
;;;3025   
                          ENDP

                  BTE_S1_Memory_Start_Address PROC
;;;3029   //[9Dh][9Eh][9Fh][A0h]=========================================================================
;;;3030   void BTE_S1_Memory_Start_Address(unsigned long Addr)	
001940  b500              PUSH     {lr}
;;;3031   {
001942  4603              MOV      r3,r0
;;;3032   /*
;;;3033   [9Dh] BTE S1 Memory Start Address [7:0]
;;;3034   [9Eh] BTE S1 Memory Start Address [15:8]
;;;3035   [9Fh] BTE S1 Memory Start Address [23:16]
;;;3036   [A0h] BTE S1 Memory Start Address [31:24]
;;;3037   Bit [1:0] tie to ˇ§0ˇ¨ internally.
;;;3038   */
;;;3039   	LCD_RegisterWrite(0x9D,Addr);
001944  b2d9              UXTB     r1,r3
001946  209d              MOVS     r0,#0x9d
001948  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_RegisterWrite
;;;3040   	LCD_RegisterWrite(0x9E,Addr>>8);
00194c  f3c32107          UBFX     r1,r3,#8,#8
001950  209e              MOVS     r0,#0x9e
001952  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_RegisterWrite
;;;3041   	LCD_RegisterWrite(0x9F,Addr>>16);
001956  f3c34107          UBFX     r1,r3,#16,#8
00195a  209f              MOVS     r0,#0x9f
00195c  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_RegisterWrite
;;;3042   	LCD_RegisterWrite(0xA0,Addr>>24);
001960  0e19              LSRS     r1,r3,#24
001962  20a0              MOVS     r0,#0xa0
001964  f85deb04          POP      {lr}
001968  f7ffbffe          B.W      LCD_RegisterWrite
;;;3043   }
;;;3044   
                          ENDP

                  S1_Constant_color_256 PROC
;;;3046   //Input data format:R3G3B2
;;;3047   void S1_Constant_color_256(unsigned char temp)
00196c  b500              PUSH     {lr}
;;;3048   {
00196e  4602              MOV      r2,r0
;;;3049       LCD_CmdWrite(0x9D);
001970  209d              MOVS     r0,#0x9d
001972  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_CmdWrite
;;;3050       LCD_DataWrite(temp);
001976  4610              MOV      r0,r2
001978  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_DataWrite
;;;3051   
;;;3052       LCD_CmdWrite(0x9E);
00197c  209e              MOVS     r0,#0x9e
00197e  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_CmdWrite
;;;3053       LCD_DataWrite(temp<<3);
001982  06d0              LSLS     r0,r2,#27
001984  0e00              LSRS     r0,r0,#24
001986  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_DataWrite
;;;3054   
;;;3055       LCD_CmdWrite(0x9F);
00198a  209f              MOVS     r0,#0x9f
00198c  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_CmdWrite
;;;3056       LCD_DataWrite(temp<<6);
001990  0790              LSLS     r0,r2,#30
001992  0e00              LSRS     r0,r0,#24
001994  f85deb04          POP      {lr}
001998  f7ffbffe          B.W      LCD_DataWrite
;;;3057   }
;;;3058   
                          ENDP

                  S1_Constant_color_65k PROC
;;;3059   //Input data format:R5G6B6
;;;3060   void S1_Constant_color_65k(unsigned short temp)
00199c  b500              PUSH     {lr}
;;;3061   {
00199e  4602              MOV      r2,r0
;;;3062       LCD_CmdWrite(0x9D);
0019a0  209d              MOVS     r0,#0x9d
0019a2  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_CmdWrite
;;;3063       LCD_DataWrite(temp>>8);
0019a6  0a10              LSRS     r0,r2,#8
0019a8  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_DataWrite
;;;3064   
;;;3065       LCD_CmdWrite(0x9E);
0019ac  209e              MOVS     r0,#0x9e
0019ae  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_CmdWrite
;;;3066       LCD_DataWrite(temp>>3);
0019b2  f3c200c7          UBFX     r0,r2,#3,#8
0019b6  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_DataWrite
;;;3067   
;;;3068       LCD_CmdWrite(0x9F);
0019ba  209f              MOVS     r0,#0x9f
0019bc  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_CmdWrite
;;;3069       LCD_DataWrite(temp<<3);
0019c0  06d0              LSLS     r0,r2,#27
0019c2  0e00              LSRS     r0,r0,#24
0019c4  f85deb04          POP      {lr}
0019c8  f7ffbffe          B.W      LCD_DataWrite
;;;3070   }
;;;3071   
                          ENDP

                  S1_Constant_color_16M PROC
;;;3072   //Input data format:R8G8B8
;;;3073   void S1_Constant_color_16M(unsigned long temp)
0019cc  b500              PUSH     {lr}
;;;3074   {
0019ce  4602              MOV      r2,r0
;;;3075       LCD_CmdWrite(0x9D);
0019d0  209d              MOVS     r0,#0x9d
0019d2  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_CmdWrite
;;;3076       LCD_DataWrite(temp>>16);
0019d6  f3c24007          UBFX     r0,r2,#16,#8
0019da  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_DataWrite
;;;3077   
;;;3078       LCD_CmdWrite(0x9E);
0019de  209e              MOVS     r0,#0x9e
0019e0  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_CmdWrite
;;;3079       LCD_DataWrite(temp>>8);
0019e4  f3c22007          UBFX     r0,r2,#8,#8
0019e8  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_DataWrite
;;;3080   
;;;3081       LCD_CmdWrite(0x9F);
0019ec  209f              MOVS     r0,#0x9f
0019ee  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_CmdWrite
;;;3082       LCD_DataWrite(temp);
0019f2  b2d0              UXTB     r0,r2
0019f4  f85deb04          POP      {lr}
0019f8  f7ffbffe          B.W      LCD_DataWrite
;;;3083   }
;;;3084   
                          ENDP

                  BTE_S1_Image_Width PROC
;;;3088   //[A1h][A2h]=========================================================================
;;;3089   void BTE_S1_Image_Width(unsigned short WX)	
0019fc  b500              PUSH     {lr}
;;;3090   {
0019fe  4603              MOV      r3,r0
;;;3091   /*
;;;3092   [A1h] BTE S1 Image Width [7:0]
;;;3093   [A2h] BTE S1 Image Width [12:8]
;;;3094   Unit: Pixel.
;;;3095   Bit [1:0] tie to ˇ§0ˇ¨ internally.
;;;3096   */
;;;3097   	LCD_RegisterWrite(0xA1,WX);
001a00  b2d9              UXTB     r1,r3
001a02  20a1              MOVS     r0,#0xa1
001a04  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_RegisterWrite
;;;3098   	LCD_RegisterWrite(0xA2,WX>>8);
001a08  0a19              LSRS     r1,r3,#8
001a0a  20a2              MOVS     r0,#0xa2
001a0c  f85deb04          POP      {lr}
001a10  f7ffbffe          B.W      LCD_RegisterWrite
;;;3099   }
;;;3100   
                          ENDP

                  BTE_S1_Window_Start_XY PROC
;;;3102   //[A3h][A4h][A5h][A6h]=========================================================================
;;;3103   void BTE_S1_Window_Start_XY(unsigned short WX,unsigned short HY)	
001a14  b510              PUSH     {r4,lr}
;;;3104   {
001a16  4603              MOV      r3,r0
001a18  460c              MOV      r4,r1
;;;3105   /*
;;;3106   [A3h] BTE S1 Window Upper-Left corner X-coordination [7:0]
;;;3107   [A4h] BTE S1 Window Upper-Left corner X-coordination [12:8]
;;;3108   [A5h] BTE S1 Window Upper-Left corner Y-coordination [7:0]
;;;3109   [A6h] BTE S1 Window Upper-Left corner Y-coordination [12:8]
;;;3110   */
;;;3111   	LCD_RegisterWrite(0xA3,WX);
001a1a  b2d9              UXTB     r1,r3
001a1c  20a3              MOVS     r0,#0xa3
001a1e  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_RegisterWrite
;;;3112   	LCD_RegisterWrite(0xA4,WX>>8);
001a22  0a19              LSRS     r1,r3,#8
001a24  20a4              MOVS     r0,#0xa4
001a26  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_RegisterWrite
;;;3113   
;;;3114   	LCD_RegisterWrite(0xA5,HY);
001a2a  b2e1              UXTB     r1,r4
001a2c  20a5              MOVS     r0,#0xa5
001a2e  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_RegisterWrite
;;;3115   	LCD_RegisterWrite(0xA6,HY>>8);
001a32  0a21              LSRS     r1,r4,#8
001a34  e8bd4010          POP      {r4,lr}
001a38  20a6              MOVS     r0,#0xa6
001a3a  f7ffbffe          B.W      LCD_RegisterWrite
;;;3116   }
;;;3117   
                          ENDP

                  BTE_Destination_Memory_Start_Address PROC
;;;3121   //[A7h][A8h][A9h][AAh]=========================================================================
;;;3122   void BTE_Destination_Memory_Start_Address(unsigned long Addr)	
001a3e  b500              PUSH     {lr}
;;;3123   {
001a40  4603              MOV      r3,r0
;;;3124   /*
;;;3125   [A7h] BTE Destination Memory Start Address [7:0]
;;;3126   [A8h] BTE Destination Memory Start Address [15:8]
;;;3127   [A9h] BTE Destination Memory Start Address [23:16]
;;;3128   [AAh] BTE Destination Memory Start Address [31:24]
;;;3129   Bit [1:0] tie to ˇ§0ˇ¨ internally.
;;;3130   */
;;;3131   	LCD_RegisterWrite(0xA7,Addr);
001a42  b2d9              UXTB     r1,r3
001a44  20a7              MOVS     r0,#0xa7
001a46  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_RegisterWrite
;;;3132   	LCD_RegisterWrite(0xA8,Addr>>8);
001a4a  f3c32107          UBFX     r1,r3,#8,#8
001a4e  20a8              MOVS     r0,#0xa8
001a50  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_RegisterWrite
;;;3133   	LCD_RegisterWrite(0xA9,Addr>>16);
001a54  f3c34107          UBFX     r1,r3,#16,#8
001a58  20a9              MOVS     r0,#0xa9
001a5a  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_RegisterWrite
;;;3134   	LCD_RegisterWrite(0xAA,Addr>>24);
001a5e  0e19              LSRS     r1,r3,#24
001a60  20aa              MOVS     r0,#0xaa
001a62  f85deb04          POP      {lr}
001a66  f7ffbffe          B.W      LCD_RegisterWrite
;;;3135   }
;;;3136   
                          ENDP

                  BTE_Destination_Image_Width PROC
;;;3138   //[ABh][ACh]=========================================================================
;;;3139   void BTE_Destination_Image_Width(unsigned short WX)	
001a6a  b500              PUSH     {lr}
;;;3140   {
001a6c  4603              MOV      r3,r0
;;;3141   /*
;;;3142   [ABh] BTE Destination Image Width [7:0]
;;;3143   [ACh] BTE Destination Image Width [12:8]
;;;3144   Unit: Pixel.
;;;3145   Bit [1:0] tie to ˇ§0ˇ¨ internally.
;;;3146   */
;;;3147   	LCD_RegisterWrite(0xAB,WX);
001a6e  b2d9              UXTB     r1,r3
001a70  20ab              MOVS     r0,#0xab
001a72  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_RegisterWrite
;;;3148   	LCD_RegisterWrite(0xAC,WX>>8);
001a76  0a19              LSRS     r1,r3,#8
001a78  20ac              MOVS     r0,#0xac
001a7a  f85deb04          POP      {lr}
001a7e  f7ffbffe          B.W      LCD_RegisterWrite
;;;3149   }
;;;3150   
                          ENDP

                  BTE_Destination_Window_Start_XY PROC
;;;3152   //[ADh][AEh][AFh][B0h]=========================================================================
;;;3153   void BTE_Destination_Window_Start_XY(unsigned short WX,unsigned short HY)	
001a82  b510              PUSH     {r4,lr}
;;;3154   {
001a84  4603              MOV      r3,r0
001a86  460c              MOV      r4,r1
;;;3155   /*
;;;3156   [ADh] BTE Destination Window Upper-Left corner X-coordination [7:0]
;;;3157   [AEh] BTE Destination Window Upper-Left corner X-coordination [12:8]
;;;3158   [AFh] BTE Destination Window Upper-Left corner Y-coordination [7:0]
;;;3159   [B0h] BTE Destination Window Upper-Left corner Y-coordination [12:8]
;;;3160   */
;;;3161   	LCD_RegisterWrite(0xAD,WX);
001a88  b2d9              UXTB     r1,r3
001a8a  20ad              MOVS     r0,#0xad
001a8c  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_RegisterWrite
;;;3162   	LCD_RegisterWrite(0xAE,WX>>8);
001a90  0a19              LSRS     r1,r3,#8
001a92  20ae              MOVS     r0,#0xae
001a94  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_RegisterWrite
;;;3163   
;;;3164   	LCD_RegisterWrite(0xAF,HY);
001a98  b2e1              UXTB     r1,r4
001a9a  20af              MOVS     r0,#0xaf
001a9c  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_RegisterWrite
;;;3165   	LCD_RegisterWrite(0xB0,HY>>8);
001aa0  0a21              LSRS     r1,r4,#8
001aa2  e8bd4010          POP      {r4,lr}
001aa6  20b0              MOVS     r0,#0xb0
001aa8  f7ffbffe          B.W      LCD_RegisterWrite
;;;3166   }
;;;3167   
                          ENDP

                  BTE_Window_Size PROC
;;;3170   
;;;3171   void BTE_Window_Size(unsigned short WX, unsigned short WY)
001aac  b510              PUSH     {r4,lr}
;;;3172   
;;;3173   {
001aae  4603              MOV      r3,r0
001ab0  460c              MOV      r4,r1
;;;3174   /*
;;;3175   [B1h] BTE Window Width [7:0]
;;;3176   [B2h] BTE Window Width [12:8]
;;;3177   
;;;3178   [B3h] BTE Window Height [7:0]
;;;3179   [B4h] BTE Window Height [12:8]
;;;3180   */
;;;3181           LCD_RegisterWrite(0xB1,WX);
001ab2  b2d9              UXTB     r1,r3
001ab4  20b1              MOVS     r0,#0xb1
001ab6  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_RegisterWrite
;;;3182           LCD_RegisterWrite(0xB2,WX>>8);
001aba  0a19              LSRS     r1,r3,#8
001abc  20b2              MOVS     r0,#0xb2
001abe  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_RegisterWrite
;;;3183   	
;;;3184   	    LCD_RegisterWrite(0xB3,WY);
001ac2  b2e1              UXTB     r1,r4
001ac4  20b3              MOVS     r0,#0xb3
001ac6  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_RegisterWrite
;;;3185           LCD_RegisterWrite(0xB4,WY>>8);
001aca  0a21              LSRS     r1,r4,#8
001acc  e8bd4010          POP      {r4,lr}
001ad0  20b4              MOVS     r0,#0xb4
001ad2  f7ffbffe          B.W      LCD_RegisterWrite
;;;3186   }
;;;3187   
                          ENDP

                  BTE_Alpha_Blending_Effect PROC
;;;3188   //[B5h]=========================================================================
;;;3189   void BTE_Alpha_Blending_Effect(unsigned char temp)
001ad6  b500              PUSH     {lr}
;;;3190   {	
001ad8  4602              MOV      r2,r0
;;;3191   /*
;;;3192   Window Alpha Blending effect for S0 & S1
;;;3193   The value of alpha in the color code ranges from 0.0 to 1.0,
;;;3194   where 0.0 represents a fully transparent color, and 1.0
;;;3195   represents a fully opaque color.
;;;3196   00h: 0
;;;3197   01h: 1/32
;;;3198   02h: 2/32
;;;3199   :
;;;3200   1Eh: 30/32
;;;3201   1Fh: 31/32
;;;3202   2Xh: 1
;;;3203   Output Effect = (S0 image x (1 - alpha setting value)) + (S1 image x alpha setting value)
;;;3204   */
;;;3205       LCD_CmdWrite(0xB5);
001ada  20b5              MOVS     r0,#0xb5
001adc  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_CmdWrite
;;;3206   	LCD_DataWrite(temp);  
001ae0  4610              MOV      r0,r2
001ae2  f85deb04          POP      {lr}
001ae6  f7ffbffe          B.W      LCD_DataWrite
;;;3207   }
;;;3208   
                          ENDP

                  Select_SFI_Font_Mode PROC
;;;3209   void Select_SFI_Font_Mode(void)
001aea  b500              PUSH     {lr}
;;;3210   {
;;;3211   /*[bit6]
;;;3212   Serial Flash /ROM Access Mode
;;;3213   0: Font mode ˇV for external cgrom
;;;3214   1: DMA mode ˇV for cgram , pattern , bootstart image or osd
;;;3215   */
;;;3216   	unsigned char temp;
;;;3217   	LCD_CmdWrite(0xB7);
001aec  20b7              MOVS     r0,#0xb7
001aee  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_CmdWrite
;;;3218   	temp = LCD_DataRead();
001af2  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_DataRead
;;;3219       temp &= cClrb6;
001af6  f00000bf          AND      r0,r0,#0xbf
;;;3220   	LCD_DataWrite(temp);
001afa  f85deb04          POP      {lr}
001afe  f7ffbffe          B.W      LCD_DataWrite
;;;3221   }
;;;3222   
                          ENDP

                  Select_SFI_24bit_Address PROC
;;;3223   void Select_SFI_24bit_Address(void)
001b02  b500              PUSH     {lr}
;;;3224   {
;;;3225   /*[bit5]
;;;3226   Serial Flash/ROM Address Mode
;;;3227   0: 24 bits address mode
;;;3228   1: 32 bits address mode
;;;3229   */
;;;3230   	unsigned char temp;
;;;3231   	LCD_CmdWrite(0xB7);
001b04  20b7              MOVS     r0,#0xb7
001b06  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_CmdWrite
;;;3232   	temp = LCD_DataRead();
001b0a  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_DataRead
;;;3233       temp &= cClrb5;
001b0e  f00000df          AND      r0,r0,#0xdf
;;;3234   	LCD_DataWrite(temp);
001b12  f85deb04          POP      {lr}
001b16  f7ffbffe          B.W      LCD_DataWrite
;;;3235   }
;;;3236   void Select_SFI_32bit_Address(void)
                          ENDP

                  Select_SFI_32bit_Address PROC
001b1a  b500              PUSH     {lr}
;;;3237   {
;;;3238   /*[bit5]
;;;3239   Serial Flash/ROM Address Mode
;;;3240   0: 24 bits address mode
;;;3241   1: 32 bits address mode
;;;3242   */
;;;3243   	unsigned char temp;
;;;3244   	LCD_CmdWrite(0xB7);
001b1c  20b7              MOVS     r0,#0xb7
001b1e  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_CmdWrite
;;;3245   	temp = LCD_DataRead();
001b22  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_DataRead
001b26  b2c0              UXTB     r0,r0
;;;3246       temp |= cSetb5;
001b28  f0400020          ORR      r0,r0,#0x20
;;;3247   	LCD_DataWrite(temp);
001b2c  f85deb04          POP      {lr}
001b30  f7ffbffe          B.W      LCD_DataWrite
;;;3248   }
;;;3249   void Select_SFI_Waveform_Mode_0(void)
                          ENDP

                  Select_SFI_Waveform_Mode_0 PROC
001b34  b500              PUSH     {lr}
;;;3250   {
;;;3251   /*[bit4]
;;;3252   Serial Flash/ROM Waveform Mode
;;;3253   Mode 0.
;;;3254   Mode 3.
;;;3255   */
;;;3256   	unsigned char temp;
;;;3257   	LCD_CmdWrite(0xB7);
001b36  20b7              MOVS     r0,#0xb7
001b38  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_CmdWrite
;;;3258   	temp = LCD_DataRead();
001b3c  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_DataRead
;;;3259       temp &= cClrb4;
001b40  f00000ef          AND      r0,r0,#0xef
;;;3260   	LCD_DataWrite(temp);
001b44  f85deb04          POP      {lr}
001b48  f7ffbffe          B.W      LCD_DataWrite
;;;3261   }
;;;3262   void Select_SFI_Waveform_Mode_3(void)
                          ENDP

                  Select_SFI_Waveform_Mode_3 PROC
001b4c  b500              PUSH     {lr}
;;;3263   {
;;;3264   /*[bit4]
;;;3265   Serial Flash/ROM Waveform Mode
;;;3266   Mode 0.
;;;3267   Mode 3.
;;;3268   */
;;;3269   	unsigned char temp;
;;;3270   	LCD_CmdWrite(0xB7);
001b4e  20b7              MOVS     r0,#0xb7
001b50  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_CmdWrite
;;;3271   	temp = LCD_DataRead();
001b54  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_DataRead
001b58  b2c0              UXTB     r0,r0
;;;3272       temp |= cSetb4;
001b5a  f0400010          ORR      r0,r0,#0x10
;;;3273   	LCD_DataWrite(temp);
001b5e  f85deb04          POP      {lr}
001b62  f7ffbffe          B.W      LCD_DataWrite
;;;3274   }
;;;3275   void Select_SFI_0_DummyRead(void)
                          ENDP

                  Select_SFI_0_DummyRead PROC
001b66  b500              PUSH     {lr}
;;;3276   {
;;;3277   /*[bit3][bit2]
;;;3278   Serial Flash /ROM Read Cycle 0 RW
;;;3279   00b: no dummy cycle mode
;;;3280   01b: 1 dummy cycle mode
;;;3281   10b: 2 dummy cycle mode
;;;3282   11b: 4 dummy cycle mode
;;;3283   */
;;;3284   	unsigned char temp;
;;;3285   	LCD_CmdWrite(0xB7);
001b68  20b7              MOVS     r0,#0xb7
001b6a  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_CmdWrite
;;;3286   	temp = LCD_DataRead();
001b6e  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_DataRead
;;;3287   	temp &= 0xF3;
001b72  f00000f3          AND      r0,r0,#0xf3
;;;3288   	LCD_DataWrite(temp);
001b76  f85deb04          POP      {lr}
001b7a  f7ffbffe          B.W      LCD_DataWrite
;;;3289   }
;;;3290   void Select_SFI_8_DummyRead(void)
                          ENDP

                  Select_SFI_8_DummyRead PROC
001b7e  b500              PUSH     {lr}
;;;3291   {
;;;3292   	unsigned char temp;

001b82  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_CmdWrite
;;;3294   	temp = LCD_DataRead();
001b86  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_DataRead
;;;3295   	temp &= 0xF3;
001b8a  f00000f3          AND      r0,r0,#0xf3
;;;3296       temp |= cSetb2;
001b8e  f0400004          ORR      r0,r0,#4
;;;3297   	LCD_DataWrite(temp);
001b92  f85deb04          POP      {lr}
001b96  f7ffbffe          B.W      LCD_DataWrite
;;;3298   }
;;;3299   void Select_SFI_16_DummyRead(void)
                          ENDP

                  Select_SFI_16_DummyRead PROC
001b9a  b500              PUSH     {lr}
;;;3300   {
;;;3301   
;;;3302   	unsigned char temp;
;;;3303   	LCD_CmdWrite(0xB7);

;;;3304   	temp = LCD_DataRead();
001ba2  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_DataRead
;;;3305   	temp &= 0xF3;
001ba6  f00000f3          AND      r0,r0,#0xf3
;;;3306       temp |= cSetb3;

;;;3308   }

                  Select_SFI_24_DummyRead PROC
001bb6  b500              PUSH     {lr}
;;;3310   {
;;;3311   	unsigned char temp;
;;;3312   	LCD_CmdWrite(0xB7);
001bb8  20b7              MOVS     r0,#0xb7
001bba  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_CmdWrite
;;;3313   	temp = LCD_DataRead();
001bbe  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_DataRead
001bc2  b2c0              UXTB     r0,r0
;;;3314       temp |= 0x0c;
001bc4  f040000c          ORR      r0,r0,#0xc
;;;3315   	LCD_DataWrite(temp);

001bcc  f7ffbffe          B.W      LCD_DataWrite
;;;3316   }
;;;3317   void Select_SFI_Single_Mode(void)
                          ENDP

                  Select_SFI_Single_Mode PROC
001bd0  b500              PUSH     {lr}
;;;3318   {
;;;3319   /*[bit1][bit0]
;;;3320   Serial Flash /ROM I/F Data Latch Mode Select
;;;3321   0Xb: Single Mode
;;;3322   10b: Dual Mode 0.
;;;3323   11b: Dual Mode 1.
;;;3324   */
;;;3325   	unsigned char temp;
;;;3326   	LCD_CmdWrite(0xB7);
001bd2  20b7              MOVS     r0,#0xb7
001bd4  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_CmdWrite
;;;3327   	temp = LCD_DataRead();
001bd8  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_DataRead
;;;3328   	temp &= 0xFC;
001bdc  f00000fc          AND      r0,r0,#0xfc
;;;3329   	LCD_DataWrite(temp);
001be0  f85deb04          POP      {lr}
001be4  f7ffbffe          B.W      LCD_DataWrite
;;;3330   }
;;;3331   
                          ENDP

                  Select_SFI_Dual_Mode1 PROC
;;;3332   void Select_SFI_Dual_Mode1(void)
001be8  b500              PUSH     {lr}
;;;3333   {
;;;3334   	unsigned char temp;
;;;3335   	LCD_CmdWrite(0xB7);
001bea  20b7              MOVS     r0,#0xb7
001bec  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_CmdWrite
;;;3336   	temp = LCD_DataRead();
001bf0  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_DataRead
001bf4  b2c0              UXTB     r0,r0
;;;3337       temp |= 0x03;
001bf6  f0400003          ORR      r0,r0,#3
;;;3338   	LCD_DataWrite(temp);
001bfa  f85deb04          POP      {lr}
001bfe  f7ffbffe          B.W      LCD_DataWrite
;;;3339   }
;;;3340   
                          ENDP

                  Rx_FIFO_Empty_Flag PROC
;;;3500   
;;;3501   unsigned char Rx_FIFO_Empty_Flag(void)
001c02  b500              PUSH     {lr}
;;;3502   {
;;;3503   	LCD_CmdWrite(0xBA);
001c04  20ba              MOVS     r0,#0xba
001c06  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_CmdWrite
;;;3504   	if((LCD_DataRead()&0x20)==0x20)
001c0a  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_DataRead
001c0e  0680              LSLS     r0,r0,#26
001c10  d501              BPL      |L1.7190|
;;;3505   	return 1;
001c12  2001              MOVS     r0,#1
;;;3506   	else
;;;3507   	return 0;
;;;3508   } 
001c14  bd00              POP      {pc}
                  |L1.7190|
001c16  2000              MOVS     r0,#0                 ;3507
001c18  bd00              POP      {pc}
;;;3509   
                          ENDP

                  SPI_Master_FIFO_Data_Get PROC
;;;3351   
;;;3352   unsigned char SPI_Master_FIFO_Data_Get(void)
001c1a  b500              PUSH     {lr}
                  |L1.7196|
;;;3353   {
;;;3354      unsigned char temp;
;;;3355   
;;;3356   	while(Rx_FIFO_Empty_Flag()==1);
001c1c  f7fffffe          BL       Rx_FIFO_Empty_Flag
001c20  2801              CMP      r0,#1
001c22  d0fb              BEQ      |L1.7196|
;;;3357   	LCD_CmdWrite(0xB8);
001c24  20b8              MOVS     r0,#0xb8
001c26  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_CmdWrite
;;;3358   	temp=LCD_DataRead();
001c2a  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_DataRead
001c2e  b2c0              UXTB     r0,r0
;;;3359   	//while(Rx_FIFO_full_flag());
;;;3360      return temp;
;;;3361   }
001c30  bd00              POP      {pc}
;;;3362   
                          ENDP

                  Tx_FIFO_Empty_Flag PROC
;;;3482   //REG[BAh] SPI master Status Register (SPIMSR) 
;;;3483   unsigned char Tx_FIFO_Empty_Flag(void)
001c32  b500              PUSH     {lr}
;;;3484   {
;;;3485   	LCD_CmdWrite(0xBA);
001c34  20ba              MOVS     r0,#0xba
001c36  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_CmdWrite
;;;3486   	if((LCD_DataRead()&0x80)==0x80)
001c3a  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_DataRead
001c3e  0600              LSLS     r0,r0,#24
001c40  d501              BPL      |L1.7238|
;;;3487   	return 1;
001c42  2001              MOVS     r0,#1
;;;3488   	else
;;;3489   	return 0;
;;;3490   }
001c44  bd00              POP      {pc}
                  |L1.7238|
001c46  2000              MOVS     r0,#0                 ;3489
001c48  bd00              POP      {pc}
;;;3491   
                          ENDP

                  SPI_Master_FIFO_Data_Put PROC
;;;3341   //REG[B8h] SPI master Tx /Rx FIFO Data Register (SPIDR) 
;;;3342   unsigned char SPI_Master_FIFO_Data_Put(unsigned char Data)
001c4a  b500              PUSH     {lr}
;;;3343   {
001c4c  4602              MOV      r2,r0
;;;3344       unsigned char temp;
;;;3345   	LCD_CmdWrite(0xB8);
001c4e  20b8              MOVS     r0,#0xb8
001c50  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_CmdWrite
;;;3346   	LCD_DataWrite(Data);
001c54  4610              MOV      r0,r2
001c56  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_DataWrite
                  |L1.7258|
;;;3347   	while(Tx_FIFO_Empty_Flag()==0);	
001c5a  f7fffffe          BL       Tx_FIFO_Empty_Flag
001c5e  2800              CMP      r0,#0
001c60  d0fb              BEQ      |L1.7258|
;;;3348   	temp = SPI_Master_FIFO_Data_Get();
001c62  f85deb04          POP      {lr}
001c66  e7fe              B        SPI_Master_FIFO_Data_Get
;;;3349   	return temp;
;;;3350   }
;;;3351   
                          ENDP

                  Mask_SPI_Master_Interrupt_Flag PROC
;;;3363   //REG[B9h] SPI master Control Register (SPIMCR2) 
;;;3364   void Mask_SPI_Master_Interrupt_Flag(void)
001c68  b500              PUSH     {lr}
;;;3365   {
;;;3366     unsigned char temp;
;;;3367     LCD_CmdWrite(0xB9);
001c6a  20b9              MOVS     r0,#0xb9
001c6c  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_CmdWrite
;;;3368     temp = LCD_DataRead();
001c70  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_DataRead
001c74  b2c0              UXTB     r0,r0
;;;3369     temp |= cSetb6;
001c76  f0400040          ORR      r0,r0,#0x40
;;;3370     LCD_DataWrite(temp);
001c7a  f85deb04          POP      {lr}
001c7e  f7ffbffe          B.W      LCD_DataWrite
;;;3371   
;;;3372   } 
;;;3373   
                          ENDP

                  Select_nSS_drive_on_xnsfcs0 PROC
;;;3374   void Select_nSS_drive_on_xnsfcs0(void)
001c82  b500              PUSH     {lr}
;;;3375   {
;;;3376   	unsigned char temp;
;;;3377   	LCD_CmdWrite(0xB9);
001c84  20b9              MOVS     r0,#0xb9
001c86  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_CmdWrite
;;;3378   	temp = LCD_DataRead();
001c8a  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_DataRead
;;;3379   	temp &= cClrb5;
001c8e  f00000df          AND      r0,r0,#0xdf
;;;3380   	LCD_DataWrite(temp);
001c92  f85deb04          POP      {lr}
001c96  f7ffbffe          B.W      LCD_DataWrite
;;;3381   
;;;3382   }
;;;3383   
                          ENDP

                  Select_nSS_drive_on_xnsfcs1 PROC

001ca2  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_DataRead
001ca6  b2c0              UXTB     r0,r0
;;;3389   	temp |= cSetb5;
001ca8  f0400020          ORR      r0,r0,#0x20
;;;3390   	LCD_DataWrite(temp);

001cb0  f7ffbffe          B.W      LCD_DataWrite
;;;3391   }
;;;3392   
                          ENDP

                  nSS_Inactive PROC
;;;3393   //0: inactive (nSS port will goes high) 
;;;3394   void nSS_Inactive(void)
001cb4  b500              PUSH     {lr}
;;;3395   {
;;;3396   	unsigned char temp;
;;;3397   	LCD_CmdWrite(0xB9);
001cb6  20b9              MOVS     r0,#0xb9
001cb8  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_CmdWrite
;;;3398   	temp = LCD_DataRead();
001cbc  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_DataRead
;;;3399   	temp &= cClrb4;
001cc0  f00000ef          AND      r0,r0,#0xef
;;;3400   	LCD_DataWrite(temp);
001cc4  f85deb04          POP      {lr}
001cc8  f7ffbffe          B.W      LCD_DataWrite
;;;3401   }
;;;3402   //1: active (nSS port will goes low) 
                          ENDP

                  nSS_Active PROC

001cd4  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_DataRead
001cd8  b2c0              UXTB     r0,r0
;;;3408   	temp |= cSetb4;
001cda  f0400010          ORR      r0,r0,#0x10
;;;3409   	LCD_DataWrite(temp);
001cde  f85deb04          POP      {lr}
001ce2  f7ffbffe          B.W      LCD_DataWrite
;;;3410   }
;;;3411   
                          ENDP

                          ENDP

                  Tx_FIFO_Full_Flag PROC
;;;3491   
;;;3492   unsigned char Tx_FIFO_Full_Flag(void)
001d7e  b500              PUSH     {lr}
;;;3493   {
;;;3494   	LCD_CmdWrite(0xBA);
001d80  20ba              MOVS     r0,#0xba
001d82  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_CmdWrite
;;;3495   	if((LCD_DataRead()&0x40)==0x40)
001d86  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_DataRead
001d8a  0640              LSLS     r0,r0,#25
001d8c  d501              BPL      |L1.7570|
;;;3496   	return 1;
001d8e  2001              MOVS     r0,#1
;;;3497   	else
;;;3498   	return 0;
;;;3499   } 
001d90  bd00              POP      {pc}
                  |L1.7570|
001d92  2000              MOVS     r0,#0                 ;3498
001d94  bd00              POP      {pc}
;;;3500   
                          ENDP

                  Rx_FIFO_full_flag PROC
;;;3509   
;;;3510   unsigned char Rx_FIFO_full_flag(void)
001d96  b500              PUSH     {lr}
;;;3511   {
;;;3512      LCD_CmdWrite(0xBA);
001d98  20ba              MOVS     r0,#0xba
001d9a  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_CmdWrite
;;;3513      if((LCD_DataRead()&0x10)==0x10)
001d9e  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_DataRead
001da2  06c0              LSLS     r0,r0,#27
001da4  d501              BPL      |L1.7594|
;;;3514      return 1;
001da6  2001              MOVS     r0,#1
;;;3515      else
;;;3516      return 0;
;;;3517   } 
001da8  bd00              POP      {pc}
                  |L1.7594|
001daa  2000              MOVS     r0,#0                 ;3516
001dac  bd00              POP      {pc}
;;;3518   
                          ENDP

                  OVFI_Flag PROC
;;;3519   unsigned char OVFI_Flag(void)
001dae  b500              PUSH     {lr}
;;;3520   {
;;;3521      LCD_CmdWrite(0xBA);
001db0  20ba              MOVS     r0,#0xba
001db2  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_CmdWrite
;;;3522      if((LCD_DataRead()&0x08)==0x08)
001db6  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_DataRead
001dba  0700              LSLS     r0,r0,#28
001dbc  d501              BPL      |L1.7618|
;;;3523      return 1;
001dbe  2001              MOVS     r0,#1
;;;3524      else
;;;3525      return 0;
;;;3526   }
001dc0  bd00              POP      {pc}
                  |L1.7618|
001dc2  2000              MOVS     r0,#0                 ;3525
001dc4  bd00              POP      {pc}
;;;3527   
                          ENDP

                  Clear_OVFI_Flag PROC

;;;3535   }
;;;3536   
                          ENDP

                  EMTI_Flag PROC
;;;3537   unsigned char EMTI_Flag(void)

;;;3538   {
;;;3539      LCD_CmdWrite(0xBA);
001de2  20ba              MOVS     r0,#0xba
001de4  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_CmdWrite
;;;3540      if((LCD_DataRead()&0x04)==0x04)
001de8  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_DataRead
001dec  0740              LSLS     r0,r0,#29
001dee  d501              BPL      |L1.7668|
;;;3541      return 1;

;;;3542      else
;;;3543      return 0;
