                  Clear_EMTI_Flag PROC
;;;3546   void Clear_EMTI_Flag(void)
001df8  b500              PUSH     {lr}
;;;3547   {
;;;3548      unsigned char temp;
;;;3549      LCD_CmdWrite(0xBA);
001dfa  20ba              MOVS     r0,#0xba
001dfc  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_CmdWrite
;;;3550      temp = LCD_DataRead();
001e00  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_DataRead
001e04  b2c0              UXTB     r0,r0
;;;3551      temp |= cSetb2;
001e06  f0400004          ORR      r0,r0,#4
;;;3552      LCD_DataWrite(temp);
001e0a  f85deb04          POP      {lr}
001e0e  f7ffbffe          B.W      LCD_DataWrite
;;;3553   }
;;;3554   
                          ENDP

                  SFI_DMA_Destination_Start_Address PROC
;;;3555   //[C0h][C1h][C2h][C3h]=========================================================================
;;;3556   void SFI_DMA_Destination_Start_Address(unsigned long Addr)
001e12  b500              PUSH     {lr}
;;;3557   {
001e14  4602              MOV      r2,r0
;;;3558   /*
;;;3559   DMA Destination START ADDRESS 
;;;3560   [1:0]Fix at 0
;;;3561   This bits index SDRAM address [7:0][15:8][23:16][31:24]
;;;3562   */
;;;3563   	LCD_CmdWrite(0xC0);
001e16  20c0              MOVS     r0,#0xc0
001e18  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_CmdWrite
;;;3564   	LCD_DataWrite(Addr);
001e1c  b2d0              UXTB     r0,r2
001e1e  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_DataWrite
;;;3565   	LCD_CmdWrite(0xC1);
001e22  20c1              MOVS     r0,#0xc1
001e24  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_CmdWrite
;;;3566   	LCD_DataWrite(Addr>>8);
001e28  f3c22007          UBFX     r0,r2,#8,#8
001e2c  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_DataWrite
;;;3567   	LCD_CmdWrite(0xC2);
001e30  20c2              MOVS     r0,#0xc2
001e32  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_CmdWrite
;;;3568   	LCD_DataWrite(Addr>>16);
001e36  f3c24007          UBFX     r0,r2,#16,#8
001e3a  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_DataWrite
;;;3569   	LCD_CmdWrite(0xC3);
001e3e  20c3              MOVS     r0,#0xc3
001e40  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_CmdWrite
;;;3570   	LCD_DataWrite(Addr>>24);
001e44  0e10              LSRS     r0,r2,#24
001e46  f85deb04          POP      {lr}
001e4a  f7ffbffe          B.W      LCD_DataWrite
;;;3571   }
;;;3572   //[C0h][C1h][C2h][C3h]=========================================================================
                          ENDP

                  SFI_DMA_Destination_Upper_Left_Corner PROC
;;;3573   void SFI_DMA_Destination_Upper_Left_Corner(unsigned short WX,unsigned short HY)
001e4e  b500              PUSH     {lr}
;;;3574   {
001e50  4602              MOV      r2,r0
001e52  460b              MOV      r3,r1
;;;3575   /*
;;;3576   C0h
;;;3577   This register defines DMA Destination Window Upper-Left corner 
;;;3578   X-coordination [7:0] on Canvas area. 
;;;3579   When REG DMACR bit 1 = 1 (Block Mode) 
;;;3580   This register defines Destination address [7:2] in SDRAM. 
;;;3581   C1h
;;;3582   When REG DMACR bit 1 = 0 (Linear Mode) 
;;;3583   This register defines DMA Destination Window Upper-Left corner 
;;;3584   X-coordination [12:8] on Canvas area. 
;;;3585   When REG DMACR bit 1 = 1 (Block Mode) 
;;;3586   This register defines Destination address [15:8] in SDRAM.
;;;3587   C2h
;;;3588   When REG DMACR bit 1 = 0 (Linear Mode) 
;;;3589   This register defines DMA Destination Window Upper-Left corner
;;;3590   Y-coordination [7:0] on Canvas area. 
;;;3591   When REG DMACR bit 1 = 1 (Block Mode) 
;;;3592   This register defines Destination address [23:16] in SDRAM. 
;;;3593   C3h
;;;3594   When REG DMACR bit 1 = 0 (Linear Mode) 
;;;3595   This register defines DMA Destination Window Upper-Left corner 
;;;3596   Y-coordination [12:8] on Canvas area. 
;;;3597   When REG DMACR bit 1 = 1 (Block Mode) 
;;;3598   This register defines Destination address [31:24] in SDRAM. 
;;;3599   */
;;;3600    
;;;3601   	LCD_CmdWrite(0xC0);
001e54  20c0              MOVS     r0,#0xc0
001e56  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_CmdWrite
;;;3602   	LCD_DataWrite(WX);
001e5a  b2d0              UXTB     r0,r2
001e5c  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_DataWrite
;;;3603   	LCD_CmdWrite(0xC1);
001e60  20c1              MOVS     r0,#0xc1
001e62  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_CmdWrite
;;;3604   	LCD_DataWrite(WX>>8);
001e66  0a10              LSRS     r0,r2,#8
001e68  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_DataWrite
;;;3605    
;;;3606   	LCD_CmdWrite(0xC2);
001e6c  20c2              MOVS     r0,#0xc2
001e6e  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_CmdWrite
;;;3607   	LCD_DataWrite(HY);
001e72  b2d8              UXTB     r0,r3
001e74  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_DataWrite
;;;3608   	LCD_CmdWrite(0xC3);
001e78  20c3              MOVS     r0,#0xc3
001e7a  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_CmdWrite
;;;3609   	LCD_DataWrite(HY>>8);
001e7e  0a18              LSRS     r0,r3,#8
001e80  f85deb04          POP      {lr}
001e84  f7ffbffe          B.W      LCD_DataWrite
;;;3610   }
;;;3611   
                          ENDP

                  SFI_DMA_Transfer_Number PROC
;;;3612   //[C6h][C7h][C8h][C9h]=========================================================================
;;;3613   void SFI_DMA_Transfer_Number(unsigned long Addr)
001e88  b500              PUSH     {lr}
;;;3614   {
001e8a  4602              MOV      r2,r0
;;;3615   /*
;;;3616   Unit : Pixel
;;;3617   When REG DMACR bit 1 = 0 (Linear Mode)
;;;3618   DMA Transfer Number [7:0][15:8][23:16][31:24]
;;;3619   
;;;3620   When REG DMACR bit 1 = 1 (Block Mode)
;;;3621   DMA Block Width [7:0][15:8]
;;;3622   DMA Block HIGH[7:0][15:8]
;;;3623   */
;;;3624   	LCD_CmdWrite(0xC6);
001e8c  20c6              MOVS     r0,#0xc6
001e8e  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_CmdWrite
;;;3625   	LCD_DataWrite(Addr);
001e92  b2d0              UXTB     r0,r2
001e94  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_DataWrite
;;;3626   	LCD_CmdWrite(0xC7);
001e98  20c7              MOVS     r0,#0xc7
001e9a  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_CmdWrite
;;;3627   	LCD_DataWrite(Addr>>8);
001e9e  f3c22007          UBFX     r0,r2,#8,#8
001ea2  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_DataWrite
;;;3628   	LCD_CmdWrite(0xC8);
001ea6  20c8              MOVS     r0,#0xc8
001ea8  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_CmdWrite
;;;3629   	LCD_DataWrite(Addr>>16);
001eac  f3c24007          UBFX     r0,r2,#16,#8
001eb0  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_DataWrite
;;;3630   	LCD_CmdWrite(0xC9);
001eb4  20c9              MOVS     r0,#0xc9
001eb6  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_CmdWrite
;;;3631   	LCD_DataWrite(Addr>>24);
001eba  0e10              LSRS     r0,r2,#24
001ebc  f85deb04          POP      {lr}
001ec0  f7ffbffe          B.W      LCD_DataWrite
;;;3632   }
;;;3633   void SFI_DMA_Transfer_Width_Height(unsigned short WX,unsigned short HY)
                          ENDP

                  SFI_DMA_Transfer_Width_Height PROC
001ec4  b500              PUSH     {lr}
;;;3634   {
001ec6  4602              MOV      r2,r0
001ec8  460b              MOV      r3,r1
;;;3635   /*
;;;3636   When REG DMACR bit 1 = 0 (Linear Mode)
;;;3637   DMA Transfer Number [7:0][15:8][23:16][31:24]
;;;3638   
;;;3639   When REG DMACR bit 1 = 1 (Block Mode)
;;;3640   DMA Block Width [7:0][15:8]
;;;3641   DMA Block HIGH[7:0][15:8]
;;;3642   */
;;;3643   	LCD_CmdWrite(0xC6);
001eca  20c6              MOVS     r0,#0xc6
001ecc  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_CmdWrite
;;;3644   	LCD_DataWrite(WX);
001ed0  b2d0              UXTB     r0,r2
001ed2  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_DataWrite
;;;3645   	LCD_CmdWrite(0xC7);
001ed6  20c7              MOVS     r0,#0xc7
001ed8  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_CmdWrite
;;;3646   	LCD_DataWrite(WX>>8);
001edc  0a10              LSRS     r0,r2,#8
001ede  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_DataWrite
;;;3647   
;;;3648   	LCD_CmdWrite(0xC8);
001ee2  20c8              MOVS     r0,#0xc8
001ee4  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_CmdWrite
;;;3649   	LCD_DataWrite(HY);
001ee8  b2d8              UXTB     r0,r3
001eea  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_DataWrite
;;;3650   	LCD_CmdWrite(0xC9);
001eee  20c9              MOVS     r0,#0xc9
001ef0  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_CmdWrite
;;;3651   	LCD_DataWrite(HY>>8);
001ef4  0a18              LSRS     r0,r3,#8
001ef6  f85deb04          POP      {lr}
001efa  f7ffbffe          B.W      LCD_DataWrite
;;;3652   }
;;;3653   
                          ENDP

                  Font_Select_UserDefine_Mode PROC
;;;3655   
;;;3656   void Font_Select_UserDefine_Mode(void)
001efe  b500              PUSH     {lr}
;;;3657   {
;;;3658   /*[bit7-6]
;;;3659   User-defined Font /CGROM Font Selection Bit in Text Mode
;;;3660   00 : Internal CGROM
;;;3661   01 : Genitop serial flash
;;;3662   10 : User-defined Font
;;;3663   */
;;;3664   	unsigned char temp;
;;;3665   	LCD_CmdWrite(0xCC);
001f00  20cc              MOVS     r0,#0xcc
001f02  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_CmdWrite
;;;3666   	temp = LCD_DataRead();
001f06  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_DataRead
;;;3667       temp |= cSetb7;
001f0a  f0400080          ORR      r0,r0,#0x80
;;;3668   	temp &= cClrb6;
001f0e  f00000bf          AND      r0,r0,#0xbf
;;;3669   	LCD_DataWrite(temp);
001f12  f85deb04          POP      {lr}
001f16  f7ffbffe          B.W      LCD_DataWrite
;;;3670   }
;;;3671   void CGROM_Select_Internal_CGROM(void)
                          ENDP

                  CGROM_Select_Internal_CGROM PROC
001f1a  b500              PUSH     {lr}
;;;3672   {
;;;3673   /*[bit7-6]
;;;3674   User-defined Font /CGROM Font Selection Bit in Text Mode
;;;3675   00 : Internal CGROM
;;;3676   01 : Genitop serial flash
;;;3677   10 : User-defined Font
;;;3678   */
;;;3679   	unsigned char temp;
;;;3680   	LCD_CmdWrite(0xCC);
001f1c  20cc              MOVS     r0,#0xcc
001f1e  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_CmdWrite
;;;3681   	temp = LCD_DataRead();
001f22  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_DataRead
;;;3682   	temp &= cClrb7;
001f26  f000007f          AND      r0,r0,#0x7f
;;;3683       temp &= cClrb6;
001f2a  f00000bf          AND      r0,r0,#0xbf
;;;3684   	LCD_DataWrite(temp);
001f2e  f85deb04          POP      {lr}
001f32  f7ffbffe          B.W      LCD_DataWrite
;;;3685   }
;;;3686   void CGROM_Select_Genitop_FontROM(void)
                          ENDP

                  CGROM_Select_Genitop_FontROM PROC
001f36  b500              PUSH     {lr}
;;;3687   {
;;;3688   /*[bit7-6]
;;;3689   User-defined Font /CGROM Font Selection Bit in Text Mode
;;;3690   00 : Internal CGROM
;;;3691   01 : Genitop serial flash
;;;3692   10 : User-defined Font
;;;3693   */
;;;3694   	unsigned char temp;
;;;3695   	LCD_CmdWrite(0xCC);
001f38  20cc              MOVS     r0,#0xcc
001f3a  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_CmdWrite
;;;3696   	temp = LCD_DataRead();
001f3e  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_DataRead
;;;3697   	temp &= cClrb7;
001f42  f000007f          AND      r0,r0,#0x7f
;;;3698       temp |= cSetb6;
001f46  f0400040          ORR      r0,r0,#0x40
;;;3699   	LCD_DataWrite(temp);
001f4a  f85deb04          POP      {lr}
001f4e  f7ffbffe          B.W      LCD_DataWrite
;;;3700   }
;;;3701   void Font_Select_8x16_16x16(void)
                          ENDP

                  Font_Select_8x16_16x16 PROC
001f52  b500              PUSH     {lr}
;;;3702   {
;;;3703   /*[bit5-4]
;;;3704   Font Height Setting
;;;3705   00b : 8x16 / 16x16.
;;;3706   01b : 12x24 / 24x24.
;;;3707   10b : 16x32 / 32x32.
;;;3708   *** User-defined Font width is decided by font code. Genitop
;;;3709   serial flashˇ¦s font width is decided by font code or GT Font ROM
;;;3710   control register.
;;;3711   */
;;;3712   	unsigned char temp;
;;;3713   	LCD_CmdWrite(0xCC);
001f54  20cc              MOVS     r0,#0xcc
001f56  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_CmdWrite
;;;3714   	temp = LCD_DataRead();
001f5a  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_DataRead
;;;3715       temp &= cClrb5;
001f5e  f00000df          AND      r0,r0,#0xdf
;;;3716       temp &= cClrb4;
001f62  f00000ef          AND      r0,r0,#0xef
;;;3717   	LCD_DataWrite(temp);
001f66  f85deb04          POP      {lr}
001f6a  f7ffbffe          B.W      LCD_DataWrite
;;;3718   }
;;;3719   void Font_Select_12x24_24x24(void)
                          ENDP

                  Font_Select_12x24_24x24 PROC
001f6e  b500              PUSH     {lr}
;;;3720   {
;;;3721   /*[bit5-4]
;;;3722   Font Height Setting
;;;3723   00b : 8x16 / 16x16.
;;;3724   01b : 12x24 / 24x24.
;;;3725   10b : 16x32 / 32x32.
;;;3726   *** User-defined Font width is decided by font code. Genitop
;;;3727   serial flashˇ¦s font width is decided by font code or GT Font ROM
;;;3728   control register.
;;;3729   */
;;;3730   	unsigned char temp;
;;;3731   	LCD_CmdWrite(0xCC);
001f70  20cc              MOVS     r0,#0xcc
001f72  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_CmdWrite
;;;3732   	temp = LCD_DataRead();
001f76  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_DataRead
;;;3733       temp &= cClrb5;
001f7a  f00000df          AND      r0,r0,#0xdf
;;;3734       temp |= cSetb4;
001f7e  f0400010          ORR      r0,r0,#0x10
;;;3735   	LCD_DataWrite(temp);
001f82  f85deb04          POP      {lr}
001f86  f7ffbffe          B.W      LCD_DataWrite
;;;3736   }
;;;3737   void Font_Select_16x32_32x32(void)
                          ENDP

                  Font_Select_16x32_32x32 PROC
001f8a  b500              PUSH     {lr}
;;;3738   {
;;;3739   /*[bit5-4]
;;;3740   Font Height Setting
;;;3741   00b : 8x16 / 16x16.
;;;3742   01b : 12x24 / 24x24.
;;;3743   10b : 16x32 / 32x32.
;;;3744   *** User-defined Font width is decided by font code. Genitop
;;;3745   serial flashˇ¦s font width is decided by font code or GT Font ROM
;;;3746   control register.
;;;3747   */
;;;3748   	unsigned char temp;
;;;3749   	LCD_CmdWrite(0xCC);
001f8c  20cc              MOVS     r0,#0xcc
001f8e  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_CmdWrite
;;;3750   	temp = LCD_DataRead();
001f92  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_DataRead
;;;3751       temp |= cSetb5;
001f96  f0400020          ORR      r0,r0,#0x20
;;;3752       temp &= cClrb4;
001f9a  f00000ef          AND      r0,r0,#0xef
;;;3753   	LCD_DataWrite(temp);
001f9e  f85deb04          POP      {lr}
001fa2  f7ffbffe          B.W      LCD_DataWrite
;;;3754   }
;;;3755   void Internal_CGROM_Select_ISOIEC8859_1(void)
                          ENDP

                  Internal_CGROM_Select_ISOIEC8859_1 PROC
001fa6  b500              PUSH     {lr}
;;;3756   {
;;;3757   /*
;;;3758   Font Selection for internal CGROM
;;;3759   When FNCR0 B7 = 0 and B5 = 0, Internal CGROM supports the
;;;3760   8x16 character sets with the standard coding of ISO/IEC 8859-1~4, 
;;;3761   which supports English and most of European country languages.
;;;3762   00b : ISO/IEC 8859-1.
;;;3763   01b : ISO/IEC 8859-2.
;;;3764   10b : ISO/IEC 8859-3.
;;;3765   11b : ISO/IEC 8859-4.
;;;3766   */
;;;3767   	unsigned char temp;
;;;3768   	LCD_CmdWrite(0xCC);
001fa8  20cc              MOVS     r0,#0xcc
001faa  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_CmdWrite
;;;3769   	temp = LCD_DataRead();
001fae  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_DataRead
;;;3770       temp &= cClrb1;
001fb2  f00000fd          AND      r0,r0,#0xfd
;;;3771       temp &= cClrb0;
001fb6  f00000fe          AND      r0,r0,#0xfe
;;;3772   	LCD_DataWrite(temp);
001fba  f85deb04          POP      {lr}
001fbe  f7ffbffe          B.W      LCD_DataWrite
;;;3773   }
;;;3774   void Internal_CGROM_Select_ISOIEC8859_2(void)
                          ENDP

                  Internal_CGROM_Select_ISOIEC8859_2 PROC
001fc2  b500              PUSH     {lr}
;;;3775   {
;;;3776   /*
;;;3777   Font Selection for internal CGROM
;;;3778   When FNCR0 B7 = 0 and B5 = 0, Internal CGROM supports the
;;;3779   8x16 character sets with the standard coding of ISO/IEC 8859-1~4, 
;;;3780   which supports English and most of European country languages.
;;;3781   00b : ISO/IEC 8859-1.
;;;3782   01b : ISO/IEC 8859-2.
;;;3783   10b : ISO/IEC 8859-3.
;;;3784   11b : ISO/IEC 8859-4.
;;;3785   */
;;;3786   	unsigned char temp;
;;;3787   	LCD_CmdWrite(0xCC);
001fc4  20cc              MOVS     r0,#0xcc
001fc6  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_CmdWrite
;;;3788   	temp = LCD_DataRead();
001fca  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_DataRead
;;;3789       temp &= cClrb1;
001fce  f00000fd          AND      r0,r0,#0xfd
;;;3790       temp |= cSetb0;
001fd2  f0400001          ORR      r0,r0,#1
;;;3791   	LCD_DataWrite(temp);
001fd6  f85deb04          POP      {lr}
001fda  f7ffbffe          B.W      LCD_DataWrite
;;;3792   }
;;;3793   void Internal_CGROM_Select_ISOIEC8859_3(void)
                          ENDP

                  Internal_CGROM_Select_ISOIEC8859_3 PROC
001fde  b500              PUSH     {lr}
;;;3794   {
;;;3795   /*
;;;3796   Font Selection for internal CGROM
;;;3797   When FNCR0 B7 = 0 and B5 = 0, Internal CGROM supports the
;;;3798   8x16 character sets with the standard coding of ISO/IEC 8859-1~4, 
;;;3799   which supports English and most of European country languages.
;;;3800   00b : ISO/IEC 8859-1.
;;;3801   01b : ISO/IEC 8859-2.
;;;3802   10b : ISO/IEC 8859-3.
;;;3803   11b : ISO/IEC 8859-4.
;;;3804   */
;;;3805   	unsigned char temp;
;;;3806   	LCD_CmdWrite(0xCC);
001fe0  20cc              MOVS     r0,#0xcc
001fe2  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_CmdWrite
;;;3807   	temp = LCD_DataRead();
001fe6  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_DataRead
;;;3808       temp |= cSetb1;
001fea  f0400002          ORR      r0,r0,#2
;;;3809       temp &= cClrb0;
001fee  f00000fe          AND      r0,r0,#0xfe
;;;3810   	LCD_DataWrite(temp);
001ff2  f85deb04          POP      {lr}
001ff6  f7ffbffe          B.W      LCD_DataWrite
;;;3811   }
;;;3812   void Internal_CGROM_Select_ISOIEC8859_4(void)
                          ENDP

                  Internal_CGROM_Select_ISOIEC8859_4 PROC
001ffa  b500              PUSH     {lr}
;;;3813   {
;;;3814   /*
;;;3815   Font Selection for internal CGROM
;;;3816   When FNCR0 B7 = 0 and B5 = 0, Internal CGROM supports the
;;;3817   8x16 character sets with the standard coding of ISO/IEC 8859-1~4, 
;;;3818   which supports English and most of European country languages.
;;;3819   00b : ISO/IEC 8859-1.
;;;3820   01b : ISO/IEC 8859-2.
;;;3821   10b : ISO/IEC 8859-3.
;;;3822   11b : ISO/IEC 8859-4.
;;;3823   */
;;;3824   	unsigned char temp;
;;;3825   	LCD_CmdWrite(0xCC);
001ffc  20cc              MOVS     r0,#0xcc
001ffe  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_CmdWrite
;;;3826   	temp = LCD_DataRead();
002002  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_DataRead
002006  b2c0              UXTB     r0,r0
;;;3827       temp |= cSetb1;
002008  f0400002          ORR      r0,r0,#2
;;;3828       temp |= cSetb0;
00200c  f0400001          ORR      r0,r0,#1
;;;3829   	LCD_DataWrite(temp);
002010  f85deb04          POP      {lr}
002014  f7ffbffe          B.W      LCD_DataWrite
;;;3830   }
;;;3831   //[CDh]=========================================================================
                          ENDP

                  Enable_Font_Alignment PROC
;;;3832   void Enable_Font_Alignment(void)
002018  b500              PUSH     {lr}
;;;3833   {
;;;3834   /*
;;;3835   Full Alignment Selection Bit
;;;3836   0 : Full alignment disable.
;;;3837   1 : Full alignment enable.
;;;3838   */
;;;3839   	unsigned char temp;
;;;3840   	LCD_CmdWrite(0xCD);
00201a  20cd              MOVS     r0,#0xcd
00201c  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_CmdWrite
;;;3841   	temp = LCD_DataRead();
002020  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_DataRead
002024  b2c0              UXTB     r0,r0
;;;3842       temp |= cSetb7;
002026  f0400080          ORR      r0,r0,#0x80
;;;3843   	LCD_DataWrite(temp);
00202a  f85deb04          POP      {lr}
00202e  f7ffbffe          B.W      LCD_DataWrite
;;;3844   }
;;;3845   void Disable_Font_Alignment(void)
                          ENDP

                  Disable_Font_Alignment PROC
002032  b500              PUSH     {lr}
;;;3846   {
;;;3847   /*
;;;3848   Full Alignment Selection Bit
;;;3849   0 : Full alignment disable.
;;;3850   1 : Full alignment enable.
;;;3851   */
;;;3852   	unsigned char temp;
;;;3853   	LCD_CmdWrite(0xCD);
002034  20cd              MOVS     r0,#0xcd
002036  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_CmdWrite
;;;3854   	temp = LCD_DataRead();
00203a  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_DataRead
;;;3855       temp &= cClrb7;
00203e  f000007f          AND      r0,r0,#0x7f
;;;3856   	LCD_DataWrite(temp);
002042  f85deb04          POP      {lr}
002046  f7ffbffe          B.W      LCD_DataWrite
;;;3857   }
;;;3858   void Font_Background_select_Transparency(void)
                          ENDP

                  Font_Background_select_Transparency PROC
00204a  b500              PUSH     {lr}
;;;3859   {
;;;3860   /*
;;;3861   Font Transparency
;;;3862   0 : Font with background color.
;;;3863   1 : Font with background transparency.
;;;3864   */
;;;3865   	unsigned char temp;
;;;3866   	LCD_CmdWrite(0xCD);
00204c  20cd              MOVS     r0,#0xcd
00204e  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_CmdWrite
;;;3867   	temp = LCD_DataRead();
002052  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_DataRead
002056  b2c0              UXTB     r0,r0
;;;3868       temp |= cSetb6;
002058  f0400040          ORR      r0,r0,#0x40
;;;3869   	LCD_DataWrite(temp);
00205c  f85deb04          POP      {lr}
002060  f7ffbffe          B.W      LCD_DataWrite
;;;3870   }
;;;3871   void Font_Background_select_Color(void)
                          ENDP

                  Font_Background_select_Color PROC
002064  b500              PUSH     {lr}
;;;3872   {
;;;3873   /*
;;;3874   Font Transparency
;;;3875   0 : Font with background color.
;;;3876   1 : Font with background transparency.
;;;3877   */
;;;3878   	unsigned char temp;
;;;3879   	LCD_CmdWrite(0xCD);
002066  20cd              MOVS     r0,#0xcd
002068  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_CmdWrite
;;;3880   	temp = LCD_DataRead();
00206c  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_DataRead
;;;3881       temp &= cClrb6;
002070  f00000bf          AND      r0,r0,#0xbf
;;;3882   	LCD_DataWrite(temp);
002074  f85deb04          POP      {lr}
002078  f7ffbffe          B.W      LCD_DataWrite
;;;3883   }
;;;3884   void Font_0_degree(void)
                          ENDP

                  Font_0_degree PROC
00207c  b500              PUSH     {lr}
;;;3885   {
;;;3886   /*
;;;3887   Font Rotation
;;;3888   0 : Normal
;;;3889   Text direction from left to right then from top to bottom
;;;3890   1 : Counterclockwise 90 degree & horizontal flip
;;;3891   Text direction from top to bottom then from left to right
;;;3892   (it should accommodate with set VDIR as 1)
;;;3893   This attribute can be changed only when previous font write
;;;3894   finished (core_busy = 0)
;;;3895   */
;;;3896   	unsigned char temp;
;;;3897   	LCD_CmdWrite(0xCD);
00207e  20cd              MOVS     r0,#0xcd
002080  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_CmdWrite
;;;3898   	temp = LCD_DataRead();
002084  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_DataRead
;;;3899       temp &= cClrb4;
002088  f00000ef          AND      r0,r0,#0xef
;;;3900   	LCD_DataWrite(temp);
00208c  f85deb04          POP      {lr}
002090  f7ffbffe          B.W      LCD_DataWrite
;;;3901   }
;;;3902   void Font_90_degree(void)
                          ENDP

                  Font_90_degree PROC
002094  b500              PUSH     {lr}
;;;3903   {
;;;3904   /*
;;;3905   Font Rotation
;;;3906   0 : Normal
;;;3907   Text direction from left to right then from top to bottom
;;;3908   1 : Counterclockwise 90 degree & horizontal flip
;;;3909   Text direction from top to bottom then from left to right
;;;3910   (it should accommodate with set VDIR as 1)
;;;3911   This attribute can be changed only when previous font write
;;;3912   finished (core_busy = 0)
;;;3913   */
;;;3914   	unsigned char temp;
;;;3915   	LCD_CmdWrite(0xCD);
002096  20cd              MOVS     r0,#0xcd
002098  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_CmdWrite
;;;3916   	temp = LCD_DataRead();
00209c  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_DataRead
0020a0  b2c0              UXTB     r0,r0
;;;3917       temp |= cSetb4;
0020a2  f0400010          ORR      r0,r0,#0x10
;;;3918   	LCD_DataWrite(temp);
0020a6  f85deb04          POP      {lr}
0020aa  f7ffbffe          B.W      LCD_DataWrite
;;;3919   }
;;;3920   void Font_Width_X1(void)
                          ENDP

                  Font_Width_X1 PROC
0020ae  b500              PUSH     {lr}
;;;3921   {
;;;3922   /*
;;;3923   Horizontal Font Enlargement
;;;3924   00b : X1.
;;;3925   01b : X2.
;;;3926   10b : X3.
;;;3927   11b : X4.
;;;3928   */
;;;3929   	unsigned char temp;
;;;3930   	LCD_CmdWrite(0xCD);
0020b0  20cd              MOVS     r0,#0xcd
0020b2  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_CmdWrite
;;;3931   	temp = LCD_DataRead();
0020b6  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_DataRead
;;;3932       temp &= cClrb3;
0020ba  f00000f7          AND      r0,r0,#0xf7
;;;3933       temp &= cClrb2;
0020be  f00000fb          AND      r0,r0,#0xfb
;;;3934   	LCD_DataWrite(temp);
0020c2  f85deb04          POP      {lr}
0020c6  f7ffbffe          B.W      LCD_DataWrite
;;;3935   }
;;;3936   void Font_Width_X2(void)
                          ENDP

                  Font_Width_X2 PROC
0020ca  b500              PUSH     {lr}
;;;3937   {
;;;3938   /*
;;;3939   Horizontal Font Enlargement
;;;3940   00b : X1.
;;;3941   01b : X2.
;;;3942   10b : X3.
;;;3943   11b : X4.
;;;3944   */
;;;3945   	unsigned char temp;
;;;3946   	LCD_CmdWrite(0xCD);
0020cc  20cd              MOVS     r0,#0xcd
0020ce  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_CmdWrite
;;;3947   	temp = LCD_DataRead();
0020d2  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_DataRead
;;;3948       temp &= cClrb3;
0020d6  f00000f7          AND      r0,r0,#0xf7
;;;3949       temp |= cSetb2;
0020da  f0400004          ORR      r0,r0,#4
;;;3950   	LCD_DataWrite(temp);
0020de  f85deb04          POP      {lr}
0020e2  f7ffbffe          B.W      LCD_DataWrite
;;;3951   }
;;;3952   void Font_Width_X3(void)
                          ENDP

                  Font_Width_X3 PROC
0020e6  b500              PUSH     {lr}
;;;3953   {
;;;3954   /*
;;;3955   Horizontal Font Enlargement
;;;3956   00b : X1.
;;;3957   01b : X2.
;;;3958   10b : X3.
;;;3959   11b : X4.
;;;3960   */
;;;3961   	unsigned char temp;
;;;3962   	LCD_CmdWrite(0xCD);
0020e8  20cd              MOVS     r0,#0xcd
0020ea  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_CmdWrite
;;;3963   	temp = LCD_DataRead();
0020ee  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_DataRead
;;;3964       temp |= cSetb3;
0020f2  f0400008          ORR      r0,r0,#8
;;;3965       temp &= cClrb2;
0020f6  f00000fb          AND      r0,r0,#0xfb
;;;3966   	LCD_DataWrite(temp);
0020fa  f85deb04          POP      {lr}
0020fe  f7ffbffe          B.W      LCD_DataWrite
;;;3967   }
;;;3968   void Font_Width_X4(void)
                          ENDP

                  Font_Width_X4 PROC
002102  b500              PUSH     {lr}
;;;3969   {
;;;3970   /*
;;;3971   Horizontal Font Enlargement
;;;3972   00b : X1.
;;;3973   01b : X2.
;;;3974   10b : X3.
;;;3975   11b : X4.
;;;3976   */
;;;3977   	unsigned char temp;
;;;3978   	LCD_CmdWrite(0xCD);
002104  20cd              MOVS     r0,#0xcd
002106  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_CmdWrite
;;;3979   	temp = LCD_DataRead();
00210a  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_DataRead
00210e  b2c0              UXTB     r0,r0
;;;3980       temp |= cSetb3;
002110  f0400008          ORR      r0,r0,#8
;;;3981       temp |= cSetb2;
002114  f0400004          ORR      r0,r0,#4
;;;3982   	LCD_DataWrite(temp);
002118  f85deb04          POP      {lr}
00211c  f7ffbffe          B.W      LCD_DataWrite
;;;3983   }
;;;3984   void Font_Height_X1(void)
                          ENDP

                  Font_Height_X1 PROC
002120  b500              PUSH     {lr}
;;;3985   {
;;;3986   /*
;;;3987   Vertical Font Enlargement
;;;3988   00b : X1.
;;;3989   01b : X2.
;;;3990   10b : X3.
;;;3991   11b : X4.
;;;3992   */
;;;3993   	unsigned char temp;
;;;3994   	LCD_CmdWrite(0xCD);
002122  20cd              MOVS     r0,#0xcd
002124  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_CmdWrite
;;;3995   	temp = LCD_DataRead();
002128  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_DataRead
;;;3996       temp &= cClrb1;
00212c  f00000fd          AND      r0,r0,#0xfd
;;;3997       temp &= cClrb0;
002130  f00000fe          AND      r0,r0,#0xfe
;;;3998   	LCD_DataWrite(temp);
002134  f85deb04          POP      {lr}
002138  f7ffbffe          B.W      LCD_DataWrite
;;;3999   }
;;;4000   void Font_Height_X2(void)
                          ENDP

                  Font_Height_X2 PROC

                  GTFont_Select_GT21L16TW_GT21H16T1W PROC
;;;4049   //[CEh]=========================================================================
;;;4050   void GTFont_Select_GT21L16TW_GT21H16T1W(void)
002192  b500              PUSH     {lr}
;;;4051   {
;;;4052   /*
;;;4053   GT Serial Font ROM Select
;;;4054   000b: GT21L16TW / GT21H16T1W
;;;4055   001b: GT23L16U2W
;;;4056   010b: GT23L24T3Y / GT23H24T3Y
;;;4057   011b: GT23L24M1Z
;;;4058   100b: GT23L32S4W / GT23H32S4W
;;;4059   101b: GT20L24F6Y
;;;4060   110b: GT21L24S1W
;;;4061   111b: GT22L16A1Y
;;;4062   */
;;;4063   	unsigned char temp;
;;;4064   	LCD_CmdWrite(0xCE);
002194  20ce              MOVS     r0,#0xce
002196  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_CmdWrite
;;;4065   	temp = LCD_DataRead();
00219a  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_DataRead
;;;4066       temp &= cClrb7;
00219e  f000007f          AND      r0,r0,#0x7f
;;;4067       temp &= cClrb6;
0021a2  f00000bf          AND      r0,r0,#0xbf
;;;4068       temp &= cClrb5;
0021a6  f00000df          AND      r0,r0,#0xdf
;;;4069   	LCD_DataWrite(temp);
0021aa  f85deb04          POP      {lr}
0021ae  f7ffbffe          B.W      LCD_DataWrite
;;;4070   }
;;;4071   void GTFont_Select_GT23L16U2W(void)
                          ENDP

                  GTFont_Select_GT23L16U2W PROC
0021b2  b500              PUSH     {lr}
;;;4072   {
;;;4073   /*
;;;4074   GT Serial Font ROM Select
;;;4075   000b: GT21L16TW / GT21H16T1W
;;;4076   001b: GT23L16U2W
;;;4077   010b: GT23L24T3Y / GT23H24T3Y
;;;4078   011b: GT23L24M1Z
;;;4079   100b: GT23L32S4W / GT23H32S4W
;;;4080   101b: GT20L24F6Y

;;;4083   */

;;;4086   	temp = LCD_DataRead();
0021ba  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_DataRead
;;;4087       temp &= cClrb7;

;;;4088       temp &= cClrb6;

;;;4089       temp |= cSetb5;

;;;4091   }
;;;4092   void GTFont_Select_GT23L24T3Y_GT23H24T3Y(void)
                          ENDP

                  GTFont_Select_GT23L32S4W_GT23H32S4W PROC
002212  b500              PUSH     {lr}
;;;4135   {
;;;4136   /*
;;;4137   GT Serial Font ROM Select
;;;4138   000b: GT21L16TW / GT21H16T1W
;;;4139   001b: GT23L16U2W
;;;4140   010b: GT23L24T3Y / GT23H24T3Y

;;;4142   100b: GT23L32S4W / GT23H32S4W

                  GTFont_Select_GT20L24F6Y PROC
002232  b500              PUSH     {lr}
;;;4156   {
;;;4157   /*
;;;4158   GT Serial Font ROM Select

;;;4160   001b: GT23L16U2W
;;;4161   010b: GT23L24T3Y / GT23H24T3Y

                  GTFont_Select_GT21L24S1W PROC

;;;4177   {
;;;4178   /*
;;;4179   GT Serial Font ROM Select
;;;4180   000b: GT21L16TW / GT21H16T1W
;;;4181   001b: GT23L16U2W
;;;4182   010b: GT23L24T3Y / GT23H24T3Y

                  GTFont_Select_GT22L16A1Y PROC
002272  b500              PUSH     {lr}
;;;4198   {
;;;4199   /*
;;;4200   GT Serial Font ROM Select
;;;4201   000b: GT21L16TW / GT21H16T1W
;;;4202   001b: GT23L16U2W
;;;4203   010b: GT23L24T3Y / GT23H24T3Y
;;;4204   011b: GT23L24M1Z
;;;4205   100b: GT23L32S4W / GT23H32S4W
;;;4206   101b: GT20L24F6Y
;;;4207   110b: GT21L24S1W
;;;4208   111b: GT22L16A1Y
;;;4209   */

;;;4211   	LCD_CmdWrite(0xCE);

;;;4212   	temp = LCD_DataRead();

;;;4213       temp |= cSetb7;

;;;4214       temp |= cSetb6;

;;;4215       temp |= cSetb5;

;;;4216   	LCD_DataWrite(temp);

;;;4217   }
;;;4218   
                          ENDP

                  Set_GTFont_Decoder PROC
;;;4219   //[CFh]=========================================================================
;;;4220   void Set_GTFont_Decoder(unsigned char temp)
002294  b500              PUSH     {lr}
;;;4221   {
002296  4602              MOV      r2,r0
;;;4222   /*
;;;4223   [bit7-3]
;;;4224   FONT ROM Coding Setting
;;;4225   For specific GT serial Font ROM, the coding method must be set for decoding.
;;;4226   00000b: GB2312
;;;4227   00001b: GB12345/GB18030
;;;4228   00010b: BIG5
;;;4229   00011b: UNICODE
;;;4230   00100b: ASCII
;;;4231   00101b: UNI-Japanese
;;;4232   00110b: JIS0208
;;;4233   00111b: Latin/Greek/ Cyrillic / Arabic/Thai/Hebrew
;;;4234   01000b: Korea
;;;4235   10001b: ISO-8859-1
;;;4236   10010b: ISO-8859-2
;;;4237   10011b: ISO-8859-3
;;;4238   10100b: ISO-8859-4
;;;4239   10101b: ISO-8859-5
;;;4240   10110b: ISO-8859-6
;;;4241   10111b: ISO-8859-7
;;;4242   11000b: ISO-8859-8
;;;4243   11001b: ISO-8859-9
;;;4244   11010b: ISO-8859-10
;;;4245   11011b: ISO-8859-11
;;;4246   11100b: ISO-8859-12
;;;4247   11101b: ISO-8859-13
;;;4248   11110b: ISO-8859-14
;;;4249   11111b: ISO-8859-15
;;;4250   
;;;4251   [bit1-0]
;;;4252   ASCII / Latin/Greek/ Cyrillic / Arabic
;;;4253   		(ASCII)		(Latin/Greek/Cyrillic)	(Arabic)
;;;4254   00b		Normal			Normal 					NA
;;;4255   01b		Arial 		Variable Width 			Presentation Forms-A
;;;4256   10b		Roman 			NA 					Presentation Forms-B
;;;4257   11b		Bold			NA 						NA
;;;4258   */
;;;4259   	LCD_CmdWrite(0xCF);
002298  20cf              MOVS     r0,#0xcf
00229a  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_CmdWrite
;;;4260   	LCD_DataWrite(temp);
00229e  4610              MOV      r0,r2
0022a0  f85deb04          POP      {lr}
0022a4  f7ffbffe          B.W      LCD_DataWrite
;;;4261   }
;;;4262   //[D0h]=========================================================================
                          ENDP

                  Font_Line_Distance PROC
;;;4263   void Font_Line_Distance(unsigned char temp)
0022a8  b500              PUSH     {lr}
;;;4264   {
0022aa  4602              MOV      r2,r0
;;;4265   /*[bit4-0]
;;;4266   Font Line Distance Setting
;;;4267   Setting the font character line distance when setting memory font
;;;4268   write cursor auto move. (Unit: pixel)
;;;4269   */
;;;4270   	LCD_CmdWrite(0xD0);
0022ac  20d0              MOVS     r0,#0xd0
0022ae  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_CmdWrite
;;;4271   	LCD_DataWrite(temp);
0022b2  4610              MOV      r0,r2
0022b4  f85deb04          POP      {lr}
0022b8  f7ffbffe          B.W      LCD_DataWrite
;;;4272   }
;;;4273   //[D1h]=========================================================================
                          ENDP

                  Set_Font_to_Font_Width PROC
;;;4274   void Set_Font_to_Font_Width(unsigned char temp)
0022bc  b500              PUSH     {lr}
;;;4275   {
0022be  4602              MOV      r2,r0
;;;4276   /*[bit5-0]
;;;4277   Font to Font Width Setting (Unit: pixel)
;;;4278   */
;;;4279   	LCD_CmdWrite(0xD1);
0022c0  20d1              MOVS     r0,#0xd1
0022c2  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_CmdWrite
;;;4280   	LCD_DataWrite(temp);
0022c6  4610              MOV      r0,r2
0022c8  f85deb04          POP      {lr}
0022cc  f7ffbffe          B.W      LCD_DataWrite
;;;4281   }
;;;4282   //[D2h]~[D4h]=========================================================================
                          ENDP

                  Foreground_RGB PROC
;;;4283   void Foreground_RGB(unsigned char RED,unsigned char GREEN,unsigned char BLUE)
0022d0  b510              PUSH     {r4,lr}
;;;4284   {
0022d2  4604              MOV      r4,r0
0022d4  460b              MOV      r3,r1
;;;4285   /*
;;;4286   [D2h] Foreground Color - Red, for draw, text or color expansion
;;;4287   [D3h] Foreground Color - Green, for draw, text or color expansion
;;;4288   [D4h] Foreground Color - Blue, for draw, text or color expansion
;;;4289   */  
;;;4290       LCD_CmdWrite(0xD2);
0022d6  20d2              MOVS     r0,#0xd2
0022d8  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_CmdWrite
;;;4291   	LCD_DataWrite(RED);
0022dc  4620              MOV      r0,r4
0022de  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_DataWrite
;;;4292    
;;;4293       LCD_CmdWrite(0xD3);
0022e2  20d3              MOVS     r0,#0xd3
0022e4  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_CmdWrite
;;;4294   	LCD_DataWrite(GREEN);
0022e8  4618              MOV      r0,r3
0022ea  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_DataWrite
;;;4295     
;;;4296       LCD_CmdWrite(0xD4);
0022ee  20d4              MOVS     r0,#0xd4
0022f0  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_CmdWrite
;;;4297   	LCD_DataWrite(BLUE);
0022f4  e8bd4010          POP      {r4,lr}
0022f8  4610              MOV      r0,r2
0022fa  f7ffbffe          B.W      LCD_DataWrite
;;;4298   }
;;;4299   
                          ENDP

                  Foreground_color_256 PROC
;;;4300   //Input data format:R3G3B2  
;;;4301   void Foreground_color_256(unsigned char temp) 
0022fe  b500              PUSH     {lr}
;;;4302   {
002300  4602              MOV      r2,r0
;;;4303       LCD_CmdWrite(0xD2);
002302  20d2              MOVS     r0,#0xd2
002304  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_CmdWrite
;;;4304   	LCD_DataWrite(temp);
002308  4610              MOV      r0,r2
00230a  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_DataWrite
;;;4305    
;;;4306       LCD_CmdWrite(0xD3);
00230e  20d3              MOVS     r0,#0xd3
002310  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_CmdWrite
;;;4307   	LCD_DataWrite(temp<<3);
002314  06d0              LSLS     r0,r2,#27
002316  0e00              LSRS     r0,r0,#24
002318  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_DataWrite
;;;4308     
;;;4309       LCD_CmdWrite(0xD4);
00231c  20d4              MOVS     r0,#0xd4
00231e  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_CmdWrite
;;;4310   	LCD_DataWrite(temp<<6);
002322  0790              LSLS     r0,r2,#30
002324  0e00              LSRS     r0,r0,#24
002326  f85deb04          POP      {lr}
00232a  f7ffbffe          B.W      LCD_DataWrite
;;;4311   }
;;;4312    
                          ENDP

                  Foreground_color_16M PROC

;;;4315   {

                  Background_RGB PROC
;;;4331   */

;;;4340

00237e  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_CmdWrite
;;;4342   	LCD_DataWrite(BLUE);
002382  e8bd4010          POP      {r4,lr}
002386  4610              MOV      r0,r2
002388  f7ffbffe          B.W      LCD_DataWrite
;;;4343   }
;;;4344    
                          ENDP

                  CGRAM_Start_address PROC
;;;4384   //[DBh]~[DEh]=========================================================================
;;;4385   void CGRAM_Start_address(unsigned long Addr)
00241c  b500              PUSH     {lr}
;;;4386   {
00241e  4602              MOV      r2,r0
;;;4387   /*
;;;4388   CGRAM START ADDRESS [31:0]
;;;4389   */	 
;;;4390       LCD_CmdWrite(0xDB);
002420  20db              MOVS     r0,#0xdb
002422  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_CmdWrite
;;;4391   	LCD_DataWrite(Addr);
002426  b2d0              UXTB     r0,r2
002428  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_DataWrite
;;;4392       LCD_CmdWrite(0xDC);
00242c  20dc              MOVS     r0,#0xdc
00242e  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_CmdWrite
;;;4393   	LCD_DataWrite(Addr>>8);
002432  f3c22007          UBFX     r0,r2,#8,#8
002436  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_DataWrite
;;;4394       LCD_CmdWrite(0xDD);
00243a  20dd              MOVS     r0,#0xdd
00243c  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_CmdWrite
;;;4395   	LCD_DataWrite(Addr>>16);
002440  f3c24007          UBFX     r0,r2,#16,#8
002444  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_DataWrite
;;;4396       LCD_CmdWrite(0xDE);
002448  20de              MOVS     r0,#0xde
00244a  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_CmdWrite
;;;4397   	LCD_DataWrite(Addr>>24);
00244e  0e10              LSRS     r0,r2,#24
002450  f85deb04          POP      {lr}
002454  f7ffbffe          B.W      LCD_DataWrite
;;;4398   }
;;;4399   
                          ENDP

                  LT768_I2CM_Clock_Prescale PROC
;;;4439   //[E5h]~[E6h]=========================================================================
;;;4440   void LT768_I2CM_Clock_Prescale(unsigned short WX)
0024ac  b500              PUSH     {lr}
;;;4441   {
0024ae  4602              MOV      r2,r0
;;;4442   /*
;;;4443   I2C Master Clock Pre-scale [7:0]
;;;4444   I2C Master Clock Pre-scale [15:8]
;;;4445   */  
;;;4446       LCD_CmdWrite(0xE5);
0024b0  20e5              MOVS     r0,#0xe5
0024b2  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_CmdWrite
;;;4447   	LCD_DataWrite(WX);
0024b6  b2d0              UXTB     r0,r2
0024b8  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_DataWrite
;;;4448       LCD_CmdWrite(0xE6);
0024bc  20e6              MOVS     r0,#0xe6
0024be  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_CmdWrite
;;;4449   	LCD_DataWrite(WX>>8);
0024c2  0a10              LSRS     r0,r2,#8
0024c4  f85deb04          POP      {lr}
0024c8  f7ffbffe          B.W      LCD_DataWrite
;;;4450   }
;;;4451   //[E7h]=========================================================================
                          ENDP

                  LT768_I2CM_Transmit_Data PROC
;;;4452   void LT768_I2CM_Transmit_Data(unsigned char temp)
0024cc  b500              PUSH     {lr}
;;;4453   {
0024ce  4602              MOV      r2,r0
;;;4454   /*
;;;4455   I2C Master Transmit[7:0]
;;;4456   */  
;;;4457       LCD_CmdWrite(0xE7);
0024d0  20e7              MOVS     r0,#0xe7
0024d2  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_CmdWrite
;;;4458   	LCD_DataWrite(temp);
0024d6  4610              MOV      r0,r2
0024d8  f85deb04          POP      {lr}
0024dc  f7ffbffe          B.W      LCD_DataWrite
;;;4459   }
;;;4460   //[E8h]=========================================================================
                          ENDP

                  LT768_I2CM_Receiver_Data PROC
;;;4461   unsigned char LT768_I2CM_Receiver_Data(void)
0024e0  b500              PUSH     {lr}
;;;4462   {
;;;4463   /*
;;;4464   I2C Master Receiver [7:0]
;;;4465   */  
;;;4466   	unsigned char temp;
;;;4467       LCD_CmdWrite(0xE8);
0024e2  20e8              MOVS     r0,#0xe8
0024e4  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_CmdWrite
;;;4468   	temp=LCD_DataRead();
0024e8  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_DataRead
0024ec  b2c0              UXTB     r0,r0
;;;4469   	return temp;
;;;4470   }
0024ee  bd00              POP      {pc}
;;;4471   //[E9h]=========================================================================
                          ENDP

                  LT768_I2CM_Stop PROC
;;;4498    
;;;4499   void LT768_I2CM_Stop(void)
0024f0  b500              PUSH     {lr}
;;;4500   {
;;;4501   	LCD_CmdWrite(0xE9);
0024f2  20e9              MOVS     r0,#0xe9
0024f4  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_CmdWrite
;;;4502   	#ifdef Disable_I2CM_Noise_Filter 
;;;4503   	LCD_DataWrite(0x40);

0024fa  f85deb04          POP      {lr}
0024fe  f7ffbffe          B.W      LCD_DataWrite
;;;4504   	#endif
;;;4505    
;;;4506   	#ifdef Enable_I2CM_Noise_Filter 
;;;4507   	LCD_DataWrite(0x41);
;;;4508   	#endif
;;;4509   }
;;;4510   void LT768_I2CM_Read_With_Ack(void)
                          ENDP

;;;4516   	#endif
;;;4517   	
;;;4518   	#ifdef Enable_I2CM_Noise_Filter 
;;;4519    LCD_DataWrite(0x21);
;;;4520   	#endif
;;;4521   }

                  LT768_I2CM_Check_Slave_ACK PROC
;;;4566   */
;;;4567   unsigned char LT768_I2CM_Check_Slave_ACK(void)
00254a  b500              PUSH     {lr}
;;;4568   { 
;;;4569   	unsigned char temp;
;;;4570   /*[bit7]
;;;4571   Received acknowledge from slave
;;;4572   0 : Acknowledge received.
;;;4573   1 : No Acknowledge received. 
;;;4574   */ 
;;;4575   	LCD_CmdWrite(0xEA);
00254c  20ea              MOVS     r0,#0xea
00254e  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_CmdWrite
;;;4576   	temp=LCD_DataRead();
002552  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_DataRead
;;;4577   	if((temp&0x80)==0x80)
002556  0600              LSLS     r0,r0,#24
002558  d501              BPL      |L1.9566|
;;;4578   	return 1;
00255a  2001              MOVS     r0,#1
;;;4579   	else
;;;4580   	return 0; 
;;;4581   }
00255c  bd00              POP      {pc}
                  |L1.9566|
00255e  2000              MOVS     r0,#0                 ;4580
002560  bd00              POP      {pc}
;;;4582    
                          ENDP

                  LT768_I2CM_Bus_Busy PROC
;;;4587   */
;;;4588   unsigned char LT768_I2CM_Bus_Busy(void)
002562  b500              PUSH     {lr}
;;;4589   {
;;;4590   	unsigned char temp; 
;;;4591    
;;;4592   /*[bit6]
;;;4593   I2C Bus is Busy
;;;4594   0 : Idle.
;;;4595   1 : Busy.  
;;;4596   */ 
;;;4597   	LCD_CmdWrite(0xEA);
002564  20ea              MOVS     r0,#0xea
002566  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_CmdWrite
;;;4598   	temp=LCD_DataRead();
00256a  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_DataRead
;;;4599   	if((temp&0x40)==0x40)
00256e  0640              LSLS     r0,r0,#25
002570  d501              BPL      |L1.9590|
;;;4600   	return 1;
002572  2001              MOVS     r0,#1
;;;4601   	else
;;;4602   	return 0;    
;;;4603   }
002574  bd00              POP      {pc}
                  |L1.9590|
002576  2000              MOVS     r0,#0                 ;4602
002578  bd00              POP      {pc}
;;;4604    
                          ENDP

                  LT768_I2CM_transmit_Progress PROC
;;;4608   */
;;;4609   unsigned char LT768_I2CM_transmit_Progress(void)
00257a  b500              PUSH     {lr}
;;;4610   {
;;;4611   	unsigned char temp; 
;;;4612   /*[bit6]
;;;4613    0=Complete
;;;4614    1=Transferring
;;;4615   */ 
;;;4616   	LCD_CmdWrite(0xEA);
00257c  20ea              MOVS     r0,#0xea
00257e  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_CmdWrite
;;;4617   	temp=LCD_DataRead();
002582  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_DataRead
;;;4618   	if((temp&0x02)==0x02)
002586  0780              LSLS     r0,r0,#30
002588  d501              BPL      |L1.9614|
;;;4619   	return 1;
00258a  2001              MOVS     r0,#1
;;;4620   	else
;;;4621   	return 0;
;;;4622   }
00258c  bd00              POP      {pc}
                  |L1.9614|
00258e  2000              MOVS     r0,#0                 ;4621
002590  bd00              POP      {pc}
;;;4623    
                          ENDP

                  LT768_I2CM_Arbitration PROC
;;;4627   */
;;;4628   unsigned char LT768_I2CM_Arbitration(void)
002592  b500              PUSH     {lr}
;;;4629   {
;;;4630   	unsigned char temp; 
;;;4631   /*[bit6]
;;;4632   I2C Bus is Busy
;;;4633   0 : Idle.
;;;4634   1 : Busy.  
;;;4635   */ 
;;;4636   	LCD_CmdWrite(0xEA);
002594  20ea              MOVS     r0,#0xea
002596  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_CmdWrite
;;;4637   	temp=LCD_DataRead();
00259a  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_DataRead
;;;4638   	temp&=0x01;
00259e  f0000001          AND      r0,r0,#1
;;;4639   	return temp;
;;;4640   }
0025a2  bd00              POP      {pc}
;;;4641   
                          ENDP

                  Set_GPIO_A_In_Out PROC
;;;4643   //[F0h]=========================================================================
;;;4644   void Set_GPIO_A_In_Out(unsigned char temp)
0025a4  b500              PUSH     {lr}
;;;4645   {
0025a6  4602              MOV      r2,r0
;;;4646   /*
;;;4647   GPO-A_dir[7:0] : General Purpose I/O direction control.
;;;4648   0: Output
;;;4649   1: Input
;;;4650   */
;;;4651   	LCD_CmdWrite(0xF0);
0025a8  20f0              MOVS     r0,#0xf0
0025aa  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_CmdWrite
;;;4652   	LCD_DataWrite(temp);
0025ae  4610              MOV      r0,r2
0025b0  f85deb04          POP      {lr}
0025b4  f7ffbffe          B.W      LCD_DataWrite
;;;4653   }
;;;4654   //[F1h]=========================================================================
                          ENDP

                  Write_GPIO_A_7_0 PROC

                  Long_Key_enable PROC
;;;4826   
;;;4827   void Long_Key_enable(void)
0026e0  b500              PUSH     {lr}
;;;4828   {
;;;4829    /*
;;;4830   Key-Scan Control Register 1
;;;4831   [bit6]		LongKey Enable Bit
;;;4832   1 : Enable. Long key period is set by KSCR2 bit4-2.
;;;4833   0 : Disable.
;;;4834   */
;;;4835   	unsigned char temp;
;;;4836   	LCD_CmdWrite(0xFB);
0026e2  20fb              MOVS     r0,#0xfb
0026e4  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_CmdWrite
;;;4837   	temp=LCD_DataRead();
0026e8  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_DataRead
0026ec  b2c0              UXTB     r0,r0
;;;4838   	temp |= cSetb6;
0026ee  f0400040          ORR      r0,r0,#0x40
;;;4839   	LCD_DataWrite(temp);
0026f2  f85deb04          POP      {lr}
0026f6  f7ffbffe          B.W      LCD_DataWrite
;;;4840   }
;;;4841   
                          ENDP

                  Key_Scan_Freg PROC
;;;4842   
;;;4843   void Key_Scan_Freg(unsigned char setx)
0026fa  b500              PUSH     {lr}
;;;4844   {
0026fc  4602              MOV      r2,r0
;;;4845   /*KF2-0: Key-Scan Frequency */ 
;;;4846     unsigned char temp;
;;;4847     LCD_CmdWrite(0xFB);
0026fe  20fb              MOVS     r0,#0xfb
002700  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_CmdWrite
;;;4848     temp = LCD_DataRead();
002704  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_DataRead
;;;4849     temp &= 0xf0;
002708  f00001f0          AND      r1,r0,#0xf0
;;;4850     temp|= (setx&0x07);
00270c  f0020007          AND      r0,r2,#7
002710  4308              ORRS     r0,r0,r1
;;;4851     LCD_DataWrite(temp);  
002712  f85deb04          POP      {lr}
002716  f7ffbffe          B.W      LCD_DataWrite
;;;4852   }
;;;4853   
                          ENDP

                  Key_Scan_Wakeup_Function_Enable PROC
;;;4856   
;;;4857   void Key_Scan_Wakeup_Function_Enable(void)
00271a  b500              PUSH     {lr}
;;;4858   {
;;;4859   /*
;;;4860   Key-Scan Controller Register 2
;;;4861   [bit7]	
;;;4862   Key-Scan Wakeup Function Enable Bit
;;;4863   0: Key-Scan Wakeup function is disabled.
;;;4864   1: Key-Scan Wakeup function is enabled.
;;;4865   */
;;;4866   	unsigned char temp;
;;;4867   	LCD_CmdWrite(0xFC);
00271c  20fc              MOVS     r0,#0xfc
00271e  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_CmdWrite
;;;4868   	temp=LCD_DataRead();
002722  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_DataRead
002726  b2c0              UXTB     r0,r0
;;;4869   	temp |= cSetb7;
002728  f0400080          ORR      r0,r0,#0x80
;;;4870   	LCD_DataWrite(temp);
00272c  f85deb04          POP      {lr}
002730  f7ffbffe          B.W      LCD_DataWrite
;;;4871   }
;;;4872   
                          ENDP

                  Long_Key_Timing_Adjustment PROC
;;;4873   
;;;4874   void Long_Key_Timing_Adjustment(unsigned char setx)
002734  b500              PUSH     {lr}
;;;4875   {
;;;4876    /*Long Key Timing Adjustment*/ 
;;;4877   	unsigned char temp,temp1;
;;;4878   	temp = setx & 0x1c;
002736  f000021c          AND      r2,r0,#0x1c
;;;4879   	LCD_CmdWrite(0xFC);
00273a  20fc              MOVS     r0,#0xfc
00273c  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_CmdWrite
;;;4880   	temp1 = LCD_DataRead();
002740  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_DataRead
002744  b2c0              UXTB     r0,r0
;;;4881   	temp1|=temp;
002746  4310              ORRS     r0,r0,r2
;;;4882   	LCD_DataWrite(temp1);   
002748  f85deb04          POP      {lr}
00274c  f7ffbffe          B.W      LCD_DataWrite
;;;4883    
;;;4884   }
;;;4885   
                          ENDP

                  Numbers_of_Key_Hit PROC
;;;4886   unsigned char Numbers_of_Key_Hit(void)
002750  b500              PUSH     {lr}
;;;4887   {  
;;;4888      unsigned char temp;
;;;4889      LCD_CmdWrite(0xFC);
002752  20fc              MOVS     r0,#0xfc
002754  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_CmdWrite
;;;4890      temp = LCD_DataRead();   //read key touch number
002758  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_DataRead
;;;4891      temp = temp & 0x03;	 //¤U
00275c  f0000003          AND      r0,r0,#3
;;;4892      return temp;
;;;4893   }
002760  bd00              POP      {pc}
;;;4894   
                          ENDP

                  Read_Key_Strobe_Data_0 PROC

                  Show_String PROC
;;;4931   
;;;4932   void Show_String(char *str)
002792  b500              PUSH     {lr}
;;;4933   {   
002794  4602              MOV      r2,r0
;;;4934     	Text_Mode();	   //ÎÄ±ľÄŁĘ˝
002796  f7fffffe          BL       Text_Mode
;;;4935     	LCD_CmdWrite(0x04);
00279a  2004              MOVS     r0,#4
00279c  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_CmdWrite
;;;4936     	while(*str != '\0')
0027a0  e004              B        |L1.10156|
                  |L1.10146|
;;;4937     	{
;;;4938      		LCD_DataWrite(*str);
0027a2  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_DataWrite
;;;4939      		Check_Mem_WR_FIFO_not_Full();
0027a6  f7fffffe          BL       Check_Mem_WR_FIFO_not_Full
;;;4940     		++str;   
0027aa  1c52              ADDS     r2,r2,#1
                  |L1.10156|
0027ac  7810              LDRB     r0,[r2,#0]            ;4936
0027ae  2800              CMP      r0,#0                 ;4936
0027b0  d1f7              BNE      |L1.10146|
;;;4941     	}
;;;4942      	Check_2D_Busy();
0027b2  f7fffffe          BL       Check_2D_Busy
;;;4943   
;;;4944      	Graphic_Mode(); //back to graphic mode;ÍĽĐÎÄŁĘ˝
0027b6  f85deb04          POP      {lr}
0027ba  f7ffbffe          B.W      Graphic_Mode
;;;4945   }
;;;4946   
                          ENDP

                  Show_picture PROC
;;;4947   
;;;4948   void Show_picture(unsigned long numbers,const unsigned short *datap)
0027be  b510              PUSH     {r4,lr}
;;;4949   {   
0027c0  4604              MOV      r4,r0
0027c2  460b              MOV      r3,r1
;;;4950   	unsigned long i;
;;;4951   
;;;4952   	LCD_CmdWrite(0x04);  
0027c4  2004              MOVS     r0,#4
0027c6  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_CmdWrite
;;;4953   	for(i=0;i<numbers;i++)
0027ca  2200              MOVS     r2,#0
0027cc  e006              B        |L1.10204|
                  |L1.10190|
;;;4954   	{
;;;4955   		LCD_DataWrite(datap[i]);
0027ce  f8130012          LDRB     r0,[r3,r2,LSL #1]
0027d2  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_DataWrite
;;;4956   		Check_Mem_WR_FIFO_not_Full();
0027d6  f7fffffe          BL       Check_Mem_WR_FIFO_not_Full
0027da  1c52              ADDS     r2,r2,#1              ;4953
                  |L1.10204|
0027dc  42a2              CMP      r2,r4                 ;4953
0027de  d3f6              BCC      |L1.10190|
;;;4957   	}
;;;4958   
;;;4959   }
0027e0  bd10              POP      {r4,pc}
;;;4960   
                          ENDP

                  LT768_DrawLine PROC
;;;4961   //------------------------------------- Ďß¶Î -----------------------------------------
;;;4962   void LT768_DrawLine
0027e2  b5f0              PUSH     {r4-r7,lr}
;;;4963   (
;;;4964    unsigned short X1        // X1×ř±ę
;;;4965   ,unsigned short Y1        // Y1×ř±ę
;;;4966   ,unsigned short X2        // X2×ř±ę
;;;4967   ,unsigned short Y2        // Y2×ř±ę
;;;4968   ,unsigned long  LineColor // Ďß¶ÎŃŐÉ«
;;;4969   )
;;;4970   {
0027e4  4606              MOV      r6,r0
0027e6  9805              LDR      r0,[sp,#0x14]
0027e8  460f              MOV      r7,r1
0027ea  4614              MOV      r4,r2
0027ec  461d              MOV      r5,r3
;;;4971   	Foreground_color_65k(LineColor);
0027ee  b280              UXTH     r0,r0
0027f0  f7fffffe          BL       Foreground_color_65k
;;;4972   	Line_Start_XY(X1,Y1);
0027f4  4639              MOV      r1,r7
0027f6  4630              MOV      r0,r6
0027f8  f7fffffe          BL       Line_Start_XY
;;;4973   	Line_End_XY(X2,Y2);
0027fc  4629              MOV      r1,r5
0027fe  4620              MOV      r0,r4
002800  f7fffffe          BL       Line_End_XY
;;;4974   	Start_Line();
002804  f7fffffe          BL       Start_Line
;;;4975   	Check_2D_Busy();
002808  e8bd40f0          POP      {r4-r7,lr}
00280c  f7ffbffe          B.W      Check_2D_Busy
;;;4976   }
;;;4977   
                          ENDP

                  LT768_DrawLine_Width PROC
;;;4979   
;;;4980   void LT768_DrawLine_Width
002810  e92d47f8          PUSH     {r3-r10,lr}
;;;4981   (
;;;4982    unsigned short X1        // X1×ř±ę
;;;4983   ,unsigned short Y1        // Y1×ř±ę
;;;4984   ,unsigned short X2        // X2×ř±ę
;;;4985   ,unsigned short Y2        // Y2×ř±ę
;;;4986   ,unsigned long  LineColor // Ďß¶ÎŃŐÉ«
;;;4987   ,unsigned short Width     // Ďß¶Îżí¶Č
;;;4988   )
;;;4989   {
002814  4681              MOV      r9,r0
002816  e9dd8509          LDRD     r8,r5,[sp,#0x24]
00281a  460e              MOV      r6,r1
00281c  4692              MOV      r10,r2
00281e  461f              MOV      r7,r3
;;;4990   	unsigned short  i = 0;
002820  2400              MOVS     r4,#0
002822  e00b              B        |L1.10300|
                  |L1.10276|
;;;4991   	while(Width--)
;;;4992   	{
;;;4993   		LT768_DrawLine(X1,Y1+i,X2,Y2+i,LineColor);
002824  1938              ADDS     r0,r7,r4
002826  b283              UXTH     r3,r0
002828  1930              ADDS     r0,r6,r4
00282a  b281              UXTH     r1,r0
00282c  4652              MOV      r2,r10
00282e  4648              MOV      r0,r9
002830  f8cd8000          STR      r8,[sp,#0]
002834  f7fffffe          BL       LT768_DrawLine
;;;4994   		i++;
002838  1c64              ADDS     r4,r4,#1
00283a  b2a4              UXTH     r4,r4
                  |L1.10300|
00283c  1e6d              SUBS     r5,r5,#1              ;4991
00283e  b2ad              UXTH     r5,r5                 ;4991
002840  d2f0              BCS      |L1.10276|
;;;4995   	}
;;;4996   }
002842  e8bd87f8          POP      {r3-r10,pc}
;;;4997   
                          ENDP

                  LT768_DrawCircle PROC
;;;4999   //------------------------------------- Ô˛ -----------------------------------------
;;;5000   void LT768_DrawCircle
002846  b570              PUSH     {r4-r6,lr}
;;;5001   (
;;;5002    unsigned short XCenter           // Ô˛ĐÄXÎ»ÖĂ
;;;5003   ,unsigned short YCenter           // Ô˛ĐÄYÎ»ÖĂ
;;;5004   ,unsigned short R                 // °ëľ¶
;;;5005   ,unsigned long CircleColor        // »­ĎßŃŐÉ«
;;;5006   )
;;;5007   {
002848  4605              MOV      r5,r0
00284a  460e              MOV      r6,r1
00284c  4614              MOV      r4,r2
;;;5008   	Foreground_color_65k(CircleColor);
00284e  b298              UXTH     r0,r3
002850  f7fffffe          BL       Foreground_color_65k
;;;5009   	Circle_Center_XY(XCenter,YCenter);
002854  4631              MOV      r1,r6
002856  4628              MOV      r0,r5
002858  f7fffffe          BL       Circle_Center_XY
;;;5010     Circle_Radius_R(R);
00285c  4620              MOV      r0,r4
00285e  f7fffffe          BL       Circle_Radius_R
;;;5011     Start_Circle_or_Ellipse();
002862  f7fffffe          BL       Start_Circle_or_Ellipse
;;;5012     Check_2D_Busy(); 
002866  e8bd4070          POP      {r4-r6,lr}
00286a  f7ffbffe          B.W      Check_2D_Busy
;;;5013   }
;;;5014   
                          ENDP

                  LT768_DrawCircle_Fill PROC
;;;5016   
;;;5017   void LT768_DrawCircle_Fill
00286e  b570              PUSH     {r4-r6,lr}
;;;5018   (
;;;5019    unsigned short XCenter           // Ô˛ĐÄXÎ»ÖĂ
;;;5020   ,unsigned short YCenter           // Ô˛ĐÄYÎ»ÖĂ
;;;5021   ,unsigned short R                 // °ëľ¶
;;;5022   ,unsigned long ForegroundColor    // ±łľ°ŃŐÉ«
;;;5023   )

00287e  4628              MOV      r0,r5
002880  f7fffffe          BL       Circle_Center_XY
;;;5027     Circle_Radius_R(R);

002886  f7fffffe          BL       Circle_Radius_R
;;;5028     Start_Circle_or_Ellipse_Fill();

;;;5029     Check_2D_Busy();

002892  f7ffbffe          B.W      Check_2D_Busy
;;;5030   }
;;;5031   
                          ENDP

                  LT768_DrawCircle_Width PROC
;;;5033   
;;;5034   void LT768_DrawCircle_Width
002896  b5f0              PUSH     {r4-r7,lr}
;;;5035   (
;;;5036    unsigned short XCenter          // Ô˛ĐÄXÎ»ÖĂ
;;;5037   ,unsigned short YCenter          // Ô˛ĐÄYÎ»ÖĂ
;;;5038   ,unsigned short R                // °ëľ¶
;;;5039   ,unsigned long CircleColor       // »­ĎßŃŐÉ«
;;;5040   ,unsigned long ForegroundColor   // ±łľ°ŃŐÉ«
;;;5041   ,unsigned short Width            // Ďßżí
;;;5042   )
;;;5043   {
002898  4614              MOV      r4,r2
00289a  e9dd7205          LDRD     r7,r2,[sp,#0x14]
00289e  4605              MOV      r5,r0
0028a0  460e              MOV      r6,r1
;;;5044   	LT768_DrawCircle_Fill(XCenter,YCenter,R+Width,CircleColor);
0028a2  18a0              ADDS     r0,r4,r2
0028a4  b282              UXTH     r2,r0
0028a6  4631              MOV      r1,r6
0028a8  4628              MOV      r0,r5
0028aa  f7fffffe          BL       LT768_DrawCircle_Fill
;;;5045   	LT768_DrawCircle_Fill(XCenter,YCenter,R,ForegroundColor);
0028ae  463b              MOV      r3,r7
0028b0  4622              MOV      r2,r4
0028b2  4631              MOV      r1,r6
0028b4  4628              MOV      r0,r5
0028b6  e8bd40f0          POP      {r4-r7,lr}
0028ba  e7fe              B        LT768_DrawCircle_Fill
;;;5046   }
;;;5047   
                          ENDP

                  LT768_DrawEllipse PROC
;;;5049   //------------------------------------- ÍÖÔ˛ -----------------------------------------
;;;5050   void LT768_DrawEllipse
0028bc  b5f0              PUSH     {r4-r7,lr}
;;;5051   (
;;;5052    unsigned short XCenter          // ÍÖÔ˛ĐÄXÎ»ÖĂ
;;;5053   ,unsigned short YCenter          // ÍÖÔ˛ĐÄYÎ»ÖĂ
;;;5054   ,unsigned short X_R              // żí°ëľ¶
;;;5055   ,unsigned short Y_R              // ł¤°ëľ¶
;;;5056   ,unsigned long EllipseColor      // »­ĎßŃŐÉ«
;;;5057   )
;;;5058   {
0028be  4606              MOV      r6,r0
0028c0  9805              LDR      r0,[sp,#0x14]
0028c2  460f              MOV      r7,r1
0028c4  4614              MOV      r4,r2
0028c6  461d              MOV      r5,r3
;;;5059   	Foreground_color_65k(EllipseColor);
0028c8  b280              UXTH     r0,r0
0028ca  f7fffffe          BL       Foreground_color_65k
;;;5060   	Ellipse_Center_XY(XCenter,YCenter);
0028ce  4639              MOV      r1,r7
0028d0  4630              MOV      r0,r6
0028d2  f7fffffe          BL       Ellipse_Center_XY
;;;5061     Ellipse_Radius_RxRy(X_R,Y_R);
0028d6  4629              MOV      r1,r5
0028d8  4620              MOV      r0,r4
0028da  f7fffffe          BL       Ellipse_Radius_RxRy
;;;5062     Start_Circle_or_Ellipse();
0028de  f7fffffe          BL       Start_Circle_or_Ellipse
;;;5063     Check_2D_Busy(); 
0028e2  e8bd40f0          POP      {r4-r7,lr}
0028e6  f7ffbffe          B.W      Check_2D_Busy
;;;5064   }
;;;5065   
                          ENDP

                  LT768_DrawEllipse_Fill PROC
;;;5066   void LT768_DrawEllipse_Fill
0028ea  b5f0              PUSH     {r4-r7,lr}

;;;5069   ,unsigned short YCenter           // ÍÖÔ˛ĐÄYÎ»ÖĂ

                  LT768_DrawEllipse_Width PROC
;;;5082   
;;;5083   void LT768_DrawEllipse_Width
002918  e92d41f8          PUSH     {r3-r8,lr}
;;;5084   (
;;;5085    unsigned short XCenter           // ÍÖÔ˛ĐÄXÎ»ÖĂ
;;;5086   ,unsigned short YCenter           // ÍÖÔ˛ĐÄYÎ»ÖĂ
;;;5087   ,unsigned short X_R               // żí°ëľ¶
;;;5088   ,unsigned short Y_R               // ł¤°ëľ¶
;;;5089   ,unsigned long EllipseColor       // »­ĎßŃŐÉ«
;;;5090   ,unsigned long ForegroundColor    // ±łľ°ŃŐÉ«
;;;5091   ,unsigned short Width             // Ďßżí
;;;5092   )
;;;5093   {
00291c  4614              MOV      r4,r2
00291e  4606              MOV      r6,r0
002920  e9dd8208          LDRD     r8,r2,[sp,#0x20]
002924  9807              LDR      r0,[sp,#0x1c]
002926  460f              MOV      r7,r1
002928  461d              MOV      r5,r3
;;;5094   	LT768_DrawEllipse_Fill(XCenter,YCenter,X_R+Width,Y_R+Width,EllipseColor);
00292a  9000              STR      r0,[sp,#0]
00292c  18a8              ADDS     r0,r5,r2
00292e  b283              UXTH     r3,r0
002930  18a0              ADDS     r0,r4,r2
002932  b282              UXTH     r2,r0
002934  4639              MOV      r1,r7
002936  4630              MOV      r0,r6
002938  f7fffffe          BL       LT768_DrawEllipse_Fill
;;;5095   	LT768_DrawEllipse_Fill(XCenter,YCenter,X_R,Y_R,ForegroundColor);
00293c  462b              MOV      r3,r5
00293e  4622              MOV      r2,r4
002940  4639              MOV      r1,r7
002942  4630              MOV      r0,r6
002944  f8cd8000          STR      r8,[sp,#0]
002948  f7fffffe          BL       LT768_DrawEllipse_Fill
;;;5096   }
00294c  e8bd81f8          POP      {r3-r8,pc}
;;;5097   
                          ENDP

                  LT768_DrawSquare PROC
;;;5100   //------------------------------------- ľŘĐÎ -----------------------------------------
;;;5101   void LT768_DrawSquare
002950  b5f0              PUSH     {r4-r7,lr}
;;;5102   (
;;;5103    unsigned short X1                // X1Î»ÖĂ
;;;5104   ,unsigned short Y1                // Y1Î»ÖĂ
;;;5105   ,unsigned short X2                // X2Î»ÖĂ
;;;5106   ,unsigned short Y2                // Y2Î»ÖĂ
;;;5107   ,unsigned long SquareColor        // »­ĎßŃŐÉ«
;;;5108   )
;;;5109   {
002952  4606              MOV      r6,r0
002954  9805              LDR      r0,[sp,#0x14]
002956  460f              MOV      r7,r1
002958  4614              MOV      r4,r2
00295a  461d              MOV      r5,r3
;;;5110   	Foreground_color_65k(SquareColor);
00295c  b280              UXTH     r0,r0
00295e  f7fffffe          BL       Foreground_color_65k
;;;5111   	Square_Start_XY(X1,Y1);
002962  4639              MOV      r1,r7
002964  4630              MOV      r0,r6
002966  f7fffffe          BL       Square_Start_XY
;;;5112     Square_End_XY(X2,Y2);
00296a  4629              MOV      r1,r5
00296c  4620              MOV      r0,r4
00296e  f7fffffe          BL       Square_End_XY
;;;5113     Start_Square();
002972  f7fffffe          BL       Start_Square
;;;5114     Check_2D_Busy(); 
002976  e8bd40f0          POP      {r4-r7,lr}
00297a  f7ffbffe          B.W      Check_2D_Busy
;;;5115   }
;;;5116   
                          ENDP

                  LT768_DrawSquare_Fill PROC
;;;5117

;;;5119   (

;;;5121   ,unsigned short Y1                // Y1Î»ÖĂ
;;;5122   ,unsigned short X2                // X2Î»ÖĂ
;;;5123   ,unsigned short Y2                // Y2Î»ÖĂ

;;;5127   	Foreground_color_65k(ForegroundColor);

                  LT768_DrawSquare_Width PROC
;;;5134   
;;;5135   void LT768_DrawSquare_Width
0029ac  e92d43f8          PUSH     {r3-r9,lr}
;;;5136   (
;;;5137    unsigned short X1                // X1Î»ÖĂ
;;;5138   ,unsigned short Y1                // Y1Î»ÖĂ
;;;5139   ,unsigned short X2                // X2Î»ÖĂ
;;;5140   ,unsigned short Y2                // Y2Î»ÖĂ
;;;5141   ,unsigned long SquareColor        // »­ĎßŃŐÉ«
;;;5142   ,unsigned long ForegroundColor    // ±łľ°ŃŐÉ«
;;;5143   ,unsigned short Width             // Ďßżí
;;;5144   )
;;;5145   {
0029b0  4605              MOV      r5,r0
0029b2  e9dd9409          LDRD     r9,r4,[sp,#0x24]
0029b6  9808              LDR      r0,[sp,#0x20]
0029b8  460e              MOV      r6,r1
0029ba  4617              MOV      r7,r2
0029bc  4698              MOV      r8,r3
;;;5146   	LT768_DrawSquare_Fill(X1-Width,Y1-Width,X2+Width,Y2+Width,SquareColor);
0029be  9000              STR      r0,[sp,#0]
0029c0  eb080004          ADD      r0,r8,r4
0029c4  b283              UXTH     r3,r0
0029c6  1938              ADDS     r0,r7,r4
0029c8  b282              UXTH     r2,r0
0029ca  1b30              SUBS     r0,r6,r4
0029cc  b281              UXTH     r1,r0
0029ce  1b28              SUBS     r0,r5,r4
0029d0  b280              UXTH     r0,r0
0029d2  f7fffffe          BL       LT768_DrawSquare_Fill
;;;5147   	LT768_DrawSquare_Fill(X1,Y1,X2,Y2,ForegroundColor);
0029d6  4643              MOV      r3,r8
0029d8  463a              MOV      r2,r7
0029da  4631              MOV      r1,r6
0029dc  4628              MOV      r0,r5
0029de  f8cd9000          STR      r9,[sp,#0]
0029e2  f7fffffe          BL       LT768_DrawSquare_Fill
;;;5148   }
0029e6  e8bd83f8          POP      {r3-r9,pc}
;;;5149   
                          ENDP

                  LT768_DrawCircleSquare PROC
;;;5151   //------------------------------------- Ô˛˝ÇľŘĐÎ -----------------------------------------
;;;5152   void LT768_DrawCircleSquare
0029ea  e92d43f0          PUSH     {r4-r9,lr}
;;;5153   (
;;;5154    unsigned short X1                // X1Î»ÖĂ
;;;5155   ,unsigned short Y1                // Y1Î»ÖĂ
;;;5156   ,unsigned short X2                // X2Î»ÖĂ
;;;5157   ,unsigned short Y2                // Y2Î»ÖĂ
;;;5158   ,unsigned short X_R               // żí°ëľ¶
;;;5159   ,unsigned short Y_R               // ł¤°ëľ¶
;;;5160   ,unsigned long CircleSquareColor  // »­ĎßŃŐÉ«
;;;5161   )
;;;5162   {
0029ee  4606              MOV      r6,r0
0029f0  e9dd8907          LDRD     r8,r9,[sp,#0x1c]
0029f4  9809              LDR      r0,[sp,#0x24]
0029f6  460f              MOV      r7,r1
0029f8  4614              MOV      r4,r2
0029fa  461d              MOV      r5,r3
;;;5163   	Foreground_color_65k(CircleSquareColor);
0029fc  b280              UXTH     r0,r0
0029fe  f7fffffe          BL       Foreground_color_65k
;;;5164     Square_Start_XY(X1,Y1);
002a02  4639              MOV      r1,r7
002a04  4630              MOV      r0,r6
002a06  f7fffffe          BL       Square_Start_XY
;;;5165     Square_End_XY(X2,Y2); 
002a0a  4629              MOV      r1,r5
002a0c  4620              MOV      r0,r4
002a0e  f7fffffe          BL       Square_End_XY
;;;5166     Circle_Square_Radius_RxRy(X_R,Y_R);
002a12  4649              MOV      r1,r9
002a14  4640              MOV      r0,r8
002a16  f7fffffe          BL       Circle_Square_Radius_RxRy
;;;5167     Start_Circle_Square();
002a1a  f7fffffe          BL       Start_Circle_Square
;;;5168     Check_2D_Busy();
002a1e  e8bd43f0          POP      {r4-r9,lr}
002a22  f7ffbffe          B.W      Check_2D_Busy
;;;5169   }
;;;5170   
                          ENDP

                  LT768_DrawCircleSquare_Fill PROC
;;;5172   
;;;5173   void LT768_DrawCircleSquare_Fill
002a26  e92d43f0          PUSH     {r4-r9,lr}
;;;5174   (
;;;5175    unsigned short X1                // X1Î»ÖĂ
;;;5176   ,unsigned short Y1                // Y1Î»ÖĂ
;;;5177   ,unsigned short X2                // X2Î»ÖĂ
;;;5178   ,unsigned short Y2                // Y2Î»ÖĂ
;;;5179   ,unsigned short X_R               // żí°ëľ¶
;;;5180   ,unsigned short Y_R               // ł¤°ëľ¶
;;;5181   ,unsigned long ForegroundColor  // »­ĎßŃŐÉ«
;;;5182   )
;;;5183   {
002a2a  4606              MOV      r6,r0
002a2c  e9dd8907          LDRD     r8,r9,[sp,#0x1c]
002a30  9809              LDR      r0,[sp,#0x24]
002a32  460f              MOV      r7,r1
002a34  4614              MOV      r4,r2
002a36  461d              MOV      r5,r3
;;;5184   	Foreground_color_65k(ForegroundColor);
002a38  b280              UXTH     r0,r0
002a3a  f7fffffe          BL       Foreground_color_65k
;;;5185     Square_Start_XY(X1,Y1);
002a3e  4639              MOV      r1,r7
002a40  4630              MOV      r0,r6
002a42  f7fffffe          BL       Square_Start_XY
;;;5186     Square_End_XY(X2,Y2); 
002a46  4629              MOV      r1,r5
002a48  4620              MOV      r0,r4
002a4a  f7fffffe          BL       Square_End_XY
;;;5187     Circle_Square_Radius_RxRy(X_R,Y_R);
002a4e  4649              MOV      r1,r9
002a50  4640              MOV      r0,r8
002a52  f7fffffe          BL       Circle_Square_Radius_RxRy
;;;5188     Start_Circle_Square_Fill();
002a56  f7fffffe          BL       Start_Circle_Square_Fill
;;;5189     Check_2D_Busy(); 
002a5a  e8bd43f0          POP      {r4-r9,lr}
002a5e  f7ffbffe          B.W      Check_2D_Busy
;;;5190   }
;;;5191   
                          ENDP

                  LT768_DrawCircleSquare_Width PROC
;;;5193   
;;;5194   void LT768_DrawCircleSquare_Width
002a62  e92d4ffe          PUSH     {r1-r11,lr}
;;;5195   (
;;;5196    unsigned short X1                // X1Î»ÖĂ
;;;5197   ,unsigned short Y1                // Y1Î»ÖĂ
;;;5198   ,unsigned short X2                // X2Î»ÖĂ
;;;5199   ,unsigned short Y2                // Y2Î»ÖĂ
;;;5200   ,unsigned short X_R               // żí°ëľ¶
;;;5201   ,unsigned short Y_R               // ł¤°ëľ¶
;;;5202   ,unsigned long CircleSquareColor  // »­ĎßŃŐÉ«
;;;5203   ,unsigned long ForegroundColor    // »­ĎßŃŐÉ«
;;;5204   ,unsigned short Width             // żí¶Č
;;;5205   )
;;;5206   {
002a66  4605              MOV      r5,r0
002a68  e9ddb40f          LDRD     r11,r4,[sp,#0x3c]
002a6c  e9dd9a0c          LDRD     r9,r10,[sp,#0x30]
002a70  980e              LDR      r0,[sp,#0x38]
002a72  460e              MOV      r6,r1
002a74  4617              MOV      r7,r2
002a76  4698              MOV      r8,r3
;;;5207   	LT768_DrawCircleSquare_Fill(X1-Width,Y1-Width,X2+Width,Y2+Width,X_R,Y_R,CircleSquareColor);
002a78  9002              STR      r0,[sp,#8]
002a7a  eb080004          ADD      r0,r8,r4
002a7e  b283              UXTH     r3,r0
002a80  1938              ADDS     r0,r7,r4
002a82  b282              UXTH     r2,r0
002a84  1b30              SUBS     r0,r6,r4
002a86  e9cd9a00          STRD     r9,r10,[sp,#0]
002a8a  b281              UXTH     r1,r0
002a8c  1b28              SUBS     r0,r5,r4
002a8e  b280              UXTH     r0,r0
002a90  f7fffffe          BL       LT768_DrawCircleSquare_Fill
;;;5208   	LT768_DrawCircleSquare_Fill(X1,Y1,X2,Y2,X_R,Y_R,ForegroundColor);
002a94  e88d0e00          STM      sp,{r9-r11}
002a98  4643              MOV      r3,r8
002a9a  463a              MOV      r2,r7
002a9c  4631              MOV      r1,r6
002a9e  4628              MOV      r0,r5
002aa0  f7fffffe          BL       LT768_DrawCircleSquare_Fill
;;;5209   }
002aa4  e8bd8ffe          POP      {r1-r11,pc}
;;;5210   
                          ENDP

                  LT768_DrawTriangle PROC
;;;5212   //------------------------------------- Čý˝ÇĐÎ -----------------------------------------
;;;5213   void LT768_DrawTriangle
002aa8  e92d43f0          PUSH     {r4-r9,lr}
;;;5214   (
;;;5215    unsigned short X1              // X1Î»ÖĂ
;;;5216   ,unsigned short Y1              // Y1Î»ÖĂ
;;;5217   ,unsigned short X2              // X2Î»ÖĂ
;;;5218   ,unsigned short Y2              // Y2Î»ÖĂ
;;;5219   ,unsigned short X3              // X3Î»ÖĂ
;;;5220   ,unsigned short Y3              // Y3Î»ÖĂ
;;;5221   ,unsigned long TriangleColor    // »­ĎßŃŐÉ«
;;;5222   )
;;;5223   {
002aac  4606              MOV      r6,r0
002aae  e9dd8907          LDRD     r8,r9,[sp,#0x1c]
002ab2  9809              LDR      r0,[sp,#0x24]
002ab4  460f              MOV      r7,r1
002ab6  4614              MOV      r4,r2
002ab8  461d              MOV      r5,r3
;;;5224   	Foreground_color_65k(TriangleColor);
002aba  b280              UXTH     r0,r0
002abc  f7fffffe          BL       Foreground_color_65k
;;;5225   	Triangle_Point1_XY(X1,Y1);
002ac0  4639              MOV      r1,r7
002ac2  4630              MOV      r0,r6
002ac4  f7fffffe          BL       Triangle_Point1_XY
;;;5226     Triangle_Point2_XY(X2,Y2);
002ac8  4629              MOV      r1,r5
002aca  4620              MOV      r0,r4
002acc  f7fffffe          BL       Triangle_Point2_XY
;;;5227     Triangle_Point3_XY(X3,Y3);
002ad0  4649              MOV      r1,r9
002ad2  4640              MOV      r0,r8
002ad4  f7fffffe          BL       Triangle_Point3_XY
;;;5228     Start_Triangle();
002ad8  f7fffffe          BL       Start_Triangle
;;;5229     Check_2D_Busy(); 
002adc  e8bd43f0          POP      {r4-r9,lr}
002ae0  f7ffbffe          B.W      Check_2D_Busy
;;;5230   }
;;;5231   
                          ENDP

                  LT768_DrawTriangle_Fill PROC
;;;5233   
;;;5234   void LT768_DrawTriangle_Fill
002ae4  e92d43f0          PUSH     {r4-r9,lr}
;;;5235   (
;;;5236    unsigned short X1              // X1Î»ÖĂ
;;;5237   ,unsigned short Y1              // Y1Î»ÖĂ
;;;5238   ,unsigned short X2              // X2Î»ÖĂ
;;;5239   ,unsigned short Y2              // Y2Î»ÖĂ
;;;5240   ,unsigned short X3              // X3Î»ÖĂ
;;;5241   ,unsigned short Y3              // Y3Î»ÖĂ
;;;5242   ,unsigned long ForegroundColor  // »­ĎßŃŐÉ«
;;;5243   )
;;;5244   {
002ae8  4606              MOV      r6,r0
002aea  e9dd8907          LDRD     r8,r9,[sp,#0x1c]
002aee  9809              LDR      r0,[sp,#0x24]
002af0  460f              MOV      r7,r1
002af2  4614              MOV      r4,r2
002af4  461d              MOV      r5,r3
;;;5245   	Foreground_color_65k(ForegroundColor);
002af6  b280              UXTH     r0,r0
002af8  f7fffffe          BL       Foreground_color_65k
;;;5246   	Triangle_Point1_XY(X1,Y1);
002afc  4639              MOV      r1,r7
002afe  4630              MOV      r0,r6
002b00  f7fffffe          BL       Triangle_Point1_XY
;;;5247     Triangle_Point2_XY(X2,Y2);

002b06  4620              MOV      r0,r4
002b08  f7fffffe          BL       Triangle_Point2_XY
;;;5248     Triangle_Point3_XY(X3,Y3);
002b0c  4649              MOV      r1,r9
002b0e  4640              MOV      r0,r8
002b10  f7fffffe          BL       Triangle_Point3_XY
;;;5249     Start_Triangle_Fill();
002b14  f7fffffe          BL       Start_Triangle_Fill
;;;5250     Check_2D_Busy();
002b18  e8bd43f0          POP      {r4-r9,lr}
002b1c  f7ffbffe          B.W      Check_2D_Busy
;;;5251   }
;;;5252   
                          ENDP

                  LT768_DrawLeftUpCurve PROC
;;;5255   //------------------------------------- ÇúĎß -----------------------------------------

002b20  b5f0              PUSH     {r4-r7,lr}
;;;5257   ( 
;;;5258    unsigned short XCenter           // ÇúĐÄXÎ»ÖĂ
;;;5259   ,unsigned short YCenter           // ÇúĐÄYÎ»ÖĂ

                  LT768_DrawRightDownCurve PROC
