                  LT768_SelectDrawCurve PROC
;;;5323   
;;;5324   void LT768_SelectDrawCurve
002bd8  b538              PUSH     {r3-r5,lr}
;;;5325   (
;;;5326    unsigned short XCenter           // ÇúĐÄXÎ»ÖĂ
;;;5327   ,unsigned short YCenter           // ÇúĐÄYÎ»ÖĂ
;;;5328   ,unsigned short X_R               // żí°ëľ¶
;;;5329   ,unsigned short Y_R               // ł¤°ëľ¶
;;;5330   ,unsigned long CurveColor         // »­ĎßŃŐÉ«
;;;5331   ,unsigned short  Dir              // ·˝Ďň
;;;5332   )
;;;5333   {
002bda  e9dd5404          LDRD     r5,r4,[sp,#0x10]
;;;5334   	switch(Dir)
002bde  2c00              CMP      r4,#0
002be0  d009              BEQ      |L1.11254|
002be2  2c01              CMP      r4,#1
002be4  d00b              BEQ      |L1.11262|
002be6  2c02              CMP      r4,#2
002be8  d00d              BEQ      |L1.11270|
002bea  2c03              CMP      r4,#3
002bec  d102              BNE      |L1.11252|
;;;5335   	{
;;;5336   		case 0:LT768_DrawLeftDownCurve(XCenter,YCenter,X_R,Y_R,CurveColor);		break;
;;;5337   		case 1:LT768_DrawLeftUpCurve(XCenter,YCenter,X_R,Y_R,CurveColor);			break;
;;;5338   		case 2:LT768_DrawRightUpCurve(XCenter,YCenter,X_R,Y_R,CurveColor);		break;
;;;5339   		case 3:LT768_DrawRightDownCurve(XCenter,YCenter,X_R,Y_R,CurveColor);	break;
002bee  9500              STR      r5,[sp,#0]
002bf0  f7fffffe          BL       LT768_DrawRightDownCurve
                  |L1.11252|
;;;5340   		default:																															break;
;;;5341   	}
;;;5342   }
002bf4  bd38              POP      {r3-r5,pc}
                  |L1.11254|
002bf6  9500              STR      r5,[sp,#0]            ;5336
002bf8  f7fffffe          BL       LT768_DrawLeftDownCurve
002bfc  bd38              POP      {r3-r5,pc}
                  |L1.11262|
002bfe  9500              STR      r5,[sp,#0]            ;5337
002c00  f7fffffe          BL       LT768_DrawLeftUpCurve
002c04  bd38              POP      {r3-r5,pc}
                  |L1.11270|
002c06  9500              STR      r5,[sp,#0]            ;5338
002c08  f7fffffe          BL       LT768_DrawRightUpCurve
002c0c  bd38              POP      {r3-r5,pc}
;;;5343   
                          ENDP

                  LT768_DrawLeftUpCurve_Fill PROC
;;;5345   //------------------------------------- 1/4ĘµĐÄÍÖÔ˛ -----------------------------------------
;;;5346   void LT768_DrawLeftUpCurve_Fill
002c0e  b5f0              PUSH     {r4-r7,lr}
;;;5347   (
;;;5348    unsigned short XCenter           // ÇúĐÄXÎ»ÖĂ
;;;5349   ,unsigned short YCenter           // ÇúĐÄYÎ»ÖĂ
;;;5350   ,unsigned short X_R               // żí°ëľ¶
;;;5351   ,unsigned short Y_R               // ł¤°ëľ¶
;;;5352   ,unsigned long ForegroundColor    // ±łľ°ŃŐÉ«
;;;5353   )
;;;5354   {
002c10  4606              MOV      r6,r0
002c12  9805              LDR      r0,[sp,#0x14]
002c14  460f              MOV      r7,r1
002c16  4614              MOV      r4,r2
002c18  461d              MOV      r5,r3
;;;5355     Foreground_color_65k(ForegroundColor);
002c1a  b280              UXTH     r0,r0
002c1c  f7fffffe          BL       Foreground_color_65k
;;;5356     Ellipse_Center_XY(XCenter,YCenter);
002c20  4639              MOV      r1,r7
002c22  4630              MOV      r0,r6
002c24  f7fffffe          BL       Ellipse_Center_XY
;;;5357     Ellipse_Radius_RxRy(X_R,Y_R);
002c28  4629              MOV      r1,r5
002c2a  4620              MOV      r0,r4
002c2c  f7fffffe          BL       Ellipse_Radius_RxRy
;;;5358     Start_Left_Up_Curve_Fill();
002c30  f7fffffe          BL       Start_Left_Up_Curve_Fill
;;;5359     Check_2D_Busy(); 
002c34  e8bd40f0          POP      {r4-r7,lr}
002c38  f7ffbffe          B.W      Check_2D_Busy
;;;5360   }
;;;5361   
                          ENDP

                  LT768_DrawLeftDownCurve_Fill PROC
;;;5362   
;;;5363   void LT768_DrawLeftDownCurve_Fill

;;;5364   (
;;;5365    unsigned short XCenter           // ÇúĐÄXÎ»ÖĂ

                  LT768_DrawRightUpCurve_Fill PROC
;;;5379   
;;;5380   void LT768_DrawRightUpCurve_Fill
002c6a  b5f0              PUSH     {r4-r7,lr}
;;;5381   (
;;;5382    unsigned short XCenter           // ÇúĐÄXÎ»ÖĂ
;;;5383   ,unsigned short YCenter           // ÇúĐÄYÎ»ÖĂ
;;;5384   ,unsigned short X_R               // żí°ëľ¶
;;;5385   ,unsigned short Y_R               // ł¤°ëľ¶
;;;5386   ,unsigned long ForegroundColor    // ±łľ°ŃŐÉ«
;;;5387   )
;;;5388   {
002c6c  4606              MOV      r6,r0
002c6e  9805              LDR      r0,[sp,#0x14]
002c70  460f              MOV      r7,r1
002c72  4614              MOV      r4,r2
002c74  461d              MOV      r5,r3
;;;5389     Foreground_color_65k(ForegroundColor);
002c76  b280              UXTH     r0,r0
002c78  f7fffffe          BL       Foreground_color_65k
;;;5390     Ellipse_Center_XY(XCenter,YCenter);
002c7c  4639              MOV      r1,r7
002c7e  4630              MOV      r0,r6
002c80  f7fffffe          BL       Ellipse_Center_XY
;;;5391     Ellipse_Radius_RxRy(X_R,Y_R);
002c84  4629              MOV      r1,r5
002c86  4620              MOV      r0,r4
002c88  f7fffffe          BL       Ellipse_Radius_RxRy
;;;5392     Start_Right_Up_Curve_Fill();
002c8c  f7fffffe          BL       Start_Right_Up_Curve_Fill
;;;5393     Check_2D_Busy(); 
002c90  e8bd40f0          POP      {r4-r7,lr}
002c94  f7ffbffe          B.W      Check_2D_Busy
;;;5394   }
;;;5395   
                          ENDP

                  LT768_DrawRightDownCurve_Fill PROC
;;;5396   
;;;5397   void LT768_DrawRightDownCurve_Fill
002c98  b5f0              PUSH     {r4-r7,lr}
;;;5398   (
;;;5399    unsigned short XCenter           // ÇúĐÄXÎ»ÖĂ
;;;5400   ,unsigned short YCenter           // ÇúĐÄYÎ»ÖĂ
;;;5401   ,unsigned short X_R               // żí°ëľ¶
;;;5402   ,unsigned short Y_R               // ł¤°ëľ¶
;;;5403   ,unsigned long ForegroundColor    // ±łľ°ŃŐÉ«
;;;5404   )
;;;5405   {
002c9a  4606              MOV      r6,r0
002c9c  9805              LDR      r0,[sp,#0x14]
002c9e  460f              MOV      r7,r1
002ca0  4614              MOV      r4,r2
002ca2  461d              MOV      r5,r3
;;;5406     Foreground_color_65k(ForegroundColor);
002ca4  b280              UXTH     r0,r0
002ca6  f7fffffe          BL       Foreground_color_65k
;;;5407     Ellipse_Center_XY(XCenter,YCenter);
002caa  4639              MOV      r1,r7
002cac  4630              MOV      r0,r6
002cae  f7fffffe          BL       Ellipse_Center_XY
;;;5408     Ellipse_Radius_RxRy(X_R,Y_R);
002cb2  4629              MOV      r1,r5
002cb4  4620              MOV      r0,r4
002cb6  f7fffffe          BL       Ellipse_Radius_RxRy
;;;5409     Start_Right_Down_Curve_Fill();
002cba  f7fffffe          BL       Start_Right_Down_Curve_Fill
;;;5410     Check_2D_Busy(); 
002cbe  e8bd40f0          POP      {r4-r7,lr}
002cc2  f7ffbffe          B.W      Check_2D_Busy
;;;5411   }
;;;5412   
                          ENDP

                  LT768_SelectDrawCurve_Fill PROC
;;;5413   
;;;5414   void LT768_SelectDrawCurve_Fill
002cc6  b538              PUSH     {r3-r5,lr}
;;;5415   (
;;;5416    unsigned short XCenter           // ÇúĐÄXÎ»ÖĂ
;;;5417   ,unsigned short YCenter           // ÇúĐÄYÎ»ÖĂ
;;;5418   ,unsigned short X_R               // żí°ëľ¶
;;;5419   ,unsigned short Y_R               // ł¤°ëľ¶
;;;5420   ,unsigned long CurveColor         // »­ĎßŃŐÉ«
;;;5421   ,unsigned short  Dir              // ·˝Ďň
;;;5422   )
;;;5423   {
002cc8  e9dd5404          LDRD     r5,r4,[sp,#0x10]
;;;5424   	switch(Dir)
002ccc  2c00              CMP      r4,#0
002cce  d009              BEQ      |L1.11492|
002cd0  2c01              CMP      r4,#1
002cd2  d00b              BEQ      |L1.11500|
002cd4  2c02              CMP      r4,#2
002cd6  d00d              BEQ      |L1.11508|
002cd8  2c03              CMP      r4,#3
002cda  d102              BNE      |L1.11490|
;;;5425   	{
;;;5426   		case 0:LT768_DrawLeftDownCurve_Fill(XCenter,YCenter,X_R,Y_R,CurveColor);		break;
;;;5427   		case 1:LT768_DrawLeftUpCurve_Fill(XCenter,YCenter,X_R,Y_R,CurveColor);			break;
;;;5428   		case 2:LT768_DrawRightUpCurve_Fill(XCenter,YCenter,X_R,Y_R,CurveColor);			break;
;;;5429   		case 3:LT768_DrawRightDownCurve_Fill(XCenter,YCenter,X_R,Y_R,CurveColor);		break;
002cdc  9500              STR      r5,[sp,#0]
002cde  f7fffffe          BL       LT768_DrawRightDownCurve_Fill
                  |L1.11490|
;;;5430   		default:																																		break;
;;;5431   	}
;;;5432   }
002ce2  bd38              POP      {r3-r5,pc}
                  |L1.11492|
002ce4  9500              STR      r5,[sp,#0]            ;5426
002ce6  f7fffffe          BL       LT768_DrawLeftDownCurve_Fill
002cea  bd38              POP      {r3-r5,pc}
                  |L1.11500|
002cec  9500              STR      r5,[sp,#0]            ;5427
002cee  f7fffffe          BL       LT768_DrawLeftUpCurve_Fill
002cf2  bd38              POP      {r3-r5,pc}
                  |L1.11508|
002cf4  9500              STR      r5,[sp,#0]            ;5428
002cf6  f7fffffe          BL       LT768_DrawRightUpCurve_Fill
002cfa  bd38              POP      {r3-r5,pc}
;;;5433   
                          ENDP

                  LT768_DrawQuadrilateral PROC
;;;5437   
;;;5438   void LT768_DrawQuadrilateral
002cfc  e92d4ff0          PUSH     {r4-r11,lr}
;;;5439   (
;;;5440    unsigned short X1              // X1Î»ÖĂ
;;;5441   ,unsigned short Y1              // Y1Î»ÖĂ
;;;5442   ,unsigned short X2              // X2Î»ÖĂ
;;;5443   ,unsigned short Y2              // Y2Î»ÖĂ
;;;5444   ,unsigned short X3              // X3Î»ÖĂ
;;;5445   ,unsigned short Y3              // Y3Î»ÖĂ
;;;5446   ,unsigned short X4              // X4Î»ÖĂ
;;;5447   ,unsigned short Y4              // Y4Î»ÖĂ
;;;5448   ,unsigned long ForegroundColor  // »­ĎßŃŐÉ«
;;;5449   )
;;;5450   {
002d00  4606              MOV      r6,r0
002d02  e9ddab0b          LDRD     r10,r11,[sp,#0x2c]
002d06  e9dd8909          LDRD     r8,r9,[sp,#0x24]
002d0a  980d              LDR      r0,[sp,#0x34]
002d0c  460f              MOV      r7,r1
002d0e  4614              MOV      r4,r2
002d10  461d              MOV      r5,r3
;;;5451   	Foreground_color_65k(ForegroundColor);
002d12  b280              UXTH     r0,r0
002d14  f7fffffe          BL       Foreground_color_65k
;;;5452   	Triangle_Point1_XY(X1,Y1);
002d18  4639              MOV      r1,r7
002d1a  4630              MOV      r0,r6
002d1c  f7fffffe          BL       Triangle_Point1_XY
;;;5453     Triangle_Point2_XY(X2,Y2);
002d20  4629              MOV      r1,r5
002d22  4620              MOV      r0,r4
002d24  f7fffffe          BL       Triangle_Point2_XY
;;;5454     Triangle_Point3_XY(X3,Y3);
002d28  4649              MOV      r1,r9
002d2a  4640              MOV      r0,r8
002d2c  f7fffffe          BL       Triangle_Point3_XY
;;;5455   	Ellipse_Radius_RxRy(X4,Y4);
002d30  4659              MOV      r1,r11
002d32  4650              MOV      r0,r10
002d34  f7fffffe          BL       Ellipse_Radius_RxRy
;;;5456   	
;;;5457   	LCD_CmdWrite(0x67);
002d38  2067              MOVS     r0,#0x67
002d3a  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_CmdWrite
;;;5458   	LCD_DataWrite(0x8d);
002d3e  208d              MOVS     r0,#0x8d
002d40  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_DataWrite
;;;5459   	Check_Busy_Draw();
002d44  f7fffffe          BL       Check_Busy_Draw
;;;5460   	
;;;5461   	Check_2D_Busy(); 
002d48  e8bd4ff0          POP      {r4-r11,lr}
002d4c  f7ffbffe          B.W      Check_2D_Busy
;;;5462   }
;;;5463   
                          ENDP

                  LT768_DrawQuadrilateral_Fill PROC
;;;5464   
;;;5465   void LT768_DrawQuadrilateral_Fill
002d50  e92d4ff0          PUSH     {r4-r11,lr}
;;;5466   (
;;;5467    unsigned short X1              // X1Î»ÖĂ
;;;5468   ,unsigned short Y1              // Y1Î»ÖĂ
;;;5469   ,unsigned short X2              // X2Î»ÖĂ
;;;5470   ,unsigned short Y2              // Y2Î»ÖĂ
;;;5471   ,unsigned short X3              // X3Î»ÖĂ
;;;5472   ,unsigned short Y3              // Y3Î»ÖĂ
;;;5473   ,unsigned short X4              // X4Î»ÖĂ
;;;5474   ,unsigned short Y4              // Y4Î»ÖĂ
;;;5475   ,unsigned long ForegroundColor  // »­ĎßŃŐÉ«
;;;5476   )
;;;5477   {

002d56  e9ddab0b          LDRD     r10,r11,[sp,#0x2c]
002d5a  e9dd8909          LDRD     r8,r9,[sp,#0x24]
002d5e  980d              LDR      r0,[sp,#0x34]
002d60  460f              MOV      r7,r1
002d62  4614              MOV      r4,r2
002d64  461d              MOV      r5,r3
;;;5478   	Foreground_color_65k(ForegroundColor);
002d66  b280              UXTH     r0,r0
002d68  f7fffffe          BL       Foreground_color_65k
;;;5479   	Triangle_Point1_XY(X1,Y1);
002d6c  4639              MOV      r1,r7
002d6e  4630              MOV      r0,r6
002d70  f7fffffe          BL       Triangle_Point1_XY
;;;5480     Triangle_Point2_XY(X2,Y2);
002d74  4629              MOV      r1,r5
002d76  4620              MOV      r0,r4
002d78  f7fffffe          BL       Triangle_Point2_XY
;;;5481     Triangle_Point3_XY(X3,Y3);
002d7c  4649              MOV      r1,r9
002d7e  4640              MOV      r0,r8
002d80  f7fffffe          BL       Triangle_Point3_XY
;;;5482   	Ellipse_Radius_RxRy(X4,Y4);
002d84  4659              MOV      r1,r11
002d86  4650              MOV      r0,r10
002d88  f7fffffe          BL       Ellipse_Radius_RxRy
;;;5483   	
;;;5484   	LCD_CmdWrite(0x67);
002d8c  2067              MOVS     r0,#0x67
002d8e  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_CmdWrite
;;;5485   	LCD_DataWrite(0xa7);
002d92  20a7              MOVS     r0,#0xa7
002d94  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_DataWrite
;;;5486   	Check_Busy_Draw();
002d98  f7fffffe          BL       Check_Busy_Draw
;;;5487   	
;;;5488   	Check_2D_Busy(); 
002d9c  e8bd4ff0          POP      {r4-r11,lr}
002da0  f7ffbffe          B.W      Check_2D_Busy
;;;5489   }
;;;5490   
                          ENDP

                  LT768_DrawPentagon PROC
;;;5494   
;;;5495   void LT768_DrawPentagon
002da4  e92d4ff0          PUSH     {r4-r11,lr}
;;;5496   (
;;;5497    unsigned short X1              // X1Î»ÖĂ
;;;5498   ,unsigned short Y1              // Y1Î»ÖĂ
;;;5499   ,unsigned short X2              // X2Î»ÖĂ
;;;5500   ,unsigned short Y2              // Y2Î»ÖĂ
;;;5501   ,unsigned short X3              // X3Î»ÖĂ
;;;5502   ,unsigned short Y3              // Y3Î»ÖĂ
;;;5503   ,unsigned short X4              // X4Î»ÖĂ
;;;5504   ,unsigned short Y4              // Y4Î»ÖĂ
;;;5505   ,unsigned short X5              // X5Î»ÖĂ
;;;5506   ,unsigned short Y5              // Y5Î»ÖĂ
;;;5507   ,unsigned long ForegroundColor  // »­ĎßŃŐÉ«
;;;5508   )
;;;5509   {
002da8  4606              MOV      r6,r0
002daa  e9ddab0b          LDRD     r10,r11,[sp,#0x2c]
002dae  e9dd8909          LDRD     r8,r9,[sp,#0x24]
002db2  980f              LDR      r0,[sp,#0x3c]
002db4  460f              MOV      r7,r1
002db6  4614              MOV      r4,r2
002db8  461d              MOV      r5,r3
;;;5510   	Foreground_color_65k(ForegroundColor);
002dba  b280              UXTH     r0,r0
002dbc  f7fffffe          BL       Foreground_color_65k
;;;5511   	Triangle_Point1_XY(X1,Y1);
002dc0  4639              MOV      r1,r7
002dc2  4630              MOV      r0,r6
002dc4  f7fffffe          BL       Triangle_Point1_XY
;;;5512     Triangle_Point2_XY(X2,Y2);
002dc8  4629              MOV      r1,r5
002dca  4620              MOV      r0,r4
002dcc  f7fffffe          BL       Triangle_Point2_XY
;;;5513     Triangle_Point3_XY(X3,Y3);
002dd0  4649              MOV      r1,r9
002dd2  4640              MOV      r0,r8
002dd4  f7fffffe          BL       Triangle_Point3_XY
;;;5514   	Ellipse_Radius_RxRy(X4,Y4);
002dd8  4659              MOV      r1,r11
002dda  4650              MOV      r0,r10
002ddc  f7fffffe          BL       Ellipse_Radius_RxRy
;;;5515   	Ellipse_Center_XY(X5,Y5);
002de0  e9dd010d          LDRD     r0,r1,[sp,#0x34]
002de4  f7fffffe          BL       Ellipse_Center_XY
;;;5516   	
;;;5517   	LCD_CmdWrite(0x67);
002de8  2067              MOVS     r0,#0x67
002dea  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_CmdWrite
;;;5518   	LCD_DataWrite(0x8F);
002dee  208f              MOVS     r0,#0x8f
002df0  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_DataWrite
;;;5519   	Check_Busy_Draw();
002df4  f7fffffe          BL       Check_Busy_Draw
;;;5520   	
;;;5521   	Check_2D_Busy(); 
002df8  e8bd4ff0          POP      {r4-r11,lr}
002dfc  f7ffbffe          B.W      Check_2D_Busy
;;;5522   }
;;;5523   
                          ENDP

                  LT768_DrawPentagon_Fill PROC
;;;5524   
;;;5525   void LT768_DrawPentagon_Fill
002e00  e92d4ff0          PUSH     {r4-r11,lr}
;;;5526   (
;;;5527    unsigned short X1              // X1Î»ÖĂ
;;;5528   ,unsigned short Y1              // Y1Î»ÖĂ
;;;5529   ,unsigned short X2              // X2Î»ÖĂ
;;;5530   ,unsigned short Y2              // Y2Î»ÖĂ
;;;5531   ,unsigned short X3              // X3Î»ÖĂ
;;;5532   ,unsigned short Y3              // Y3Î»ÖĂ
;;;5533   ,unsigned short X4              // X4Î»ÖĂ
;;;5534   ,unsigned short Y4              // Y4Î»ÖĂ
;;;5535   ,unsigned short X5              // X5Î»ÖĂ
;;;5536   ,unsigned short Y5              // Y5Î»ÖĂ
;;;5537   ,unsigned long ForegroundColor  // »­ĎßŃŐÉ«
;;;5538   )
;;;5539   {
002e04  4606              MOV      r6,r0
002e06  e9ddab0b          LDRD     r10,r11,[sp,#0x2c]
002e0a  e9dd8909          LDRD     r8,r9,[sp,#0x24]
002e0e  980f              LDR      r0,[sp,#0x3c]
002e10  460f              MOV      r7,r1
002e12  4614              MOV      r4,r2
002e14  461d              MOV      r5,r3
;;;5540   	Foreground_color_65k(ForegroundColor);
002e16  b280              UXTH     r0,r0
002e18  f7fffffe          BL       Foreground_color_65k
;;;5541   	Triangle_Point1_XY(X1,Y1);
002e1c  4639              MOV      r1,r7
002e1e  4630              MOV      r0,r6
002e20  f7fffffe          BL       Triangle_Point1_XY
;;;5542     Triangle_Point2_XY(X2,Y2);
002e24  4629              MOV      r1,r5
002e26  4620              MOV      r0,r4
002e28  f7fffffe          BL       Triangle_Point2_XY
;;;5543     Triangle_Point3_XY(X3,Y3);
002e2c  4649              MOV      r1,r9
002e2e  4640              MOV      r0,r8
002e30  f7fffffe          BL       Triangle_Point3_XY
;;;5544   	Ellipse_Radius_RxRy(X4,Y4);
002e34  4659              MOV      r1,r11
002e36  4650              MOV      r0,r10
002e38  f7fffffe          BL       Ellipse_Radius_RxRy
;;;5545   	Ellipse_Center_XY(X5,Y5);
002e3c  e9dd010d          LDRD     r0,r1,[sp,#0x34]
002e40  f7fffffe          BL       Ellipse_Center_XY
;;;5546   	
;;;5547   	LCD_CmdWrite(0x67);
002e44  2067              MOVS     r0,#0x67
002e46  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_CmdWrite
;;;5548   	LCD_DataWrite(0xa9);
002e4a  20a9              MOVS     r0,#0xa9
002e4c  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_DataWrite
;;;5549   	Check_Busy_Draw();
002e50  f7fffffe          BL       Check_Busy_Draw
;;;5550   	
;;;5551   	Check_2D_Busy(); 
002e54  e8bd4ff0          POP      {r4-r11,lr}
002e58  f7ffbffe          B.W      Check_2D_Busy
;;;5552   }
;;;5553   
                          ENDP

                  LT768_DrawCylinder PROC
;;;5555   //------------------------------------- Ô˛Öů -----------------------------------------
;;;5556   unsigned char LT768_DrawCylinder
002e5c  e92d4fff          PUSH     {r0-r11,lr}
;;;5557   (
;;;5558    unsigned short XCenter           // ÍÖÔ˛ĐÄXÎ»ÖĂ
;;;5559   ,unsigned short YCenter           // ÍÖÔ˛ĐÄYÎ»ÖĂ
;;;5560   ,unsigned short X_R               // żí°ëľ¶
;;;5561   ,unsigned short Y_R               // ł¤°ëľ¶
;;;5562   ,unsigned short H                 // ¸ß¶Č
;;;5563   ,unsigned long CylinderColor      // »­ĎßŃŐÉ«
;;;5564   ,unsigned long ForegroundColor    // ±łľ°ŃŐÉ«
;;;5565   )
;;;5566   {
002e60  b081              SUB      sp,sp,#4
002e62  4607              MOV      r7,r0
002e64  e9dd590f          LDRD     r5,r9,[sp,#0x3c]
002e68  9c0e              LDR      r4,[sp,#0x38]
002e6a  460e              MOV      r6,r1
002e6c  4690              MOV      r8,r2
;;;5567   	if(YCenter < H)	return 1;
002e6e  42a6              CMP      r6,r4
002e70  d203              BCS      |L1.11898|
002e72  2001              MOVS     r0,#1
                  |L1.11892|
;;;5568   	
;;;5569   	//µ×ĂćÍÖÔ˛
;;;5570   	LT768_DrawEllipse_Fill(XCenter,YCenter,X_R,Y_R,ForegroundColor);
;;;5571   	LT768_DrawEllipse(XCenter,YCenter,X_R,Y_R,CylinderColor);
;;;5572   	
;;;5573   	//ÖĐĽäľŘĐÎ
;;;5574   	LT768_DrawSquare_Fill(XCenter-X_R,YCenter-H,XCenter+X_R,YCenter,ForegroundColor);
;;;5575   	
;;;5576   	//¶ĄĂćÍÖÔ˛
;;;5577   	LT768_DrawEllipse_Fill(XCenter,YCenter-H,X_R,Y_R,ForegroundColor);
;;;5578   	LT768_DrawEllipse(XCenter,YCenter-H,X_R,Y_R,CylinderColor);
;;;5579   	
;;;5580   	LT768_DrawLine(XCenter-X_R,YCenter,XCenter-X_R,YCenter-H,CylinderColor);
;;;5581   	LT768_DrawLine(XCenter+X_R,YCenter,XCenter+X_R,YCenter-H,CylinderColor);
;;;5582   	
;;;5583   	return 0;
;;;5584   }
002e74  b005              ADD      sp,sp,#0x14
                  |L1.11894|
002e76  e8bd8ff0          POP      {r4-r11,pc}
                  |L1.11898|
002e7a  f8cd9000          STR      r9,[sp,#0]            ;5570
002e7e  4642              MOV      r2,r8                 ;5570
002e80  4631              MOV      r1,r6                 ;5570
002e82  4638              MOV      r0,r7                 ;5570
002e84  9b04              LDR      r3,[sp,#0x10]         ;5570
002e86  f7fffffe          BL       LT768_DrawEllipse_Fill
002e8a  9500              STR      r5,[sp,#0]            ;5571
002e8c  4642              MOV      r2,r8                 ;5571
002e8e  4631              MOV      r1,r6                 ;5571
002e90  4638              MOV      r0,r7                 ;5571
002e92  9b04              LDR      r3,[sp,#0x10]         ;5571
002e94  f7fffffe          BL       LT768_DrawEllipse
002e98  eb070a08          ADD      r10,r7,r8             ;5574
002e9c  1b34              SUBS     r4,r6,r4              ;5574
002e9e  eba70b08          SUB      r11,r7,r8             ;5574
002ea2  fa1ff28a          UXTH     r2,r10                ;5574
002ea6  b2a1              UXTH     r1,r4                 ;5574
002ea8  fa1ff08b          UXTH     r0,r11                ;5574
002eac  4633              MOV      r3,r6                 ;5574
002eae  f8cd9000          STR      r9,[sp,#0]            ;5574
002eb2  f7fffffe          BL       LT768_DrawSquare_Fill
002eb6  b2a1              UXTH     r1,r4                 ;5577
002eb8  f8cd9000          STR      r9,[sp,#0]            ;5577
002ebc  4642              MOV      r2,r8                 ;5577
002ebe  4638              MOV      r0,r7                 ;5577
002ec0  9b04              LDR      r3,[sp,#0x10]         ;5577
002ec2  f7fffffe          BL       LT768_DrawEllipse_Fill
002ec6  b2a1              UXTH     r1,r4                 ;5578
002ec8  9500              STR      r5,[sp,#0]            ;5578
002eca  4642              MOV      r2,r8                 ;5578
002ecc  4638              MOV      r0,r7                 ;5578
002ece  9b04              LDR      r3,[sp,#0x10]         ;5578
002ed0  f7fffffe          BL       LT768_DrawEllipse
002ed4  b2a3              UXTH     r3,r4                 ;5580
002ed6  fa1ff28b          UXTH     r2,r11                ;5580
002eda  fa1ff08b          UXTH     r0,r11                ;5580
002ede  4631              MOV      r1,r6                 ;5580
002ee0  9500              STR      r5,[sp,#0]            ;5580
002ee2  f7fffffe          BL       LT768_DrawLine
002ee6  b2a3              UXTH     r3,r4                 ;5581
002ee8  fa1ff28a          UXTH     r2,r10                ;5581
002eec  fa1ff08a          UXTH     r0,r10                ;5581
002ef0  4631              MOV      r1,r6                 ;5581
002ef2  9500              STR      r5,[sp,#0]            ;5581
002ef4  f7fffffe          BL       LT768_DrawLine
002ef8  2000              MOVS     r0,#0                 ;5583
002efa  e7bb              B        |L1.11892|
;;;5585   
                          ENDP

                  LT768_DrawQuadrangular PROC
;;;5587   //------------------------------------- ËÄŔâÖů -----------------------------------------
;;;5588   void LT768_DrawQuadrangular
002efc  e92d4fff          PUSH     {r0-r11,lr}
;;;5589   (
;;;5590    unsigned short X1
;;;5591   ,unsigned short Y1
;;;5592   ,unsigned short X2
;;;5593   ,unsigned short Y2
;;;5594   ,unsigned short X3
;;;5595   ,unsigned short Y3
;;;5596   ,unsigned short X4
;;;5597   ,unsigned short Y4
;;;5598   ,unsigned short X5
;;;5599   ,unsigned short Y5
;;;5600   ,unsigned short X6
;;;5601   ,unsigned short Y6
;;;5602   ,unsigned long QuadrangularColor   // »­ĎßŃŐÉ«
;;;5603   ,unsigned long ForegroundColor     // ±łľ°ŃŐÉ«
;;;5604   )
;;;5605   {
002f00  b085              SUB      sp,sp,#0x14
002f02  ac12              ADD      r4,sp,#0x48
002f04  e8940cf0          LDM      r4,{r4-r7,r10,r11}
002f08  e9dd891a          LDRD     r8,r9,[sp,#0x68]
;;;5606   	LT768_DrawSquare_Fill(X1,Y1,X5,Y5,ForegroundColor);
002f0c  f8cd9000          STR      r9,[sp,#0]
002f10  e9dd0105          LDRD     r0,r1,[sp,#0x14]
002f14  465b              MOV      r3,r11
002f16  4652              MOV      r2,r10
002f18  f7fffffe          BL       LT768_DrawSquare_Fill
;;;5607   	LT768_DrawSquare(X1,Y1,X5,Y5,QuadrangularColor);
002f1c  f8cd8000          STR      r8,[sp,#0]
002f20  e9dd0105          LDRD     r0,r1,[sp,#0x14]
002f24  465b              MOV      r3,r11
002f26  4652              MOV      r2,r10
002f28  f7fffffe          BL       LT768_DrawSquare
;;;5608   	
;;;5609   	LT768_DrawQuadrilateral_Fill(X1,Y1,X2,Y2,X3,Y3,X4,Y4,ForegroundColor);
002f2c  e88d02f0          STM      sp,{r4-r7,r9}
002f30  a805              ADD      r0,sp,#0x14
002f32  c80f              LDM      r0,{r0-r3}
002f34  f7fffffe          BL       LT768_DrawQuadrilateral_Fill
;;;5610   	LT768_DrawQuadrilateral(X1,Y1,X2,Y2,X3,Y3,X4,Y4,QuadrangularColor);
002f38  e88d01f0          STM      sp,{r4-r8}
002f3c  a805              ADD      r0,sp,#0x14
002f3e  c80f              LDM      r0,{r0-r3}
002f40  f7fffffe          BL       LT768_DrawQuadrilateral
;;;5611   	
;;;5612   	LT768_DrawQuadrilateral_Fill(X3,Y3,X4,Y4,X5,Y5,X6,Y6,ForegroundColor);
002f44  e9dd1018          LDRD     r1,r0,[sp,#0x60]
002f48  e9cdab00          STRD     r10,r11,[sp,#0]
002f4c  e9cd0903          STRD     r0,r9,[sp,#0xc]
002f50  9102              STR      r1,[sp,#8]
002f52  463b              MOV      r3,r7
002f54  4632              MOV      r2,r6
002f56  4629              MOV      r1,r5
002f58  4620              MOV      r0,r4
002f5a  f7fffffe          BL       LT768_DrawQuadrilateral_Fill
;;;5613   	LT768_DrawQuadrilateral(X3,Y3,X4,Y4,X5,Y5,X6,Y6,QuadrangularColor);
002f5e  e9dd1018          LDRD     r1,r0,[sp,#0x60]
002f62  e9cdab00          STRD     r10,r11,[sp,#0]
002f66  e9cd0803          STRD     r0,r8,[sp,#0xc]
002f6a  9102              STR      r1,[sp,#8]
002f6c  463b              MOV      r3,r7
002f6e  4632              MOV      r2,r6
002f70  4629              MOV      r1,r5
002f72  4620              MOV      r0,r4
002f74  f7fffffe          BL       LT768_DrawQuadrilateral
;;;5614   }
002f78  b009              ADD      sp,sp,#0x24
002f7a  e77c              B        |L1.11894|
;;;5615   
                          ENDP

                  LT768_Color_Bar_ON PROC

;;;5623   {
;;;5624   	Color_Bar_ON();

                  LT768_Color_Bar_OFF PROC

                  LT768_DMA_24bit_Linear PROC
;;;5640   
;;;5641   void LT768_DMA_24bit_Linear
002f84  b5f0              PUSH     {r4-r7,lr}
;;;5642   (
;;;5643    unsigned char SCS              // ŃˇÔńÍâąŇµÄSPI   : SCSŁş0       SCSŁş1
;;;5644   ,unsigned char Clk              // SPIĘ±ÖÓ·ÖĆµ˛ÎĘý : SPI Clock = System Clock /{(Clk+1)*2}
;;;5645   ,unsigned long flash_addr       // ŇŞ´Óflash¶ÁČˇĘýľÝµÄĆđĘĽµŘÖ·   
;;;5646   ,unsigned long memory_addr      // ĘýľÝŇŞ´«Ęäµ˝SDRAMµÄĆđĘĽµŘÖ·
;;;5647   ,unsigned long data_num         // ´«ĘäµÄĘýľÝÁż
;;;5648   )
;;;5649   {
002f86  4604              MOV      r4,r0
002f88  460d              MOV      r5,r1
002f8a  4616              MOV      r6,r2
002f8c  9f05              LDR      r7,[sp,#0x14]
;;;5650   	
;;;5651   	Enable_SFlash_SPI();									             // ĘąÄÜSPIą¦ÄÜ
002f8e  f7fffffe          BL       Enable_SFlash_SPI
;;;5652     if(SCS == 0)		Select_SFI_0();										 // ŃˇÔńÍâąŇµÄSPI0
002f92  b90c              CBNZ     r4,|L1.12184|
002f94  f7fffffe          BL       Select_SFI_0
                  |L1.12184|
;;;5653     if(SCS == 1)		Select_SFI_1();										 // ŃˇÔńÍâąŇµÄSPI1
002f98  2c01              CMP      r4,#1
002f9a  d101              BNE      |L1.12192|
002f9c  f7fffffe          BL       Select_SFI_1
                  |L1.12192|
;;;5654   	
;;;5655   	Memory_Linear_Mode();
002fa0  f7fffffe          BL       Memory_Linear_Mode
;;;5656   	Select_SFI_DMA_Mode();								             // ÉčÖĂSPIµÄDMAÄŁĘ˝
002fa4  f7fffffe          BL       Select_SFI_DMA_Mode
;;;5657   	
;;;5658   	SPI_Clock_Period(Clk);                             // SPIËŮÂĘ 
002fa8  4628              MOV      r0,r5
002faa  f7fffffe          BL       SPI_Clock_Period
;;;5659   	SFI_DMA_Destination_Start_Address(memory_addr);  	 // Ö¸¶¨µÄÄÚ´ćµÄżŞĘĽµŘÖ·
002fae  4618              MOV      r0,r3
002fb0  f7fffffe          BL       SFI_DMA_Destination_Start_Address
;;;5660   	SFI_DMA_Transfer_Number(data_num);                 // DMA´«ĘäµÄĘýÁż
002fb4  4638              MOV      r0,r7
002fb6  f7fffffe          BL       SFI_DMA_Transfer_Number
;;;5661   	SFI_DMA_Source_Start_Address(flash_addr);          // flashµŘÖ·
002fba  4630              MOV      r0,r6
002fbc  f7fffffe          BL       SFI_DMA_Source_Start_Address
;;;5662   	Check_Busy_SFI_DMA(); 
002fc0  f7fffffe          BL       Check_Busy_SFI_DMA
;;;5663   	Start_SFI_DMA();
002fc4  f7fffffe          BL       Start_SFI_DMA
;;;5664   	Check_Busy_SFI_DMA();
002fc8  f7fffffe          BL       Check_Busy_SFI_DMA
;;;5665   	Memory_XY_Mode();
002fcc  e8bd40f0          POP      {r4-r7,lr}
002fd0  f7ffbffe          B.W      Memory_XY_Mode
;;;5666   }
;;;5667   
                          ENDP

                  LT768_DMA_32bit_Linear PROC
;;;5669   
;;;5670   void LT768_DMA_32bit_Linear
002fd4  b5f0              PUSH     {r4-r7,lr}
;;;5671   (
;;;5672    unsigned char SCS              // ŃˇÔńÍâąŇµÄSPI   : SCSŁş0       SCSŁş1
;;;5673   ,unsigned char Clk              // SPIĘ±ÖÓ·ÖĆµ˛ÎĘý : SPI Clock = System Clock /{(Clk+1)*2}
;;;5674   ,unsigned long flash_addr       // ŇŞ´Óflash¶ÁČˇĘýľÝµÄĆđĘĽµŘÖ·   
;;;5675   ,unsigned long memory_addr      // ĘýľÝŇŞ´«Ęäµ˝SDRAMµÄĆđĘĽµŘÖ·
;;;5676   ,unsigned long data_num         // ´«ĘäµÄĘýľÝÁż
;;;5677   )
;;;5678   {
002fd6  4604              MOV      r4,r0
002fd8  460d              MOV      r5,r1
002fda  4616              MOV      r6,r2
002fdc  9f05              LDR      r7,[sp,#0x14]
;;;5679   	Enable_SFlash_SPI();									             // ĘąÄÜSPIą¦ÄÜ
002fde  f7fffffe          BL       Enable_SFlash_SPI
;;;5680     if(SCS == 0)		Select_SFI_0();								     // ŃˇÔńÍâąŇµÄSPI0
002fe2  b90c              CBNZ     r4,|L1.12264|
002fe4  f7fffffe          BL       Select_SFI_0
                  |L1.12264|
;;;5681     if(SCS == 1)		Select_SFI_1();										 // ŃˇÔńÍâąŇµÄSPI1
002fe8  2c01              CMP      r4,#1
002fea  d101              BNE      |L1.12272|
002fec  f7fffffe          BL       Select_SFI_1
                  |L1.12272|
;;;5682   	
;;;5683   	Memory_Linear_Mode();
002ff0  f7fffffe          BL       Memory_Linear_Mode
;;;5684   	Select_SFI_DMA_Mode();								            // ÉčÖĂSPIµÄDMAÄŁĘ˝
002ff4  f7fffffe          BL       Select_SFI_DMA_Mode
;;;5685   	Select_SFI_32bit_Address();
002ff8  f7fffffe          BL       Select_SFI_32bit_Address
;;;5686   	
;;;5687   	SPI_Clock_Period(Clk);                             // SPIËŮÂĘ 
002ffc  4628              MOV      r0,r5
002ffe  f7fffffe          BL       SPI_Clock_Period
;;;5688   	SFI_DMA_Destination_Start_Address(memory_addr);  	 // Ö¸¶¨µÄÄÚ´ćµÄżŞĘĽµŘÖ·
003002  4618              MOV      r0,r3
003004  f7fffffe          BL       SFI_DMA_Destination_Start_Address
;;;5689   	SFI_DMA_Transfer_Number(data_num);                 // DMA´«ĘäµÄĘýÁż
003008  4638              MOV      r0,r7
00300a  f7fffffe          BL       SFI_DMA_Transfer_Number
;;;5690   	SFI_DMA_Source_Start_Address(flash_addr);          // flashµŘÖ·
00300e  4630              MOV      r0,r6
003010  f7fffffe          BL       SFI_DMA_Source_Start_Address
;;;5691   	Check_Busy_SFI_DMA(); 
003014  f7fffffe          BL       Check_Busy_SFI_DMA
;;;5692   	Start_SFI_DMA();
003018  f7fffffe          BL       Start_SFI_DMA
;;;5693   	Check_Busy_SFI_DMA();
00301c  f7fffffe          BL       Check_Busy_SFI_DMA
;;;5694   	Memory_XY_Mode();
003020  e8bd40f0          POP      {r4-r7,lr}
003024  f7ffbffe          B.W      Memory_XY_Mode
;;;5695   }
;;;5696   
                          ENDP

                  LT768_DMA_24bit_Block PROC
;;;5698   
;;;5699   void LT768_DMA_24bit_Block
003028  e92d4ff0          PUSH     {r4-r11,lr}
;;;5700   (
;;;5701    unsigned char SCS         // ŃˇÔńÍâąŇµÄSPI   : SCSŁş0       SCSŁş1
;;;5702   ,unsigned char Clk         // SPIĘ±ÖÓ·ÖĆµ˛ÎĘý : SPI Clock = System Clock /{(Clk+1)*2}
;;;5703   ,unsigned short X1         // ´«Ęäµ˝ÄÚ´ćX1µÄÎ»ÖĂ
;;;5704   ,unsigned short Y1         // ´«Ęäµ˝ÄÚ´ćY1µÄÎ»ÖĂ
;;;5705   ,unsigned short X_W        // DMA´«ĘäĘýľÝµÄżí¶Č
;;;5706   ,unsigned short Y_H        // DMA´«ĘäĘýľÝµÄ¸ß¶Č
;;;5707   ,unsigned short P_W        // ÍĽĆ¬µÄżí¶Č
;;;5708   ,unsigned long Addr        // FlashµÄµŘÖ·
;;;5709   )
;;;5710   {  
00302c  4604              MOV      r4,r0
00302e  e9ddab0b          LDRD     r10,r11,[sp,#0x2c]
003032  e9dd8909          LDRD     r8,r9,[sp,#0x24]
003036  460d              MOV      r5,r1
003038  4616              MOV      r6,r2
00303a  461f              MOV      r7,r3
;;;5711   
;;;5712     Enable_SFlash_SPI();									          // ĘąÄÜSPIą¦ÄÜ
00303c  f7fffffe          BL       Enable_SFlash_SPI
;;;5713     if(SCS == 0)	Select_SFI_0();										// ŃˇÔńÍâąŇµÄSPI0
003040  b90c              CBNZ     r4,|L1.12358|
003042  f7fffffe          BL       Select_SFI_0
                  |L1.12358|
;;;5714     if(SCS == 1)	Select_SFI_1();									  // ŃˇÔńÍâąŇµÄSPI1
003046  2c01              CMP      r4,#1
003048  d101              BNE      |L1.12366|
00304a  f7fffffe          BL       Select_SFI_1
                  |L1.12366|
;;;5715    
;;;5716   										   
;;;5717     Select_SFI_DMA_Mode();								          // ÉčÖĂSPIµÄDMAÄŁĘ˝
00304e  f7fffffe          BL       Select_SFI_DMA_Mode
;;;5718     SPI_Clock_Period(Clk);                          // ÉčÖĂSPIµÄ·ÖĆµĎµĘý
003052  4628              MOV      r0,r5
003054  f7fffffe          BL       SPI_Clock_Period
;;;5719   
;;;5720     Goto_Pixel_XY(X1,Y1);									          // ÔÚÍĽĐÎÄŁĘ˝ÖĐÉčÖĂÄÚ´ćµÄÎ»ÖĂ
003058  4639              MOV      r1,r7
00305a  4630              MOV      r0,r6
00305c  f7fffffe          BL       Goto_Pixel_XY
;;;5721     SFI_DMA_Destination_Upper_Left_Corner(X1,Y1);		// DMA´«ĘäµÄÄżµÄµŘŁ¨ÄÚ´ćµÄÎ»ÖĂŁ©
003060  4639              MOV      r1,r7
003062  4630              MOV      r0,r6
003064  f7fffffe          BL       SFI_DMA_Destination_Upper_Left_Corner
;;;5722     SFI_DMA_Transfer_Width_Height(X_W,Y_H);				  // ÉčÖĂżéĘýľÝµÄżí¶ČşÍ¸ß¶Č
003068  4649              MOV      r1,r9
00306a  4640              MOV      r0,r8
00306c  f7fffffe          BL       SFI_DMA_Transfer_Width_Height
;;;5723     SFI_DMA_Source_Width(P_W);							        // ÉčÖĂÔ´ĘýľÝµÄżí¶Č
003070  4650              MOV      r0,r10
003072  f7fffffe          BL       SFI_DMA_Source_Width
;;;5724     SFI_DMA_Source_Start_Address(Addr); 					  // ÉčÖĂÔ´ĘýľÝÔÚFlashµÄµŘÖ·
003076  4658              MOV      r0,r11
003078  f7fffffe          BL       SFI_DMA_Source_Start_Address
;;;5725   
;;;5726     Start_SFI_DMA();									              // żŞĘĽDMA´«Ęä
00307c  f7fffffe          BL       Start_SFI_DMA
;;;5727     Check_Busy_SFI_DMA();								            // Ľě˛âDMAĘÇ·ń´«ĘäÍęłÉ
003080  e8bd4ff0          POP      {r4-r11,lr}
003084  f7ffbffe          B.W      Check_Busy_SFI_DMA
;;;5728   }
;;;5729   
                          ENDP

                  LT768_DMA_32bit_Block PROC
;;;5731   
;;;5732   void LT768_DMA_32bit_Block
003088  e92d4ff0          PUSH     {r4-r11,lr}
;;;5733   (
;;;5734    unsigned char SCS         // ŃˇÔńÍâąŇµÄSPI   : SCSŁş0       SCSŁş1
;;;5735   ,unsigned char Clk         // SPIĘ±ÖÓ·ÖĆµ˛ÎĘý : SPI Clock = System Clock /{(Clk+1)*2}
;;;5736   ,unsigned short X1         // ÄÚ´ćX1µÄÎ»ÖĂ
;;;5737   ,unsigned short Y1         // ÄÚ´ćY1µÄÎ»ÖĂ
;;;5738   ,unsigned short X_W        // DMA´«ĘäĘýľÝµÄżí¶Č
;;;5739   ,unsigned short Y_H        // DMA´«ĘäĘýľÝµÄ¸ß¶Č
;;;5740   ,unsigned short P_W        // ÍĽĆ¬µÄżí¶Č
;;;5741   ,unsigned long Addr        // FlashµÄµŘÖ·
;;;5742   )
;;;5743   {  
00308c  4604              MOV      r4,r0
00308e  e9ddab0b          LDRD     r10,r11,[sp,#0x2c]
003092  e9dd8909          LDRD     r8,r9,[sp,#0x24]
003096  460d              MOV      r5,r1
003098  4616              MOV      r6,r2
00309a  461f              MOV      r7,r3
;;;5744   
;;;5745     Enable_SFlash_SPI();									
00309c  f7fffffe          BL       Enable_SFlash_SPI
;;;5746     if(SCS == 0)	Select_SFI_0();										       
0030a0  b90c              CBNZ     r4,|L1.12454|
0030a2  f7fffffe          BL       Select_SFI_0
                  |L1.12454|
;;;5747     if(SCS == 1)	Select_SFI_1();										      
0030a6  2c01              CMP      r4,#1
0030a8  d101              BNE      |L1.12462|
0030aa  f7fffffe          BL       Select_SFI_1
                  |L1.12462|
;;;5748      
;;;5749     Select_SFI_DMA_Mode();								  
0030ae  f7fffffe          BL       Select_SFI_DMA_Mode
;;;5750     SPI_Clock_Period(Clk);
0030b2  4628              MOV      r0,r5
0030b4  f7fffffe          BL       SPI_Clock_Period
;;;5751   
;;;5752     Select_SFI_32bit_Address();							  
0030b8  f7fffffe          BL       Select_SFI_32bit_Address
;;;5753   
;;;5754     Goto_Pixel_XY(X1,Y1);									  
0030bc  4639              MOV      r1,r7
0030be  4630              MOV      r0,r6
0030c0  f7fffffe          BL       Goto_Pixel_XY
;;;5755     SFI_DMA_Destination_Upper_Left_Corner(X1,Y1);			
0030c4  4639              MOV      r1,r7
0030c6  4630              MOV      r0,r6
0030c8  f7fffffe          BL       SFI_DMA_Destination_Upper_Left_Corner
;;;5756     SFI_DMA_Transfer_Width_Height(X_W,Y_H);				  
0030cc  4649              MOV      r1,r9
0030ce  4640              MOV      r0,r8
0030d0  f7fffffe          BL       SFI_DMA_Transfer_Width_Height
;;;5757     SFI_DMA_Source_Width(P_W);							  
0030d4  4650              MOV      r0,r10
0030d6  f7fffffe          BL       SFI_DMA_Source_Width
;;;5758     SFI_DMA_Source_Start_Address(Addr); 						 
0030da  4658              MOV      r0,r11
0030dc  f7fffffe          BL       SFI_DMA_Source_Start_Address
;;;5759   
;;;5760     Start_SFI_DMA();									  
0030e0  f7fffffe          BL       Start_SFI_DMA
;;;5761     Check_Busy_SFI_DMA();								 
0030e4  f7fffffe          BL       Check_Busy_SFI_DMA
;;;5762     Select_SFI_24bit_Address();
0030e8  e8bd4ff0          POP      {r4-r11,lr}
0030ec  f7ffbffe          B.W      Select_SFI_24bit_Address
;;;5763   }
;;;5764   
                          ENDP

                  LT768_Select_Internal_Font_Init PROC
;;;5771   /* ŃˇÔńÄÚ˛żĽŻłÉ×ÖżâłőĘĽ»Ż */
;;;5772   void LT768_Select_Internal_Font_Init
0030f0  b570              PUSH     {r4-r6,lr}
;;;5773   (
;;;5774    unsigned char Size         // ÉčÖĂ×ÖĚĺ´óĐˇ  16Łş16*16     24:24*24    32:32*32
;;;5775   ,unsigned char XxN          // ×ÖĚĺµÄżí¶Č·Ĺ´ó±¶ĘýŁş1~4
;;;5776   ,unsigned char YxN          // ×ÖĚĺµÄ¸ß¶Č·Ĺ´ó±¶ĘýŁş1~4
;;;5777   ,unsigned char ChromaKey    // 0Łş×ÖĚĺ±łľ°É«Í¸Ă÷    1ŁşżÉŇÔÉčÖĂ×ÖĚĺµÄ±łľ°É«
;;;5778   ,unsigned char Alignment    // 0Łş˛»×ÖĚĺ˛»¶ÔĆë      1Łş×ÖĚĺ¶ÔĆë
;;;5779   )
;;;5780   {
0030f2  4605              MOV      r5,r0
0030f4  9e04              LDR      r6,[sp,#0x10]
0030f6  460c              MOV      r4,r1
;;;5781   	if(Size==16)	Font_Select_8x16_16x16();
0030f8  2d10              CMP      r5,#0x10
0030fa  d101              BNE      |L1.12544|
0030fc  f7fffffe          BL       Font_Select_8x16_16x16
                  |L1.12544|
;;;5782   	if(Size==24)	Font_Select_12x24_24x24();
003100  2d18              CMP      r5,#0x18
003102  d101              BNE      |L1.12552|
003104  f7fffffe          BL       Font_Select_12x24_24x24
                  |L1.12552|
;;;5783   	if(Size==32)	Font_Select_16x32_32x32();
003108  2d20              CMP      r5,#0x20
00310a  d101              BNE      |L1.12560|
00310c  f7fffffe          BL       Font_Select_16x32_32x32
                  |L1.12560|
;;;5784   
;;;5785   	//(*)
;;;5786   	if(XxN==1)	Font_Width_X1();
003110  2c01              CMP      r4,#1
003112  d101              BNE      |L1.12568|
003114  f7fffffe          BL       Font_Width_X1
                  |L1.12568|
;;;5787   	if(XxN==2)	Font_Width_X2();
003118  2c02              CMP      r4,#2
00311a  d101              BNE      |L1.12576|
00311c  f7fffffe          BL       Font_Width_X2
                  |L1.12576|
;;;5788   	if(XxN==3)	Font_Width_X3();
003120  2c03              CMP      r4,#3
003122  d101              BNE      |L1.12584|
003124  f7fffffe          BL       Font_Width_X3
                  |L1.12584|
;;;5789   	if(XxN==4)	Font_Width_X4();
003128  2c04              CMP      r4,#4
00312a  d101              BNE      |L1.12592|
00312c  f7fffffe          BL       Font_Width_X4
                  |L1.12592|
;;;5790   
;;;5791   	//(*)	
;;;5792   	if(YxN==1)	Font_Height_X1();
003130  2a01              CMP      r2,#1
003132  d101              BNE      |L1.12600|
003134  f7fffffe          BL       Font_Height_X1
                  |L1.12600|
;;;5793   	if(YxN==2)	Font_Height_X2();
003138  2a02              CMP      r2,#2
00313a  d101              BNE      |L1.12608|
00313c  f7fffffe          BL       Font_Height_X2
                  |L1.12608|
;;;5794   	if(YxN==3)	Font_Height_X3();
003140  2a03              CMP      r2,#3
003142  d101              BNE      |L1.12616|
003144  f7fffffe          BL       Font_Height_X3
                  |L1.12616|
;;;5795   	if(YxN==4)	Font_Height_X4();
003148  2a04              CMP      r2,#4
00314a  d101              BNE      |L1.12624|
00314c  f7fffffe          BL       Font_Height_X4
                  |L1.12624|
;;;5796   
;;;5797   	//(*)
;;;5798   	if(ChromaKey==0)	Font_Background_select_Color();	
003150  b90b              CBNZ     r3,|L1.12630|
003152  f7fffffe          BL       Font_Background_select_Color
                  |L1.12630|
;;;5799   	if(ChromaKey==1)	Font_Background_select_Transparency();	
003156  2b01              CMP      r3,#1
003158  d101              BNE      |L1.12638|
00315a  f7fffffe          BL       Font_Background_select_Transparency
                  |L1.12638|
;;;5800   
;;;5801   	//(*)
;;;5802   	if(Alignment==0)	Disable_Font_Alignment();
00315e  b90e              CBNZ     r6,|L1.12644|
003160  f7fffffe          BL       Disable_Font_Alignment
                  |L1.12644|
;;;5803   	if(Alignment==1)	Enable_Font_Alignment();
003164  2e01              CMP      r6,#1
003166  d103              BNE      |L1.12656|
003168  e8bd4070          POP      {r4-r6,lr}
00316c  f7ffbffe          B.W      Enable_Font_Alignment
                  |L1.12656|
;;;5804   }
003170  bd70              POP      {r4-r6,pc}
;;;5805   
                          ENDP

                  LT768_Print_Internal_Font_String PROC
;;;5807   /* ĎÔĘľÄÚ˛żĽŻłÉ×ÖĚĺ */
;;;5808   void LT768_Print_Internal_Font_String
003172  b570              PUSH     {r4-r6,lr}
;;;5809   (
;;;5810    unsigned short x               // ×ÖĚĺżŞĘĽĎÔĘľµÄxÎ»ÖĂ
;;;5811   ,unsigned short y               // ×ÖĚĺżŞĘĽĎÔĘľµÄyÎ»ÖĂ
;;;5812   ,unsigned long FontColor        // ×ÖĚĺµÄŃŐÉ«
;;;5813   ,unsigned long BackGroundColor  // ×ÖĚĺµÄ±łľ°É«Ł¨×˘ŇâŁşµ±×ÖĚĺ±łľ°łőĘĽ»ŻłÉÍ¸Ă÷Ę±Ł¬ÉčÖĂ¸ĂÖµÎŢĐ§Ł©
;;;5814   ,char *c                        // ĘýľÝ»şłĺµÄĘ×µŘÖ·
;;;5815   )
;;;5816   {
003174  4604              MOV      r4,r0
003176  460d              MOV      r5,r1
003178  9e04              LDR      r6,[sp,#0x10]
;;;5817     Text_Mode();
00317a  f7fffffe          BL       Text_Mode
;;;5818   	CGROM_Select_Internal_CGROM();
00317e  f7fffffe          BL       CGROM_Select_Internal_CGROM
;;;5819     Foreground_color_65k(FontColor);
003182  b290              UXTH     r0,r2
003184  f7fffffe          BL       Foreground_color_65k
;;;5820   	Background_color_65k(BackGroundColor);
003188  b298              UXTH     r0,r3
00318a  f7fffffe          BL       Background_color_65k
;;;5821   	Goto_Text_XY(x,y);
00318e  4629              MOV      r1,r5
003190  4620              MOV      r0,r4
003192  f7fffffe          BL       Goto_Text_XY
;;;5822   	Show_String(c);
003196  4630              MOV      r0,r6
003198  e8bd4070          POP      {r4-r6,lr}
00319c  f7ffbffe          B.W      Show_String
;;;5823   }
;;;5824   
                          ENDP

                  LT768_Select_Outside_Font_Init PROC
;;;5826   /* ŃˇÔńÍâ˛żĽŻłÉ×ÖżâłőĘĽ»Ż */
;;;5827   void LT768_Select_Outside_Font_Init
0031a0  e92d4ff8          PUSH     {r3-r11,lr}
;;;5828   (
;;;5829    unsigned char SCS           // ŃˇÔńÍâąŇµÄSPI   : SCSŁş0       SCSŁş1
;;;5830   ,unsigned char Clk           // SPIĘ±ÖÓ·ÖĆµ˛ÎĘý : SPI Clock = System Clock /{(Clk+1)*2}
;;;5831   ,unsigned long FlashAddr     // Ô´µŘÖ·(Flash)
;;;5832   ,unsigned long MemoryAddr    // ÄżµÄµŘÖ·(SDRAM)
;;;5833   ,unsigned long Num           // ×ÖżâµÄĘýľÝÁż´óĐˇ
;;;5834   ,unsigned char Size          // ÉčÖĂ×ÖĚĺ´óĐˇ  16Łş16*16     24:24*24    32:32*32
;;;5835   ,unsigned char XxN           // ×ÖĚĺµÄżí¶Č·Ĺ´ó±¶ĘýŁş1~4
;;;5836   ,unsigned char YxN           // ×ÖĚĺµÄ¸ß¶Č·Ĺ´ó±¶ĘýŁş1~4
;;;5837   ,unsigned char ChromaKey     // 0Łş×ÖĚĺ±łľ°É«Í¸Ă÷    1ŁşżÉŇÔÉčÖĂ×ÖĚĺµÄ±łľ°É«
;;;5838   ,unsigned char Alignment     // 0Łş˛»×ÖĚĺ˛»¶ÔĆë      1Łş×ÖĚĺ¶ÔĆë
;;;5839   )
;;;5840   {
0031a4  ac0c              ADD      r4,sp,#0x30
0031a6  4699              MOV      r9,r3
0031a8  e89401b0          LDM      r4,{r4,r5,r7,r8}
0031ac  e9dd360a          LDRD     r3,r6,[sp,#0x28]
0031b0  4682              MOV      r10,r0
0031b2  468b              MOV      r11,r1
;;;5841   	if(Size==16)	Font_Select_8x16_16x16();
0031b4  2e10              CMP      r6,#0x10
0031b6  d101              BNE      |L1.12732|
0031b8  f7fffffe          BL       Font_Select_8x16_16x16
                  |L1.12732|
;;;5842   	if(Size==24)	Font_Select_12x24_24x24();
0031bc  2e18              CMP      r6,#0x18
0031be  d101              BNE      |L1.12740|
0031c0  f7fffffe          BL       Font_Select_12x24_24x24
                  |L1.12740|
;;;5843   	if(Size==32)	Font_Select_16x32_32x32();
0031c4  2e20              CMP      r6,#0x20
0031c6  d101              BNE      |L1.12748|
0031c8  f7fffffe          BL       Font_Select_16x32_32x32
                  |L1.12748|
;;;5844   
;;;5845   	//(*)
;;;5846   	if(XxN==1)	Font_Width_X1();
0031cc  2c01              CMP      r4,#1
0031ce  d101              BNE      |L1.12756|
0031d0  f7fffffe          BL       Font_Width_X1
                  |L1.12756|
;;;5847   	if(XxN==2)	Font_Width_X2();
0031d4  2c02              CMP      r4,#2
0031d6  d101              BNE      |L1.12764|
0031d8  f7fffffe          BL       Font_Width_X2
                  |L1.12764|
;;;5848   	if(XxN==3)	Font_Width_X3();
0031dc  2c03              CMP      r4,#3
0031de  d101              BNE      |L1.12772|
0031e0  f7fffffe          BL       Font_Width_X3
                  |L1.12772|
;;;5849   	if(XxN==4)	Font_Width_X4();
0031e4  2c04              CMP      r4,#4
0031e6  d101              BNE      |L1.12780|
0031e8  f7fffffe          BL       Font_Width_X4
                  |L1.12780|
;;;5850   
;;;5851   	//(*)	
;;;5852   	if(YxN==1)	Font_Height_X1();
0031ec  2d01              CMP      r5,#1
0031ee  d101              BNE      |L1.12788|
0031f0  f7fffffe          BL       Font_Height_X1
                  |L1.12788|
;;;5853   	if(YxN==2)	Font_Height_X2();
0031f4  2d02              CMP      r5,#2
0031f6  d101              BNE      |L1.12796|
0031f8  f7fffffe          BL       Font_Height_X2
                  |L1.12796|
;;;5854   	if(YxN==3)	Font_Height_X3();
0031fc  2d03              CMP      r5,#3
0031fe  d101              BNE      |L1.12804|
003200  f7fffffe          BL       Font_Height_X3
                  |L1.12804|
;;;5855   	if(YxN==4)	Font_Height_X4();
003204  2d04              CMP      r5,#4
003206  d101              BNE      |L1.12812|
003208  f7fffffe          BL       Font_Height_X4
                  |L1.12812|
;;;5856   
;;;5857   	//(*)
;;;5858   	if(ChromaKey==0)	Font_Background_select_Color();	
00320c  b90f              CBNZ     r7,|L1.12818|
00320e  f7fffffe          BL       Font_Background_select_Color
                  |L1.12818|
;;;5859   	if(ChromaKey==1)	Font_Background_select_Transparency();	
003212  2f01              CMP      r7,#1
003214  d101              BNE      |L1.12826|
003216  f7fffffe          BL       Font_Background_select_Transparency
                  |L1.12826|
;;;5860   
;;;5861   	//(*)
;;;5862   	if(Alignment==0)	Disable_Font_Alignment();
00321a  f1b80f00          CMP      r8,#0
00321e  d101              BNE      |L1.12836|
003220  f7fffffe          BL       Disable_Font_Alignment
                  |L1.12836|
;;;5863   	if(Alignment==1)	Enable_Font_Alignment();	
003224  f1b80f01          CMP      r8,#1
003228  d101              BNE      |L1.12846|
00322a  f7fffffe          BL       Enable_Font_Alignment
                  |L1.12846|
;;;5864   	
;;;5865   	LT768_DMA_24bit_Linear(SCS,Clk,FlashAddr,MemoryAddr,Num);
00322e  9300              STR      r3,[sp,#0]
003230  464b              MOV      r3,r9
003232  4659              MOV      r1,r11
003234  4650              MOV      r0,r10
003236  f7fffffe          BL       LT768_DMA_24bit_Linear
;;;5866   	CGRAM_Start_address(MemoryAddr);        
00323a  4648              MOV      r0,r9
00323c  e8bd4ff8          POP      {r3-r11,lr}
003240  f7ffbffe          B.W      CGRAM_Start_address
;;;5867   }
;;;5868   
                          ENDP

                  LT768_Print_Outside_Font_String PROC
;;;5871   /* ĎÔĘľÍâ˛żĽ°ÄÚ˛żĽŻłÉ×ÖĚĺ */
;;;5872   void LT768_Print_Outside_Font_String
003244  b5f0              PUSH     {r4-r7,lr}
;;;5873   (
;;;5874    unsigned short x               // ×ÖĚĺżŞĘĽĎÔĘľµÄxÎ»ÖĂ
;;;5875   ,unsigned short y               // ×ÖĚĺżŞĘĽĎÔĘľµÄyÎ»ÖĂ
;;;5876   ,unsigned long FontColor        // ×ÖĚĺµÄŃŐÉ«
;;;5877   ,unsigned long BackGroundColor  // ×ÖĚĺµÄ±łľ°É«Ł¨×˘ŇâŁşµ±×ÖĚĺ±łľ°łőĘĽ»ŻłÉÍ¸Ă÷Ę±Ł¬ÉčÖĂ¸ĂÖµÎŢĐ§Ł©
;;;5878   ,unsigned char *c               // ĘýľÝ»şłĺµÄĘ×µŘÖ·
;;;5879   )
;;;5880   {
003246  4606              MOV      r6,r0
003248  9d05              LDR      r5,[sp,#0x14]
00324a  460f              MOV      r7,r1
;;;5881   	unsigned short temp_H = 0;
;;;5882   	unsigned short temp_L = 0;
;;;5883   	unsigned short temp = 0;
;;;5884   	unsigned long i = 0;
00324c  2400              MOVS     r4,#0
;;;5885   	
;;;5886   	Text_Mode();
00324e  f7fffffe          BL       Text_Mode
;;;5887   	Font_Select_UserDefine_Mode();
003252  f7fffffe          BL       Font_Select_UserDefine_Mode
;;;5888     Foreground_color_65k(FontColor);
003256  b290              UXTH     r0,r2
003258  f7fffffe          BL       Foreground_color_65k
;;;5889   	Background_color_65k(BackGroundColor);
00325c  b298              UXTH     r0,r3
00325e  f7fffffe          BL       Background_color_65k
;;;5890   	Goto_Text_XY(x,y);
003262  4639              MOV      r1,r7
003264  4630              MOV      r0,r6
003266  f7fffffe          BL       Goto_Text_XY
;;;5891   	
;;;5892   	while(c[i] != '\0')
00326a  e02a              B        |L1.12994|
                  |L1.12908|
;;;5893     { 
;;;5894   		if(c[i] < 0xa1)
00326c  28a1              CMP      r0,#0xa1
00326e  d20b              BCS      |L1.12936|
;;;5895   		{
;;;5896   			CGROM_Select_Internal_CGROM();   // ÄÚ˛żCGROMÎŞ×Ö·űŔ´Ô´
003270  f7fffffe          BL       CGROM_Select_Internal_CGROM
;;;5897   			LCD_CmdWrite(0x04);
003274  2004              MOVS     r0,#4
003276  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_CmdWrite
;;;5898   			LCD_DataWrite(c[i]);
00327a  5d28              LDRB     r0,[r5,r4]
00327c  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_DataWrite
;;;5899   			Check_Mem_WR_FIFO_not_Full();  
003280  f7fffffe          BL       Check_Mem_WR_FIFO_not_Full
;;;5900   			i += 1;
003284  1c64              ADDS     r4,r4,#1
003286  e01c              B        |L1.12994|
                  |L1.12936|
;;;5901   		}
;;;5902   		else
;;;5903   		{
;;;5904   			Font_Select_UserDefine_Mode();   // ×Ô¶¨Ňĺ×Öżâ
003288  f7fffffe          BL       Font_Select_UserDefine_Mode
;;;5905   			LCD_CmdWrite(0x04);
00328c  2004              MOVS     r0,#4
00328e  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_CmdWrite
;;;5906   			temp_H = ((c[i] - 0xa1) & 0x00ff) * 94;
003292  5d28              LDRB     r0,[r5,r4]
003294  38a1              SUBS     r0,r0,#0xa1
003296  b2c0              UXTB     r0,r0
003298  215e              MOVS     r1,#0x5e
00329a  fb10f101          SMULBB   r1,r0,r1
;;;5907   			temp_L = c[i+1] - 0xa1;
00329e  1928              ADDS     r0,r5,r4
0032a0  7840              LDRB     r0,[r0,#1]
0032a2  38a1              SUBS     r0,r0,#0xa1
;;;5908   			temp = temp_H + temp_L + 0x8000;
0032a4  4408              ADD      r0,r0,r1
0032a6  f5004000          ADD      r0,r0,#0x8000
0032aa  b282              UXTH     r2,r0
;;;5909   			LCD_DataWrite((temp>>8)&0xff);
0032ac  0a10              LSRS     r0,r2,#8
0032ae  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_DataWrite
;;;5910   			Check_Mem_WR_FIFO_not_Full();
0032b2  f7fffffe          BL       Check_Mem_WR_FIFO_not_Full
;;;5911   			LCD_DataWrite(temp&0xff);
0032b6  b2d0              UXTB     r0,r2
0032b8  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_DataWrite
;;;5912   			Check_Mem_WR_FIFO_not_Full();
0032bc  f7fffffe          BL       Check_Mem_WR_FIFO_not_Full
;;;5913   			i += 2;		
0032c0  1ca4              ADDS     r4,r4,#2
                  |L1.12994|
0032c2  5d28              LDRB     r0,[r5,r4]            ;5892
0032c4  2800              CMP      r0,#0                 ;5892
0032c6  d1d1              BNE      |L1.12908|
;;;5914   		}
;;;5915   	}
;;;5916   	
;;;5917     Check_2D_Busy();
0032c8  f7fffffe          BL       Check_2D_Busy
;;;5918   
;;;5919     Graphic_Mode(); //back to graphic mode;ÍĽĐÎÄŁĘ˝
0032cc  e8bd40f0          POP      {r4-r7,lr}
0032d0  f7ffbffe          B.W      Graphic_Mode
;;;5920   }
;;;5921   
                          ENDP

                  LT768_Text_cursor_Init PROC
;;;5924   
;;;5925   void LT768_Text_cursor_Init
0032d4  b570              PUSH     {r4-r6,lr}
;;;5926   (
;;;5927    unsigned char On_Off_Blinking         // 0Łş˝űÖąąâ±ęÉÁË¸   1ŁşĘąÄÜąâ±ęÉÁË¸
;;;5928   ,unsigned short Blinking_Time          // ÉčÖĂÎÄ×Öąâ±ęÉÁË¸Ę±Ľä
;;;5929   ,unsigned short X_W                    // ÎÄ×Öąâ±ęË®Ć˝´óĐˇ
;;;5930   ,unsigned short Y_W                    // ÎÄ×Öąâ±ę´ąÖ±´óĐˇ
;;;5931   )
;;;5932   {
0032d6  4604              MOV      r4,r0
0032d8  460d              MOV      r5,r1
0032da  4616              MOV      r6,r2
;;;5933   	if(On_Off_Blinking == 0)	Disable_Text_Cursor_Blinking();
0032dc  2c00              CMP      r4,#0
0032de  d101              BNE      |L1.13028|
0032e0  f7fffffe          BL       Disable_Text_Cursor_Blinking
                  |L1.13028|
;;;5934   	if(On_Off_Blinking == 1)	Enable_Text_Cursor_Blinking();
0032e4  2c01              CMP      r4,#1
0032e6  d101              BNE      |L1.13036|
0032e8  f7fffffe          BL       Enable_Text_Cursor_Blinking
                  |L1.13036|
;;;5935   
;;;5936     Blinking_Time_Frames(Blinking_Time); 
0032ec  b2e8              UXTB     r0,r5
0032ee  f7fffffe          BL       Blinking_Time_Frames
;;;5937   	
;;;5938     //[3E][3Fh]
;;;5939     Text_Cursor_H_V(X_W,Y_W);
0032f2  4619              MOV      r1,r3
0032f4  4630              MOV      r0,r6
0032f6  f7fffffe          BL       Text_Cursor_H_V
;;;5940   	
;;;5941   	Enable_Text_Cursor();
0032fa  e8bd4070          POP      {r4-r6,lr}
0032fe  f7ffbffe          B.W      Enable_Text_Cursor
;;;5942   }
;;;5943   
                          ENDP

                  LT768_Enable_Text_Cursor PROC
;;;5944   
;;;5945   void LT768_Enable_Text_Cursor(void)
003302  f7ffbffe          B.W      Enable_Text_Cursor
;;;5946   {
;;;5947   	Enable_Text_Cursor();
;;;5948   }
;;;5949   
                          ENDP

                  LT768_Disable_Text_Cursor PROC
;;;5950   
;;;5951   void LT768_Disable_Text_Cursor(void)
003306  f7ffbffe          B.W      Disable_Text_Cursor
;;;5952   {
;;;5953   	Disable_Text_Cursor();
;;;5954   }
;;;5955   
                          ENDP

                  LT768_Graphic_cursor_Init PROC
;;;5956   
;;;5957   void LT768_Graphic_cursor_Init
00330a  b5f0              PUSH     {r4-r7,lr}
;;;5958   (
;;;5959    unsigned char Cursor_N                  // ŃˇÔńąâ±ę   1:ąâ±ę1   2:ąâ±ę2   3:ąâ±ę3  4:ąâ±ę4
;;;5960   ,unsigned char Color1                    // ŃŐÉ«1
;;;5961   ,unsigned char Color2                    // ŃŐÉ«2
;;;5962   ,unsigned short X_Pos                    // ĎÔĘľ×ř±ęX
;;;5963   ,unsigned short Y_Pos                    // ĎÔĘľ×ř±ęY
;;;5964   ,unsigned char *Cursor_Buf               // ąâ±ęĘýľÝµÄ»şłĺĘ×µŘÖ·
;;;5965   )
;;;5966   {
00330c  4616              MOV      r6,r2
00330e  e9dd7205          LDRD     r7,r2,[sp,#0x14]
003312  4604              MOV      r4,r0
003314  460d              MOV      r5,r1
;;;5967   	unsigned int i ;
;;;5968   	
;;;5969   	Memory_Select_Graphic_Cursor_RAM(); 
003316  f7fffffe          BL       Memory_Select_Graphic_Cursor_RAM
;;;5970   	Graphic_Mode();
00331a  f7fffffe          BL       Graphic_Mode
;;;5971   	
;;;5972   	switch(Cursor_N)
00331e  2c01              CMP      r4,#1
003320  d006              BEQ      |L1.13104|
003322  2c02              CMP      r4,#2
003324  d007              BEQ      |L1.13110|
003326  2c03              CMP      r4,#3
003328  d008              BEQ      |L1.13116|
00332a  2c04              CMP      r4,#4
00332c  d10b              BNE      |L1.13126|
00332e  e008              B        |L1.13122|
                  |L1.13104|
;;;5973   	{
;;;5974   		case 1:	Select_Graphic_Cursor_1();	break;
003330  f7fffffe          BL       Select_Graphic_Cursor_1
003334  e007              B        |L1.13126|
                  |L1.13110|
;;;5975   		case 2:	Select_Graphic_Cursor_2();	break;
003336  f7fffffe          BL       Select_Graphic_Cursor_2
00333a  e004              B        |L1.13126|
                  |L1.13116|
;;;5976   		case 3:	Select_Graphic_Cursor_3();	break;
00333c  f7fffffe          BL       Select_Graphic_Cursor_3
003340  e001              B        |L1.13126|
                  |L1.13122|
;;;5977   		case 4:	Select_Graphic_Cursor_4();	break;
003342  f7fffffe          BL       Select_Graphic_Cursor_4
                  |L1.13126|
;;;5978   		default:														break;
;;;5979   	}
;;;5980   	
;;;5981   	LCD_CmdWrite(0x04);
003346  2004              MOVS     r0,#4
003348  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_CmdWrite
;;;5982     for(i=0;i<256;i++)
00334c  2400              MOVS     r4,#0
                  |L1.13134|
;;;5983     {					 
;;;5984   		LCD_DataWrite(Cursor_Buf[i]);
00334e  5d10              LDRB     r0,[r2,r4]
003350  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_DataWrite
003354  1c64              ADDS     r4,r4,#1              ;5982
003356  2cff              CMP      r4,#0xff              ;5982
003358  d9f9              BLS      |L1.13134|
;;;5985     }
;;;5986   	
;;;5987   	Memory_Select_SDRAM();//Đ´ÍęşóÇĐ»ŘSDRAM
00335a  f7fffffe          BL       Memory_Select_SDRAM
;;;5988   	Set_Graphic_Cursor_Color_1(Color1);
00335e  4628              MOV      r0,r5
003360  f7fffffe          BL       Set_Graphic_Cursor_Color_1
;;;5989     Set_Graphic_Cursor_Color_2(Color2);
003364  4630              MOV      r0,r6
003366  f7fffffe          BL       Set_Graphic_Cursor_Color_2
;;;5990     Graphic_Cursor_XY(X_Pos,Y_Pos);
00336a  4639              MOV      r1,r7
00336c  4618              MOV      r0,r3
00336e  f7fffffe          BL       Graphic_Cursor_XY
;;;5991   	
;;;5992   	Enable_Graphic_Cursor();
003372  e8bd40f0          POP      {r4-r7,lr}
003376  f7ffbffe          B.W      Enable_Graphic_Cursor
;;;5993   }
;;;5994   
                          ENDP

                  LT768_Set_Graphic_cursor_Pos PROC
;;;5995   
;;;5996   void LT768_Set_Graphic_cursor_Pos
00337a  b510              PUSH     {r4,lr}
;;;5997   (
;;;5998    unsigned char Cursor_N                  // ŃˇÔńąâ±ę   1:ąâ±ę1   2:ąâ±ę2   3:ąâ±ę3  4:ąâ±ę4
;;;5999   ,unsigned short X_Pos                    // ĎÔĘľ×ř±ęX
;;;6000   ,unsigned short Y_Pos                    // ĎÔĘľ×ř±ęY
;;;6001   )
;;;6002   {
00337c  4604              MOV      r4,r0
00337e  4608              MOV      r0,r1
003380  4611              MOV      r1,r2
;;;6003   	Graphic_Cursor_XY(X_Pos,Y_Pos);
003382  f7fffffe          BL       Graphic_Cursor_XY
;;;6004   	switch(Cursor_N)
003386  2c01              CMP      r4,#1
003388  d009              BEQ      |L1.13214|
00338a  2c02              CMP      r4,#2
00338c  d00b              BEQ      |L1.13222|
00338e  2c03              CMP      r4,#3
003390  d00d              BEQ      |L1.13230|
003392  2c04              CMP      r4,#4
003394  d10f              BNE      |L1.13238|
;;;6005   	{
;;;6006   		case 1:	Select_Graphic_Cursor_1();	break;
;;;6007   		case 2:	Select_Graphic_Cursor_2();	break;
;;;6008   		case 3:	Select_Graphic_Cursor_3();	break;
;;;6009   		case 4:	Select_Graphic_Cursor_4();	break;
003396  e8bd4010          POP      {r4,lr}
00339a  f7ffbffe          B.W      Select_Graphic_Cursor_4
                  |L1.13214|
00339e  e8bd4010          POP      {r4,lr}               ;6006
0033a2  f7ffbffe          B.W      Select_Graphic_Cursor_1
                  |L1.13222|
0033a6  e8bd4010          POP      {r4,lr}               ;6007
0033aa  f7ffbffe          B.W      Select_Graphic_Cursor_2
                  |L1.13230|
0033ae  e8bd4010          POP      {r4,lr}               ;6008
0033b2  f7ffbffe          B.W      Select_Graphic_Cursor_3
                  |L1.13238|
;;;6010   		default:														break;
;;;6011   	}
;;;6012   }
0033b6  bd10              POP      {r4,pc}
;;;6013   
                          ENDP
