                  LT768_PIP_Init PROC
;;;6028   
;;;6029   void LT768_PIP_Init
0033c0  e92d4ff0          PUSH     {r4-r11,lr}
;;;6030   (
;;;6031    unsigned char On_Off         // 0 : ˝űÖą PIP    1 : ĘąÄÜ PIP    2 : ±ŁłÖÔ­Ŕ´µÄ×´Ě¬
;;;6032   ,unsigned char Select_PIP     // 1 : ĘąÓĂ PIP1   2 : ĘąÓĂ PIP2
;;;6033   ,unsigned long PAddr          // PIPµÄżŞĘĽµŘÖ·
;;;6034   ,unsigned short XP            // PIP´°żÚµÄX×ř±ę,±ŘĐë±»4Őűłý
;;;6035   ,unsigned short YP            // PIP´°żÚµÄY×ř±ę,±ŘĐë±»4Őűłý
;;;6036   ,unsigned long ImageWidth     // µ×ÍĽµÄżí¶Č
;;;6037   ,unsigned short X_Dis         // ĎÔĘľ´°żÚµÄX×ř±ę
;;;6038   ,unsigned short Y_Dis         // ĎÔĘľ´°żÚµÄY×ř±ę
;;;6039   ,unsigned short X_W           // ĎÔĘľ´°żÚµÄżí¶ČŁ¬±ŘĐë±»4Őűłý
;;;6040   ,unsigned short Y_H           // ĎÔĘľ´°żÚµÄł¤¶ČŁ¬±ŘĐë±»4Őűłý
;;;6041   )
;;;6042   {
0033c4  4693              MOV      r11,r2
0033c6  aa0b              ADD      r2,sp,#0x2c
0033c8  461f              MOV      r7,r3
0033ca  e892060c          LDM      r2,{r2,r3,r9,r10}
0033ce  e9dd8609          LDRD     r8,r6,[sp,#0x24]
0033d2  4605              MOV      r5,r0
0033d4  460c              MOV      r4,r1
;;;6043   	if(Select_PIP == 1 )  
0033d6  2c01              CMP      r4,#1
0033d8  d103              BNE      |L1.13282|
;;;6044   	{
;;;6045   		Select_PIP1_Window_16bpp();
0033da  f7fffffe          BL       Select_PIP1_Window_16bpp
;;;6046   		Select_PIP1_Parameter();
0033de  f7fffffe          BL       Select_PIP1_Parameter
                  |L1.13282|
;;;6047   	}
;;;6048   	if(Select_PIP == 2 )  
0033e2  2c02              CMP      r4,#2
0033e4  d103              BNE      |L1.13294|
;;;6049   	{
;;;6050   		Select_PIP2_Window_16bpp();
0033e6  f7fffffe          BL       Select_PIP2_Window_16bpp
;;;6051   		Select_PIP2_Parameter();
0033ea  f7fffffe          BL       Select_PIP2_Parameter
                  |L1.13294|
;;;6052   	}
;;;6053   	
;;;6054   	PIP_Display_Start_XY(X_Dis,Y_Dis);
0033ee  4619              MOV      r1,r3
0033f0  4610              MOV      r0,r2
0033f2  f7fffffe          BL       PIP_Display_Start_XY
;;;6055   	PIP_Image_Start_Address(PAddr);
0033f6  4658              MOV      r0,r11
0033f8  f7fffffe          BL       PIP_Image_Start_Address
;;;6056   	PIP_Image_Width(ImageWidth);
0033fc  b2b0              UXTH     r0,r6
0033fe  f7fffffe          BL       PIP_Image_Width
;;;6057   	PIP_Window_Image_Start_XY(XP,YP);
003402  4641              MOV      r1,r8
003404  4638              MOV      r0,r7
003406  f7fffffe          BL       PIP_Window_Image_Start_XY
;;;6058   	PIP_Window_Width_Height(X_W,Y_H);
00340a  4651              MOV      r1,r10
00340c  4648              MOV      r0,r9
00340e  f7fffffe          BL       PIP_Window_Width_Height
;;;6059   
;;;6060   	if(On_Off == 0)
003412  b93d              CBNZ     r5,|L1.13348|
;;;6061     {
;;;6062     	if(Select_PIP == 1 )  Disable_PIP1();	
003414  2c01              CMP      r4,#1
003416  d101              BNE      |L1.13340|
003418  f7fffffe          BL       Disable_PIP1
                  |L1.13340|
;;;6063   		if(Select_PIP == 2 )  Disable_PIP2();
00341c  2c02              CMP      r4,#2
00341e  d101              BNE      |L1.13348|
003420  f7fffffe          BL       Disable_PIP2
                  |L1.13348|
;;;6064   	}
;;;6065   
;;;6066     if(On_Off == 1)
003424  2d01              CMP      r5,#1
003426  d109              BNE      |L1.13372|
;;;6067     {
;;;6068   		if(Select_PIP == 1 )  Enable_PIP1();	
003428  2c01              CMP      r4,#1
00342a  d101              BNE      |L1.13360|
00342c  f7fffffe          BL       Enable_PIP1
                  |L1.13360|
;;;6069   		if(Select_PIP == 2 )  Enable_PIP2();
003430  2c02              CMP      r4,#2
003432  d103              BNE      |L1.13372|
003434  e8bd4ff0          POP      {r4-r11,lr}
003438  f7ffbffe          B.W      Enable_PIP2
                  |L1.13372|
;;;6070   	}
;;;6071   }
00343c  e51b              B        |L1.11894|
;;;6072   
                          ENDP

                  LT768_Set_DisWindowPos PROC
;;;6073   
;;;6074   void LT768_Set_DisWindowPos
00343e  b530              PUSH     {r4,r5,lr}
;;;6075   (
;;;6076    unsigned char On_Off         // 0 : ˝űÖą PIP, 1 : ĘąÄÜ PIP, 2 : ±ŁłÖÔ­Ŕ´µÄ×´Ě¬
;;;6077   ,unsigned char Select_PIP     // 1 : ĘąÓĂ PIP1 , 2 : ĘąÓĂ PIP2
;;;6078   ,unsigned short X_Dis         // ĎÔĘľ´°żÚµÄX×ř±ę
;;;6079   ,unsigned short Y_Dis         // ĎÔĘľ´°żÚµÄY×ř±ę
;;;6080   )
;;;6081   {
003440  4605              MOV      r5,r0
003442  460c              MOV      r4,r1
;;;6082   	if(Select_PIP == 1 )  Select_PIP1_Parameter();
003444  2c01              CMP      r4,#1
003446  d101              BNE      |L1.13388|
003448  f7fffffe          BL       Select_PIP1_Parameter
                  |L1.13388|
;;;6083   	if(Select_PIP == 2 )  Select_PIP2_Parameter();
00344c  2c02              CMP      r4,#2
00344e  d101              BNE      |L1.13396|
003450  f7fffffe          BL       Select_PIP2_Parameter
                  |L1.13396|
;;;6084   	
;;;6085   	if(On_Off == 0)
003454  b93d              CBNZ     r5,|L1.13414|
;;;6086     {
;;;6087     	if(Select_PIP == 1 )  Disable_PIP1();	
003456  2c01              CMP      r4,#1
003458  d101              BNE      |L1.13406|
00345a  f7fffffe          BL       Disable_PIP1
                  |L1.13406|
;;;6088   		if(Select_PIP == 2 )  Disable_PIP2();
00345e  2c02              CMP      r4,#2
003460  d101              BNE      |L1.13414|
003462  f7fffffe          BL       Disable_PIP2
                  |L1.13414|
;;;6089   	}
;;;6090   
;;;6091     if(On_Off == 1)
003466  2d01              CMP      r5,#1
003468  d107              BNE      |L1.13434|
;;;6092     {
;;;6093   		if(Select_PIP == 1 )  Enable_PIP1();	
00346a  2c01              CMP      r4,#1
00346c  d101              BNE      |L1.13426|
00346e  f7fffffe          BL       Enable_PIP1
                  |L1.13426|
;;;6094   		if(Select_PIP == 2 )  Enable_PIP2();
003472  2c02              CMP      r4,#2
003474  d101              BNE      |L1.13434|
003476  f7fffffe          BL       Enable_PIP2
                  |L1.13434|
;;;6095   	}
;;;6096   	
;;;6097   	PIP_Display_Start_XY(X_Dis,Y_Dis);
00347a  e8bd4030          POP      {r4,r5,lr}
00347e  4619              MOV      r1,r3
003480  4610              MOV      r0,r2
003482  f7ffbffe          B.W      PIP_Display_Start_XY
;;;6098   	
;;;6099   }
;;;6100   
                          ENDP

                  BTE_Solid_Fill PROC
;;;6107   
;;;6108   void BTE_Solid_Fill
003486  e92d47f0          PUSH     {r4-r10,lr}
;;;6109   (
;;;6110    unsigned long Des_Addr           // ĚîłäµÄÄżµÄµŘÖ· 
;;;6111   ,unsigned short Des_W             // ÄżµÄµŘÖ·ÍĽĆ¬żí¶Č
;;;6112   ,unsigned short XDes              // x×ř±ę 
;;;6113   ,unsigned short YDes              // y×ř±ę 
;;;6114   ,unsigned short color             // ĚîłäµÄŃŐÉ« 
;;;6115   ,unsigned short X_W               // ĚîłäµÄł¤¶Č 
;;;6116   ,unsigned short Y_H               // ĚîłäµÄżí¶Č 
;;;6117   )            
;;;6118   {
00348a  4607              MOV      r7,r0
00348c  e9dd9a09          LDRD     r9,r10,[sp,#0x24]
003490  460c              MOV      r4,r1
003492  4615              MOV      r5,r2
003494  461e              MOV      r6,r3
003496  f8dd8020          LDR      r8,[sp,#0x20]
;;;6119   	
;;;6120   	BTE_Destination_Color_16bpp();
00349a  f7fffffe          BL       BTE_Destination_Color_16bpp
;;;6121   	
;;;6122     BTE_Destination_Memory_Start_Address(Des_Addr);
00349e  4638              MOV      r0,r7
0034a0  f7fffffe          BL       BTE_Destination_Memory_Start_Address
;;;6123       
;;;6124     BTE_Destination_Image_Width(Des_W);
0034a4  4620              MOV      r0,r4
0034a6  f7fffffe          BL       BTE_Destination_Image_Width
;;;6125     BTE_Destination_Window_Start_XY(XDes,YDes);
0034aa  4631              MOV      r1,r6
0034ac  4628              MOV      r0,r5
0034ae  f7fffffe          BL       BTE_Destination_Window_Start_XY
;;;6126     BTE_Window_Size(X_W,Y_H);
0034b2  4651              MOV      r1,r10
0034b4  4648              MOV      r0,r9
0034b6  f7fffffe          BL       BTE_Window_Size
;;;6127       
;;;6128     Foreground_color_65k(color);
0034ba  4640              MOV      r0,r8
0034bc  f7fffffe          BL       Foreground_color_65k
;;;6129     BTE_Operation_Code(0x0c);
0034c0  200c              MOVS     r0,#0xc
0034c2  f7fffffe          BL       BTE_Operation_Code
;;;6130     BTE_Enable();
0034c6  f7fffffe          BL       BTE_Enable
;;;6131     Check_BTE_Busy();     
0034ca  e8bd47f0          POP      {r4-r10,lr}
0034ce  f7ffbffe          B.W      Check_BTE_Busy
;;;6132   }
;;;6133   
                          ENDP

                  LT768_BTE_Memory_Copy PROC
;;;6134   /*  ˝áşĎąâŐ¤˛Ů×÷µÄBTEÄÚ´ć¸´ÖĆ */
;;;6135   void LT768_BTE_Memory_Copy
0034d2  e92d4ff0          PUSH     {r4-r11,lr}
;;;6136   (
;;;6137    unsigned long S0_Addr     // SOÍĽĎńµÄÄÚ´ćĆđĘĽµŘÖ·
;;;6138   ,unsigned short S0_W       // S0ÍĽĎńµÄżí¶Č
;;;6139   ,unsigned short XS0        // S0ÍĽĎńµÄ×óÉĎ·˝X×ř±ę
;;;6140   ,unsigned short YS0        // S0ÍĽĎńµÄ×óÉĎ·˝Y×ř±ę
;;;6141   ,unsigned long S1_Addr     // S1ÍĽĎńµÄÄÚ´ćĆđĘĽµŘÖ·
;;;6142   ,unsigned short S1_W       // S1ÍĽĎńµÄżí¶Č
;;;6143   ,unsigned short XS1        // S1ÍĽĎńµÄ×óÉĎ·˝X×ř±ę
;;;6144   ,unsigned short YS1        // S1ÍĽĎńµÄ×óÉĎ·˝Y×ř±ę
;;;6145   ,unsigned long Des_Addr    // ÄżµÄÍĽĎńµÄÄÚ´ćĆđĘĽµŘÖ·
;;;6146   ,unsigned short Des_W      // ÄżµÄÍĽĎńµÄżí¶Č
;;;6147   ,unsigned short XDes       // ÄżµÄÍĽĎńµÄ×óÉĎ·˝X×ř±ę
;;;6148   ,unsigned short YDes       // ÄżµÄÍĽĎńµÄ×óÉĎ·˝Y×ř±ę
;;;6149   ,unsigned int ROP_Code     // ąâŐ¤˛Ů×÷ÄŁĘ˝
;;;6150   /*ROP_Code :
;;;6151      0000b		0(Blackness)
;;;6152      0001b		~S0!E~S1 or ~(S0+S1)
;;;6153      0010b		~S0!ES1
;;;6154      0011b		~S0
;;;6155      0100b		S0!E~S1
;;;6156      0101b		~S1
;;;6157      0110b		S0^S1
;;;6158      0111b		~S0 + ~S1 or ~(S0 + S1)
;;;6159      1000b		S0!ES1
;;;6160      1001b		~(S0^S1)
;;;6161      1010b		S1
;;;6162      1011b		~S0+S1
;;;6163      1100b		S0
;;;6164      1101b		S0+~S1
;;;6165      1110b		S0+S1
;;;6166      1111b		1(whiteness)*/
;;;6167   ,unsigned short X_W       // »î¶Ż´°żÚµÄżí¶Č
;;;6168   ,unsigned short Y_H       // »î¶Ż´°żÚµÄł¤¶Č
;;;6169   )
;;;6170   {
0034d6  4607              MOV      r7,r0
0034d8  e9ddab0b          LDRD     r10,r11,[sp,#0x2c]
0034dc  e9dd8909          LDRD     r8,r9,[sp,#0x24]
0034e0  460c              MOV      r4,r1
0034e2  4615              MOV      r5,r2
0034e4  461e              MOV      r6,r3
;;;6171   	BTE_S0_Color_16bpp();
0034e6  f7fffffe          BL       BTE_S0_Color_16bpp
;;;6172   	BTE_S0_Memory_Start_Address(S0_Addr);
0034ea  4638              MOV      r0,r7
0034ec  f7fffffe          BL       BTE_S0_Memory_Start_Address
;;;6173     BTE_S0_Image_Width(S0_W);
0034f0  4620              MOV      r0,r4
0034f2  f7fffffe          BL       BTE_S0_Image_Width
;;;6174     BTE_S0_Window_Start_XY(XS0,YS0);
0034f6  4631              MOV      r1,r6
0034f8  4628              MOV      r0,r5
0034fa  f7fffffe          BL       BTE_S0_Window_Start_XY
;;;6175   
;;;6176   	BTE_S1_Color_16bpp();
0034fe  f7fffffe          BL       BTE_S1_Color_16bpp
;;;6177     BTE_S1_Memory_Start_Address(S1_Addr);
003502  4640              MOV      r0,r8
003504  f7fffffe          BL       BTE_S1_Memory_Start_Address
;;;6178     BTE_S1_Image_Width(S1_W); 
003508  4648              MOV      r0,r9
00350a  f7fffffe          BL       BTE_S1_Image_Width
;;;6179     BTE_S1_Window_Start_XY(XS1,YS1);
00350e  4659              MOV      r1,r11
003510  4650              MOV      r0,r10
003512  f7fffffe          BL       BTE_S1_Window_Start_XY
;;;6180   
;;;6181   	BTE_Destination_Color_16bpp();
003516  f7fffffe          BL       BTE_Destination_Color_16bpp
;;;6182     BTE_Destination_Memory_Start_Address(Des_Addr);
00351a  980d              LDR      r0,[sp,#0x34]
00351c  f7fffffe          BL       BTE_Destination_Memory_Start_Address
;;;6183     BTE_Destination_Image_Width(Des_W);
003520  980e              LDR      r0,[sp,#0x38]
003522  f7fffffe          BL       BTE_Destination_Image_Width
;;;6184     BTE_Destination_Window_Start_XY(XDes,YDes);	
003526  e9dd010f          LDRD     r0,r1,[sp,#0x3c]
00352a  f7fffffe          BL       BTE_Destination_Window_Start_XY
;;;6185      
;;;6186     BTE_ROP_Code(ROP_Code);	
00352e  9811              LDR      r0,[sp,#0x44]
003530  b2c0              UXTB     r0,r0
003532  f7fffffe          BL       BTE_ROP_Code
;;;6187     BTE_Operation_Code(0x02); //BTE Operation: Memory copy (move) with ROP.
003536  2002              MOVS     r0,#2
003538  f7fffffe          BL       BTE_Operation_Code
;;;6188     BTE_Window_Size(X_W,Y_H); 
00353c  e9dd0112          LDRD     r0,r1,[sp,#0x48]
003540  f7fffffe          BL       BTE_Window_Size
;;;6189     BTE_Enable();
003544  f7fffffe          BL       BTE_Enable
;;;6190     Check_BTE_Busy();
003548  e8bd4ff0          POP      {r4-r11,lr}
00354c  f7ffbffe          B.W      Check_BTE_Busy
;;;6191   }
;;;6192   
                          ENDP

                  LT768_BTE_Memory_Copy_Chroma_key PROC
;;;6194   /*  ˝áşĎ Chroma Key µÄÄÚ´ć¸´ÖĆŁ¨˛»ş¬ ROPŁ© */
;;;6195   void LT768_BTE_Memory_Copy_Chroma_key
003550  e92d4ff0          PUSH     {r4-r11,lr}
;;;6196   (
;;;6197    unsigned long S0_Addr             // SOÍĽĎńµÄÄÚ´ćĆđĘĽµŘÖ·
;;;6198   ,unsigned short S0_W               // S0ÍĽĎńµÄżí¶Č
;;;6199   ,unsigned short XS0                // S0ÍĽĎńµÄ×óÉĎ·˝X×ř±ę
;;;6200   ,unsigned short YS0                // S0ÍĽĎńµÄ×óÉĎ·˝Y×ř±ę
;;;6201   ,unsigned long Des_Addr            // ÄżµÄÍĽĎńµÄÄÚ´ćĆđĘĽµŘÖ·
;;;6202   ,unsigned short Des_W              // ÄżµÄÍĽĎńµÄżí¶Č
;;;6203   ,unsigned short XDes               // ÄżµÄÍĽĎńµÄ×óÉĎ·˝X×ř±ę
;;;6204   ,unsigned short YDes               // ÄżµÄÍĽĎńµÄ×óÉĎ·˝X×ř±ę
;;;6205   ,unsigned long Background_color    // Í¸Ă÷É«
;;;6206   ,unsigned short X_W                // »î¶Ż´°żÚµÄżí¶Č
;;;6207   ,unsigned short Y_H                // »î¶Ż´°żÚµÄł¤¶Č
;;;6208   )
;;;6209   {
003554  4607              MOV      r7,r0
003556  e9ddab0b          LDRD     r10,r11,[sp,#0x2c]
00355a  e9dd8909          LDRD     r8,r9,[sp,#0x24]
00355e  980d              LDR      r0,[sp,#0x34]
003560  460c              MOV      r4,r1
003562  4615              MOV      r5,r2
003564  461e              MOV      r6,r3
;;;6210   	Background_color_65k(Background_color); 
003566  b280              UXTH     r0,r0
003568  f7fffffe          BL       Background_color_65k
;;;6211   	
;;;6212   	BTE_S0_Color_16bpp();
00356c  f7fffffe          BL       BTE_S0_Color_16bpp
;;;6213     BTE_S0_Memory_Start_Address(S0_Addr);
003570  4638              MOV      r0,r7
003572  f7fffffe          BL       BTE_S0_Memory_Start_Address
;;;6214     BTE_S0_Image_Width(S0_W);
003576  4620              MOV      r0,r4
003578  f7fffffe          BL       BTE_S0_Image_Width
;;;6215     BTE_S0_Window_Start_XY(XS0,YS0);	
00357c  4631              MOV      r1,r6
00357e  4628              MOV      r0,r5
003580  f7fffffe          BL       BTE_S0_Window_Start_XY
;;;6216   
;;;6217   	BTE_Destination_Color_16bpp();
003584  f7fffffe          BL       BTE_Destination_Color_16bpp
;;;6218     BTE_Destination_Memory_Start_Address(Des_Addr);
003588  4640              MOV      r0,r8
00358a  f7fffffe          BL       BTE_Destination_Memory_Start_Address
;;;6219     BTE_Destination_Image_Width(Des_W);
00358e  4648              MOV      r0,r9
003590  f7fffffe          BL       BTE_Destination_Image_Width
;;;6220     BTE_Destination_Window_Start_XY(XDes,YDes);
003594  4659              MOV      r1,r11
003596  4650              MOV      r0,r10
003598  f7fffffe          BL       BTE_Destination_Window_Start_XY
;;;6221      
;;;6222     BTE_Operation_Code(0x05);	//BTE Operation: Memory copy (move) with chroma keying (w/o ROP)
00359c  2005              MOVS     r0,#5
00359e  f7fffffe          BL       BTE_Operation_Code
;;;6223     BTE_Window_Size(X_W,Y_H); 
0035a2  e9dd010e          LDRD     r0,r1,[sp,#0x38]
0035a6  f7fffffe          BL       BTE_Window_Size
;;;6224     BTE_Enable();
0035aa  f7fffffe          BL       BTE_Enable
;;;6225     Check_BTE_Busy();
0035ae  e8bd4ff0          POP      {r4-r11,lr}
0035b2  f7ffbffe          B.W      Check_BTE_Busy
;;;6226   }
;;;6227   
                          ENDP

                  LT768_BTE_Pattern_Fill PROC
;;;6228   
;;;6229   void LT768_BTE_Pattern_Fill
0035b6  e92d4ff0          PUSH     {r4-r11,lr}
;;;6230   (
;;;6231    unsigned char P_8x8_or_16x16      // 0 : use 8x8 Icon , 1 : use 16x16 Icon.
;;;6232   ,unsigned long S0_Addr             // SOÍĽĎńµÄÄÚ´ćĆđĘĽµŘÖ·
;;;6233   ,unsigned short S0_W               // S0ÍĽĎńµÄżí¶Č
;;;6234   ,unsigned short XS0                // S0ÍĽĎńµÄ×óÉĎ·˝X×ř±ę
;;;6235   ,unsigned short YS0                // S0ÍĽĎńµÄ×óÉĎ·˝Y×ř±ę
;;;6236   ,unsigned long Des_Addr            // ÄżµÄÍĽĎńµÄÄÚ´ćĆđĘĽµŘÖ·
;;;6237   ,unsigned short Des_W              // ÄżµÄÍĽĎńµÄżí¶Č
;;;6238   , unsigned short XDes              // ÄżµÄÍĽĎńµÄ×óÉĎ·˝X×ř±ę
;;;6239   ,unsigned short YDes               // ÄżµÄÍĽĎńµÄ×óÉĎ·˝X×ř±ę
;;;6240   ,unsigned int ROP_Code             // ąâŐ¤˛Ů×÷ÄŁĘ˝
;;;6241   /*ROP_Code :
;;;6242      0000b		0(Blackness)
;;;6243      0001b		~S0!E~S1 or ~(S0+S1)
;;;6244      0010b		~S0!ES1
;;;6245      0011b		~S0
;;;6246      0100b		S0!E~S1
;;;6247      0101b		~S1
;;;6248      0110b		S0^S1
;;;6249      0111b		~S0 + ~S1 or ~(S0 + S1)
;;;6250      1000b		S0!ES1
;;;6251      1001b		~(S0^S1)
;;;6252      1010b		S1
;;;6253      1011b		~S0+S1
;;;6254      1100b		S0
;;;6255      1101b		S0+~S1
;;;6256      1110b		S0+S1
;;;6257      1111b		1(whiteness)*/
;;;6258   ,unsigned short X_W                // »î¶Ż´°żÚµÄżí¶Č
;;;6259   ,unsigned short Y_H                // »î¶Ż´°żÚµÄł¤¶Č
;;;6260   )
;;;6261   {
0035ba  4604              MOV      r4,r0
0035bc  e9ddab0a          LDRD     r10,r11,[sp,#0x28]
0035c0  f8dd9024          LDR      r9,[sp,#0x24]
0035c4  9d0e              LDR      r5,[sp,#0x38]
0035c6  460e              MOV      r6,r1
0035c8  4617              MOV      r7,r2
0035ca  4698              MOV      r8,r3
;;;6262   	if(P_8x8_or_16x16 == 0)
0035cc  2c00              CMP      r4,#0
0035ce  d101              BNE      |L1.13780|
;;;6263     {
;;;6264   		Pattern_Format_8X8();
0035d0  f7fffffe          BL       Pattern_Format_8X8
                  |L1.13780|
;;;6265     }
;;;6266     if(P_8x8_or_16x16 == 1)
0035d4  2c01              CMP      r4,#1
0035d6  d101              BNE      |L1.13788|
;;;6267     {														    
;;;6268   		Pattern_Format_16X16();
0035d8  f7fffffe          BL       Pattern_Format_16X16
                  |L1.13788|
;;;6269     }	
;;;6270   	
;;;6271   	BTE_S0_Color_16bpp();
0035dc  f7fffffe          BL       BTE_S0_Color_16bpp
;;;6272     BTE_S0_Memory_Start_Address(S0_Addr);
0035e0  4630              MOV      r0,r6
0035e2  f7fffffe          BL       BTE_S0_Memory_Start_Address
;;;6273     BTE_S0_Image_Width(S0_W);
0035e6  4638              MOV      r0,r7
0035e8  f7fffffe          BL       BTE_S0_Image_Width
;;;6274     BTE_S0_Window_Start_XY(XS0,YS0);
0035ec  4649              MOV      r1,r9
0035ee  4640              MOV      r0,r8
0035f0  f7fffffe          BL       BTE_S0_Window_Start_XY
;;;6275   
;;;6276   	BTE_Destination_Color_16bpp();
0035f4  f7fffffe          BL       BTE_Destination_Color_16bpp
;;;6277     BTE_Destination_Memory_Start_Address(Des_Addr);
0035f8  4650              MOV      r0,r10
0035fa  f7fffffe          BL       BTE_Destination_Memory_Start_Address
;;;6278     BTE_Destination_Image_Width(Des_W);
0035fe  4658              MOV      r0,r11
003600  f7fffffe          BL       BTE_Destination_Image_Width
;;;6279     BTE_Destination_Window_Start_XY(XDes,YDes);	
003604  e9dd010c          LDRD     r0,r1,[sp,#0x30]
003608  f7fffffe          BL       BTE_Destination_Window_Start_XY
;;;6280      
;;;6281     BTE_ROP_Code(ROP_Code);	
00360c  b2e8              UXTB     r0,r5
00360e  f7fffffe          BL       BTE_ROP_Code
;;;6282     BTE_Operation_Code(0x06); //BTE Operation: Pattern Fill with ROP.
003612  2006              MOVS     r0,#6
003614  f7fffffe          BL       BTE_Operation_Code
;;;6283     BTE_Window_Size(X_W,Y_H); 
003618  e9dd010f          LDRD     r0,r1,[sp,#0x3c]
00361c  f7fffffe          BL       BTE_Window_Size
;;;6284     BTE_Enable();
003620  f7fffffe          BL       BTE_Enable
;;;6285     Check_BTE_Busy();
003624  e8bd4ff0          POP      {r4-r11,lr}
003628  f7ffbffe          B.W      Check_BTE_Busy
;;;6286   }
;;;6287   
                          ENDP

                  LT768_BTE_Pattern_Fill_With_Chroma_key PROC
;;;6289   
;;;6290   void LT768_BTE_Pattern_Fill_With_Chroma_key
00362c  e92d4ff0          PUSH     {r4-r11,lr}
;;;6291   (
;;;6292    unsigned char P_8x8_or_16x16      // 0 : use 8x8 Icon , 1 : use 16x16 Icon.
;;;6293   ,unsigned long S0_Addr             // SOÍĽĎńµÄÄÚ´ćĆđĘĽµŘÖ·
;;;6294   ,unsigned short S0_W               // S0ÍĽĎńµÄżí¶Č
;;;6295   ,unsigned short XS0                // S0ÍĽĎńµÄ×óÉĎ·˝X×ř±ę
;;;6296   ,unsigned short YS0                // S0ÍĽĎńµÄ×óÉĎ·˝Y×ř±ę
;;;6297   ,unsigned long Des_Addr            // ÄżµÄÍĽĎńµÄÄÚ´ćĆđĘĽµŘÖ·
;;;6298   ,unsigned short Des_W              // ÄżµÄÍĽĎńµÄżí¶Č
;;;6299   ,unsigned short XDes               // ÄżµÄÍĽĎńµÄ×óÉĎ·˝X×ř±ę
;;;6300   ,unsigned short YDes               // ÄżµÄÍĽĎńµÄ×óÉĎ·˝Y×ř±ę
;;;6301   ,unsigned int ROP_Code             // ąâŐ¤˛Ů×÷ÄŁĘ˝
;;;6302   /*ROP_Code :
;;;6303      0000b		0(Blackness)
;;;6304      0001b		~S0!E~S1 or ~(S0+S1)
;;;6305      0010b		~S0!ES1
;;;6306      0011b		~S0
;;;6307      0100b		S0!E~S1
;;;6308      0101b		~S1
;;;6309      0110b		S0^S1
;;;6310      0111b		~S0 + ~S1 or ~(S0 + S1)
;;;6311      1000b		S0!ES1
;;;6312      1001b		~(S0^S1)
;;;6313      1010b		S1
;;;6314      1011b		~S0+S1
;;;6315      1100b		S0
;;;6316      1101b		S0+~S1
;;;6317      1110b		S0+S1
;;;6318      1111b		1(whiteness)*/
;;;6319   ,unsigned long Background_color   // Í¸Ă÷É«
;;;6320   ,unsigned short X_W               // »î¶Ż´°żÚµÄżí¶Č
;;;6321   ,unsigned short Y_H               // »î¶Ż´°żÚµÄł¤¶Č
;;;6322   )
;;;6323   {
003630  4604              MOV      r4,r0
003632  e9ddab0a          LDRD     r10,r11,[sp,#0x28]
003636  e9dd500e          LDRD     r5,r0,[sp,#0x38]
00363a  f8dd9024          LDR      r9,[sp,#0x24]
00363e  460e              MOV      r6,r1
003640  4617              MOV      r7,r2
003642  4698              MOV      r8,r3
;;;6324   	Background_color_65k(Background_color);
003644  b280              UXTH     r0,r0
003646  f7fffffe          BL       Background_color_65k
;;;6325   	
;;;6326   	if(P_8x8_or_16x16 == 0)
00364a  b90c              CBNZ     r4,|L1.13904|
;;;6327     {
;;;6328     Pattern_Format_8X8();
00364c  f7fffffe          BL       Pattern_Format_8X8
                  |L1.13904|
;;;6329      }
;;;6330     if(P_8x8_or_16x16 == 1)
003650  2c01              CMP      r4,#1
003652  d101              BNE      |L1.13912|
;;;6331     {														    
;;;6332     Pattern_Format_16X16();
003654  f7fffffe          BL       Pattern_Format_16X16
                  |L1.13912|
;;;6333     }	  
;;;6334   	
;;;6335   	BTE_S0_Color_16bpp();
003658  f7fffffe          BL       BTE_S0_Color_16bpp
;;;6336     BTE_S0_Memory_Start_Address(S0_Addr);
00365c  4630              MOV      r0,r6
00365e  f7fffffe          BL       BTE_S0_Memory_Start_Address
;;;6337     BTE_S0_Image_Width(S0_W);
003662  4638              MOV      r0,r7
003664  f7fffffe          BL       BTE_S0_Image_Width
;;;6338     BTE_S0_Window_Start_XY(XS0,YS0);
003668  4649              MOV      r1,r9
00366a  4640              MOV      r0,r8
00366c  f7fffffe          BL       BTE_S0_Window_Start_XY
;;;6339   
;;;6340   	BTE_Destination_Color_16bpp();
003670  f7fffffe          BL       BTE_Destination_Color_16bpp
;;;6341     BTE_Destination_Memory_Start_Address(Des_Addr);
003674  4650              MOV      r0,r10
003676  f7fffffe          BL       BTE_Destination_Memory_Start_Address
;;;6342     BTE_Destination_Image_Width(Des_W);
00367a  4658              MOV      r0,r11
00367c  f7fffffe          BL       BTE_Destination_Image_Width
;;;6343     BTE_Destination_Window_Start_XY(XDes,YDes);	
003680  e9dd010c          LDRD     r0,r1,[sp,#0x30]
003684  f7fffffe          BL       BTE_Destination_Window_Start_XY
;;;6344      
;;;6345     BTE_ROP_Code(ROP_Code);	
003688  b2e8              UXTB     r0,r5
00368a  f7fffffe          BL       BTE_ROP_Code
;;;6346     BTE_Operation_Code(0x07); //BTE Operation: Pattern Fill with Chroma key.
00368e  2007              MOVS     r0,#7
003690  f7fffffe          BL       BTE_Operation_Code
;;;6347     BTE_Window_Size(X_W,Y_H); 
003694  e9dd0110          LDRD     r0,r1,[sp,#0x40]
003698  f7fffffe          BL       BTE_Window_Size
;;;6348     BTE_Enable();
00369c  f7fffffe          BL       BTE_Enable
;;;6349     Check_BTE_Busy();
0036a0  e8bd4ff0          POP      {r4-r11,lr}
0036a4  f7ffbffe          B.W      Check_BTE_Busy
;;;6350   }
;;;6351   
                          ENDP

                  LT768_BTE_MCU_Write_MCU_16bit PROC
;;;6352   void LT768_BTE_MCU_Write_MCU_16bit
0036a8  e92d4ff0          PUSH     {r4-r11,lr}
;;;6353   (
;;;6354    unsigned long S1_Addr              // S1ÍĽĎńµÄÄÚ´ćĆđĘĽµŘÖ·
;;;6355   ,unsigned short S1_W                // S1ÍĽĎńµÄżí¶Č
;;;6356   ,unsigned short XS1                 // S1ÍĽĎńµÄ×óÉĎ·˝X×ř±ę
;;;6357   ,unsigned short YS1                 // S1ÍĽĎńµÄ×óÉĎ·˝Y×ř±ę
;;;6358   ,unsigned long Des_Addr             // ÄżµÄÍĽĎńµÄÄÚ´ćĆđĘĽµŘÖ·
;;;6359   ,unsigned short Des_W               // ÄżµÄÍĽĎńµÄżí¶Č
;;;6360   ,unsigned short XDes                // ÄżµÄÍĽĎńµÄ×óÉĎ·˝X×ř±ę
;;;6361   ,unsigned short YDes                // ÄżµÄÍĽĎńµÄ×óÉĎ·˝Y×ř±ę
;;;6362   ,unsigned int ROP_Code              // ąâŐ¤˛Ů×÷ÄŁĘ˝ 
;;;6363   /*ROP_Code :
;;;6364      0000b		0(Blackness)
;;;6365      0001b		~S0!E~S1 or ~(S0+S1)
;;;6366      0010b		~S0!ES1
;;;6367      0011b		~S0
;;;6368      0100b		S0!E~S1
;;;6369      0101b		~S1
;;;6370      0110b		S0^S1
;;;6371      0111b		~S0 + ~S1 or ~(S0 + S1)
;;;6372      1000b		S0!ES1
;;;6373      1001b		~(S0^S1)
;;;6374      1010b		S1
;;;6375      1011b		~S0+S1
;;;6376      1100b		S0
;;;6377      1101b		S0+~S1
;;;6378      1110b		S0+S1
;;;6379      1111b		1(whiteness)*/
;;;6380   ,unsigned short X_W                 // »î¶Ż´°żÚµÄżí¶Č
;;;6381   ,unsigned short Y_H                 // »î¶Ż´°żÚµÄł¤¶Č
;;;6382   ,const unsigned short *data         // S0µÄĘýľÝĘŐµŘÖ·
;;;6383   )
;;;6384   {
0036ac  4682              MOV      r10,r0
0036ae  e9dd560e          LDRD     r5,r6,[sp,#0x38]
0036b2  460f              MOV      r7,r1
0036b4  4690              MOV      r8,r2
0036b6  4699              MOV      r9,r3
0036b8  f8ddb024          LDR      r11,[sp,#0x24]
0036bc  9c10              LDR      r4,[sp,#0x40]
;;;6385   	unsigned short i,j;
;;;6386   
;;;6387   	BTE_S1_Color_16bpp();
0036be  f7fffffe          BL       BTE_S1_Color_16bpp
;;;6388     BTE_S1_Memory_Start_Address(S1_Addr);
0036c2  4650              MOV      r0,r10
0036c4  f7fffffe          BL       BTE_S1_Memory_Start_Address
;;;6389     BTE_S1_Image_Width(S1_W); 
0036c8  4638              MOV      r0,r7
0036ca  f7fffffe          BL       BTE_S1_Image_Width
;;;6390     BTE_S1_Window_Start_XY(XS1,YS1);
0036ce  4649              MOV      r1,r9
0036d0  4640              MOV      r0,r8
0036d2  f7fffffe          BL       BTE_S1_Window_Start_XY
;;;6391   
;;;6392   	BTE_Destination_Color_16bpp();
0036d6  f7fffffe          BL       BTE_Destination_Color_16bpp
;;;6393     BTE_Destination_Memory_Start_Address(Des_Addr);
0036da  4658              MOV      r0,r11
0036dc  f7fffffe          BL       BTE_Destination_Memory_Start_Address
;;;6394     BTE_Destination_Image_Width(Des_W);
0036e0  980a              LDR      r0,[sp,#0x28]
0036e2  f7fffffe          BL       BTE_Destination_Image_Width
;;;6395     BTE_Destination_Window_Start_XY(XDes,YDes);
0036e6  e9dd010b          LDRD     r0,r1,[sp,#0x2c]
0036ea  f7fffffe          BL       BTE_Destination_Window_Start_XY
;;;6396     
;;;6397     BTE_Window_Size(X_W,Y_H);
0036ee  4631              MOV      r1,r6
0036f0  4628              MOV      r0,r5
0036f2  f7fffffe          BL       BTE_Window_Size
;;;6398     BTE_ROP_Code(ROP_Code);
0036f6  980d              LDR      r0,[sp,#0x34]
0036f8  b2c0              UXTB     r0,r0
0036fa  f7fffffe          BL       BTE_ROP_Code
;;;6399     BTE_Operation_Code(0x00);		//BTE Operation: MPU Write with ROP.
0036fe  2000              MOVS     r0,#0
003700  f7fffffe          BL       BTE_Operation_Code
;;;6400     BTE_Enable();
003704  f7fffffe          BL       BTE_Enable
;;;6401   	
;;;6402   	BTE_S0_Color_16bpp();
003708  f7fffffe          BL       BTE_S0_Color_16bpp
;;;6403   	LCD_CmdWrite(0x04);				 		//Memory Data Read/Write Port
00370c  2004              MOVS     r0,#4
00370e  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_CmdWrite
;;;6404   	
;;;6405   	//MCU_16bit_ColorDepth_16bpp
;;;6406   	for(i=0;i< Y_H;i++)
003712  2300              MOVS     r3,#0
003714  e00d              B        |L1.14130|
                  |L1.14102|
;;;6407   	{	
;;;6408   		for(j=0;j< (X_W);j++)
003716  2200              MOVS     r2,#0
003718  e007              B        |L1.14122|
                  |L1.14106|
;;;6409    	  {
;;;6410   			Check_Mem_WR_FIFO_not_Full();
00371a  f7fffffe          BL       Check_Mem_WR_FIFO_not_Full
;;;6411   			LCD_DataWrite_Pixel((*data));
00371e  8820              LDRH     r0,[r4,#0]
003720  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_DataWrite_Pixel
;;;6412   			data++;
003724  1ca4              ADDS     r4,r4,#2
003726  1c52              ADDS     r2,r2,#1              ;6408
003728  b292              UXTH     r2,r2                 ;6408
                  |L1.14122|
00372a  42aa              CMP      r2,r5                 ;6408
00372c  d3f5              BCC      |L1.14106|
00372e  1c5b              ADDS     r3,r3,#1              ;6406
003730  b29b              UXTH     r3,r3                 ;6406
                  |L1.14130|
003732  42b3              CMP      r3,r6                 ;6406
003734  d3ef              BCC      |L1.14102|
;;;6413   	  }
;;;6414     }
;;;6415     Check_Mem_WR_FIFO_Empty();
003736  f7fffffe          BL       Check_Mem_WR_FIFO_Empty
;;;6416   	Check_BTE_Busy();
00373a  e8bd4ff0          POP      {r4-r11,lr}
00373e  f7ffbffe          B.W      Check_BTE_Busy
;;;6417   }
;;;6418   
                          ENDP

                  LT768_BTE_MCU_Write_Chroma_key_MCU_16bit PROC
;;;6420   
;;;6421   void LT768_BTE_MCU_Write_Chroma_key_MCU_16bit
003742  e92d47f0          PUSH     {r4-r10,lr}
;;;6422   (
;;;6423    unsigned long Des_Addr                 // ÄżµÄÍĽĎńµÄÄÚ´ćĆđĘĽµŘÖ·
;;;6424   ,unsigned short Des_W                   // ÄżµÄÍĽĎńµÄżí¶Č
;;;6425   ,unsigned short XDes                    // ÄżµÄÍĽĎńµÄ×óÉĎ·˝X×ř±ę
;;;6426   ,unsigned short YDes                    // ÄżµÄÍĽĎńµÄ×óÉĎ·˝Y×ř±ę
;;;6427   ,unsigned long Background_color         // Í¸Ă÷É«
;;;6428   ,unsigned short X_W                     // »î¶Ż´°żÚµÄżí¶Č
;;;6429   ,unsigned short Y_H                     // »î¶Ż´°żÚµÄł¤¶Č
;;;6430   ,const unsigned short *data             // S0µÄĘýľÝĘŐµŘÖ·
;;;6431   )
;;;6432   {
003746  4682              MOV      r10,r0
003748  a808              ADD      r0,sp,#0x20
00374a  9c0b              LDR      r4,[sp,#0x2c]
00374c  c861              LDM      r0,{r0,r5,r6}
00374e  460f              MOV      r7,r1
003750  4690              MOV      r8,r2
003752  4699              MOV      r9,r3
;;;6433   	unsigned int i,j;
;;;6434   	
;;;6435   	Background_color_65k(Background_color);
003754  b280              UXTH     r0,r0
003756  f7fffffe          BL       Background_color_65k
;;;6436   	
;;;6437   	BTE_Destination_Color_16bpp();
00375a  f7fffffe          BL       BTE_Destination_Color_16bpp
;;;6438   	BTE_Destination_Memory_Start_Address(Des_Addr);
00375e  4650              MOV      r0,r10
003760  f7fffffe          BL       BTE_Destination_Memory_Start_Address
;;;6439     BTE_Destination_Image_Width(Des_W);
003764  4638              MOV      r0,r7
003766  f7fffffe          BL       BTE_Destination_Image_Width
;;;6440     BTE_Destination_Window_Start_XY(XDes,YDes);
00376a  4649              MOV      r1,r9
00376c  4640              MOV      r0,r8
00376e  f7fffffe          BL       BTE_Destination_Window_Start_XY
;;;6441     
;;;6442     BTE_Window_Size(X_W,Y_H);
003772  4631              MOV      r1,r6
003774  4628              MOV      r0,r5
003776  f7fffffe          BL       BTE_Window_Size
;;;6443     BTE_Operation_Code(0x04);		//BTE Operation: MPU Write with chroma keying (w/o ROP)
00377a  2004              MOVS     r0,#4
00377c  f7fffffe          BL       BTE_Operation_Code
;;;6444     BTE_Enable();
003780  f7fffffe          BL       BTE_Enable
;;;6445   	
;;;6446   	BTE_S0_Color_16bpp();
003784  f7fffffe          BL       BTE_S0_Color_16bpp
;;;6447     LCD_CmdWrite(0x04);			//Memory Data Read/Write Port
003788  2004              MOVS     r0,#4
00378a  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_CmdWrite
;;;6448   	
;;;6449   	//MCU_16bit_ColorDepth_16bpp
;;;6450   	for(i=0;i< Y_H;i++)
00378e  2300              MOVS     r3,#0
003790  e00b              B        |L1.14250|
                  |L1.14226|
;;;6451   	{	
;;;6452   		for(j=0;j< (X_W);j++)
003792  2200              MOVS     r2,#0
003794  e006              B        |L1.14244|
                  |L1.14230|
;;;6453    	  {
;;;6454   			Check_Mem_WR_FIFO_not_Full();
003796  f7fffffe          BL       Check_Mem_WR_FIFO_not_Full
;;;6455   			LCD_DataWrite_Pixel((*data));
00379a  8820              LDRH     r0,[r4,#0]
00379c  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_DataWrite_Pixel
;;;6456   			data++;
0037a0  1ca4              ADDS     r4,r4,#2
0037a2  1c52              ADDS     r2,r2,#1              ;6452
                  |L1.14244|
0037a4  42aa              CMP      r2,r5                 ;6452
0037a6  d3f6              BCC      |L1.14230|
0037a8  1c5b              ADDS     r3,r3,#1              ;6450
                  |L1.14250|
0037aa  42b3              CMP      r3,r6                 ;6450
0037ac  d3f1              BCC      |L1.14226|
;;;6457   	  }
;;;6458     }
;;;6459     Check_Mem_WR_FIFO_Empty();
0037ae  f7fffffe          BL       Check_Mem_WR_FIFO_Empty
;;;6460   	Check_BTE_Busy();
0037b2  e8bd47f0          POP      {r4-r10,lr}
0037b6  f7ffbffe          B.W      Check_BTE_Busy
;;;6461   }
;;;6462   
                          ENDP

                  LT768_BTE_MCU_Write_ColorExpansion_MCU_16bit PROC
;;;6465   /* ˝áşĎŔ©ŐąÉ«˛ĘµÄ MPU Ś‘Čë */
;;;6466   void LT768_BTE_MCU_Write_ColorExpansion_MCU_16bit
0037ba  e92d47f0          PUSH     {r4-r10,lr}
;;;6467   (
;;;6468    unsigned long Des_Addr               //start address of Destination
;;;6469   ,unsigned short Des_W                 //image width of Destination (recommend = canvas image width)
;;;6470   ,unsigned short XDes                  //coordinate X of Destination
;;;6471   ,unsigned short YDes                  //coordinate Y of Destination
;;;6472   ,unsigned short X_W                   //Width of BTE Window
;;;6473   ,unsigned short Y_H                   //Length of BTE Window
;;;6474   ,unsigned long Foreground_color 
;;;6475   /*Foreground_color : The source (1bit map picture) map data 1 translate to Foreground color by color expansion*/
;;;6476   ,unsigned long Background_color 
;;;6477   /*Background_color : The source (1bit map picture) map data 0 translate to Background color by color expansion*/
;;;6478   ,const unsigned short *data           //16-bit data
;;;6479   )
;;;6480   {
0037be  4690              MOV      r8,r2
0037c0  aa0a              ADD      r2,sp,#0x28
0037c2  4699              MOV      r9,r3
0037c4  e9dd5608          LDRD     r5,r6,[sp,#0x20]
0037c8  ca1c              LDM      r2,{r2-r4}
0037ca  4682              MOV      r10,r0
0037cc  460f              MOV      r7,r1
;;;6481   	unsigned short i,j;
;;;6482   	
;;;6483   	RGB_16b_16bpp();
0037ce  f7fffffe          BL       RGB_16b_16bpp
;;;6484     Foreground_color_65k(Foreground_color);
0037d2  b290              UXTH     r0,r2
0037d4  f7fffffe          BL       Foreground_color_65k
;;;6485     Background_color_65k(Background_color);
0037d8  b298              UXTH     r0,r3
0037da  f7fffffe          BL       Background_color_65k
;;;6486   	BTE_ROP_Code(15);
0037de  200f              MOVS     r0,#0xf
0037e0  f7fffffe          BL       BTE_ROP_Code
;;;6487   	
;;;6488   	BTE_Destination_Color_16bpp();
0037e4  f7fffffe          BL       BTE_Destination_Color_16bpp
;;;6489   	BTE_Destination_Memory_Start_Address(Des_Addr);
0037e8  4650              MOV      r0,r10
0037ea  f7fffffe          BL       BTE_Destination_Memory_Start_Address
;;;6490     BTE_Destination_Image_Width(Des_W);
0037ee  4638              MOV      r0,r7
0037f0  f7fffffe          BL       BTE_Destination_Image_Width
;;;6491     BTE_Destination_Window_Start_XY(XDes,YDes);
0037f4  4649              MOV      r1,r9
0037f6  4640              MOV      r0,r8
0037f8  f7fffffe          BL       BTE_Destination_Window_Start_XY
;;;6492   	
;;;6493   
;;;6494     BTE_Window_Size(X_W,Y_H);
0037fc  4631              MOV      r1,r6
0037fe  4628              MOV      r0,r5
003800  f7fffffe          BL       BTE_Window_Size
;;;6495     BTE_Operation_Code(0x8);		//BTE Operation: MPU Write with Color Expansion (w/o ROP)
003804  2008              MOVS     r0,#8
003806  f7fffffe          BL       BTE_Operation_Code
;;;6496     BTE_Enable();
00380a  f7fffffe          BL       BTE_Enable
;;;6497   	
;;;6498   	LCD_CmdWrite(0x04);				 		//Memory Data Read/Write Port  
00380e  2004              MOVS     r0,#4
003810  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_CmdWrite
;;;6499   	for(i=0;i< Y_H;i++)
003814  2300              MOVS     r3,#0
003816  e00e              B        |L1.14390|
                  |L1.14360|
;;;6500     {	
;;;6501   	  for(j=0;j< X_W/16;j++)
003818  2200              MOVS     r2,#0
00381a  e007              B        |L1.14380|
                  |L1.14364|
;;;6502    	  {
;;;6503   	    Check_Mem_WR_FIFO_not_Full();
00381c  f7fffffe          BL       Check_Mem_WR_FIFO_not_Full
;;;6504   		  LCD_DataWrite_Pixel(*data);  
003820  8820              LDRH     r0,[r4,#0]
003822  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_DataWrite_Pixel
;;;6505   	    data++;
003826  1ca4              ADDS     r4,r4,#2
003828  1c52              ADDS     r2,r2,#1              ;6501
00382a  b292              UXTH     r2,r2                 ;6501
                  |L1.14380|
00382c  ebb21f15          CMP      r2,r5,LSR #4          ;6501
003830  d3f4              BCC      |L1.14364|
003832  1c5b              ADDS     r3,r3,#1              ;6499
003834  b29b              UXTH     r3,r3                 ;6499
                  |L1.14390|
003836  42b3              CMP      r3,r6                 ;6499
003838  d3ee              BCC      |L1.14360|
;;;6506   	  }
;;;6507     }
;;;6508     Check_Mem_WR_FIFO_Empty();
00383a  f7fffffe          BL       Check_Mem_WR_FIFO_Empty
;;;6509   	Check_BTE_Busy();
00383e  e8bd47f0          POP      {r4-r10,lr}
003842  f7ffbffe          B.W      Check_BTE_Busy
;;;6510   }
;;;6511   
                          ENDP

                  LT768_BTE_MCU_Write_ColorExpansion_Chroma_key_MCU_16bit PROC
;;;6514   /* ˝áşĎŔ©ŐąÉ«˛ĘÓë Chroma key µÄ MPU Ś‘Čë */
;;;6515   void LT768_BTE_MCU_Write_ColorExpansion_Chroma_key_MCU_16bit
003846  e92d47f0          PUSH     {r4-r10,lr}
;;;6516   (
;;;6517    unsigned long Des_Addr //start address of Destination
;;;6518   ,unsigned short Des_W //image width of Destination (recommend = canvas image width)
;;;6519   ,unsigned short XDes //coordinate X of Destination
;;;6520   ,unsigned short YDes //coordinate Y of Destination
;;;6521   ,unsigned short X_W //Width of BTE Window
;;;6522   ,unsigned short Y_H //Length of BTE Window
;;;6523   ,unsigned long Foreground_color
;;;6524   /*Foreground_color : The source (1bit map picture) map data 1 translate to Foreground color by color expansion*/
;;;6525   ,const unsigned short *data //16-bit data
;;;6526   )
;;;6527   {
00384a  4690              MOV      r8,r2
00384c  e9dd5608          LDRD     r5,r6,[sp,#0x20]
003850  e9dd240a          LDRD     r2,r4,[sp,#0x28]
003854  4682              MOV      r10,r0
003856  460f              MOV      r7,r1
003858  4699              MOV      r9,r3
;;;6528   	unsigned short i,j;
;;;6529   	
;;;6530   	RGB_16b_16bpp();
00385a  f7fffffe          BL       RGB_16b_16bpp
;;;6531     Foreground_color_65k(Foreground_color);
00385e  b290              UXTH     r0,r2
003860  f7fffffe          BL       Foreground_color_65k
;;;6532   	BTE_ROP_Code(15);
003864  200f              MOVS     r0,#0xf
003866  f7fffffe          BL       BTE_ROP_Code
;;;6533   	
;;;6534   	BTE_Destination_Color_16bpp();
00386a  f7fffffe          BL       BTE_Destination_Color_16bpp
;;;6535   	BTE_Destination_Memory_Start_Address(Des_Addr);
00386e  4650              MOV      r0,r10
003870  f7fffffe          BL       BTE_Destination_Memory_Start_Address
;;;6536     BTE_Destination_Image_Width(Des_W);
003874  4638              MOV      r0,r7
003876  f7fffffe          BL       BTE_Destination_Image_Width
;;;6537     BTE_Destination_Window_Start_XY(XDes,YDes);
00387a  4649              MOV      r1,r9
00387c  4640              MOV      r0,r8
00387e  f7fffffe          BL       BTE_Destination_Window_Start_XY
;;;6538   	
;;;6539   
;;;6540     BTE_Window_Size(X_W,Y_H);
003882  4631              MOV      r1,r6
003884  4628              MOV      r0,r5
003886  f7fffffe          BL       BTE_Window_Size
;;;6541   	BTE_Operation_Code(0x9);		//BTE Operation: MPU Write with Color Expansion and chroma keying (w/o ROP)
00388a  2009              MOVS     r0,#9
00388c  f7fffffe          BL       BTE_Operation_Code
;;;6542     BTE_Enable();
003890  f7fffffe          BL       BTE_Enable
;;;6543   	
;;;6544   	LCD_CmdWrite(0x04);				 		//Memory Data Read/Write Port  
003894  2004              MOVS     r0,#4
003896  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_CmdWrite
;;;6545   	for(i=0;i< Y_H;i++)
00389a  2300              MOVS     r3,#0
00389c  e00e              B        |L1.14524|
                  |L1.14494|
;;;6546     {	
;;;6547   	  for(j=0;j< X_W/16;j++)
00389e  2200              MOVS     r2,#0
0038a0  e007              B        |L1.14514|
                  |L1.14498|
;;;6548    	  {
;;;6549   	    Check_Mem_WR_FIFO_not_Full();
0038a2  f7fffffe          BL       Check_Mem_WR_FIFO_not_Full
;;;6550   		  LCD_DataWrite_Pixel(*data);  
0038a6  8820              LDRH     r0,[r4,#0]
0038a8  f7fffffe          BL       LCD_DataWrite_Pixel
;;;6551   	    data++;
0038ac  1ca4              ADDS     r4,r4,#2
0038ae  1c52              ADDS     r2,r2,#1              ;6547
0038b0  b292              UXTH     r2,r2                 ;6547
                  |L1.14514|
0038b2  ebb21f15          CMP      r2,r5,LSR #4          ;6547
0038b6  d3f4              BCC      |L1.14498|
0038b8  1c5b              ADDS     r3,r3,#1              ;6545
0038ba  b29b              UXTH     r3,r3                 ;6545
                  |L1.14524|
0038bc  42b3              CMP      r3,r6                 ;6545
0038be  d3ee              BCC      |L1.14494|
;;;6552   	  }
;;;6553     }
;;;6554     Check_Mem_WR_FIFO_Empty();
0038c0  f7fffffe          BL       Check_Mem_WR_FIFO_Empty
;;;6555   	Check_BTE_Busy();
0038c4  e8bd47f0          POP      {r4-r10,lr}
0038c8  f7ffbffe          B.W      Check_BTE_Busy
;;;6556   }
;;;6557   
                          ENDP

                  BTE_Alpha_Blending PROC
;;;6574   */
;;;6575   void BTE_Alpha_Blending
0038cc  e92d4ff0          PUSH     {r4-r11,lr}
;;;6576   (
;;;6577    unsigned long S0_Addr
;;;6578    ,unsigned short S0_W
;;;6579    ,unsigned short XS0
;;;6580    ,unsigned short YS0
;;;6581    ,unsigned long S1_Addr
;;;6582    ,unsigned short S1_W
;;;6583    ,unsigned short XS1
;;;6584    ,unsigned short YS1
;;;6585    ,unsigned long Des_Addr
;;;6586    ,unsigned short Des_W
;;;6587    ,unsigned short XDes
;;;6588    ,unsigned short YDes
;;;6589    ,unsigned short X_W
;;;6590    ,unsigned short Y_H
;;;6591    ,unsigned char alpha
;;;6592   )
;;;6593   {	
0038d0  4607              MOV      r7,r0
0038d2  e9ddab0b          LDRD     r10,r11,[sp,#0x2c]
0038d6  e9dd8909          LDRD     r8,r9,[sp,#0x24]
0038da  460c              MOV      r4,r1
0038dc  4615              MOV      r5,r2
0038de  461e              MOV      r6,r3
;;;6594   	BTE_S0_Color_16bpp();
0038e0  f7fffffe          BL       BTE_S0_Color_16bpp
;;;6595     BTE_S0_Memory_Start_Address(S0_Addr);
0038e4  4638              MOV      r0,r7
0038e6  f7fffffe          BL       BTE_S0_Memory_Start_Address
;;;6596     BTE_S0_Image_Width(S0_W);
0038ea  4620              MOV      r0,r4
0038ec  f7fffffe          BL       BTE_S0_Image_Width
;;;6597     BTE_S0_Window_Start_XY(XS0,YS0);
0038f0  4631              MOV      r1,r6
0038f2  4628              MOV      r0,r5
0038f4  f7fffffe          BL       BTE_S0_Window_Start_XY
;;;6598   
;;;6599   	BTE_S1_Color_16bpp();
0038f8  f7fffffe          BL       BTE_S1_Color_16bpp
;;;6600     BTE_S1_Memory_Start_Address(S1_Addr);
0038fc  4640              MOV      r0,r8
0038fe  f7fffffe          BL       BTE_S1_Memory_Start_Address
;;;6601     BTE_S1_Image_Width(S1_W); 
003902  4648              MOV      r0,r9
003904  f7fffffe          BL       BTE_S1_Image_Width
;;;6602     BTE_S1_Window_Start_XY(XS1,YS1);
003908  4659              MOV      r1,r11
00390a  4650              MOV      r0,r10
00390c  f7fffffe          BL       BTE_S1_Window_Start_XY
;;;6603   
;;;6604   	BTE_Destination_Color_16bpp();
003910  f7fffffe          BL       BTE_Destination_Color_16bpp
;;;6605     BTE_Destination_Memory_Start_Address(Des_Addr);
003914  980d              LDR      r0,[sp,#0x34]
003916  f7fffffe          BL       BTE_Destination_Memory_Start_Address
;;;6606     BTE_Destination_Image_Width(Des_W);
00391a  980e              LDR      r0,[sp,#0x38]
00391c  f7fffffe          BL       BTE_Destination_Image_Width
;;;6607     BTE_Destination_Window_Start_XY(XDes,YDes);
003920  e9dd010f          LDRD     r0,r1,[sp,#0x3c]
003924  f7fffffe          BL       BTE_Destination_Window_Start_XY
;;;6608   
;;;6609     BTE_Window_Size(X_W,Y_H);
003928  e9dd0111          LDRD     r0,r1,[sp,#0x44]
00392c  f7fffffe          BL       BTE_Window_Size
;;;6610     BTE_Operation_Code(0x0A);		//BTE Operation: Memory write with opacity (w/o ROP)
003930  200a              MOVS     r0,#0xa
003932  f7fffffe          BL       BTE_Operation_Code
;;;6611     BTE_Alpha_Blending_Effect(alpha);
003936  9813              LDR      r0,[sp,#0x4c]
003938  f7fffffe          BL       BTE_Alpha_Blending_Effect
;;;6612     BTE_Enable();
00393c  f7fffffe          BL       BTE_Enable
;;;6613     Check_BTE_Busy();
003940  e8bd4ff0          POP      {r4-r11,lr}
003944  f7ffbffe          B.W      Check_BTE_Busy
;;;6614   }
;;;6615   const int xs=20;
                          ENDP

                  Show PROC
;;;6623   
;;;6624   void Show(void)
003948  e92d4ffe          PUSH     {r1-r11,lr}
;;;6625   {
;;;6626   	uint16_t i,j;
;;;6627   	uint16_t yn;	
;;;6628     
;;;6629   	Select_Main_Window_16bpp();

;;;6634   	Active_Window_WH(LCD_XSIZE_TFT,LCD_YSIZE_TFT);

00396c  f44f6080          MOV      r0,#0x400
